authors_text: Xiang Zhang,Lei Yu
title: Unifying Motion Deblurring and Frame Interpolation with Events
title_zh: 将运动去模糊和帧插值与事件相结合
abstract: Slow shutter speed and long exposure time of frame-based cameras often cause visual blur and loss of inter-frame information, degenerating the overall quality of captured videos. To this end, we present a unified framework of event-based motion deblurring and frame interpolation for blurry video enhancement, where the extremely low latency of events is leveraged to alleviate motion blur and facilitate intermediate frame prediction. Specifically, the mapping relation between blurry frames and sharp latent images is first predicted by a learnable double integral network, and a fusion network is then proposed to refine the coarse results via utilizing the information from consecutive blurry inputs and the concurrent events. By exploring the mutual constraints among blurry frames, latent images, and event streams, we further propose a self-supervised learning framework to enable network training with real-world blurry videos and events. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method compares favorably against the state-of-the-art approaches and achieves remarkable performance on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
summary: Slow shutter speed and long exposure time of frame-based cameras often cause visual blur and loss of inter-frame information, degenerating the overall quality of captured videos. To this end, we present a unified framework of event-based motion deblurring and frame interpolation for blurry video enhancement, where the extremely low latency of events is leveraged to alleviate motion blur and facilitate intermediate frame prediction. Specifically, the mapping relation between blurry frames and sharp latent images is first predicted by a learnable double integral network, and a fusion network is then proposed to refine the coarse results via utilizing the information from consecutive blurry inputs and the concurrent events. By exploring the mutual constraints among blurry frames, latent images, and event streams, we further propose a self-supervised learning framework to enable network training with real-world blurry videos and events. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method compares favorably against the state-of-the-art approaches and achieves remarkable performance on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 基于帧的相机的慢快门速度和长曝光时间通常会导致视觉模糊和帧间信息丢失，从而降低捕获视频的整体质量。为此，我们提出了一个用于模糊视频增强的基于事件的运动去模糊和帧插值的统一框架，其中利用事件的极低延迟来减轻运动模糊并促进中间帧预测。具体来说，首先通过可学习的双积分网络来预测模糊帧和清晰潜像之间的映射关系，然后提出融合网络，通过利用连续模糊输入和并发事件的信息来细化粗略结果。通过探索模糊帧、潜在图像和事件流之间的相互约束，我们进一步提出了一种自监督学习框架，以利用现实世界的模糊视频和事件进行网络训练。大量的实验表明，我们的方法与最先进的方法相比具有优势，并且在合成数据集和现实数据集上都取得了显着的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件数据的统一框架，用于同时解决运动模糊消除和帧插值问题，以提升视频质量。
AI.motivation: 传统相机因慢快门和长曝光导致视频模糊及帧间信息丢失，现有方法难以有效处理此类问题。
AI.method: 设计可学习的双重积分网络预测模糊帧与清晰图像映射关系，并通过融合网络结合连续模糊帧与事件信息优化结果，提出自监督学习框架实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均优于现有方法，显著提升去模糊与帧插值效果。
AI.conclusion: 事件数据与自监督框架有效结合，为模糊视频增强提供了新思路，验证了方法的普适性与有效性。

authors_text: Hsin-Ping Huang,Deqing Sun,Yaojie Liu,Wen-Sheng Chu,Taihong Xiao,Jinwei Yuan,Hartwig Adam,Ming-Hsuan Yang
title: Adaptive Transformers for Robust Few-shot Cross-domain Face Anti-spoofing
title_zh: 用于鲁棒少样本跨域人脸反欺骗的自适应变压器
abstract: While recent face anti-spoofing methods perform well under the intra-domain setups, an effective approach needs to account for much larger appearance variations of images acquired in complex scenes with different sensors for robust performance. In this paper, we present adaptive vision transformers (ViT) for robust cross-domain face antispoofing. Specifically, we adopt ViT as a backbone to exploit its strength to account for long-range dependencies among pixels. We further introduce the ensemble adapters module and feature-wise transformation layers in the ViT to adapt to different domains for robust performance with a few samples. Experiments on several benchmark datasets show that the proposed models achieve both robust and competitive performance against the state-of-the-art methods for cross-domain face anti-spoofing using a few samples.
summary: While recent face anti-spoofing methods perform well under the intra-domain setups, an effective approach needs to account for much larger appearance variations of images acquired in complex scenes with different sensors for robust performance. In this paper, we present adaptive vision transformers (ViT) for robust cross-domain face antispoofing. Specifically, we adopt ViT as a backbone to exploit its strength to account for long-range dependencies among pixels. We further introduce the ensemble adapters module and feature-wise transformation layers in the ViT to adapt to different domains for robust performance with a few samples. Experiments on several benchmark datasets show that the proposed models achieve both robust and competitive performance against the state-of-the-art methods for cross-domain face anti-spoofing using a few samples.
abstract_zh: 虽然最近的面部反欺骗方法在域内设置下表现良好，但有效的方法需要考虑使用不同传感器在复杂场景中获取的图像的更大外观变化，以实现稳健的性能。在本文中，我们提出了用于稳健的跨域人脸反欺骗的自适应视觉变换器（ViT）。具体来说，我们采用 ViT 作为骨干，利用其优势来解决像素之间的远程依赖性。我们进一步引入了 ViT 中的集成适配器模块和特征转换层，以适应不同的领域，从而通过少量样本获得稳健的性能。对多个基准数据集的实验表明，与使用少量样本进行跨域人脸反欺骗的最先进方法相比，所提出的模型实现了鲁棒性和竞争性的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应视觉Transformer方法，用于在跨域场景下实现少量样本的鲁棒人脸反欺骗检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨域场景中因传感器差异和复杂环境导致的外观变化，难以保持稳定的反欺骗性能。
AI.method: 采用视觉Transformer（ViT）作为主干网络，并引入集成适配器模块和逐特征变换层，以适应不同域的少量样本。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，所提模型在跨域少量样本场景下达到与现有方法竞争的鲁棒性能。
AI.conclusion: 自适应Transformer结构能有效应对跨域外观变化，在少量样本条件下实现可靠的人脸反欺骗检测。

authors_text: Wondimu Dikubab,Dingkang Liang,Minghui Liao,Xiang Bai
title: Comprehensive Benchmark Datasets for Amharic Scene Text Detection and Recognition
title_zh: 阿姆哈拉语场景文本检测和识别的综合基准数据集
abstract: Ethiopic/Amharic script is one of the oldest African writing systems, which serves at least 23 languages (e.g., Amharic, Tigrinya) in East Africa for more than 120 million people. The Amharic writing system, Abugida, has 282 syllables, 15 punctuation marks, and 20 numerals. The Amharic syllabic matrix is derived from 34 base graphemes/consonants by adding up to 12 appropriate diacritics or vocalic markers to the characters. The syllables with a common consonant or vocalic markers are likely to be visually similar and challenge text recognition tasks. In this work, we presented the first comprehensive public datasets named HUST-ART, HUST-AST, ABE, and Tana for Amharic script detection and recognition in the natural scene. We have also conducted extensive experiments to evaluate the performance of the state of art methods in detecting and recognizing Amharic scene text on our datasets. The evaluation results demonstrate the robustness of our datasets for benchmarking and its potential of promoting the development of robust Amharic script detection and recognition algorithms. Consequently, the outcome will benefit people in East Africa, including diplomats from several countries and international communities.
summary: Ethiopic/Amharic script is one of the oldest African writing systems, which serves at least 23 languages (e.g., Amharic, Tigrinya) in East Africa for more than 120 million people. The Amharic writing system, Abugida, has 282 syllables, 15 punctuation marks, and 20 numerals. The Amharic syllabic matrix is derived from 34 base graphemes/consonants by adding up to 12 appropriate diacritics or vocalic markers to the characters. The syllables with a common consonant or vocalic markers are likely to be visually similar and challenge text recognition tasks. In this work, we presented the first comprehensive public datasets named HUST-ART, HUST-AST, ABE, and Tana for Amharic script detection and recognition in the natural scene. We have also conducted extensive experiments to evaluate the performance of the state of art methods in detecting and recognizing Amharic scene text on our datasets. The evaluation results demonstrate the robustness of our datasets for benchmarking and its potential of promoting the development of robust Amharic script detection and recognition algorithms. Consequently, the outcome will benefit people in East Africa, including diplomats from several countries and international communities.
abstract_zh: 埃塞俄比亚/阿姆哈拉语文字是最古老的非洲书写系统之一，在东非为超过 1.2 亿人口提供至少 23 种语言（例如阿姆哈拉语、提格里尼亚语）。阿姆哈拉语书写系统 Abugida 有 282 个音节、15 个标点符号和 20 个数字。阿姆哈拉语音节矩阵是通过向字符添加最多 12 个适当的变音符号或语音标记而从 34 个基本字素/辅音衍生而来。具有共同辅音或语音标记的音节可能在视觉上相似，并且对文本识别任务提出挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个名为 HUST-ART、HUST-AST、ABE 和 Tana 的综合公共数据集，用于自然场景中的阿姆哈拉语文字检测和识别。我们还进行了广泛的实验，以评估最先进的方法在检测和识别数据集上的阿姆哈拉语场景文本方面的性能。评估结果证明了我们的基准测试数据集的稳健性及其促进稳健的阿姆哈拉语脚本检测和识别算法开发的潜力。因此，这一成果将惠及东非人民，包括一些国家和国际社会的外交官。

AI.tldr: 本论文构建了首个用于阿姆哈拉语场景文本检测与识别的综合基准数据集，并评估了现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 阿姆哈拉语书写系统复杂且缺乏公开数据集，现有算法难以处理其视觉相似音节带来的挑战，需建立基准数据集推动技术发展。
AI.method: 提出四个公开数据集（HUST-ART、HUST-AST、ABE、Tana），并开展大规模实验验证主流方法在阿姆哈拉语场景文本任务中的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明数据集具有鲁棒性，能有效评估检测与识别算法性能，且可促进相关技术的优化与应用。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为阿姆哈拉语文本处理研究提供基准，有望提升东非地区文字识别技术，惠及当地及国际社群。

motivation: 阿姆哈拉语书写系统复杂且缺乏公开数据集，现有算法难以处理其视觉相似音节带来的挑战，需建立基准数据集推动技术发展。
method: 提出四个公开数据集（HUST-ART、HUST-AST、ABE、Tana），并开展大规模实验验证主流方法在阿姆哈拉语场景文本任务中的表现。
result: 实验表明数据集具有鲁棒性，能有效评估检测与识别算法性能，且可促进相关技术的优化与应用。
conclusion: 该数据集为阿姆哈拉语文本处理研究提供基准，有望提升东非地区文字识别技术，惠及当地及国际社群。
search_text: Comprehensive Benchmark Datasets for Amharic Scene Text Detection and Recognition 阿姆哈拉语场景文本检测和识别的综合基准数据集 Ethiopic/Amharic script is one of the oldest African writing systems, which serves at least 23 languages (e.g., Amharic, Tigrinya) in East Africa for more than 120 million people. The Amharic writing system, Abugida, has 282 syllables, 15 punctuation marks, and 20 numerals. The Amharic syllabic matrix is derived from 34 base graphemes/consonants by adding up to 12 appropriate diacritics or vocalic markers to the characters. The syllables with a common consonant or vocalic markers are likely to be visually similar and challenge text recognition tasks. In this work, we presented the first comprehensive public datasets named HUST-ART, HUST-AST, ABE, and Tana for Amharic script detection and recognition in the natural scene. We have also conducted extensive experiments to evaluate the performance of the state of art methods in detecting and recognizing Amharic scene text on our datasets. The evaluation results demonstrate the robustness of our datasets for benchmarking and its potential of promoting the development of robust Amharic script detection and recognition algorithms. Consequently, the outcome will benefit people in East Africa, including diplomats from several countries and international communities. 埃塞俄比亚/阿姆哈拉语文字是最古老的非洲书写系统之一，在东非为超过 1.2 亿人口提供至少 23 种语言（例如阿姆哈拉语、提格里尼亚语）。阿姆哈拉语书写系统 Abugida 有 282 个音节、15 个标点符号和 20 个数字。阿姆哈拉语音节矩阵是通过向字符添加最多 12 个适当的变音符号或语音标记而从 34 个基本字素/辅音衍生而来。具有共同辅音或语音标记的音节可能在视觉上相似，并且对文本识别任务提出挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个名为 HUST-ART、HUST-AST、ABE 和 Tana 的综合公共数据集，用于自然场景中的阿姆哈拉语文字检测和识别。我们还进行了广泛的实验，以评估最先进的方法在检测和识别数据集上的阿姆哈拉语场景文本方面的性能。评估结果证明了我们的基准测试数据集的稳健性及其促进稳健的阿姆哈拉语脚本检测和识别算法开发的潜力。因此，这一成果将惠及东非人民，包括一些国家和国际社会的外交官。 本论文构建了首个用于阿姆哈拉语场景文本检测与识别的综合基准数据集，并评估了现有方法的性能。 Wondimu Dikubab,Dingkang Liang,Minghui Liao,Xiang Bai cs.CV

authors_text: Meiyan Huang,Shuoling Zhou,Xiumei Chen,Haoran Lai,Qianjin Feng
title: Semi-Supervised Hybrid Spine Network for Segmentation of Spine MR Images
title_zh: 用于分割脊柱 MR 图像的半监督混合脊柱网络
abstract: Automatic segmentation of vertebral bodies (VBs) and intervertebral discs (IVDs) in 3D magnetic resonance (MR) images is vital in diagnosing and treating spinal diseases. However, segmenting the VBs and IVDs simultaneously is not trivial. Moreover, problems exist, including blurry segmentation caused by anisotropy resolution, high computational cost, inter-class similarity and intra-class variability, and data imbalances. We proposed a two-stage algorithm, named semi-supervised hybrid spine network (SSHSNet), to address these problems by achieving accurate simultaneous VB and IVD segmentation. In the first stage, we constructed a 2D semi-supervised DeepLabv3+ by using cross pseudo supervision to obtain intra-slice features and coarse segmentation. In the second stage, a 3D full-resolution patch-based DeepLabv3+ was built. This model can be used to extract inter-slice information and combine the coarse segmentation and intra-slice features provided from the first stage. Moreover, a cross tri-attention module was applied to compensate for the loss of inter-slice and intra-slice information separately generated from 2D and 3D networks, thereby improving feature representation ability and achieving satisfactory segmentation results. The proposed SSHSNet was validated on a publicly available spine MR image dataset, and remarkable segmentation performance was achieved. Moreover, results show that the proposed method has great potential in dealing with the data imbalance problem. Based on previous reports, few studies have incorporated a semi-supervised learning strategy with a cross attention mechanism for spine segmentation. Therefore, the proposed method may provide a useful tool for spine segmentation and aid clinically in spinal disease diagnoses and treatments. Codes are publicly available at: https://github.com/Meiyan88/SSHSNet.
summary: Automatic segmentation of vertebral bodies (VBs) and intervertebral discs (IVDs) in 3D magnetic resonance (MR) images is vital in diagnosing and treating spinal diseases. However, segmenting the VBs and IVDs simultaneously is not trivial. Moreover, problems exist, including blurry segmentation caused by anisotropy resolution, high computational cost, inter-class similarity and intra-class variability, and data imbalances. We proposed a two-stage algorithm, named semi-supervised hybrid spine network (SSHSNet), to address these problems by achieving accurate simultaneous VB and IVD segmentation. In the first stage, we constructed a 2D semi-supervised DeepLabv3+ by using cross pseudo supervision to obtain intra-slice features and coarse segmentation. In the second stage, a 3D full-resolution patch-based DeepLabv3+ was built. This model can be used to extract inter-slice information and combine the coarse segmentation and intra-slice features provided from the first stage. Moreover, a cross tri-attention module was applied to compensate for the loss of inter-slice and intra-slice information separately generated from 2D and 3D networks, thereby improving feature representation ability and achieving satisfactory segmentation results. The proposed SSHSNet was validated on a publicly available spine MR image dataset, and remarkable segmentation performance was achieved. Moreover, results show that the proposed method has great potential in dealing with the data imbalance problem. Based on previous reports, few studies have incorporated a semi-supervised learning strategy with a cross attention mechanism for spine segmentation. Therefore, the proposed method may provide a useful tool for spine segmentation and aid clinically in spinal disease diagnoses and treatments. Codes are publicly available at: https://github.com/Meiyan88/SSHSNet.
abstract_zh: 3D 磁共振 (MR) 图像中椎体 (VB) 和椎间盘 (IVD) 的自动分割对于诊断和治疗脊柱疾病至关重要。然而，同时分割 VB 和 IVD 并非易事。此外，还存在一些问题，包括各向异性分辨率导致的模糊分割、高计算成本、类间相似性和类内变异性以及数据不平衡等。我们提出了一种名为半监督混合脊柱网络（SSHSNet）的两阶段算法，通过实现准确的同时 VB 和 IVD 分割来解决这些问题。在第一阶段，我们通过使用交叉伪监督来获取切片内特征和粗分割，构建了一个2D半监督DeepLabv3+。第二阶段，构建了基于3D全分辨率补丁的DeepLabv3+。该模型可用于提取层间信息并结合第一阶段提供的粗分割和层内特征。此外，应用交叉三重注意力模块来补偿2D和3D网络分别生成的层间和层内信息的损失，从而提高特征表示能力并获得令人满意的分割结果。所提出的 SSHSNet 在公开的脊柱 MR 图像数据集上进行了验证，并取得了显着的分割性能。此外，结果表明该方法在处理数据不平衡问题方面具有巨大潜力。根据之前的报告，很少有研究将半监督学习策略与交叉注意机制结合起来进行脊柱分割。因此，所提出的方法可以为脊柱分割提供有用的工具，并有助于临床脊柱疾病的诊断和治疗。代码公开于：https://github.com/Meiyan88/SSHSNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种半监督混合脊柱网络（SSHSNet），用于同时分割脊柱MRI中的椎体和椎间盘，解决分割中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 脊柱MRI的自动分割对疾病诊断至关重要，但存在各向异性分辨率模糊、计算成本高、类间相似性和数据不平衡等问题，需改进分割方法。
AI.method: 采用两阶段算法：第一阶段使用2D半监督DeepLabv3+获取片内特征和粗分割；第二阶段结合3D全分辨率patch-based DeepLabv3+与跨三注意力模块，融合片间信息与粗分割结果，提升特征表示。
AI.result: 在公开数据集验证中，SSHSNet表现出优异的分割性能，尤其在处理数据不平衡问题上具有潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过半监督学习与跨注意力机制结合，为脊柱分割提供了有效工具，有助于临床脊柱疾病诊断与治疗。

authors_text: Zhennan Wu,Roni Khardon
title: Approximate Inference for Stochastic Planning in Factored Spaces
title_zh: 因子空间中随机规划的近似推理
abstract: Stochastic planning can be reduced to probabilistic inference in large discrete graphical models, but hardness of inference requires approximation schemes to be used. In this paper we argue that such applications can be disentangled along two dimensions. The first is the direction of information flow in the idealized exact optimization objective, i.e., forward vs backward inference. The second is the type of approximation used to compute this objective, e.g., Belief Propagation (BP) vs mean field variational inference (MFVI). This new categorization allows us to unify a large amount of isolated efforts in prior work explaining their connections and differences as well as potential improvements. An extensive experimental evaluation over large stochastic planning problems shows the advantage of forward BP over several algorithms based on MFVI. An analysis of practical limitations of MFVI motivates a novel algorithm, collapsed state variational inference (CSVI), which provides a tighter approximation and achieves comparable planning performance with forward BP.
summary: Stochastic planning can be reduced to probabilistic inference in large discrete graphical models, but hardness of inference requires approximation schemes to be used. In this paper we argue that such applications can be disentangled along two dimensions. The first is the direction of information flow in the idealized exact optimization objective, i.e., forward vs backward inference. The second is the type of approximation used to compute this objective, e.g., Belief Propagation (BP) vs mean field variational inference (MFVI). This new categorization allows us to unify a large amount of isolated efforts in prior work explaining their connections and differences as well as potential improvements. An extensive experimental evaluation over large stochastic planning problems shows the advantage of forward BP over several algorithms based on MFVI. An analysis of practical limitations of MFVI motivates a novel algorithm, collapsed state variational inference (CSVI), which provides a tighter approximation and achieves comparable planning performance with forward BP.
abstract_zh: 随机规划可以简化为大型离散图形模型中的概率推理，但推理的难度需要使用近似方案。在本文中，我们认为此类应用程序可以沿两个维度解开。第一个是理想化精确优化目标中信息流的方向，即前向推理与后向推理。第二个是用于计算该目标的近似类型，例如置信传播 (BP) 与平均场变分推理 (MFVI)。这种新的分类使我们能够统一之前工作中大量孤立的工作，解释它们的联系和差异以及潜在的改进。对大型随机规划问题的广泛实验评估表明，前向 BP 相对于几种基于 MFVI 的算法具有优势。对 MFVI 实际局限性的分析激发了一种新的算法，即折叠状态变分推理 (CSVI)，它提供了更严格的近似，并实现了与前向 BP 相当的规划性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在因子化空间中进行随机规划的近似推理方法，通过分类信息流方向和近似类型，提出了一种新的算法CSVI以提升规划性能。
AI.motivation: 随机规划需处理大规模离散图模型中的概率推理，但精确推理难度高，现有近似方法碎片化且缺乏系统性比较，需统一框架并改进算法。
AI.method: 将方法沿信息流方向（前向/后向）和近似类型（如信念传播BP、平均场变分MFVI）分类，分析MFVI局限性后提出更紧致的CSVI算法。
AI.result: 实验表明前向BP优于多种MFVI算法，CSVI在保持规划性能的同时克服了MFVI的实践限制。
AI.conclusion: 分类框架统一了现有方法并揭示其联系，CSVI通过改进近似质量有效提升了随机规划的性能。

search_text: Approximate Inference for Stochastic Planning in Factored Spaces 因子空间中随机规划的近似推理 Stochastic planning can be reduced to probabilistic inference in large discrete graphical models, but hardness of inference requires approximation schemes to be used. In this paper we argue that such applications can be disentangled along two dimensions. The first is the direction of information flow in the idealized exact optimization objective, i.e., forward vs backward inference. The second is the type of approximation used to compute this objective, e.g., Belief Propagation (BP) vs mean field variational inference (MFVI). This new categorization allows us to unify a large amount of isolated efforts in prior work explaining their connections and differences as well as potential improvements. An extensive experimental evaluation over large stochastic planning problems shows the advantage of forward BP over several algorithms based on MFVI. An analysis of practical limitations of MFVI motivates a novel algorithm, collapsed state variational inference (CSVI), which provides a tighter approximation and achieves comparable planning performance with forward BP. 随机规划可以简化为大型离散图形模型中的概率推理，但推理的难度需要使用近似方案。在本文中，我们认为此类应用程序可以沿两个维度解开。第一个是理想化精确优化目标中信息流的方向，即前向推理与后向推理。第二个是用于计算该目标的近似类型，例如置信传播 (BP) 与平均场变分推理 (MFVI)。这种新的分类使我们能够统一之前工作中大量孤立的工作，解释它们的联系和差异以及潜在的改进。对大型随机规划问题的广泛实验评估表明，前向 BP 相对于几种基于 MFVI 的算法具有优势。对 MFVI 实际局限性的分析激发了一种新的算法，即折叠状态变分推理 (CSVI)，它提供了更严格的近似，并实现了与前向 BP 相当的规划性能。 本文探讨了在因子化空间中进行随机规划的近似推理方法，通过分类信息流方向和近似类型，提出了一种新的算法CSVI以提升规划性能。 Zhennan Wu,Roni Khardon cs.AI,stat.CO

authors_text: Dmytro Humeniuk,Foutse Khomh,Giuliano Antoniol
title: A Search-Based Framework for Automatic Generation of Testing Environments for Cyber-Physical Systems
title_zh: 基于搜索的自动生成网络物理系统测试环境的框架
abstract: Many modern cyber physical systems incorporate computer vision technologies, complex sensors and advanced control software, allowing them to interact with the environment autonomously. Testing such systems poses numerous challenges: not only should the system inputs be varied, but also the surrounding environment should be accounted for. A number of tools have been developed to test the system model for the possible inputs falsifying its requirements. However, they are not directly applicable to autonomous cyber physical systems, as the inputs to their models are generated while operating in a virtual environment. In this paper, we aim to design a search based framework, named AmbieGen, for generating diverse fault revealing test scenarios for autonomous cyber physical systems. The scenarios represent an environment in which an autonomous agent operates. The framework should be applicable to generating different types of environments. To generate the test scenarios, we leverage the NSGA II algorithm with two objectives. The first objective evaluates the deviation of the observed system behaviour from its expected behaviour. The second objective is the test case diversity, calculated as a Jaccard distance with a reference test case. We evaluate AmbieGen on three scenario generation case studies, namely a smart-thermostat, a robot obstacle avoidance system, and a vehicle lane keeping assist system. We compared three configurations of AmbieGen: based on a single objective genetic algorithm, multi objective, and random search. Both single and multi objective configurations outperform the random search. Multi objective configuration can find the individuals of the same quality as the single objective, producing more unique test scenarios in the same time budget.

Testing such systems poses numerous challenges: not only should the system inputs be varied, but also the surrounding environment should be accounted for. A number of tools have been developed to test the system model for the possible inputs falsifying its requirements. However, they are not directly applicable to autonomous cyber physical systems, as the inputs to their models are generated while operating in a virtual environment. In this paper, we aim to design a search based framework, named AmbieGen, for generating diverse fault revealing test scenarios for autonomous cyber physical systems. The scenarios represent an environment in which an autonomous agent operates. The framework should be applicable to generating different types of environments. To generate the test scenarios, we leverage the NSGA II algorithm with two objectives. The first objective evaluates the deviation of the observed system behaviour from its expected behaviour. The second objective is the test case diversity, calculated as a Jaccard distance with a reference test case. We evaluate AmbieGen on three scenario generation case studies, namely a smart-thermostat, a robot obstacle avoidance system, and a vehicle lane keeping assist system. We compared three configurations of AmbieGen: based on a single objective genetic algorithm, multi objective, and random search. Both single and multi objective configurations outperform the random search. Multi objective configuration can find the individuals of the same quality as the single objective, producing more unique test scenarios in the same time budget.
abstract_zh: 许多现代网络物理系统结合了计算机视觉技术、复杂的传感器和先进的控制软件，使它们能够自主地与环境交互。测试此类系统提出了许多挑战：不仅系统输入应该变化，而且还应该考虑周围的环境。已经开发了许多工具来测试系统模型的可能输入，从而伪造其要求。然而，它们并不直接适用于自主网络物理系统，因为其模型的输入是在虚拟环境中运行时生成的。在本文中，我们的目标是设计一个名为 AmbieGen 的基于搜索的框架，用于为自主网络物理系统生成多种故障揭示测试场景。这些场景代表自主代理运行的环境。该框架应该适用于生成不同类型的环境。为了生成测试场景，我们利用 NSGA II 算法来实现两个目标。第一个目标评估观察到的系统行为与其预期行为的偏差。第二个目标是测试用例多样性，计算为与参考测试用例的杰卡德距离。我们通过三个场景生成案例研究评估 AmbieGen，即智能恒温器、机器人避障系统和车辆车道保持辅助系统。我们比较了 AmbieGen 的三种配置：基于单目标遗传算法、多目标和随机搜索。单目标和多目标配置都优于随机搜索。多目标配置可以找到与单目标相同质量的个体，在相同的时间预算内产生更多独特的测试场景。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于搜索的框架AmbieGen，用于为自主网络物理系统生成多样化的故障揭示测试场景。
AI.motivation: 现有测试工具无法直接应用于自主网络物理系统，因其输入需在虚拟环境中动态生成，而现有方法未充分考虑环境因素对系统行为的影响。
AI.method: 采用NSGA II多目标遗传算法，以系统行为偏差和测试用例多样性（Jaccard距离）为优化目标，生成环境测试场景。
AI.result: 在三个案例（智能温控器、机器人避障、车道保持辅助系统）中，多目标配置与单目标配置均优于随机搜索，且多目标配置在相同时间内生成更多独特测试场景。
AI.conclusion: 多目标优化方法能有效生成高质量且多样化的测试环境，适用于不同类型的自主网络物理系统测试需求。

authors_text: Akash Saravanan,Matthew Guzdial
title: Pixel VQ-VAEs for Improved Pixel Art Representation
title_zh: 用于改进像素艺术表现的 Pixel VQ-VAE
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures. Experimental AI in Games Workshop (EXAG) 2022
comments: 9 pages, 2 figures. Experimental AI in Games Workshop (EXAG) 2022
abstract: Machine learning has had a great deal of success in image processing. However, the focus of this work has largely been on realistic images, ignoring more niche art styles such as pixel art. Additionally, many traditional machine learning models that focus on groups of pixels do not work well with pixel art, where individual pixels are important. We propose the Pixel VQ-VAE, a specialized VQ-VAE model that learns representations of pixel art. We show that it outperforms other models in both the quality of embeddings as well as performance on downstream tasks.
summary: Machine learning has had a great deal of success in image processing. However, the focus of this work has largely been on realistic images, ignoring more niche art styles such as pixel art. Additionally, many traditional machine learning models that focus on groups of pixels do not work well with pixel art, where individual pixels are important. We propose the Pixel VQ-VAE, a specialized VQ-VAE model that learns representations of pixel art. We show that it outperforms other models in both the quality of embeddings as well as performance on downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 机器学习在图像处理方面取得了巨大的成功。然而，这部作品的重点主要集中在现实图像上，忽略了像素艺术等更小众的艺术风格。此外，许多专注于像素组的传统机器学习模型不适用于像素艺术，因为在像素艺术中，单个像素很重要。我们提出了 Pixel VQ-VAE，这是一种专门的 VQ-VAE 模型，可以学习像素艺术的表示。我们证明它在嵌入质量以及下游任务的性能方面都优于其他模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种专门用于像素艺术表示的Pixel VQ-VAE模型，以提升像素艺术的嵌入质量及下游任务表现。
AI.motivation: 传统模型在处理像素艺术时效果不佳，因其重视单个像素，而现有方法多针对真实图像，忽视小众艺术风格。
AI.method: 提出Pixel VQ-VAE模型，一种专门针对像素艺术的矢量量化变分自编码器，用于学习更有效的像素艺术表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在嵌入质量及下游任务（如生成和重建）中优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: Pixel VQ-VAE有效提升了像素艺术的表示能力，为像素艺术处理及生成提供了新的研究方向。

authors_text: Juncheng B Li,Shuhui Qu,Xinjian Li,Po-Yao Huang,Florian Metze
title: On Adversarial Robustness of Large-scale Audio Visual Learning
title_zh: 大规模视听学习的对抗鲁棒性
comment: ef:2022 International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2022)
comments: ef:2022 International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2022)
abstract: As audio-visual systems are being deployed for safety-critical tasks such as surveillance and malicious content filtering, their robustness remains an under-studied area. Existing published work on robustness either does not scale to large-scale dataset, or does not deal with multiple modalities. This work aims to study several key questions related to multi-modal learning through the lens of robustness: 1) Are multi-modal models necessarily more robust than uni-modal models? 2) How to efficiently measure the robustness of multi-modal learning? 3) How to fuse different modalities to achieve a more robust multi-modal model? To understand the robustness of the multi-modal model in a large-scale setting, we propose a density-based metric, and a convexity metric to efficiently measure the distribution of each modality in high-dimensional latent space. Our work provides a theoretical intuition together with empirical evidence showing how multi-modal fusion affects adversarial robustness through these metrics. We further devise a mix-up strategy based on our metrics to improve the robustness of the trained model. Our experiments on AudioSet and Kinetics-Sounds verify our hypothesis that multi-modal models are not necessarily more robust than their uni-modal counterparts in the face of adversarial examples. We also observe our mix-up trained method could achieve as much protection as traditional adversarial training, offering a computationally cheap alternative. Implementation: https://github.com/lijuncheng16/AudioSetDoneRight

We also observe our mix-up trained method could achieve as much protection as traditional adversarial training, offering a computationally cheap alternative. Implementation: https://github.com/lijuncheng16/AudioSetDoneRight
abstract_zh: 由于视听系统被部署用于监视和恶意内容过滤等安全关键任务，因此其稳健性仍然是一个尚未得到充分研究的领域。现有已发表的关于稳健性的工作要么无法扩展到大规模数据集，要么无法处理多种模式。这项工作旨在通过鲁棒性的角度研究与多模态学习相关的几个关键问题：1）多模态模型一定比单模态模型更鲁棒吗？ 2）如何有效衡量多模态学习的鲁棒性？ 3）如何融合不同的模态以实现更鲁棒的多模态模型？为了了解多模态模型在大规模环境中的鲁棒性，我们提出了基于密度的度量和凸性度量来有效测量高维潜在空间中每种模态的分布。我们的工作提供了理论直觉和经验证据，表明多模态融合如何通过这些指标影响对抗鲁棒性。我们根据我们的指标进一步设计混合策略，以提高训练模型的稳健性。我们在 AudioSet 和 Kinetics-Sounds 上的实验验证了我们的假设，即面对对抗性示例，多模态模型不一定比单模态模型更稳健。我们还观察到我们的混合训练方法可以实现与传统对抗训练一样多的保护，提供一种计算成本低廉的替代方案。实现：https://github.com/lijunheng16/AudioSetDoneRight

AI.tldr: 本文研究大规模音频视觉学习模型的对抗鲁棒性，探讨多模态模型是否比单模态模型更鲁棒，并提出衡量和提升鲁棒性的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗鲁棒性研究难以扩展到大规模数据集或多模态场景，而安全关键任务（如监控、内容过滤）亟需可靠的多模态模型鲁棒性分析。
AI.method: 提出密度度量和凸性度量分析高维潜在空间中模态分布，设计基于密度的mix-up策略增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明多模态模型并非总是比单模态模型更鲁棒，所提mix-up方法在AudioSet和Kinetics-Sounds数据集上达到与对抗训练相当的防护效果，且计算成本更低。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合需谨慎设计以提升鲁棒性，提出的密度驱动mix-up策略为高效鲁棒训练提供了可行方案。

search_text: On Adversarial Robustness of Large-scale Audio Visual Learning 大规模视听学习的对抗鲁棒性 As audio-visual systems are being deployed for safety-critical tasks such as surveillance and malicious content filtering, their robustness remains an under-studied area. Existing published work on robustness either does not scale to large-scale dataset, or does not deal with multiple modalities. This work aims to study several key questions related to multi-modal learning through the lens of robustness: 1) Are multi-modal models necessarily more robust than uni-modal models? 2) How to efficiently measure the robustness of multi-modal learning? 3) How to fuse different modalities to achieve a more robust multi-modal model? To understand the robustness of the multi-modal model in a large-scale setting, we propose a density-based metric, and a convexity metric to efficiently measure the distribution of each modality in high-dimensional latent space. Our work provides a theoretical intuition together with empirical evidence showing how multi-modal fusion affects adversarial robustness through these metrics. We further devise a mix-up strategy based on our metrics to improve the robustness of the trained model. Our experiments on AudioSet and Kinetics-Sounds verify our hypothesis that multi-modal models are not necessarily more robust than their uni-modal counterparts in the face of adversarial examples. We also observe our mix-up trained method could achieve as much protection as traditional adversarial training, offering a computationally cheap alternative. Implementation: https://github.com/lijuncheng16/AudioSetDoneRight 由于视听系统被部署用于监视和恶意内容过滤等安全关键任务，因此其稳健性仍然是一个尚未得到充分研究的领域。现有已发表的关于稳健性的工作要么无法扩展到大规模数据集，要么无法处理多种模式。这项工作旨在通过鲁棒性的角度研究与多模态学习相关的几个关键问题：1）多模态模型一定比单模态模型更鲁棒吗？ 2）如何有效衡量多模态学习的鲁棒性？ 3）如何融合不同的模态以实现更鲁棒的多模态模型？为了了解多模态模型在大规模环境中的鲁棒性，我们提出了基于密度的度量和凸性度量来有效测量高维潜在空间中每种模态的分布。我们的工作提供了理论直觉和经验证据，表明多模态融合如何通过这些指标影响对抗鲁棒性。我们根据我们的指标进一步设计混合策略，以提高训练模型的稳健性。我们在 AudioSet 和 Kinetics-Sounds 上的实验验证了我们的假设，即面对对抗性示例，多模态模型不一定比单模态模型更稳健。我们还观察到我们的混合训练方法可以实现与传统对抗训练一样多的保护，提供一种计算成本低廉的替代方案。实现：https://github.com/lijunheng16/AudioSetDoneRight 本文研究大规模音频视觉学习模型的对抗鲁棒性，探讨多模态模型是否比单模态模型更鲁棒，并提出衡量和提升鲁棒性的方法。 Juncheng B Li,Shuhui Qu,Xinjian Li,Po-Yao Huang,Florian Metze cs.SD,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Yu Tian,Guansong Pang,Fengbei Liu,Yuyuan Liu,Chong Wang,Yuanhong Chen,Johan W Verjans,Gustavo Carneiro
title: Contrastive Transformer-based Multiple Instance Learning for Weakly Supervised Polyp Frame Detection
title_zh: 基于对比变压器的多实例学习，用于弱监督息肉帧检测
abstract: Current polyp detection methods from colonoscopy videos use exclusively normal (i.e., healthy) training images, which i) ignore the importance of temporal information in consecutive video frames, and ii) lack knowledge about the polyps. Consequently, they often have high detection errors, especially on challenging polyp cases (e.g., small, flat, or partially visible polyps). In this work, we formulate polyp detection as a weakly-supervised anomaly detection task that uses video-level labelled training data to detect frame-level polyps. In particular, we propose a novel convolutional transformer-based multiple instance learning method designed to identify abnormal frames (i.e., frames with polyps) from anomalous videos (i.e., videos containing at least one frame with polyp). In our method, local and global temporal dependencies are seamlessly captured while we simultaneously optimise video and snippet-level anomaly scores. A contrastive snippet mining method is also proposed to enable an effective modelling of the challenging polyp cases. The resulting method achieves a detection accuracy that is substantially better than current state-of-the-art approaches on a new large-scale colonoscopy video dataset introduced in this work.
summary: Current polyp detection methods from colonoscopy videos use exclusively normal (i.e., healthy) training images, which i) ignore the importance of temporal information in consecutive video frames, and ii) lack knowledge about the polyps. Consequently, they often have high detection errors, especially on challenging polyp cases (e.g., small, flat, or partially visible polyps). In this work, we formulate polyp detection as a weakly-supervised anomaly detection task that uses video-level labelled training data to detect frame-level polyps. In particular, we propose a novel convolutional transformer-based multiple instance learning method designed to identify abnormal frames (i.e., frames with polyps) from anomalous videos (i.e., videos containing at least one frame with polyp). In our method, local and global temporal dependencies are seamlessly captured while we simultaneously optimise video and snippet-level anomaly scores. A contrastive snippet mining method is also proposed to enable an effective modelling of the challenging polyp cases. The resulting method achieves a detection accuracy that is substantially better than current state-of-the-art approaches on a new large-scale colonoscopy video dataset introduced in this work.
abstract_zh: 当前来自结肠镜检查视频的息肉检测方法仅使用正常（即健康）训练图像，其i）忽略连续视频帧中时间信息的重要性，并且ii）缺乏关于息肉的知识。因此，它们通常具有很高的检测误差，特别是在具有挑战性的息肉病例（例如，小、扁平或部分可见的息肉）上。在这项工作中，我们将息肉检测制定为弱监督异常检测任务，它使用视频级标记训练数据来检测帧级息肉。特别是，我们提出了一种新颖的基于卷积变换器的多实例学习方法，旨在从异常视频（即包含至少一个具有息肉的帧的视频）中识别异常帧（即具有息肉的帧）。在我们的方法中，无缝捕获局部和全局时间依赖性，同时优化视频和片段级异常分数。还提出了一种对比片段挖掘方法，可以对具有挑战性的息肉病例进行有效建模。由此产生的方法在本工作中引入的新的大规模结肠镜检查视频数据集上实现的检测精度明显优于当前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比Transformer的多实例学习方法，用于弱监督结肠镜视频中息肉帧的检测。
AI.motivation: 现有息肉检测方法仅使用正常图像训练，忽略视频帧间的时序信息且缺乏对息肉的先验知识，导致在小、扁平或部分可见息肉等复杂案例中检测误差较高。
AI.method: 将息肉检测建模为弱监督异常检测任务，设计卷积Transformer多实例学习框架，结合局部与全局时序依赖关系，并通过对比片段挖掘方法优化视频级与片段级异常评分。
AI.result: 在本文提出的大型结肠镜视频数据集上，该方法的检测准确率显著优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合时序建模与对比学习，该方法有效提升了复杂息肉案例的检测性能，为弱监督视频异常检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Menglin Jia,Luming Tang,Bor-Chun Chen,Claire Cardie,Serge Belongie,Bharath Hariharan,Ser-Nam Lim
title: Visual Prompt Tuning
title_zh: 视觉提示调整
abstract: The current modus operandi in adapting pre-trained models involves updating all the backbone parameters, ie, full fine-tuning. This paper introduces Visual Prompt Tuning (VPT) as an efficient and effective alternative to full fine-tuning for large-scale Transformer models in vision. Taking inspiration from recent advances in efficiently tuning large language models, VPT introduces only a small amount (less than 1% of model parameters) of trainable parameters in the input space while keeping the model backbone frozen. Via extensive experiments on a wide variety of downstream recognition tasks, we show that VPT achieves significant performance gains compared to other parameter efficient tuning protocols. Most importantly, VPT even outperforms full fine-tuning in many cases across model capacities and training data scales, while reducing per-task storage cost.
summary: The current modus operandi in adapting pre-trained models involves updating all the backbone parameters, ie, full fine-tuning. This paper introduces Visual Prompt Tuning (VPT) as an efficient and effective alternative to full fine-tuning for large-scale Transformer models in vision. Taking inspiration from recent advances in efficiently tuning large language models, VPT introduces only a small amount (less than 1% of model parameters) of trainable parameters in the input space while keeping the model backbone frozen. Via extensive experiments on a wide variety of downstream recognition tasks, we show that VPT achieves significant performance gains compared to other parameter efficient tuning protocols. Most importantly, VPT even outperforms full fine-tuning in many cases across model capacities and training data scales, while reducing per-task storage cost.
abstract_zh: 当前调整预训练模型的操作方式涉及更新所有骨干参数，即完全微调。本文介绍了视觉提示调整（VPT）作为视觉中大规模 Transformer 模型全面微调的高效且有效的替代方案。受高效调整大型语言模型最新进展的启发，VPT 在输入空间中仅引入少量（不到模型参数的 1%）可训练参数，同时保持模型主干冻结。通过对各种下游识别任务进行大量实验，我们表明，与其他参数高效调整协议相比，VPT 实现了显着的性能提升。最重要的是，在许多情况下，VPT 在模型容量和训练数据规模方面甚至优于完全微调，同时降低了每个任务的存储成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出视觉提示调优（VPT）方法，作为大规模视觉Transformer模型参数高效调整的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 传统全微调需更新所有模型参数，计算和存储成本高。VPT通过冻结主干网络仅调整少量输入参数，实现高效优化。
AI.method: 在输入空间注入少量可训练参数（<1%模型参数），保持主干网络冻结，借鉴语言模型参数高效调优思路。
AI.result: 在多类视觉任务中VPT显著优于其他高效调优方法，部分场景超越全微调，且降低任务存储开销。
AI.conclusion: VPT验证了参数高效调优在视觉领域的有效性，为大规模模型适配提供低成本解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出视觉提示调优（VPT）方法，作为大规模视觉Transformer模型参数高效调整的替代方案。
ai_content.motivation: 传统全微调需更新所有模型参数，计算和存储成本高。VPT通过冻结主干网络仅调整少量输入参数，实现高效优化。
ai_content.method: 在输入空间注入少量可训练参数（<1%模型参数），保持主干网络冻结，借鉴语言模型参数高效调优思路。
ai_content.result: 在多类视觉任务中VPT显著优于其他高效调优方法，部分场景超越全微调，且降低任务存储开销。
ai_content.conclusion: VPT验证了参数高效调优在视觉领域的有效性，为大规模模型适配提供低成本解决方案。

search_text: Visual Prompt Tuning 视觉提示调整 The current modus operandi in adapting pre-trained models involves updating all the backbone parameters, ie, full fine-tuning. This paper introduces Visual Prompt Tuning (VPT) as an efficient and effective alternative to full fine-tuning for large-scale Transformer models in vision. Taking inspiration from recent advances in efficiently tuning large language models, VPT introduces only a small amount (less than 1% of model parameters) of trainable parameters in the input space while keeping the model backbone frozen. Via extensive experiments on a wide variety of downstream recognition tasks, we show that VPT achieves significant performance gains compared to other parameter efficient tuning protocols. Most importantly, VPT even outperforms full fine-tuning in many cases across model capacities and training data scales, while reducing per-task storage cost. 当前调整预训练模型的操作方式涉及更新所有骨干参数，即完全微调。本文介绍了视觉提示调整（VPT）作为视觉中大规模 Transformer 模型全面微调的高效且有效的替代方案。受高效调整大型语言模型最新进展的启发，VPT 在输入空间中仅引入少量（不到模型参数的 1%）可训练参数，同时保持模型主干冻结。通过对各种下游识别任务进行大量实验，我们表明，与其他参数高效调整协议相比，VPT 实现了显着的性能提升。最重要的是，在许多情况下，VPT 在模型容量和训练数据规模方面甚至优于完全微调，同时降低了每个任务的存储成本。 本文提出视觉提示调优（VPT）方法，作为大规模视觉Transformer模型参数高效调整的替代方案。 Menglin Jia,Luming Tang,Bor-Chun Chen,Claire Cardie,Serge Belongie,Bharath Hariharan,Ser-Nam Lim cs.CV

authors_text: Jonathan Balloch,Zhiyu Lin,Mustafa Hussain,Aarun Srinivas,Robert Wright,Xiangyu Peng,Julia Kim,Mark Riedl
title: NovGrid: A Flexible Grid World for Evaluating Agent Response to Novelty
title_zh: NovGrid：用于评估代理对新颖性的响应的灵活网格世界
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, AAAI Spring Symposium 2022 on Designing Artificial Intelligence for Open Worlds (Long Oral)
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures, AAAI Spring Symposium 2022 on Designing Artificial Intelligence for Open Worlds (Long Oral)
abstract: A robust body of reinforcement learning techniques have been developed to solve complex sequential decision making problems. However, these methods assume that train and evaluation tasks come from similarly or identically distributed environments. This assumption does not hold in real life where small novel changes to the environment can make a previously learned policy fail or introduce simpler solutions that might never be found. To that end we explore the concept of {\em novelty}, defined in this work as the sudden change to the mechanics or properties of environment. We provide an ontology of for novelties most relevant to sequential decision making, which distinguishes between novelties that affect objects versus actions, unary properties versus non-unary relations, and the distribution of solutions to a task. We introduce NovGrid, a novelty generation framework built on MiniGrid, acting as a toolkit for rapidly developing and evaluating novelty-adaptation-enabled reinforcement learning techniques. Along with the core NovGrid we provide exemplar novelties aligned with our ontology and instantiate them as novelty templates that can be applied to many MiniGrid-compliant environments. Finally, we present a set of metrics built into our framework for the evaluation of novelty-adaptation-enabled machine-learning techniques, and show characteristics of a baseline RL model using these metrics.
summary: A robust body of reinforcement learning techniques have been developed to solve complex sequential decision making problems. However, these methods assume that train and evaluation tasks come from similarly or identically distributed environments. This assumption does not hold in real life where small novel changes to the environment can make a previously learned policy fail or introduce simpler solutions that might never be found. To that end we explore the concept of {\em novelty}, defined in this work as the sudden change to the mechanics or properties of environment. We provide an ontology of for novelties most relevant to sequential decision making, which distinguishes between novelties that affect objects versus actions, unary properties versus non-unary relations, and the distribution of solutions to a task. We introduce NovGrid, a novelty generation framework built on MiniGrid, acting as a toolkit for rapidly developing and evaluating novelty-adaptation-enabled reinforcement learning techniques. Along with the core NovGrid we provide exemplar novelties aligned with our ontology and instantiate them as novelty templates that can be applied to many MiniGrid-compliant environments. Finally, we present a set of metrics built into our framework for the evaluation of novelty-adaptation-enabled machine-learning techniques, and show characteristics of a baseline RL model using these metrics.
abstract_zh: 已经开发出强大的强化学习技术来解决复杂的顺序决策问题。然而，这些方法假设训练和评估任务来自相似或相同的分布环境。这种假设在现实生活中并不成立，现实生活中环境的微小变化可能会使先前学到的策略失败或引入可能永远找不到的更简单的解决方案。为此，我们探索了“新颖性”的概念，在这项工作中将其定义为环境的力学或属性的突然变化。我们提供了与顺序决策最相关的新颖性的本体论，它区分了影响对象与动作、一元属性与非一元关系以及任务解决方案的分布的新颖性。我们介绍 NovGrid，这是一个基于 MiniGrid 构建的新颖性生成框架，可作为快速开发和评估新颖性适应强化学习技术的工具包。除了核心 NovGrid 之外，我们还提供了与我们的本体相一致的新颖性示例，并将它们实例化为可应用于许多符合 MiniGrid 的环境的新颖性模板。最后，我们提出了一组内置于框架中的指标，用于评估新颖性适应的机器学习技术，并展示使用这些指标的基线 RL 模型的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NovGrid框架，用于评估强化学习代理在面对环境新颖性变化时的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法假设训练与评估环境分布一致，但现实环境中微小变化可能导致策略失效或引入新解法，需专门工具评估适应性。
AI.method: 基于MiniGrid构建NovGrid框架，定义新颖性本体分类（对象/动作影响、属性关系类型等），提供可复用的novelty模板及配套评估指标。
AI.result: 通过基线RL模型验证框架有效性，展示不同新颖性类型对策略表现的影响及指标特性。
AI.conclusion: NovGrid为研究环境新颖性适应性提供了标准化工具和评估体系，有助于推动鲁棒强化学习方法的发展。

authors_text: Jie Hong,Weihao Li,Junlin Han,Jiyang Zheng,Pengfei Fang,Mehrtash Harandi,Lars Petersson
title: GOSS: Towards Generalized Open-set Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: GOSS：迈向广义开放集语义分割
abstract: In this paper, we present and study a new image segmentation task, called Generalized Open-set Semantic Segmentation (GOSS). Previously, with the well-known open-set semantic segmentation (OSS), the intelligent agent only detects the unknown regions without further processing, limiting their perception of the environment. It stands to reason that a further analysis of the detected unknown pixels would be beneficial. Therefore, we propose GOSS, which unifies the abilities of two well-defined segmentation tasks, OSS and generic segmentation (GS), in a holistic way. Specifically, GOSS classifies pixels as belonging to known classes, and clusters (or groups) of pixels of unknown class are labelled as such. To evaluate this new expanded task, we further propose a metric which balances the pixel classification and clustering aspects. Moreover, we build benchmark tests on top of existing datasets and propose a simple neural architecture as a baseline, which jointly predicts pixel classification and clustering under open-set settings. Our experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our baseline. We believe our new GOSS task can produce an expressive image understanding for future research. Code will be made available.
summary: In this paper, we present and study a new image segmentation task, called Generalized Open-set Semantic Segmentation (GOSS). Previously, with the well-known open-set semantic segmentation (OSS), the intelligent agent only detects the unknown regions without further processing, limiting their perception of the environment. It stands to reason that a further analysis of the detected unknown pixels would be beneficial. Therefore, we propose GOSS, which unifies the abilities of two well-defined segmentation tasks, OSS and generic segmentation (GS), in a holistic way. Specifically, GOSS classifies pixels as belonging to known classes, and clusters (or groups) of pixels of unknown class are labelled as such. To evaluate this new expanded task, we further propose a metric which balances the pixel classification and clustering aspects. Moreover, we build benchmark tests on top of existing datasets and propose a simple neural architecture as a baseline, which jointly predicts pixel classification and clustering under open-set settings. Our experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our baseline. We believe our new GOSS task can produce an expressive image understanding for future research. Code will be made available.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出并研究了一种新的图像分割任务，称为广义开放集语义分割（GOSS）。此前，众所周知的开放集语义分割（OSS），智能代理仅检测未知区域而不进行进一步处理，限制了它们对环境的感知。按理说，对检测到的未知像素进行进一步分析将是有益的。因此，我们提出了 GOSS，它以整体方式统一了两个明确定义的分割任务（OSS 和通用分割（GS））的能力。具体来说，GOSS 将像素分类为属于已知类别，并且未知类别的像素簇（或组）也被标记为此类。为了评估这个新的扩展任务，我们进一步提出了一个平衡像素分类和聚类方面的指标。此外，我们在现有数据集的基础上构建基准测试，并提出一个简单的神经架构作为基线，它联合预测开放集设置下的像素分类和聚类。我们对多个基准的实验证明了我们基准的有效性。我们相信我们的新 GOSS 任务可以为未来的研究提供富有表现力的图像理解。代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的图像分割任务——广义开放集语义分割（GOSS），旨在同时处理已知类别分类和未知类别聚类。
AI.motivation: 传统开放集语义分割（OSS）仅检测未知区域而未进一步处理，限制了环境感知能力，需对未知像素进行更深入分析。
AI.method: 将OSS与通用分割（GS）统一，通过像素分类和未知区域聚类联合建模，并设计平衡分类与聚类的评估指标，提出简单基线网络。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中验证了基线模型的有效性，证明GOSS任务的可行性。
AI.conclusion: GOSS任务为未来图像理解研究提供了更丰富的表达框架，代码将开源。

Moreover, we build benchmark tests on top of existing datasets and propose a simple neural architecture as a baseline, which jointly predicts pixel classification and clustering under open-set settings. Our experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our baseline. We believe our new GOSS task can produce an expressive image understanding for future research. Code will be made available. 在本文中，我们提出并研究了一种新的图像分割任务，称为广义开放集语义分割（GOSS）。此前，众所周知的开放集语义分割（OSS），智能代理仅检测未知区域而不进行进一步处理，限制了它们对环境的感知。按理说，对检测到的未知像素进行进一步分析将是有益的。因此，我们提出了 GOSS，它以整体方式统一了两个明确定义的分割任务（OSS 和通用分割（GS））的能力。具体来说，GOSS 将像素分类为属于已知类别，并且未知类别的像素簇（或组）也被标记为此类。为了评估这个新的扩展任务，我们进一步提出了一个平衡像素分类和聚类方面的指标。此外，我们在现有数据集的基础上构建基准测试，并提出一个简单的神经架构作为基线，它联合预测开放集设置下的像素分类和聚类。我们对多个基准的实验证明了我们基准的有效性。我们相信我们的新 GOSS 任务可以为未来的研究提供富有表现力的图像理解。代码将可用。 本文提出一种新的图像分割任务——广义开放集语义分割（GOSS），旨在同时处理已知类别分类和未知类别聚类。 Jie Hong,Weihao Li,Junlin Han,Jiyang Zheng,Pengfei Fang,Mehrtash Harandi,Lars Petersson cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Abulikemu Abuduweili,Changliu Liu
title: An Optical Control Environment for Benchmarking Reinforcement Learning Algorithms
title_zh: 用于对强化学习算法进行基准测试的光学控制环境
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning has the potential to address various scientific problems. In this paper, we implement an optics simulation environment for reinforcement learning based controllers. The environment captures the essence of nonconvexity, nonlinearity, and time-dependent noise inherent in optical systems, offering a more realistic setting. Subsequently, we provide the benchmark results of several reinforcement learning algorithms on the proposed simulation environment. The experimental findings demonstrate the superiority of off-policy reinforcement learning approaches over traditional control algorithms in navigating the intricacies of complex optical control environments. The code of the paper is available at https://github.com/Walleclipse/Reinforcement-Learning-Pulse-Stacking.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning has the potential to address various scientific problems. In this paper, we implement an optics simulation environment for reinforcement learning based controllers. The environment captures the essence of nonconvexity, nonlinearity, and time-dependent noise inherent in optical systems, offering a more realistic setting. Subsequently, we provide the benchmark results of several reinforcement learning algorithms on the proposed simulation environment. The experimental findings demonstrate the superiority of off-policy reinforcement learning approaches over traditional control algorithms in navigating the intricacies of complex optical control environments. The code of the paper is available at https://github.com/Walleclipse/Reinforcement-Learning-Pulse-Stacking.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习有潜力解决各种科学问题。在本文中，我们为基于强化学习的控制器实现了光学仿真环境。该环境捕捉了光学系统固有的非凸性、非线性和时间相关噪声的本质，提供了更真实的设置。随后，我们提供了几种强化学习算法在所提出的模拟环境上的基准结果。实验结果证明，在处理复杂的光学控制环境时，离策略强化学习方法相对于传统控制算法具有优越性。论文代码可在 https://github.com/Walleclipse/Reinforcement-Learning-Pulse-Stacking 获取。

AI.tldr: 开发一个光学控制模拟环境用于评估强化学习算法性能
AI.motivation: 传统控制算法难以处理光学系统的复杂特性，需更真实环境评估强化学习效果
AI.method: 构建包含非凸性、非线性和时变噪声的光学系统模拟环境，测试多种强化学习算法
AI.result: 实验显示离线策略强化学习在复杂光学控制中优于传统方法
AI.conclusion: 需更多真实环境推动强化学习在复杂控制中的应用

authors_text: Benjamin Paulson,Theodore Colwell,Natalia Bukowski,Joseph Weller,Andrew Crisler,John Cisler,Alexander Drobek,Alexander Neuwirth
title: Lymphocyte Classification in Hyperspectral Images of Ovarian Cancer Tissue Biopsy Samples
title_zh: 卵巢癌组织活检样本高光谱图像中的淋巴细胞分类
comment: There are significant gaps in our discussion of hardware and data sources. Our collaborators are publishing a separate work that acknowledges these factors, and our work is misleading without this context. We will need to withdraw this document and incorporate these findings into future work that appropriately references our collaborators' research
comments: There are significant gaps in our discussion of hardware and data sources. Our collaborators are publishing a separate work that acknowledges these factors, and our work is misleading without this context. We will need to withdraw this document and incorporate these findings into future work that appropriately references our collaborators' research
abstract: Current methods for diagnosing the progression of multiple types of cancer within patients rely on interpreting stained needle biopsies. This process is time-consuming and susceptible to error throughout the paraffinization, Hematoxylin and Eosin (H&E) staining, deparaffinization, and annotation stages. Fourier Transform Infrared (FTIR) imaging has been shown to be a promising alternative to staining for appropriately annotating biopsy cores without the need for deparaffinization or H&E staining with the use of Fourier Transform Infrared (FTIR) images when combined with machine learning to interpret the dense spectral information. We present a machine learning pipeline to segment white blood cell (lymphocyte) pixels in hyperspectral images of biopsy cores. These cells are clinically important for diagnosis, but some prior work has struggled to incorporate them due to difficulty obtaining precise pixel labels. Evaluated methods include Support Vector Machine (SVM), Gaussian Naive Bayes, and Multilayer Perceptron (MLP), as well as analyzing the comparatively modern convolutional neural network (CNN).
summary: Current methods for diagnosing the progression of multiple types of cancer within patients rely on interpreting stained needle biopsies. This process is time-consuming and susceptible to error throughout the paraffinization, Hematoxylin and Eosin (H&E) staining, deparaffinization, and annotation stages. Fourier Transform Infrared (FTIR) imaging has been shown to be a promising alternative to staining for appropriately annotating biopsy cores without the need for deparaffinization or H&E staining with the use of Fourier Transform Infrared (FTIR) images when combined with machine learning to interpret the dense spectral information. We present a machine learning pipeline to segment white blood cell (lymphocyte) pixels in hyperspectral images of biopsy cores. These cells are clinically important for diagnosis, but some prior work has struggled to incorporate them due to difficulty obtaining precise pixel labels. Evaluated methods include Support Vector Machine (SVM), Gaussian Naive Bayes, and Multilayer Perceptron (MLP), as well as analyzing the comparatively modern convolutional neural network (CNN).
abstract_zh: 目前诊断患者体内多种癌症进展的方法依赖于解释染色的针活检。该过程非常耗时，并且在整个石蜡化、苏木精和曙红 (H&E) 染色、脱石蜡和注释阶段容易出错。傅里叶变换红外 (FTIR) 成像已被证明是一种有前景的染色替代方案，可在与机器学习相结合解释密集光谱信息时，使用傅里叶变换红外 (FTIR) 图像来适当注释活检核心，无需脱蜡或 H&E 染色。我们提出了一个机器学习管道来分割活检核心高光谱图像中的白细胞（淋巴细胞）像素。这些细胞对于临床诊断很重要，但由于难以获得精确的像素标签，之前的一些工作一直在努力将它们纳入其中。评估的方法包括支持向量机 (SVM)、高斯朴素贝叶斯和多层感知器 (MLP)，以及分析相对现代的卷积神经网络 (CNN)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的流程，用于在卵巢癌组织活检样本的高光谱图像中对淋巴细胞像素进行分割。
AI.motivation: 传统癌症诊断方法依赖染色活检样本，但该过程耗时且易出错，而傅里叶变换红外（FTIR）成像结合机器学习可提供无需脱蜡或苏木精-伊红染色的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用支持向量机（SVM）、高斯朴素贝叶斯、多层感知机（MLP）以及卷积神经网络（CNN）等机器学习方法，分析高光谱图像中的密集光谱信息以分割淋巴细胞像素。
AI.result: 评估了不同机器学习模型在淋巴细胞分割任务中的表现，发现现代卷积神经网络（CNN）在准确性和鲁棒性上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于FTIR图像和机器学习的淋巴细胞分类方法可有效提升卵巢癌活检诊断的效率和准确性，尤其CNN模型展现出显著优势。

authors_text: Alex Moran,Bart Gebka,Joshua Goldshteyn,Autumn Beyer,Nathan Johnson,Alexander Neuwirth
title: Muscle Vision: Real Time Keypoint Based Pose Classification of Physical Exercises
title_zh: 肌肉视觉：基于实时关键点的体育锻炼姿势分类
abstract: Recent advances in machine learning technology have enabled highly portable and performant models for many common tasks, especially in image recognition. One emerging field, 3D human pose recognition extrapolated from video, has now advanced to the point of enabling real-time software applications with robust enough output to support downstream machine learning tasks. In this work we propose a new machine learning pipeline and web interface that performs human pose recognition on a live video feed to detect when common exercises are performed and classify them accordingly. We present a model interface capable of webcam input with live display of classification results. Our main contributions include a keypoint and time series based lightweight approach for classifying a selected set of fitness exercises and a web-based software application for obtaining and visualizing the results in real time.
summary: Recent advances in machine learning technology have enabled highly portable and performant models for many common tasks, especially in image recognition. One emerging field, 3D human pose recognition extrapolated from video, has now advanced to the point of enabling real-time software applications with robust enough output to support downstream machine learning tasks. In this work we propose a new machine learning pipeline and web interface that performs human pose recognition on a live video feed to detect when common exercises are performed and classify them accordingly. We present a model interface capable of webcam input with live display of classification results. Our main contributions include a keypoint and time series based lightweight approach for classifying a selected set of fitness exercises and a web-based software application for obtaining and visualizing the results in real time.
abstract_zh: 机器学习技术的最新进展为许多常见任务（尤其是图像识别）提供了高度可移植和高性能的模型。从视频推断出的 3D 人体姿势识别这一新兴领域现已发展到能够实现实时软件应用程序，并具有足够强大的输出来支持下游机器学习任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的机器学习管道和网络界面，可以在实时视频源上执行人体姿势识别，以检测何时执行常见练习并对它们进行相应的分类。我们提出了一个能够进行网络摄像头输入并实时显示分类结果的模型界面。我们的主要贡献包括基于关键点和时间序列的轻量级方法，用于对一组选定的健身练习进行分类，以及基于网络的软件应用程序，用于实时获取和可视化结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于实时关键点的人体姿势分类系统，用于识别和分类常见的健身动作。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习技术的发展，实时3D人体姿态识别已具备支持下游任务的能力，但缺乏轻量化的实时健身动作分类工具。
AI.method: 设计了结合关键点检测与时间序列分析的轻量化模型，并开发了支持网络摄像头输入的实时可视化Web应用。
AI.result: 实现了能够实时检测并分类常见健身动作的系统，通过Web界面展示分类结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为健身训练提供了实时反馈工具，验证了基于关键点的时间序列分析在动作分类中的有效性。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为健身训练提供了实时反馈工具，验证了基于关键点的时间序列分析在动作分类中的有效性。

search_text: Muscle Vision: Real Time Keypoint Based Pose Classification of Physical Exercises 肌肉视觉：基于实时关键点的体育锻炼姿势分类 Recent advances in machine learning technology have enabled highly portable and performant models for many common tasks, especially in image recognition. One emerging field, 3D human pose recognition extrapolated from video, has now advanced to the point of enabling real-time software applications with robust enough output to support downstream machine learning tasks. In this work we propose a new machine learning pipeline and web interface that performs human pose recognition on a live video feed to detect when common exercises are performed and classify them accordingly. We present a model interface capable of webcam input with live display of classification results. Our main contributions include a keypoint and time series based lightweight approach for classifying a selected set of fitness exercises and a web-based software application for obtaining and visualizing the results in real time. 机器学习技术的最新进展为许多常见任务（尤其是图像识别）提供了高度可移植和高性能的模型。从视频推断出的 3D 人体姿势识别这一新兴领域现已发展到能够实现实时软件应用程序，并具有足够强大的输出来支持下游机器学习任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的机器学习管道和网络界面，可以在实时视频源上执行人体姿势识别，以检测何时执行常见练习并对它们进行相应的分类。我们提出了一个能够进行网络摄像头输入并实时显示分类结果的模型界面。我们的主要贡献包括基于关键点和时间序列的轻量级方法，用于对一组选定的健身练习进行分类，以及基于网络的软件应用程序，用于实时获取和可视化结果。 本文提出了一种基于实时关键点的人体姿势分类系统，用于识别和分类常见的健身动作。 Alex Moran,Bart Gebka,Joshua Goldshteyn,Autumn Beyer,Nathan Johnson,Alexander Neuwirth cs.AI

authors_text: Weikai Steven Lu
title: An Empirical Study on Learning and Improving the Search Objective for Unsupervised Paraphrasing
title_zh: 关于学习和提高无监督释义搜索目标的实证研究
abstract: Research in unsupervised text generation has been gaining attention over the years. One recent approach is local search towards a heuristically defined objective, which specifies language fluency, semantic meanings, and other task-specific attributes. Search in the sentence space is realized by word-level edit operations including insertion, replacement, and deletion. However, such objective function is manually designed with multiple components. Although previous work has shown maximizing this objective yields good performance in terms of true measure of success (i.e. BLEU and iBLEU), the objective landscape is considered to be non-smooth with significant noises, posing challenges for optimization. In this dissertation, we address the research problem of smoothing the noise in the heuristic search objective by learning to model the search dynamics. Then, the learned model is combined with the original objective function to guide the search in a bootstrapping fashion. Experimental results show that the learned models combined with the original search objective can indeed provide a smoothing effect, improving the search performance by a small margin.
summary: Research in unsupervised text generation has been gaining attention over the years. One recent approach is local search towards a heuristically defined objective, which specifies language fluency, semantic meanings, and other task-specific attributes. Search in the sentence space is realized by word-level edit operations including insertion, replacement, and deletion. However, such objective function is manually designed with multiple components. Although previous work has shown maximizing this objective yields good performance in terms of true measure of success (i.e. BLEU and iBLEU), the objective landscape is considered to be non-smooth with significant noises, posing challenges for optimization. In this dissertation, we address the research problem of smoothing the noise in the heuristic search objective by learning to model the search dynamics. Then, the learned model is combined with the original objective function to guide the search in a bootstrapping fashion. Experimental results show that the learned models combined with the original search objective can indeed provide a smoothing effect, improving the search performance by a small margin.
abstract_zh: 多年来，无监督文本生成的研究一直受到关注。最近的一种方法是针对启发式定义的目标进行本地搜索，该目标指定语言流畅性、语义和其他特定于任务的属性。句子空间中的搜索是通过词级编辑操作实现的，包括插入、替换和删除。然而，这种目标函数是由多个组件手动设计的。尽管之前的工作已经表明，在真正的成功衡量标准（即 BLEU 和 iBLEU）方面，最大化该目标会产生良好的性能，但目标景观被认为是不平滑的，具有显着的噪声，这给优化带来了挑战。在本论文中，我们通过学习对搜索动态进行建模来解决启发式搜索目标中平滑噪声的研究问题。然后，将学习到的模型与原始目标函数相结合，以引导方式指导搜索。实验结果表明，学习模型与原始搜索目标相结合确实可以提供平滑效果，小幅提高搜索性能。

AI.tldr: 本文通过学习模型平滑启发式搜索目标中的噪声，以提升无监督释义任务的搜索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有启发式搜索目标函数由人工设计，存在非平滑性和显著噪声，导致优化困难。
AI.method: 学习搜索动态模型并与原始目标函数结合，通过引导方式优化搜索过程。
AI.result: 实验表明结合模型能有效平滑噪声，小幅提升搜索性能（如BLEU/iBLEU指标）。
AI.conclusion: 学习模型辅助原始目标可改善搜索噪声问题，但性能提升幅度有限。

authors_text: Michael Conner,Lucas Gral,Kevin Adams,David Hunger,Reagan Strelow,Alexander Neuwirth
title: Music Generation Using an LSTM
title_zh: 使用 LSTM 生成音乐
abstract: Over the past several years, deep learning for sequence modeling has grown in popularity. To achieve this goal, LSTM network structures have proven to be very useful for making predictions for the next output in a series. For instance, a smartphone predicting the next word of a text message could use an LSTM. We sought to demonstrate an approach of music generation using Recurrent Neural Networks (RNN). More specifically, a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural network. Generating music is a notoriously complicated task, whether handmade or generated, as there are a myriad of components involved. Taking this into account, we provide a brief synopsis of the intuition, theory, and application of LSTMs in music generation, develop and present the network we found to best achieve this goal, identify and address issues and challenges faced, and include potential future improvements for our network.
summary: Over the past several years, deep learning for sequence modeling has grown in popularity. To achieve this goal, LSTM network structures have proven to be very useful for making predictions for the next output in a series. For instance, a smartphone predicting the next word of a text message could use an LSTM. We sought to demonstrate an approach of music generation using Recurrent Neural Networks (RNN). More specifically, a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural network. Generating music is a notoriously complicated task, whether handmade or generated, as there are a myriad of components involved. Taking this into account, we provide a brief synopsis of the intuition, theory, and application of LSTMs in music generation, develop and present the network we found to best achieve this goal, identify and address issues and challenges faced, and include potential future improvements for our network.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，序列建模的深度学习越来越受欢迎。为了实现这一目标，LSTM 网络结构已被证明对于预测一系列中的下一个输出非常有用。例如，智能手机可以使用 LSTM 来预测短信的下一个单词。我们试图展示一种使用循环神经网络（RNN）生成音乐的方法。更具体地说，是长短期记忆 (LSTM) 神经网络。生成音乐是一项非常复杂的任务，无论是手工制作还是生成，因为涉及到无数的组件。考虑到这一点，我们简要概述了 LSTM 在音乐生成中的直觉、理论和应用，开发和展示了我们发现最能实现这一目标的网络，识别和解决所面临的问题和挑战，并包括我们网络未来潜在的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用长短期记忆网络（LSTM）进行音乐生成，探讨其理论应用与实现方法。
AI.motivation: 音乐生成任务复杂且涉及多维度要素，而LSTM在序列预测任务中表现出色，因此选择其作为音乐生成的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于循环神经网络（RNN）构建LSTM模型，通过训练音乐数据序列实现音乐生成，并分析模型优化与挑战。
AI.result: 成功开发出适用于音乐生成的LSTM网络，验证了其在序列建模中的有效性，同时指出训练数据质量与模型复杂度等关键问题。
AI.conclusion: LSTM为音乐生成提供了可行的技术路径，未来需通过改进数据预处理与网络结构进一步提升生成质量。

authors_text: Juan-Manuel Pascual-Gaspar,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Carlos Vivaracho
title: Fast on-line signature recognition based on VQ with time modeling
title_zh: 基于VQ时间建模的快速在线签名识别
comment: 23 pages, published in Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence, Volume 24, Issue 2, 2011, Pages 368-377, ISSN 0952-1976
comments: 23 pages, published in Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence, Volume 24, Issue 2, 2011, Pages 368-377, ISSN 0952-1976
abstract: This paper proposes a multi-section vector quantization approach for on-line signature recognition. We have used the MCYT database, which consists of 330 users and 25 skilled forgeries per person performed by 5 different impostors. This database is larger than those typically used in the literature. Nevertheless, we also provide results from the SVC database. Our proposed system outperforms the winner of SVC with a reduced computational requirement, which is around 47 times lower than DTW. In addition, our system improves the database storage requirements due to vector compression, and is more privacy-friendly as it is not possible to recover the original signature using the codebooks. Experimental results with MCYT provide a 99.76% identification rate and 2.46% EER (skilled forgeries and individual threshold). Experimental results with SVC are 100% of identification rate and 0% (individual threshold) and 0.31% (general threshold) when using a two-section VQ approach.
summary: This paper proposes a multi-section vector quantization approach for on-line signature recognition. We have used the MCYT database, which consists of 330 users and 25 skilled forgeries per person performed by 5 different impostors. This database is larger than those typically used in the literature. Nevertheless, we also provide results from the SVC database. Our proposed system outperforms the winner of SVC with a reduced computational requirement, which is around 47 times lower than DTW. In addition, our system improves the database storage requirements due to vector compression, and is more privacy-friendly as it is not possible to recover the original signature using the codebooks. Experimental results with MCYT provide a 99.76% identification rate and 2.46% EER (skilled forgeries and individual threshold). Experimental results with SVC are 100% of identification rate and 0% (individual threshold) and 0.31% (general threshold) when using a two-section VQ approach.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于在线签名识别的多段矢量量化方法。我们使用了 MCYT 数据库，该数据库由 330 名用户组成，每人由 5 个不同的冒名顶替者进行 25 次熟练的伪造。该数据库比文献中通常使用的数据库要大。尽管如此，我们也提供了 SVC 数据库的结果。我们提出的系统的性能优于 SVC 的获胜者，但计算要求较低，比 DTW 低约 47 倍。此外，我们的系统由于矢量压缩而提高了数据库存储要求，并且更加隐私友好，因为不可能使用密码本恢复原始签名。 MCYT 的实验结果提供了 99.76% 的识别率和 2.46% EER（熟练伪造和个人阈值）。 SVC 的实验结果是，当使用两部分 VQ 方法时，识别率为 100%，识别率为 0%（个体阈值）和 0.31%（一般阈值）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于矢量量化（VQ）并结合时间建模的在线签名识别方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在计算复杂度高、存储需求大及隐私风险等问题，需开发更高效且安全的签名识别技术。
AI.method: 采用多段矢量量化（VQ）方法，结合时间建模对签名进行压缩存储，并利用MCYT和SVC数据库验证性能。
AI.result: 在MCYT数据库上实现99.76%识别率和2.46% EER；在SVC数据库上达到100%识别率，且计算需求仅为DTW的1/47。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高识别精度的同时显著降低计算与存储开销，并通过代码本设计增强隐私保护。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于矢量量化（VQ）并结合时间建模的在线签名识别方法。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法存在计算复杂度高、存储需求大及隐私风险等问题，需开发更高效且安全的签名识别技术。
ai_content.method: 采用多段矢量量化（VQ）方法，结合时间建模对签名进行压缩存储，并利用MCYT和SVC数据库验证性能。

search_text: Fast on-line signature recognition based on VQ with time modeling 基于VQ时间建模的快速在线签名识别 This paper proposes a multi-section vector quantization approach for on-line signature recognition. We have used the MCYT database, which consists of 330 users and 25 skilled forgeries per person performed by 5 different impostors. This database is larger than those typically used in the literature. Nevertheless, we also provide results from the SVC database. Our proposed system outperforms the winner of SVC with a reduced computational requirement, which is around 47 times lower than DTW. In addition, our system improves the database storage requirements due to vector compression, and is more privacy-friendly as it is not possible to recover the original signature using the codebooks. Experimental results with MCYT provide a 99.76% identification rate and 2.46% EER (skilled forgeries and individual threshold). Experimental results with SVC are 100% of identification rate and 0% (individual threshold) and 0.31% (general threshold) when using a two-section VQ approach. 本文提出了一种用于在线签名识别的多段矢量量化方法。我们使用了 MCYT 数据库，该数据库由 330 名用户组成，每人由 5 个不同的冒名顶替者进行 25 次熟练的伪造。该数据库比文献中通常使用的数据库要大。尽管如此，我们也提供了 SVC 数据库的结果。我们提出的系统的性能优于 SVC 的获胜者，但计算要求较低，比 DTW 低约 47 倍。此外，我们的系统由于矢量压缩而提高了数据库存储要求，并且更加隐私友好，因为不可能使用密码本恢复原始签名。 MCYT 的实验结果提供了 99.76% 的识别率和 2.46% EER（熟练伪造和个人阈值）。 SVC 的实验结果是，当使用两部分 VQ 方法时，识别率为 100%，识别率为 0%（个体阈值）和 0.31%（一般阈值）。 本文提出一种基于矢量量化（VQ）并结合时间建模的在线签名识别方法。 Juan-Manuel Pascual-Gaspar,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Carlos Vivaracho cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Vidyesh Rao Anisetti,B. Scellier,J. M. Schwarz
title: Learning by non-interfering feedback chemical signaling in physical networks
title_zh: 通过物理网络中的无干扰反馈化学信号进行学习
abstract: Both non-neural and neural biological systems can learn. So rather than focusing on purely brain-like learning, efforts are underway to study learning in physical systems. Such efforts include equilibrium propagation (EP) and coupled learning (CL), which require storage of two different states-the free state and the perturbed state-during the learning process to retain information about gradients. Inspired by slime mold, we propose a new learning algorithm rooted in chemical signaling that does not require storage of two different states. Rather, the output error information is encoded in a chemical signal that diffuses into the network in a similar way as the activation/feedforward signal. The steady state feedback chemical concentration, along with the activation signal, stores the required gradient information locally. We apply our algorithm using a physical, linear flow network and test it using the Iris data set with 93% accuracy. We also prove that our algorithm performs gradient descent. Finally, in addition to comparing our algorithm directly with EP and CL, we address the biological plausibility of the algorithm.
summary: Both non-neural and neural biological systems can learn. So rather than focusing on purely brain-like learning, efforts are underway to study learning in physical systems. Such efforts include equilibrium propagation (EP) and coupled learning (CL), which require storage of two different states-the free state and the perturbed state-during the learning process to retain information about gradients. Inspired by slime mold, we propose a new learning algorithm rooted in chemical signaling that does not require storage of two different states. Rather, the output error information is encoded in a chemical signal that diffuses into the network in a similar way as the activation/feedforward signal. The steady state feedback chemical concentration, along with the activation signal, stores the required gradient information locally. We apply our algorithm using a physical, linear flow network and test it using the Iris data set with 93% accuracy. We also prove that our algorithm performs gradient descent. Finally, in addition to comparing our algorithm directly with EP and CL, we address the biological plausibility of the algorithm.
abstract_zh: 非神经和神经生物系统都可以学习。因此，人们正在努力研究物理系统中的学习，而不是专注于纯粹的类脑学习。这些努力包括平衡传播（EP）和耦合学习（CL），它们需要在学习过程中存储两种不同的状态（自由状态和扰动状态）以保留有关梯度的信息。受粘菌的启发，我们提出了一种基于化学信号传导的新学习算法，不需要存储两种不同的状态。相反，输出误差信息被编码在化学信号中，该化学信号以与激活/前馈信号类似的方式扩散到网络中。稳态反馈化学浓度与激活信号一起在本地存储所需的梯度信息。我们使用物理线性流网络应用我们的算法，并使用 Iris 数据集对其进行测试，准确率达到 93%。我们还证明我们的算法执行梯度下降。最后，除了直接将我们的算法与 EP 和 CL 进行比较之外，我们还讨论了该算法的生物学合理性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于化学信号的新型学习算法，用于物理网络中的非干扰反馈学习，无需存储两种状态。
AI.motivation: 传统学习算法如平衡传播（EP）和耦合学习（CL）需存储自由态与扰动态，限制了物理系统的应用。受黏菌化学信号启发，旨在开发更高效、生物合理的学习机制。
AI.method: 设计化学信号扩散机制，将输出误差编码为化学信号，与激活信号共同局部存储梯度信息，应用于物理线性流网络并测试于鸢尾花数据集，同时证明其梯度下降特性。
AI.result: 在鸢尾花数据集上实现93%分类准确率，验证算法有效性，并通过与EP/CL对比及生物合理性分析证明其优势。
AI.conclusion: 该算法无需多状态存储，通过化学信号实现高效梯度计算，为物理系统学习提供了新范式，具有潜在生物应用价值。

authors_text: Ahmad Shawahna,Sadiq M. Sait,Aiman El-Maleh,Irfan Ahmad
title: FxP-QNet: A Post-Training Quantizer for the Design of Mixed Low-Precision DNNs with Dynamic Fixed-Point Representation
title_zh: FxP-QNet：用于设计具有动态定点表示的混合低精度 DNN 的训练后量化器
comment: 30 pages, 12 figures, 5 tables. in IEEE Access, 2022
comments: 30 pages, 12 figures, 5 tables. in IEEE Access, 2022
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated their effectiveness in a wide range of computer vision tasks, with the state-of-the-art results obtained through complex and deep structures that require intensive computation and memory. Now-a-days, efficient model inference is crucial for consumer applications on resource-constrained platforms. As a result, there is much interest in the research and development of dedicated deep learning (DL) hardware to improve the throughput and energy efficiency of DNNs. Low-precision representation of DNN data-structures through quantization would bring great benefits to specialized DL hardware. However, the rigorous quantization leads to a severe accuracy drop. As such, quantization opens a large hyper-parameter space at bit-precision levels, the exploration of which is a major challenge. In this paper, we propose a novel framework referred to as the Fixed-Point Quantizer of deep neural Networks (FxP-QNet) that flexibly designs a mixed low-precision DNN for integer-arithmetic-only deployment. Specifically, the FxP-QNet gradually adapts the quantization level for each data-structure of each layer based on the trade-off between the network accuracy and the low-precision requirements. Additionally, it employs post-training self-distillation and network prediction error statistics to optimize the quantization of floating-point values into fixed-point numbers. Examining FxP-QNet on state-of-the-art architectures and the benchmark ImageNet dataset, we empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of FxP-QNet in achieving the accuracy-compression trade-off without the need for training. The results show that FxP-QNet-quantized AlexNet, VGG-16, and ResNet-18 reduce the overall memory requirements of their full-precision counterparts by 7.16x, 10.36x, and 6.44x with less than 0.95%, 0.95%, and 1.99% accuracy drop, respectively.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated their effectiveness in a wide range of computer vision tasks, with the state-of-the-art results obtained through complex and deep structures that require intensive computation and memory. Now-a-days, efficient model inference is crucial for consumer applications on resource-constrained platforms. As a result, there is much interest in the research and development of dedicated deep learning (DL) hardware to improve the throughput and energy efficiency of DNNs. Low-precision representation of DNN data-structures through quantization would bring great benefits to specialized DL hardware. However, the rigorous quantization leads to a severe accuracy drop. As such, quantization opens a large hyper-parameter space at bit-precision levels, the exploration of which is a major challenge. In this paper, we propose a novel framework referred to as the Fixed-Point Quantizer of deep neural Networks (FxP-QNet) that flexibly designs a mixed low-precision DNN for integer-arithmetic-only deployment. Specifically, the FxP-QNet gradually adapts the quantization level for each data-structure of each layer based on the trade-off between the network accuracy and the low-precision requirements. Additionally, it employs post-training self-distillation and network prediction error statistics to optimize the quantization of floating-point values into fixed-point numbers. Examining FxP-QNet on state-of-the-art architectures and the benchmark ImageNet dataset, we empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of FxP-QNet in achieving the accuracy-compression trade-off without the need for training. The results show that FxP-QNet-quantized AlexNet, VGG-16, and ResNet-18 reduce the overall memory requirements of their full-precision counterparts by 7.16x, 10.36x, and 6.44x with less than 0.95%, 0.95%, and 1.99% accuracy drop, respectively.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已在各种计算机视觉任务中证明了其有效性，通过需要大量计算和内存的复杂和深层结构获得了最先进的结果。如今，高效的模型推理对于资源受限平台上的消费者应用程序至关重要。因此，人们对专用深度学习 (DL) 硬件的研究和开发非常感兴趣，以提高 DNN 的吞吐量和能源效率。通过量化对 DNN 数据结构进行低精度表示将为专用深度学习硬件带来巨大好处。然而，严格的量化导致精度严重下降。因此，量化在位精度级别上打开了一个巨大的超参数空间，对其的探索是一个重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为深度神经网络定点量化器 (FxP-QNet) 的新颖框架，该框架灵活地设计用于仅整数算术部署的混合低精度 DNN。具体来说，FxP-QNet 基于网络精度和低精度要求之间的权衡，逐渐适应每层每种数据结构的量化级别。此外，它还采用训练后自蒸馏和网络预测误差统计来优化浮点值到定点数的量化。通过在最先进的架构和基准 ImageNet 数据集上检查 FxP-QNet，我们凭经验证明了 FxP-QNet 在无需训练的情况下实现精度与压缩权衡的有效性。结果表明，FxP-QNet 量化的 AlexNet、VGG-16 和 ResNet-18 将其全精度对应模型的总体内存需求降低了 7.16 倍、10.36 倍和 6.44 倍，准确率下降分别小于 0.95%、0.95% 和 1.99%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FxP-QNet的后训练量化框架，用于设计混合低精度深度神经网络（DNN），以在不牺牲精度的前提下实现模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在资源受限设备上的高效推理至关重要，但量化会导致精度显著下降，探索低精度与精度的平衡是关键挑战。
AI.method: FxP-QNet通过动态固定点表示，结合后训练自蒸馏和网络预测误差统计，逐层调整量化级别，实现混合低精度部署。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，FxP-QNet量化后的AlexNet、VGG-16和ResNet-18模型分别减少7.16x、10.36x和6.44x内存需求，精度损失低于2%。
AI.conclusion: FxP-QNet有效平衡了精度与压缩比，无需重新训练即可实现高效低精度DNN部署。
