result: 在ImageNet数据集上，FxP-QNet量化后的AlexNet、VGG-16和ResNet-18模型分别减少7.16x、10.36x和6.44x内存需求，精度损失低于2%。
conclusion: FxP-QNet有效平衡了精度与压缩比，无需重新训练即可实现高效低精度DNN部署。
search_text: FxP-QNet: A Post-Training Quantizer for the Design of Mixed Low-Precision DNNs with Dynamic Fixed-Point Representation FxP-QNet：用于设计具有动态定点表示的混合低精度 DNN 的训练后量化器 Deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated their effectiveness in a wide range of computer vision tasks, with the state-of-the-art results obtained through complex and deep structures that require intensive computation and memory. Now-a-days, efficient model inference is crucial for consumer applications on resource-constrained platforms. As a result, there is much interest in the research and development of dedicated deep learning (DL) hardware to improve the throughput and energy efficiency of DNNs. Low-precision representation of DNN data-structures through quantization would bring great benefits to specialized DL hardware. However, the rigorous quantization leads to a severe accuracy drop. As such, quantization opens a large hyper-parameter space at bit-precision levels, the exploration of which is a major challenge. In this paper, we propose a novel framework referred to as the Fixed-Point Quantizer of deep neural Networks (FxP-QNet) that flexibly designs a mixed low-precision DNN for integer-arithmetic-only deployment. Specifically, the FxP-QNet gradually adapts the quantization level for each data-structure of each layer based on the trade-off between the network accuracy and the low-precision requirements. Additionally, it employs post-training self-distillation and network prediction error statistics to optimize the quantization of floating-point values into fixed-point numbers. Examining FxP-QNet on state-of-the-art architectures and the benchmark ImageNet dataset, we empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of FxP-QNet in achieving the accuracy-compression trade-off without the need for training. The results show that FxP-QNet-quantized AlexNet, VGG-16, and ResNet-18 reduce the overall memory requirements of their full-precision counterparts by 7.16x, 10.36x, and 6.44x with less than 0.95%, 0.95%, and 1.99% accuracy drop, respectively. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已在各种计算机视觉任务中证明了其有效性，通过需要大量计算和内存的复杂和深层结构获得了最先进的结果。如今，高效的模型推理对于资源受限平台上的消费者应用程序至关重要。因此，人们对专用深度学习 (DL) 硬件的研究和开发非常感兴趣，以提高 DNN 的吞吐量和能源效率。通过量化对 DNN 数据结构进行低精度表示将为专用深度学习硬件带来巨大好处。然而，严格的量化导致精度严重下降。因此，量化在位精度级别上打开了一个巨大的超参数空间，对其的探索是一个重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为深度神经网络定点量化器 (FxP-QNet) 的新颖框架，该框架灵活地设计用于仅整数算术部署的混合低精度 DNN。具体来说，FxP-QNet 基于网络精度和低精度要求之间的权衡，逐渐适应每层每种数据结构的量化级别。此外，它还采用训练后自蒸馏和网络预测误差统计来优化浮点值到定点数的量化。通过在最先进的架构和基准 ImageNet 数据集上检查 FxP-QNet，我们凭经验证明了 FxP-QNet 在无需训练的情况下实现精度与压缩权衡的有效性。结果表明，FxP-QNet 量化的 AlexNet、VGG-16 和 ResNet-18 将其全精度对应模型的总体内存需求降低了 7.16 倍、10.36 倍和 6.44 倍，准确率下降分别小于 0.95%、0.95% 和 1.99%。 本文提出了一种名为FxP-QNet的后训练量化框架，用于设计混合低精度深度神经网络（DNN），以在不牺牲精度的前提下实现模型压缩。 Ahmad Shawahna,Sadiq M. Sait,Aiman El-Maleh,Irfan Ahmad cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.AR,cs.CV

authors_text: Joshua Weir,Junhong Zhao,Andrew Chalmers,Taehyun Rhee
title: Deep Portrait Delighting
title_zh: 深邃的肖像令人愉悦
abstract: We present a deep neural network for removing undesirable shading features from an unconstrained portrait image, recovering the underlying texture. Our training scheme incorporates three regularization strategies: masked loss, to emphasize high-frequency shading features; soft-shadow loss, which improves sensitivity to subtle changes in lighting; and shading-offset estimation, to supervise separation of shading and texture. Our method demonstrates improved delighting quality and generalization when compared with the state-of-the-art. We further demonstrate how our delighting method can enhance the performance of light-sensitive computer vision tasks such as face relighting and semantic parsing, allowing them to handle extreme lighting conditions.
summary: We present a deep neural network for removing undesirable shading features from an unconstrained portrait image, recovering the underlying texture. Our training scheme incorporates three regularization strategies: masked loss, to emphasize high-frequency shading features; soft-shadow loss, which improves sensitivity to subtle changes in lighting; and shading-offset estimation, to supervise separation of shading and texture. Our method demonstrates improved delighting quality and generalization when compared with the state-of-the-art. We further demonstrate how our delighting method can enhance the performance of light-sensitive computer vision tasks such as face relighting and semantic parsing, allowing them to handle extreme lighting conditions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种深度神经网络，用于从无约束的肖像图像中去除不需要的阴影特征，恢复底层纹理。我们的训练方案包含三种正则化策略：掩蔽损失，强调高频阴影特征；软阴影损失，提高对光照细微变化的敏感度；和阴影偏移估计，以监督阴影和纹理的分离。与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法展示了改进的令人愉悦的质量和泛化能力。我们进一步展示了我们令人愉悦的方法如何增强光敏计算机视觉任务的性能，例如面部重新照明和语义解析，使它们能够处理极端的照明条件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度神经网络，用于去除人像中的不良阴影特征，恢复底层纹理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在极端光照条件下难以有效分离阴影与纹理，影响光照敏感型计算机视觉任务的性能。
AI.method: 采用三种正则化策略：掩码损失（强化高频阴影特征）、软阴影损失（提升光照变化敏感度）和阴影偏移估计（监督阴影-纹理分离）。
AI.result: 相比最先进方法，本方法在去阴影质量和泛化能力上表现更优，并提升人脸重光照和语义分割等任务在极端光照下的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为光照敏感型视觉任务提供了鲁棒的预处理方案，有效解决了复杂光照条件下的纹理恢复难题。

authors_text: Jiachen Liu,Pan Ji,Nitin Bansal,Changjiang Cai,Qingan Yan,Xiaolei Huang,Yi Xu
title: PlaneMVS: 3D Plane Reconstruction from Multi-View Stereo
title_zh: PlaneMVS：多视图立体的 3D 平面重建
abstract: We present a novel framework named PlaneMVS for 3D plane reconstruction from multiple input views with known camera poses. Most previous learning-based plane reconstruction methods reconstruct 3D planes from single images, which highly rely on single-view regression and suffer from depth scale ambiguity. In contrast, we reconstruct 3D planes with a multi-view-stereo (MVS) pipeline that takes advantage of multi-view geometry. We decouple plane reconstruction into a semantic plane detection branch and a plane MVS branch. The semantic plane detection branch is based on a single-view plane detection framework but with differences. The plane MVS branch adopts a set of slanted plane hypotheses to replace conventional depth hypotheses to perform plane sweeping strategy and finally learns pixel-level plane parameters and its planar depth map. We present how the two branches are learned in a balanced way, and propose a soft-pooling loss to associate the outputs of the two branches and make them benefit from each other. Extensive experiments on various indoor datasets show that PlaneMVS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) single-view plane reconstruction methods on both plane detection and 3D geometry metrics. Our method even outperforms a set of SOTA learning-based MVS methods thanks to the learned plane priors. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work on 3D plane reconstruction within an end-to-end MVS framework. Source code: https://github.com/oppo-us-research/PlaneMVS.
summary: We present a novel framework named PlaneMVS for 3D plane reconstruction from multiple input views with known camera poses. Most previous learning-based plane reconstruction methods reconstruct 3D planes from single images, which highly rely on single-view regression and suffer from depth scale ambiguity. In contrast, we reconstruct 3D planes with a multi-view-stereo (MVS) pipeline that takes advantage of multi-view geometry. We decouple plane reconstruction into a semantic plane detection branch and a plane MVS branch. The semantic plane detection branch is based on a single-view plane detection framework but with differences. The plane MVS branch adopts a set of slanted plane hypotheses to replace conventional depth hypotheses to perform plane sweeping strategy and finally learns pixel-level plane parameters and its planar depth map. We present how the two branches are learned in a balanced way, and propose a soft-pooling loss to associate the outputs of the two branches and make them benefit from each other. Extensive experiments on various indoor datasets show that PlaneMVS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) single-view plane reconstruction methods on both plane detection and 3D geometry metrics. Our method even outperforms a set of SOTA learning-based MVS methods thanks to the learned plane priors. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work on 3D plane reconstruction within an end-to-end MVS framework. Source code: https://github.com/oppo-us-research/PlaneMVS.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个名为 PlaneMVS 的新颖框架，用于从具有已知相机姿势的多个输入视图进行 3D 平面重建。之前大多数基于学习的平面重建方法都是​​从单张图像重建 3D 平面，这种方法高度依赖单视图回归，并且存在深度尺度模糊性。相比之下，我们通过利用多视图几何的多视图立体 (MVS) 管道重建 3D 平面。我们将平面重建解耦为语义平面检测分支和平面 MVS 分支。语义平面检测分支基于单视图平面检测框架，但有所不同。平面MVS分支采用一组倾斜平面假设代替传统的深度假设来执行平面扫描策略，最终学习像素级平面参数及其平面深度图。我们展示了如何以平衡的方式学习两个分支，并提出了软池损失来​​关联两个分支的输出并使它们彼此受益。对各种室内数据集的大量实验表明，PlaneMVS 在平面检测和 3D 几何度量方面均显着优于最先进的 (SOTA) 单视图平面重建方法。由于学习到的平面先验，我们的方法甚至优于一组基于 SOTA 学习的 MVS 方法。据我们所知，这是第一个在端到端 MVS 框架内进行 3D 平面重建的工作。源代码：https://github.com/oppo-us-research/PlaneMVS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PlaneMVS框架，通过多视角立体视觉实现3D平面重建。
AI.motivation: 传统单视角平面重建方法依赖单图回归，存在深度尺度模糊问题；现有MVS方法未充分结合平面先验知识。
AI.method: 框架分为语义平面检测分支和平面MVS分支，采用斜面假设代替深度假设，结合软池化损失联合优化两个分支。
AI.result: 在多个室内数据集上，PlaneMVS在平面检测和几何指标上均优于单视角方法及现有MVS方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现端到端MVS框架下的3D平面重建，代码已开源。

ai_content.conclusion: 首次实现端到端MVS框架下的3D平面重建，代码已开源。

authors_text: Hongrun Zhang,Yanda Meng,Yitian Zhao,Yihong Qiao,Xiaoyun Yang,Sarah E. Coupland,Yalin Zheng
title: DTFD-MIL: Double-Tier Feature Distillation Multiple Instance Learning for Histopathology Whole Slide Image Classification
title_zh: DTFD-MIL：用于组织病理学全幻灯片图像分类的双层特征蒸馏多实例学习
abstract: Multiple instance learning (MIL) has been increasingly used in the classification of histopathology whole slide images (WSIs). However, MIL approaches for this specific classification problem still face unique challenges, particularly those related to small sample cohorts. In these, there are limited number of WSI slides (bags), while the resolution of a single WSI is huge, which leads to a large number of patches (instances) cropped from this slide. To address this issue, we propose to virtually enlarge the number of bags by introducing the concept of pseudo-bags, on which a double-tier MIL framework is built to effectively use the intrinsic features. Besides, we also contribute to deriving the instance probability under the framework of attention-based MIL, and utilize the derivation to help construct and analyze the proposed framework. The proposed method outperforms other latest methods on the CAMELYON-16 by substantially large margins, and is also better in performance on the TCGA lung cancer dataset. The proposed framework is ready to be extended for wider MIL applications. The code is available at: https://github.com/hrzhang1123/DTFD-MIL
summary: Multiple instance learning (MIL) has been increasingly used in the classification of histopathology whole slide images (WSIs). However, MIL approaches for this specific classification problem still face unique challenges, particularly those related to small sample cohorts. In these, there are limited number of WSI slides (bags), while the resolution of a single WSI is huge, which leads to a large number of patches (instances) cropped from this slide. To address this issue, we propose to virtually enlarge the number of bags by introducing the concept of pseudo-bags, on which a double-tier MIL framework is built to effectively use the intrinsic features. Besides, we also contribute to deriving the instance probability under the framework of attention-based MIL, and utilize the derivation to help construct and analyze the proposed framework. The proposed method outperforms other latest methods on the CAMELYON-16 by substantially large margins, and is also better in performance on the TCGA lung cancer dataset. The proposed framework is ready to be extended for wider MIL applications. The code is available at: https://github.com/hrzhang1123/DTFD-MIL
abstract_zh: 多实例学习 (MIL) 已越来越多地用于组织病理学全切片图像 (WSI) 的分类。然而，针对这一特定分类问题的 MIL 方法仍然面临着独特的挑战，特别是与小样本群体相关的挑战。其中，WSI幻灯片（包）的数量有限，而单个WSI的分辨率巨大，这导致从这张幻灯片中裁剪出大量的补丁（实例）。为了解决这个问题，我们建议通过引入伪包的概念来虚拟地增加包的数量，并在其上构建双层MIL框架以有效地利用固有特征。此外，我们还致力于推导基于注意力的 MIL 框架下的实例概率，并利用推导来帮助构建和分析所提出的框架。该方法在 CAMELYON-16 上大幅优于其他最新方法，并且在 TCGA 肺癌数据集上的性能也更好。拟议的框架已准备好扩展到更广泛的 MIL 应用。代码位于：https://github.com/hrzhang1123/DTFD-MIL

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DTFD-MIL的双层特征蒸馏多实例学习框架，用于解决病理全切片图像分类中的小样本问题。
AI.motivation: 在病理全切片图像分类中，多实例学习（MIL）方法面临小样本集的挑战，即WSI样本数量有限但单个WSI分辨率极高，导致实例数量庞大，难以有效利用。
AI.method: 本文引入伪袋的概念以虚拟增加样本数量，并构建双层MIL框架，结合基于注意力的MIL框架推导实例概率，以帮助构建和分析所提出的框架。
AI.result: 该方法在CAMELYON-16数据集上显著优于其他最新方法，并在TCGA肺癌数据集上也表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具有良好的扩展性，适用于更广泛的MIL应用，且代码已开源。

authors_text: Ozgenur Kavas-Torris,Levent Guvenc
title: Modelling and Analysis of Car Following Algorithms for Fuel Economy Improvement in Connected and Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs)
title_zh: 用于提高联网自动驾驶汽车 (CAV) 燃油经济性的汽车跟随算法的建模和分析
abstract: Connectivity in ground vehicles allows vehicles to share crucial vehicle data, such as vehicle acceleration, with each other. Using sensors such as cameras, radars and lidars, on the other hand, the intravehicular distance between a leader vehicle and a host vehicle can be detected, as well as the relative speed. Cooperative Adaptive Cruise Control (CACC) builds upon ground vehicle connectivity and sensor information to form convoys with automated car following. CACC can also be used to improve fuel economy and mobility performance of vehicles in the said convoy. In this paper, 3 car following algorithms for fuel economy of CAVs are presented. An Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) algorithm was designed as the benchmark model for comparison. A Cooperative Adaptive Cruise Control (CACC) was designed, which uses lead vehicle acceleration received through V2V in car following. an Ecological Cooperative Adaptive Cruise Control (Eco-CACC) model was developed that takes the erratic lead vehicle acceleration as a disturbance to be attenuated. A High Level (HL) controller was designed for decision making when the lead vehicle was an erratic driver. Model-in-the-Loop (MIL) and Hardware-in-the-Loop (HIL) simulations were run to test these car following algorithms for fuel economy performance. The results show that the HL controller was able to attain a smooth speed profile that consumed less fuel through using CACC and Eco-CACC than its ACC counterpart when the lead vehicle was erratic.

Using sensors such as cameras, radars and lidars, on the other hand, the intravehicular distance between a leader vehicle and a host vehicle can be detected, as well as the relative speed. Cooperative Adaptive Cruise Control (CACC) builds upon ground vehicle connectivity and sensor information to form convoys with automated car following. CACC can also be used to improve fuel economy and mobility performance of vehicles in the said convoy. In this paper, 3 car following algorithms for fuel economy of CAVs are presented. An Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) algorithm was designed as the benchmark model for comparison. A Cooperative Adaptive Cruise Control (CACC) was designed, which uses lead vehicle acceleration received through V2V in car following. an Ecological Cooperative Adaptive Cruise Control (Eco-CACC) model was developed that takes the erratic lead vehicle acceleration as a disturbance to be attenuated. A High Level (HL) controller was designed for decision making when the lead vehicle was an erratic driver. Model-in-the-Loop (MIL) and Hardware-in-the-Loop (HIL) simulations were run to test these car following algorithms for fuel economy performance. The results show that the HL controller was able to attain a smooth speed profile that consumed less fuel through using CACC and Eco-CACC than its ACC counterpart when the lead vehicle was erratic.
abstract_zh: 地面车辆的连接允许车辆彼此共享关键的车辆数据，例如车辆加速度。另一方面，使用摄像头、雷达和激光雷达等传感器，可以检测引导车辆和主车辆之间的车内距离以及相对速度。协作自适应巡航控制 (CACC) 以地面车辆连接和传感器信息为基础，形成具有自动跟随车辆的车队。 CACC 还可用于提高上述车队中车辆的燃油经济性和机动性能。本文提出了 3 种用于 CAV 燃油经济性的汽车跟随算法。设计了自适应巡航控制（ACC）算法作为比较的基准模型。设计了一种协作自适应巡航控制 (CACC)，它在跟车中使用通过 V2V 接收的前车加速度。开发了生态协作自适应巡航控制（Eco-CACC）模型，该模型将不稳定的引导车辆加速度作为要衰减的干扰。高级 (HL) 控制器专为在领先车辆驾驶不稳定时做出决策而设计。运行模型在环 (MIL) 和硬件在环 (HIL) 仿真来测试这些汽车跟随算法的燃油经济性。结果表明，当前车不稳定时，HL 控制器能够通过使用 CACC 和 Eco-CACC 获得平滑的速度曲线，并且比 ACC 控制器消耗更少的燃料。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了用于提高联网和自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）燃油经济性的三种跟车算法。
AI.motivation: 联网车辆可以通过共享车辆数据和传感器信息来改善燃油经济性和移动性能，但如何应对领头车辆的不稳定加速仍是一个挑战。
AI.method: 设计了三种跟车算法，包括基准的自适应巡航控制（ACC）、协同自适应巡航控制（CACC）以及生态协同自适应巡航控制（Eco-CACC），并结合高层（HL）控制器处理领头车辆不稳定驾驶的情况，通过模型在环（MIL）和硬件在环（HIL）仿真进行测试。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，当领头车辆驾驶不稳定时，使用CACC和Eco-CACC配合HL控制器能够获得更平滑的速度曲线，从而比ACC算法消耗更少的燃油。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的CACC和Eco-CACC算法，结合HL控制器，能够有效提高联网和自动驾驶车辆在领头车辆不稳定情况下的燃油经济性。

authors_text: Alexander Geng,Ali Moghiseh,Claudia Redenbach,Katja Schladitz
title: A hybrid quantum image edge detector for the NISQ era
title_zh: NISQ时代的混合量子图像边缘检测器
comment: The paper is submitted in the journal Quantum Machine Intelligence with manuscript number QUMI-D-22-00011 (22.03.2022)
comments: The paper is submitted in the journal Quantum Machine Intelligence with manuscript number QUMI-D-22-00011 (22.03.2022)
abstract: Edges are image locations where the gray value intensity changes suddenly. They are among the most important features to understand and segment an image. Edge detection is a standard task in digital image processing, solved for example using filtering techniques. However, the amount of data to be processed grows rapidly and pushes even supercomputers to their limits. Quantum computing promises exponentially lower memory usage in terms of the number of qubits compared to the number of classical bits. In this paper, we propose a hybrid method for quantum edge detection based on the idea of a quantum artificial neuron. Our method can be practically implemented on quantum computers, especially on those of the current noisy intermediate-scale quantum era. We compare six variants of the method to reduce the number of circuits and thus the time required for the quantum edge detection. Taking advantage of the scalability of our method, we can practically detect edges in images considerably larger than reached before.

We compare six variants of the method to reduce the number of circuits and thus the time required for the quantum edge detection. Taking advantage of the scalability of our method, we can practically detect edges in images considerably larger than reached before.
abstract_zh: 边缘是图像中灰度值强度突然变化的位置。它们是理解和分割图像的最重要的特征之一。边缘检测是数字图像处理中的一项标准任务，例如使用滤波技术来解决。然而，要处理的数据量迅速增长，甚至将超级计算机推向极限。与经典位数相比，量子计算有望以量子位数的形式显着降低内存使用量。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于量子人工神经元思想的量子边缘检测混合方法。我们的方法可以在量子计算机上实际实现，特别是在当前嘈杂的中尺度量子时代的量子计算机上。我们比较了该方法的六种变体，以减少电路数量，从而减少量子边缘检测所需的时间。利用我们方法的可扩展性，我们实际上可以检测比以前大得多的图像中的边缘。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于当前嘈杂中等规模量子计算时代的混合量子图像边缘检测方法。
AI.motivation: 传统图像边缘检测方法面临数据量激增导致的计算瓶颈，量子计算可提供指数级内存效率提升，但现有量子算法难以在NISQ设备上实现。
AI.method: 基于量子人工神经元设计混合量子边缘检测算法，通过优化六种电路变体减少量子资源消耗，利用方法可扩展性实现大尺寸图像边缘检测。
AI.result: 在保持检测精度的同时显著降低量子电路数量，成功实现比现有方法更大规模的图像边缘检测。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为NISQ时代的量子图像处理提供了可行方案，展示了量子计算在经典图像处理任务中的潜力。

search_text: A hybrid quantum image edge detector for the NISQ era NISQ时代的混合量子图像边缘检测器 Edges are image locations where the gray value intensity changes suddenly. They are among the most important features to understand and segment an image. Edge detection is a standard task in digital image processing, solved for example using filtering techniques. However, the amount of data to be processed grows rapidly and pushes even supercomputers to their limits. Quantum computing promises exponentially lower memory usage in terms of the number of qubits compared to the number of classical bits. In this paper, we propose a hybrid method for quantum edge detection based on the idea of a quantum artificial neuron. Our method can be practically implemented on quantum computers, especially on those of the current noisy intermediate-scale quantum era. We compare six variants of the method to reduce the number of circuits and thus the time required for the quantum edge detection. Taking advantage of the scalability of our method, we can practically detect edges in images considerably larger than reached before. 边缘是图像中灰度值强度突然变化的位置。它们是理解和分割图像的最重要的特征之一。边缘检测是数字图像处理中的一项标准任务，例如使用滤波技术来解决。然而，要处理的数据量迅速增长，甚至将超级计算机推向极限。与经典位数相比，量子计算有望以量子位数的形式显着降低内存使用量。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于量子人工神经元思想的量子边缘检测混合方法。我们的方法可以在量子计算机上实际实现，特别是在当前嘈杂的中尺度量子时代的量子计算机上。我们比较了该方法的六种变体，以减少电路数量，从而减少量子边缘检测所需的时间。利用我们方法的可扩展性，我们实际上可以检测比以前大得多的图像中的边缘。 本文提出一种适用于当前嘈杂中等规模量子计算时代的混合量子图像边缘检测方法。 Alexander Geng,Ali Moghiseh,Claudia Redenbach,Katja Schladitz quant-ph,cs.AI,eess.IV

authors_text: Mateus Valverde Gasparino,Arun Narenthiran Sivakumar,Yixiao Liu,Andres Eduardo Baquero Velasquez,Vitor Akihiro Hisano Higuti,John Rogers,Huy Tran,Girish Chowdhary
title: WayFAST: Navigation with Predictive Traversability in the Field
title_zh: WayFAST：具有预测可穿越性的现场导航
comment: Project website with code and videos: https://mateusgasparino.com/wayfast-traversability-navigation/ Published in the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L, 2022) Accepted for presentation in the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: Project website with code and videos: https://mateusgasparino.com/wayfast-traversability-navigation/ Published in the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L, 2022) Accepted for presentation in the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: We present a self-supervised approach for learning to predict traversable paths for wheeled mobile robots that require good traction to navigate. Our algorithm, termed WayFAST (Waypoint Free Autonomous Systems for Traversability), uses RGB and depth data, along with navigation experience, to autonomously generate traversable paths in outdoor unstructured environments. Our key inspiration is that traction can be estimated for rolling robots using kinodynamic models. Using traction estimates provided by an online receding horizon estimator, we are able to train a traversability prediction neural network in a self-supervised manner, without requiring heuristics utilized by previous methods. We demonstrate the effectiveness of WayFAST through extensive field testing in varying environments, ranging from sandy dry beaches to forest canopies and snow covered grass fields. Our results clearly demonstrate that WayFAST can learn to avoid geometric obstacles as well as untraversable terrain, such as snow, which would be difficult to avoid with sensors that provide only geometric data, such as LiDAR. Furthermore, we show that our training pipeline based on online traction estimates is more data-efficient than other heuristic-based methods.
summary: We present a self-supervised approach for learning to predict traversable paths for wheeled mobile robots that require good traction to navigate. Our algorithm, termed WayFAST (Waypoint Free Autonomous Systems for Traversability), uses RGB and depth data, along with navigation experience, to autonomously generate traversable paths in outdoor unstructured environments. Our key inspiration is that traction can be estimated for rolling robots using kinodynamic models. Using traction estimates provided by an online receding horizon estimator, we are able to train a traversability prediction neural network in a self-supervised manner, without requiring heuristics utilized by previous methods. We demonstrate the effectiveness of WayFAST through extensive field testing in varying environments, ranging from sandy dry beaches to forest canopies and snow covered grass fields. Our results clearly demonstrate that WayFAST can learn to avoid geometric obstacles as well as untraversable terrain, such as snow, which would be difficult to avoid with sensors that provide only geometric data, such as LiDAR. Furthermore, we show that our training pipeline based on online traction estimates is more data-efficient than other heuristic-based methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种自我监督的方法，用于学习预测需要良好牵引力才能导航的轮式移动机器人的可行走路径。我们的算法称为 WayFAST（用于可通行的无路点自主系统），使用 RGB 和深度数据以及导航经验，在室外非结构化环境中自动生成可通行路径。我们的主要灵感是可以使用运动动力学模型来估计滚动机器人的牵引力。使用在线后退地平线估计器提供的牵引力估计，我们能够以自我监督的方式训练可遍历性预测神经网络，而不需要以前方法使用的启发式方法。我们通过在不同环境（从干燥的沙滩到森林树冠和冰雪覆盖的草地）中进行广泛的现场测试来证明 WayFAST 的有效性。我们的结果清楚地表明，WayFAST 可以学会避开几何障碍物以及无法穿越的地形（例如雪），而使用仅提供几何数据的传感器（例如 LiDAR）很难避免这些障碍。此外，我们还表明，基于在线牵引力估计的训练流程比其他基于启发式的方法更具数据效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督方法WayFAST，利用牵引力估计预测轮式机器人可通行路径，无需依赖传统启发式方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖几何数据和启发式规则难以处理复杂地形，需开发基于牵引力估计的自监督方法以提升机器人在非结构化环境的导航能力。
AI.method: 融合RGB/深度数据与导航经验，通过在线牵引力估计器提供自监督信号训练神经网络，预测地形可通行性并生成路径。
AI.result: 在沙滩、森林和雪地等多场景测试中，WayFAST成功避开几何障碍与雪地等非几何可识别的不可通行区域，且数据效率优于启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于在线牵引力估计的自监督训练框架有效提升机器人地形适应能力，证明了该方法在复杂环境导航中的优势。

authors_text: Zexun Wang,Yuquan Le,Yi Zhu,Yuming Zhao,Mingchao Feng,Meng Chen,Xiaodong He
title: Building Robust Spoken Language Understanding by Cross Attention between Phoneme Sequence and ASR Hypothesis
title_zh: 通过音素序列和 ASR 假设之间的交叉注意力构建强大的口语理解
abstract: Building Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) robust to Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) errors is an essential issue for various voice-enabled virtual assistants. Considering that most ASR errors are caused by phonetic confusion between similar-sounding expressions, intuitively, leveraging the phoneme sequence of speech can complement ASR hypothesis and enhance the robustness of SLU. This paper proposes a novel model with Cross Attention for SLU (denoted as CASLU). The cross attention block is devised to catch the fine-grained interactions between phoneme and word embeddings in order to make the joint representations catch the phonetic and semantic features of input simultaneously and for overcoming the ASR errors in downstream natural language understanding (NLU) tasks. Extensive experiments are conducted on three datasets, showing the effectiveness and competitiveness of our approach. Additionally, We also validate the universality of CASLU and prove its complementarity when combining with other robust SLU techniques.
summary: Building Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) robust to Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) errors is an essential issue for various voice-enabled virtual assistants. Considering that most ASR errors are caused by phonetic confusion between similar-sounding expressions, intuitively, leveraging the phoneme sequence of speech can complement ASR hypothesis and enhance the robustness of SLU. This paper proposes a novel model with Cross Attention for SLU (denoted as CASLU). The cross attention block is devised to catch the fine-grained interactions between phoneme and word embeddings in order to make the joint representations catch the phonetic and semantic features of input simultaneously and for overcoming the ASR errors in downstream natural language understanding (NLU) tasks. Extensive experiments are conducted on three datasets, showing the effectiveness and competitiveness of our approach. Additionally, We also validate the universality of CASLU and prove its complementarity when combining with other robust SLU techniques.
abstract_zh: 对于各种支持语音的虚拟助理来说，构建对自动语音识别 (ASR) 错误具有鲁棒性的口语理解 (SLU) 是一个重要问题。考虑到大多数 ASR 错误是由相似发音表达之间的语音混淆引起的，直观上来说，利用语音的音素序列可以补充 ASR 假设并增强 SLU 的鲁棒性。本文提出了一种针对 SLU（表示为 CASLU）的交叉注意力模型。交叉注意力块旨在捕获音素和词嵌入之间的细粒度交互，以使联合表示同时捕获输入的语音和语义特征，并克服下游自然语言理解（NLU）任务中的 ASR 错误。 Extensive experiments are conducted on three datasets, showing the effectiveness and competitiveness of our approach. Additionally, We also validate the universality of CASLU and prove its complementarity when combining with other robust SLU techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于交叉注意力机制的新型SLU模型（CASLU），通过融合语音素序列与ASR假设来提升语音语言理解对ASR错误的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: ASR错误主要由相似发音的语音素混淆导致，现有SLU方法对ASR错误敏感，需通过利用语音素序列的细粒度信息增强鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计交叉注意力模块，捕捉语音素嵌入与词嵌入间的细粒度交互，联合表征语音特征与语义信息以缓解ASR错误影响。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上验证了CASLU的有效性与竞争力，并证明其与其他鲁棒SLU技术的互补性。
AI.conclusion: CASLU通过语音素-词级交叉注意力有效提升SLU鲁棒性，具有通用性且可与其他技术结合增强效果。

ai_content_json.method: 设计交叉注意力模块，捕捉语音素嵌入与词嵌入间的细粒度交互，联合表征语音特征与语义信息以缓解ASR错误影响。
ai_content_json.result: 在三个数据集上验证了CASLU的有效性与竞争力，并证明其与其他鲁棒SLU技术的互补性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: CASLU通过语音素-词级交叉注意力有效提升SLU鲁棒性，具有通用性且可与其他技术结合增强效果。

method: 设计交叉注意力模块，捕捉语音素嵌入与词嵌入间的细粒度交互，联合表征语音特征与语义信息以缓解ASR错误影响。

search_text: Building Robust Spoken Language Understanding by Cross Attention between Phoneme Sequence and ASR Hypothesis 通过音素序列和 ASR 假设之间的交叉注意力构建强大的口语理解 Building Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) robust to Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) errors is an essential issue for various voice-enabled virtual assistants. Considering that most ASR errors are caused by phonetic confusion between similar-sounding expressions, intuitively, leveraging the phoneme sequence of speech can complement ASR hypothesis and enhance the robustness of SLU. This paper proposes a novel model with Cross Attention for SLU (denoted as CASLU). The cross attention block is devised to catch the fine-grained interactions between phoneme and word embeddings in order to make the joint representations catch the phonetic and semantic features of input simultaneously and for overcoming the ASR errors in downstream natural language understanding (NLU) tasks. Extensive experiments are conducted on three datasets, showing the effectiveness and competitiveness of our approach. Additionally, We also validate the universality of CASLU and prove its complementarity when combining with other robust SLU techniques. 对于各种支持语音的虚拟助理来说，构建对自动语音识别 (ASR) 错误具有鲁棒性的口语理解 (SLU) 是一个重要问题。考虑到大多数 ASR 错误是由相似发音表达之间的语音混淆引起的，直观上来说，利用语音的音素序列可以补充 ASR 假设并增强 SLU 的鲁棒性。本文提出了一种针对 SLU（表示为 CASLU）的交叉注意力模型。交叉注意力块旨在捕获音素和词嵌入之间的细粒度交互，以使联合表示同时捕获输入的语音和语义特征，并克服下游自然语言理解（NLU）任务中的 ASR 错误。 Extensive experiments are conducted on three datasets, showing the effectiveness and competitiveness of our approach. Additionally, We also validate the universality of CASLU and prove its complementarity when combining with other robust SLU techniques. 本文提出一种基于交叉注意力机制的新型SLU模型（CASLU），通过融合语音素序列与ASR假设来提升语音语言理解对ASR错误的鲁棒性。 Zexun Wang,Yuquan Le,Yi Zhu,Yuming Zhao,Mingchao Feng,Meng Chen,Xiaodong He cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Sidney Pontes-Filho,Kathryn Walker,Elias Najarro,Stefano Nichele,Sebastian Risi
title: A Unified Substrate for Body-Brain Co-evolution
title_zh: 体脑协同进化的统一基础
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, accepted as a poster paper at The Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO 2022), accepted as workshop paper at Workshop From Cells to Societies: Collective Learning Across Scales at Tenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2022)
comments: 13 pages, 7 figures, accepted as a poster paper at The Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO 2022), accepted as workshop paper at Workshop From Cells to Societies: Collective Learning Across Scales at Tenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2022)
abstract: The discovery of complex multicellular organism development took millions of years of evolution. The genome of such a multicellular organism guides the development of its body from a single cell, including its control system. Our goal is to imitate this natural process using a single neural cellular automaton (NCA) as a genome for modular robotic agents. In the introduced approach, called Neural Cellular Robot Substrate (NCRS), a single NCA guides the growth of a robot and the cellular activity which controls the robot during deployment. We also introduce three benchmark environments, which test the ability of the approach to grow different robot morphologies. In this paper, NCRSs are trained with covariance matrix adaptation evolution strategy (CMA-ES), and covariance matrix adaptation MAP-Elites (CMA-ME) for quality diversity, which we show leads to more diverse robot morphologies with higher fitness scores. While the NCRS can solve the easier tasks from our benchmark environments, the success rate reduces when the difficulty of the task increases. We discuss directions for future work that may facilitate the use of the NCRS approach for more complex domains.
summary: The discovery of complex multicellular organism development took millions of years of evolution. The genome of such a multicellular organism guides the development of its body from a single cell, including its control system. Our goal is to imitate this natural process using a single neural cellular automaton (NCA) as a genome for modular robotic agents. In the introduced approach, called Neural Cellular Robot Substrate (NCRS), a single NCA guides the growth of a robot and the cellular activity which controls the robot during deployment. We also introduce three benchmark environments, which test the ability of the approach to grow different robot morphologies. In this paper, NCRSs are trained with covariance matrix adaptation evolution strategy (CMA-ES), and covariance matrix adaptation MAP-Elites (CMA-ME) for quality diversity, which we show leads to more diverse robot morphologies with higher fitness scores. While the NCRS can solve the easier tasks from our benchmark environments, the success rate reduces when the difficulty of the task increases. We discuss directions for future work that may facilitate the use of the NCRS approach for more complex domains.
abstract_zh: 复杂多细胞生物体发育的发现经历了数百万年的进化。这种多细胞生物的基因组从单个细胞指导其身体的发育，包括其控制系统。我们的目标是使用单个神经细胞自动机（NCA）作为模块化机器人代理的基因组来模仿这种自然过程。在所引入的称为神经细胞机器人基质 (NCRS) 的方法中，单个 NCA 指导机器人的生长以及在部署过程中控制机器人的细胞活动。我们还引入了三个基准环境，测试该方法生长不同机器人形态的能力。在本文中，NCRS 采用协方差矩阵适应进化策略 (CMA-ES) 和协方差矩阵适应 MAP-Elites (CMA-ME) 进行训练，以实现质量多样性，我们证明这会导致机器人形态更加多样化，适应度分数更高。虽然 NCRS 可以解决我们基准环境中较简单的任务，但当任务难度增加时，成功率就会降低。我们讨论了未来工作的方向，这些方向可能有助于将 NCRS 方法用于更复杂的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NCRS的统一基质，利用神经细胞自动机（NCA）作为基因组，实现模块化机器人的身体与大脑协同进化。
AI.motivation: 受复杂多细胞生物体进化过程启发，旨在通过模仿自然发育机制，使机器人具备自主生长和控制能力，以适应不同任务需求。
AI.method: 设计神经细胞自动机（NCA）作为基因组，结合CMA-ES和CMA-ME算法训练NCRS，通过三个基准环境测试其生成不同机器人形态的能力。
AI.result: NCRS在简单任务中表现良好，成功生成多样化形态且适应度较高；但面对复杂任务时成功率下降，需进一步优化。
AI.conclusion: NCRS为身体-大脑协同进化提供了可行框架，未来需改进以应对更复杂任务，提升鲁棒性和适应性。

authors_text: Anushri Dixit,Mohamadreza Ahmadi,Joel W. Burdick
title: Distributionally Robust Model Predictive Control with Total Variation Distance
title_zh: 具有总变异距离的分布鲁棒模型预测控制
abstract: This paper studies the problem of distributionally robust model predictive control (MPC) using total variation distance ambiguity sets. For a discrete-time linear system with additive disturbances, we provide a conditional value-at-risk reformulation of the MPC optimization problem that is distributionally robust in the expected cost and chance constraints. The distributionally robust chance constraint is over-approximated as a simpler, tightened chance constraint that reduces the computational burden. Numerical experiments support our results on probabilistic guarantees and computational efficiency.
summary: This paper studies the problem of distributionally robust model predictive control (MPC) using total variation distance ambiguity sets. For a discrete-time linear system with additive disturbances, we provide a conditional value-at-risk reformulation of the MPC optimization problem that is distributionally robust in the expected cost and chance constraints. The distributionally robust chance constraint is over-approximated as a simpler, tightened chance constraint that reduces the computational burden. Numerical experiments support our results on probabilistic guarantees and computational efficiency.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了使用全变差距离模糊集的分布鲁棒模型预测控制（MPC）问题。对于具有加性扰动的离散时间线性系统，我们提供了 MPC 优化问题的条件风险值重新表述，该问题在预期成本和机会约束下具有分布鲁棒性。分布稳健的机会约束被过度近似为更简单、更严格的机会约束，从而减少了计算负担。数值实验支持我们在概率保证和计算效率方面的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于总变差距离的分布鲁棒模型预测控制（MPC）方法，针对离散时间线性系统提出条件风险价值（CVaR）优化框架，通过紧缩机会约束降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统MPC在概率不确定性下的鲁棒性不足，而分布鲁棒方法虽能处理不确定性但计算复杂度高，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建总变差距离模糊集，将MPC优化问题转化为CVaR形式，并对分布鲁棒机会约束进行紧缩近似以简化计算。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了方法在概率保证和计算效率上的有效性，证明紧缩约束的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持分布鲁棒性的同时显著降低计算负担，适用于实际控制场景。

authors_text: Zhe Shen,Takeshi Tsuchiya
title: Cat-inspired Gaits for A Tilt-rotor -- from Symmetrical to Asymmetrical
title_zh: 受猫启发的倾转旋翼机步态——从对称到不对称
abstract: Among the tilt-rotors (quadrotors) developed in the last decades, Rylls model with eight inputs (four magnitudes of the thrusts and four tilting angles) attracted great attention. Typical feedback linearization maneuvers all the eight inputs with a united control rule to stabilize this tilt-rotor. Instead of assigning the tilting angles by the control rule, the recent research predetermined the tilting angles and left the magnitudes of the thrusts the only control signals. These tilting angles are designed to mimic the cat-trot gait, avoiding the singular decoupling matrix feedback linearization. To complete the discussions of the cat-gaits inspired tilt-rotor gaits, this research addresses the analyses on the rest of the common cat gaits, walk, run, transverse gallop, and rotary gallop. It is found that the singular decoupling matrix exist in walk gait and rotary gallop. Further modifications are conducted to these two gaits to accommodate the application of feedback linearization. The modified gaits with different periods are then applied to the tilt-rotor in tracking experiments, in which the references are uniform rectilinear motion and uniform circular motion. All the experiments are simulated in Simulink, MATLAB. The result shows that.
summary: Among the tilt-rotors (quadrotors) developed in the last decades, Rylls model with eight inputs (four magnitudes of the thrusts and four tilting angles) attracted great attention. Typical feedback linearization maneuvers all the eight inputs with a united control rule to stabilize this tilt-rotor. Instead of assigning the tilting angles by the control rule, the recent research predetermined the tilting angles and left the magnitudes of the thrusts the only control signals. These tilting angles are designed to mimic the cat-trot gait, avoiding the singular decoupling matrix feedback linearization. To complete the discussions of the cat-gaits inspired tilt-rotor gaits, this research addresses the analyses on the rest of the common cat gaits, walk, run, transverse gallop, and rotary gallop. It is found that the singular decoupling matrix exist in walk gait and rotary gallop. Further modifications are conducted to these two gaits to accommodate the application of feedback linearization. The modified gaits with different periods are then applied to the tilt-rotor in tracking experiments, in which the references are uniform rectilinear motion and uniform circular motion. All the experiments are simulated in Simulink, MATLAB. The result shows that.
abstract_zh: 在过去几十年开发的倾转旋翼机（四旋翼机）中，具有八个输入（四个推力大小和四个倾斜角）的Rylls模型引起了极大的关注。典型的反馈线性化通过统一的控制规则操纵所有八个输入来稳定该倾转旋翼。最近的研究不是通过控制规则来分配倾斜角度，而是预先确定倾斜角度，并将推力的大小作为唯一的控制信号。这些倾斜角度旨在模仿猫步态，避免奇异解耦矩阵反馈线性化。为了完成对受猫步态启发的倾转旋翼步态的讨论，本研究对其余常见猫步态（步行、跑步、横向驰骋和旋转驰骋）进行了分析。研究发现步行步态和旋转驰骋均存在奇异解耦矩阵。对这两种步态进行进一步修改以适应反馈线性化的应用。然后将不同周期的修正步态应用于倾斜旋翼进行跟踪实验，其中参考匀速直线运动和匀速圆周运动。所有实验均在Simulink、MATLAB中进行仿真。结果表明。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于猫步态的倾斜旋翼器（四旋翼）控制方法，从对称到非对称步态的分析与改进。
AI.motivation: 传统反馈线性化方法在倾斜旋翼控制中存在奇异性问题，需通过模仿猫的步态设计更鲁棒的控制策略。
AI.method: 分析猫的多种步态（行走、奔跑、横向奔跑、旋转奔跑），修正存在奇异性解耦矩阵的步态，并通过Simulink仿真验证轨迹跟踪性能。
AI.result: 修正后的步态在直线和圆周运动跟踪实验中表现出良好的控制效果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于猫步态的改进控制策略能有效避免奇异性问题，提升倾斜旋翼器的运动控制性能。

search_text: Cat-inspired Gaits for A Tilt-rotor -- from Symmetrical to Asymmetrical 受猫启发的倾转旋翼机步态——从对称到不对称 Among the tilt-rotors (quadrotors) developed in the last decades, Rylls model with eight inputs (four magnitudes of the thrusts and four tilting angles) attracted great attention. Typical feedback linearization maneuvers all the eight inputs with a united control rule to stabilize this tilt-rotor. Instead of assigning the tilting angles by the control rule, the recent research predetermined the tilting angles and left the magnitudes of the thrusts the only control signals. These tilting angles are designed to mimic the cat-trot gait, avoiding the singular decoupling matrix feedback linearization. To complete the discussions of the cat-gaits inspired tilt-rotor gaits, this research addresses the analyses on the rest of the common cat gaits, walk, run, transverse gallop, and rotary gallop. It is found that the singular decoupling matrix exist in walk gait and rotary gallop. Further modifications are conducted to these two gaits to accommodate the application of feedback linearization. The modified gaits with different periods are then applied to the tilt-rotor in tracking experiments, in which the references are uniform rectilinear motion and uniform circular motion. All the experiments are simulated in Simulink, MATLAB. The result shows that. 在过去几十年开发的倾转旋翼机（四旋翼机）中，具有八个输入（四个推力大小和四个倾斜角）的Rylls模型引起了极大的关注。典型的反馈线性化通过统一的控制规则操纵所有八个输入来稳定该倾转旋翼。最近的研究不是通过控制规则来分配倾斜角度，而是预先确定倾斜角度，并将推力的大小作为唯一的控制信号。这些倾斜角度旨在模仿猫步态，避免奇异解耦矩阵反馈线性化。为了完成对受猫步态启发的倾转旋翼步态的讨论，本研究对其余常见猫步态（步行、跑步、横向驰骋和旋转驰骋）进行了分析。研究发现步行步态和旋转驰骋均存在奇异解耦矩阵。对这两种步态进行进一步修改以适应反馈线性化的应用。然后将不同周期的修正步态应用于倾斜旋翼进行跟踪实验，其中参考匀速直线运动和匀速圆周运动。所有实验均在Simulink、MATLAB中进行仿真。结果表明。 本文研究了基于猫步态的倾斜旋翼器（四旋翼）控制方法，从对称到非对称步态的分析与改进。 Zhe Shen,Takeshi Tsuchiya cs.RO

authors_text: Tianyu Hua,Yonglong Tian,Sucheng Ren,Michalis Raptis,Hang Zhao,Leonid Sigal
title: Self-supervision through Random Segments with Autoregressive Coding (RandSAC)
title_zh: 通过自回归编码随机分段 (RandSAC) 进行自我监督
abstract: Inspired by the success of self-supervised autoregressive representation learning in natural language (GPT and its variants), and advances in recent visual architecture design with Vision Transformers (ViTs), in this paper, we explore the effect various design choices have on the success of applying such training strategies for visual feature learning. Specifically, we introduce a novel strategy that we call Random Segments with Autoregressive Coding (RandSAC). In RandSAC, we group patch representations (image tokens) into hierarchically arranged segments; within each segment, tokens are predicted in parallel, similar to BERT, while across segment predictions are sequential, similar to GPT. We illustrate that randomized serialization of the segments significantly improves the performance and results in distribution over spatially-long (across-segments) and -short (within-segment) predictions which are effective for feature learning. We illustrate the pertinence of these design choices and explore alternatives on a number of datasets (e.g., CIFAR10, CIFAR100, ImageNet). While our pre-training strategy works with a vanilla Transformer, we also propose a conceptually simple, but highly effective, addition to the decoder that allows learnable skip-connections to encoder$'$s feature layers, which further improves the performance.
summary: Inspired by the success of self-supervised autoregressive representation learning in natural language (GPT and its variants), and advances in recent visual architecture design with Vision Transformers (ViTs), in this paper, we explore the effect various design choices have on the success of applying such training strategies for visual feature learning. Specifically, we introduce a novel strategy that we call Random Segments with Autoregressive Coding (RandSAC). In RandSAC, we group patch representations (image tokens) into hierarchically arranged segments; within each segment, tokens are predicted in parallel, similar to BERT, while across segment predictions are sequential, similar to GPT. We illustrate that randomized serialization of the segments significantly improves the performance and results in distribution over spatially-long (across-segments) and -short (within-segment) predictions which are effective for feature learning. We illustrate the pertinence of these design choices and explore alternatives on a number of datasets (e.g., CIFAR10, CIFAR100, ImageNet). While our pre-training strategy works with a vanilla Transformer, we also propose a conceptually simple, but highly effective, addition to the decoder that allows learnable skip-connections to encoder$'$s feature layers, which further improves the performance.
abstract_zh: Inspired by the success of self-supervised autoregressive representation learning in natural language (GPT and its variants), and advances in recent visual architecture design with Vision Transformers (ViTs), in this paper, we explore the effect various design choices have on the success of applying such training strategies for visual feature learning.具体来说，我们引入了一种称为自回归编码随机段（RandSAC）的新颖策略。在 RandSAC 中，我们将补丁表示（图像标记）分组为分层排列的片段；在每个段内，令牌是并行预测的，类似于 BERT，而跨段预测是顺序的，类似于 GPT。 We illustrate that randomized serialization of the segments significantly improves the performance and results in distribution over spatially-long (across-segments) and -short (within-segment) predictions which are effective for feature learning.我们说明了这些设计选择的相关性，并在许多数据集（例如 CIFAR10、CIFAR100、ImageNet）上探索替代方案。 While our pre-training strategy works with a vanilla Transformer, we also propose a conceptually simple, but highly effective, addition to the decoder that allows learnable skip-connections to encoder$'$s feature layers, which further improves the performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RandSAC的自监督学习方法，通过分层分段的自回归编码策略提升视觉特征学习效果。
AI.motivation: 受自然语言处理中自回归模型（如GPT）和视觉Transformer（ViT）的启发，探索如何通过设计选择优化视觉自监督学习的性能。
AI.method: 将图像块分组为分层段，段内并行预测（类似BERT），段间顺序预测（类似GPT），并通过可学习的跳过连接增强解码器性能。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、CIFAR100和ImageNet等数据集上验证了RandSAC的有效性，证明分段随机化和跳过连接设计能显著提升特征学习效果。
AI.conclusion: RandSAC通过结合局部与全局预测机制，验证了自回归结构在视觉学习中的潜力，且跳过连接设计进一步提升了模型表现。

authors_text: Haici Yang,Sanna Wager,Spencer Russell,Mike Luo,Minje Kim,Wontak Kim
title: Upmixing via style transfer: a variational autoencoder for disentangling spatial images and musical content
title_zh: 通过风格迁移进行上混：用于解开空间图像和音乐内容的变分自动编码器
abstract: In the stereo-to-multichannel upmixing problem for music, one of the main tasks is to set the directionality of the instrument sources in the multichannel rendering results. In this paper, we propose a modified variational autoencoder model that learns a latent space to describe the spatial images in multichannel music. We seek to disentangle the spatial images and music content, so the learned latent variables are invariant to the music. At test time, we use the latent variables to control the panning of sources. We propose two upmixing use cases: transferring the spatial images from one song to another and blind panning based on the generative model. We report objective and subjective evaluation results to empirically show that our model captures spatial images separately from music content and achieves transfer-based interactive panning.
summary: In the stereo-to-multichannel upmixing problem for music, one of the main tasks is to set the directionality of the instrument sources in the multichannel rendering results. In this paper, we propose a modified variational autoencoder model that learns a latent space to describe the spatial images in multichannel music. We seek to disentangle the spatial images and music content, so the learned latent variables are invariant to the music. At test time, we use the latent variables to control the panning of sources. We propose two upmixing use cases: transferring the spatial images from one song to another and blind panning based on the generative model. We report objective and subjective evaluation results to empirically show that our model captures spatial images separately from music content and achieves transfer-based interactive panning.
abstract_zh: In the stereo-to-multichannel upmixing problem for music, one of the main tasks is to set the directionality of the instrument sources in the multichannel rendering results. In this paper, we propose a modified variational autoencoder model that learns a latent space to describe the spatial images in multichannel music.我们试图解开空间图像和音乐内容，因此学习到的潜在变量对于音乐来说是不变的。在测试时，我们使用潜在变量来控制源的平移。我们提出了两种上混用例：将空间图像从一首歌曲转移到另一首歌曲以及基于生成模型的盲平移。 We report objective and subjective evaluation results to empirically show that our model captures spatial images separately from music content and achieves transfer-based interactive panning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的变分自编码器模型，用于在音乐多通道上混任务中分离空间图像与音乐内容，并实现基于潜在变量的交互式声像定位控制。
AI.motivation: 传统多通道上混方法难以灵活控制声像定位，且空间信息与音乐内容耦合紧密，限制了跨曲目空间风格迁移与盲声像定位的实现。
AI.method: 构建变分自编码器学习分离空间图像与音乐内容的潜在空间，通过冻结音乐相关变量实现空间信息解耦，并提出两种应用：跨曲目空间迁移与生成模型盲声像定位。
AI.result: 客观指标与主观测试表明模型能有效分离空间信息，实现跨曲目空间风格迁移及交互式声像控制，验证了解耦表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过空间-内容解耦为多通道上混提供了新范式，证明了基于潜在变量的交互式声像定位可行性，为音乐空间化处理提供新思路。

ai_content_json.result: 客观指标与主观测试表明模型能有效分离空间信息，实现跨曲目空间风格迁移及交互式声像控制，验证了解耦表示的有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该模型通过空间-内容解耦为多通道上混提供了新范式，证明了基于潜在变量的交互式声像定位可行性，为音乐空间化处理提供新思路。

search_text: Upmixing via style transfer: a variational autoencoder for disentangling spatial images and musical content 通过风格迁移进行上混：用于解开空间图像和音乐内容的变分自动编码器 In the stereo-to-multichannel upmixing problem for music, one of the main tasks is to set the directionality of the instrument sources in the multichannel rendering results. In this paper, we propose a modified variational autoencoder model that learns a latent space to describe the spatial images in multichannel music. We seek to disentangle the spatial images and music content, so the learned latent variables are invariant to the music. At test time, we use the latent variables to control the panning of sources. We propose two upmixing use cases: transferring the spatial images from one song to another and blind panning based on the generative model. We report objective and subjective evaluation results to empirically show that our model captures spatial images separately from music content and achieves transfer-based interactive panning. In the stereo-to-multichannel upmixing problem for music, one of the main tasks is to set the directionality of the instrument sources in the multichannel rendering results. In this paper, we propose a modified variational autoencoder model that learns a latent space to describe the spatial images in multichannel music.我们试图解开空间图像和音乐内容，因此学习到的潜在变量对于音乐来说是不变的。在测试时，我们使用潜在变量来控制源的平移。我们提出了两种上混用例：将空间图像从一首歌曲转移到另一首歌曲以及基于生成模型的盲平移。 We report objective and subjective evaluation results to empirically show that our model captures spatial images separately from music content and achieves transfer-based interactive panning. 本文提出一种改进的变分自编码器模型，用于在音乐多通道上混任务中分离空间图像与音乐内容，并实现基于潜在变量的交互式声像定位控制。 Haici Yang,Sanna Wager,Spencer Russell,Mike Luo,Minje Kim,Wontak Kim eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Ben Boudaoud,Josef Spjut,Joohwan Kim
title: Mouse Sensitivity Effects in First-Person Targeting Tasks
title_zh: 第一人称瞄准任务中的鼠标灵敏度影响
abstract: Despite billions of hours of play and copious discussion online, mouse sensitivity recommendations for first-person targeting tasks vary by a factor of 10x or more and remain an active topic of debate in both competitive and recreational gaming communities. Inspired by previous academic literature in pointer-based gain optimization, we conduct the first user study of mouse sensitivity in first person targeting tasks, reporting a statistically significant range of optimal values in both task completion time and throughput. Due to inherent incompatibility (i.e., lack of convert-ability) between sensitivity metrics adopted for prior pointer-based gain literature and those describing first-person targeting, we provide the first analytically demonstrated, statistically significant optimal sensitivity range useful for first-person camera controls. Furthermore, we demonstrate that this optimal sensitivity range arises (at least in part) from a speed-precision trade-off impacted by spatial task difficulty, similar to results reported in pointer-based sensitivity literature previously.
summary: Despite billions of hours of play and copious discussion online, mouse sensitivity recommendations for first-person targeting tasks vary by a factor of 10x or more and remain an active topic of debate in both competitive and recreational gaming communities. Inspired by previous academic literature in pointer-based gain optimization, we conduct the first user study of mouse sensitivity in first person targeting tasks, reporting a statistically significant range of optimal values in both task completion time and throughput. Due to inherent incompatibility (i.e., lack of convert-ability) between sensitivity metrics adopted for prior pointer-based gain literature and those describing first-person targeting, we provide the first analytically demonstrated, statistically significant optimal sensitivity range useful for first-person camera controls. Furthermore, we demonstrate that this optimal sensitivity range arises (at least in part) from a speed-precision trade-off impacted by spatial task difficulty, similar to results reported in pointer-based sensitivity literature previously.
abstract_zh: 尽管有数十亿小时的游戏时间和大量的在线讨论，但针对第一人称瞄准任务的鼠标灵敏度建议差异达 10 倍或更多，并且仍然是竞技游戏和休闲游戏社区中争论的热门话题。受先前基于指针的增益优化学术文献的启发，我们对第一人称目标任务中的鼠标灵敏度进行了首次用户研究，报告了任务完成时间和吞吐量方面具有统计显着性的最佳值范围。由于先前基于指针的增益文献所采用的灵敏度度量与描述第一人称瞄准的灵敏度度量之间存在固有的不兼容性（即缺乏转换能力），我们提供了第一个经过分析论证的、统计上显着的最佳灵敏度范围，可用于第一人称相机控制。此外，我们证明了这种最佳灵敏度范围（至少部分）源于受空间任务难度影响的速度精度权衡，类似于之前基于指针的灵敏度文献中报告的结果。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过用户研究确定了第一人称瞄准任务中鼠标灵敏度的最优范围，并分析了其与速度-精度权衡的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有第一人称游戏鼠标灵敏度推荐差异极大（相差10倍以上），且缺乏与指针控制优化研究兼容的量化标准，需通过实证研究填补这一空白。
AI.method: 设计用户实验，测量不同鼠标灵敏度下任务完成时间和吞吐量，结合空间任务难度分析速度-精度权衡机制。
AI.result: 发现存在统计学显著的最优灵敏度区间，且该区间与任务难度相关的速度-精度权衡直接相关。
AI.conclusion: 首次为第一人称相机控制提供了可量化的最优灵敏度范围，揭示了其与指针控制相似的底层机制，为游戏设计和玩家设置提供理论依据。

authors_text: Laura L. Pullum
title: Review of Metrics to Measure the Stability, Robustness and Resilience of Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 衡量强化学习稳定性、鲁棒性和弹性的指标回顾
abstract: Reinforcement learning has received significant interest in recent years, due primarily to the successes of deep reinforcement learning at solving many challenging tasks such as playing Chess, Go and online computer games. However, with the increasing focus on reinforcement learning, applications outside of gaming and simulated environments require understanding the robustness, stability, and resilience of reinforcement learning methods. To this end, we conducted a comprehensive literature review to characterize the available literature on these three behaviors as they pertain to reinforcement learning. We classify the quantitative and theoretical approaches used to indicate or measure robustness, stability, and resilience behaviors. In addition, we identified the action or event to which the quantitative approaches were attempting to be stable, robust, or resilient. Finally, we provide a decision tree useful for selecting metrics to quantify the behaviors. We believe that this is the first comprehensive review of stability, robustness and resilience specifically geared towards reinforcement learning.
summary: Reinforcement learning has received significant interest in recent years, due primarily to the successes of deep reinforcement learning at solving many challenging tasks such as playing Chess, Go and online computer games. However, with the increasing focus on reinforcement learning, applications outside of gaming and simulated environments require understanding the robustness, stability, and resilience of reinforcement learning methods. To this end, we conducted a comprehensive literature review to characterize the available literature on these three behaviors as they pertain to reinforcement learning. We classify the quantitative and theoretical approaches used to indicate or measure robustness, stability, and resilience behaviors. In addition, we identified the action or event to which the quantitative approaches were attempting to be stable, robust, or resilient. Finally, we provide a decision tree useful for selecting metrics to quantify the behaviors. We believe that this is the first comprehensive review of stability, robustness and resilience specifically geared towards reinforcement learning.
abstract_zh: 近年来，强化学习引起了人们的极大兴趣，这主要是因为深度强化学习在解决许多具有挑战性的任务（例如下国际象棋、围棋和在线电脑游戏）方面取得了成功。然而，随着对强化学习的日益关注，游戏和模拟环境之外的应用程序需要了解强化学习方法的鲁棒性、稳定性和弹性。为此，我们进行了全面的文献综述，以描述与强化学习相关的这三种行为的现有文献。我们对用于指示或测量鲁棒性、稳定性和弹性行为的定量和理论方法进行分类。此外，我们还确定了定量方法试图保持稳定、稳健或有弹性的行动或事件。最后，我们提供了一个决策树，可用于选择量化行为的指标。我们相信，这是第一次专门针对强化学习的稳定性、鲁棒性和弹性的全面审查。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了用于衡量强化学习稳定性和鲁棒性的指标，并提出了一个决策树以帮助选择合适度量标准。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度强化学习在游戏领域取得成功，但实际应用中需关注其稳定性、鲁棒性和恢复力，而现有研究缺乏系统性总结。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分类量化与理论方法，识别指标针对的具体场景，并构建决策树辅助指标选择。
AI.result: 系统分类了稳定性、鲁棒性及恢复力的度量方法，明确了各指标适用的场景，并提供了决策树工具。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次对强化学习的稳定性、鲁棒性和恢复力度量方法进行系统综述，为后续研究和应用提供指导框架。

authors_text: Massimiliano Di Ventra
title: MemComputing vs. Quantum Computing: some analogies and major differences
title_zh: 内存计算与量子计算：一些类比和主要区别
abstract: Quantum computing employs some quantum phenomena to process information. It has been hailed as the future of computing but it is plagued by serious hurdles when it comes to its practical realization. MemComputing is a new paradigm that instead employs non-quantum dynamical systems and exploits time non-locality (memory) to compute. It can be efficiently emulated in software and its path towards hardware is more straightforward. I will discuss some analogies between these two computing paradigms, and the major differences that set them apart.
summary: Quantum computing employs some quantum phenomena to process information. It has been hailed as the future of computing but it is plagued by serious hurdles when it comes to its practical realization. MemComputing is a new paradigm that instead employs non-quantum dynamical systems and exploits time non-locality (memory) to compute. It can be efficiently emulated in software and its path towards hardware is more straightforward. I will discuss some analogies between these two computing paradigms, and the major differences that set them apart.
abstract_zh: 量子计算利用一些量子现象来处理信息。它被誉为计算的未来，但在实际实现时却遇到了严重的障碍。 MemComputing 是一种新范式，它采用非量子动力系统并利用时间非局域性（内存）进行计算。它可以在软件中有效地模拟，并且其通往硬件的路径更加简单。我将讨论这两种计算范式之间的一些相似之处，以及它们之间的主要区别。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了MemComputing与量子计算的相似性与主要差异，探讨两者在计算范式上的异同。
AI.motivation: 量子计算面临实际应用中的重大挑战，而MemComputing作为基于非量子动力系统的新型计算范式，可能提供更可行的替代方案。
AI.method: 通过分析两种计算范式的原理、实现路径及技术特点，对比其核心机制与应用场景。
AI.result: 发现两者均利用非传统计算特性（量子叠加/时间非局部性），但MemComputing在软件模拟与硬件实现上更具优势。
AI.conclusion: MemComputing为解决复杂计算问题提供了不同于量子计算的可行路径，尤其适合需要记忆非局部性的任务。

search_text: MemComputing vs. Quantum Computing: some analogies and major differences 内存计算与量子计算：一些类比和主要区别 Quantum computing employs some quantum phenomena to process information. It has been hailed as the future of computing but it is plagued by serious hurdles when it comes to its practical realization. MemComputing is a new paradigm that instead employs non-quantum dynamical systems and exploits time non-locality (memory) to compute. It can be efficiently emulated in software and its path towards hardware is more straightforward. I will discuss some analogies between these two computing paradigms, and the major differences that set them apart. 量子计算利用一些量子现象来处理信息。它被誉为计算的未来，但在实际实现时却遇到了严重的障碍。 MemComputing 是一种新范式，它采用非量子动力系统并利用时间非局域性（内存）进行计算。它可以在软件中有效地模拟，并且其通往硬件的路径更加简单。我将讨论这两种计算范式之间的一些相似之处，以及它们之间的主要区别。 本文比较了MemComputing与量子计算的相似性与主要差异，探讨两者在计算范式上的异同。 Massimiliano Di Ventra cs.ET,cond-mat.mes-hall,nlin.AO

authors_text: Mahshid Helali Moghadam,Markus Borg,Mehrdad Saadatmand,Seyed Jalaleddin Mousavirad,Markus Bohlin,Björn Lisper
title: Machine Learning Testing in an ADAS Case Study Using Simulation-Integrated Bio-Inspired Search-Based Testing
title_zh: ADAS 案例研究中的机器学习测试使用仿真集成、仿生搜索测试
comment: Accepted for publication in Journal Of Software: Evolution And Process
comments: Accepted for publication in Journal Of Software: Evolution And Process
abstract: This paper presents an extended version of Deeper, a search-based simulation-integrated test solution that generates failure-revealing test scenarios for testing a deep neural network-based lane-keeping system. In the newly proposed version, we utilize a new set of bio-inspired search algorithms, genetic algorithm (GA), $(μ+λ)$ and $(μ,λ)$ evolution strategies (ES), and particle swarm optimization (PSO), that leverage a quality population seed and domain-specific cross-over and mutation operations tailored for the presentation model used for modeling the test scenarios. In order to demonstrate the capabilities of the new test generators within Deeper, we carry out an empirical evaluation and comparison with regard to the results of five participating tools in the cyber-physical systems testing competition at SBST 2021. Our evaluation shows the newly proposed test generators in Deeper not only represent a considerable improvement on the previous version but also prove to be effective and efficient in provoking a considerable number of diverse failure-revealing test scenarios for testing an ML-driven lane-keeping system. They can trigger several failures while promoting test scenario diversity, under a limited test time budget, high target failure severity, and strict speed limit constraints.
summary: This paper presents an extended version of Deeper, a search-based simulation-integrated test solution that generates failure-revealing test scenarios for testing a deep neural network-based lane-keeping system. In the newly proposed version, we utilize a new set of bio-inspired search algorithms, genetic algorithm (GA), $(μ+λ)$ and $(μ,λ)$ evolution strategies (ES), and particle swarm optimization (PSO), that leverage a quality population seed and domain-specific cross-over and mutation operations tailored for the presentation model used for modeling the test scenarios. In order to demonstrate the capabilities of the new test generators within Deeper, we carry out an empirical evaluation and comparison with regard to the results of five participating tools in the cyber-physical systems testing competition at SBST 2021. Our evaluation shows the newly proposed test generators in Deeper not only represent a considerable improvement on the previous version but also prove to be effective and efficient in provoking a considerable number of diverse failure-revealing test scenarios for testing an ML-driven lane-keeping system. They can trigger several failures while promoting test scenario diversity, under a limited test time budget, high target failure severity, and strict speed limit constraints.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Deeper 的扩展版本，这是一种基于搜索的模拟集成测试解决方案，可生成用于测试基于深度神经网络的车道保持系统的故障揭示测试场景。在新提出的版本中，我们利用了一组新的仿生搜索算法、遗传算法 (GA)、$(μ+λ)$ 和 $(μ,λ)$ 进化策略 (ES) 以及粒子群优化 (PSO)，这些算法利用了质量群体种子和特定于领域的交叉和变异操作，这些操作是为用于模拟测试场景的演示模型量身定制的。为了展示 Deeper 中新测试生成器的功能，我们对 SBST 2021 网络物理系统测试竞赛中五个参赛工具的结果进行了实证评估和比较。我们的评估表明，Deeper 中新提出的测试生成器不仅比之前的版本有了相当大的改进，而且在测试 ML 驱动的车道保持系统时，在引发大量不同的揭示故障的测试场景方面被证明是有效和高效的。在有限的测试时间预算、高目标故障严重性和严格的速度限制约束下，它们可以触发多个故障，同时促进测试场景多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的Deeper测试解决方案，利用生物启发搜索算法生成深度神经网络车道保持系统的故障揭示测试场景。
AI.motivation: 现有测试方法在发现深度学习系统故障及效率方面存在不足，需更有效的测试生成技术以应对复杂约束条件。
AI.method: 采用遗传算法、进化策略和粒子群优化等生物启发算法，结合质量种群种子及领域特定交叉变异操作，生成多样化测试场景。
AI.result: 新方法在SBST 2021竞赛中优于其他工具，能在有限时间内高效生成多样化的高严重性故障测试场景。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的Deeper测试生成器有效提升了故障发现能力与测试效率，适用于严格约束下的ML系统测试。

authors_text: Benedikt Boecking,Nicholas Roberts,Willie Neiswanger,Stefano Ermon,Frederic Sala,Artur Dubrawski
title: Generative Modeling Helps Weak Supervision (and Vice Versa)
title_zh: 生成模型有助于弱监督（反之亦然）
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: Many promising applications of supervised machine learning face hurdles in the acquisition of labeled data in sufficient quantity and quality, creating an expensive bottleneck. To overcome such limitations, techniques that do not depend on ground truth labels have been studied, including weak supervision and generative modeling. While these techniques would seem to be usable in concert, improving one another, how to build an interface between them is not well-understood. In this work, we propose a model fusing programmatic weak supervision and generative adversarial networks and provide theoretical justification motivating this fusion. The proposed approach captures discrete latent variables in the data alongside the weak supervision derived label estimate. Alignment of the two allows for better modeling of sample-dependent accuracies of the weak supervision sources, improving the estimate of unobserved labels. It is the first approach to enable data augmentation through weakly supervised synthetic images and pseudolabels. Additionally, its learned latent variables can be inspected qualitatively. The model outperforms baseline weak supervision label models on a number of multiclass image classification datasets, improves the quality of generated images, and further improves end-model performance through data augmentation with synthetic samples.
summary: Many promising applications of supervised machine learning face hurdles in the acquisition of labeled data in sufficient quantity and quality, creating an expensive bottleneck. To overcome such limitations, techniques that do not depend on ground truth labels have been studied, including weak supervision and generative modeling. While these techniques would seem to be usable in concert, improving one another, how to build an interface between them is not well-understood. In this work, we propose a model fusing programmatic weak supervision and generative adversarial networks and provide theoretical justification motivating this fusion. The proposed approach captures discrete latent variables in the data alongside the weak supervision derived label estimate. Alignment of the two allows for better modeling of sample-dependent accuracies of the weak supervision sources, improving the estimate of unobserved labels. It is the first approach to enable data augmentation through weakly supervised synthetic images and pseudolabels. Additionally, its learned latent variables can be inspected qualitatively. The model outperforms baseline weak supervision label models on a number of multiclass image classification datasets, improves the quality of generated images, and further improves end-model performance through data augmentation with synthetic samples.
abstract_zh: 许多有前景的监督机器学习应用在获取足够数量和质量的标记数据方面面临障碍，从而造成了昂贵的瓶颈。为了克服这些限制，人们研究了不依赖于真实标签的技术，包括弱监督和生成建模。 While these techniques would seem to be usable in concert, improving one another, how to build an interface between them is not well-understood.在这项工作中，我们提出了一种融合程序化弱监督和生成对抗网络的模型，并提供了推动这种融合的理论依据。 The proposed approach captures discrete latent variables in the data alongside the weak supervision derived label estimate.两者的结合可以更好地对弱监督源的样本相关精度进行建模，从而改进对未观察到的标签的估计。 It is the first approach to enable data augmentation through weakly supervised synthetic images and pseudolabels. Additionally, its learned latent variables can be inspected qualitatively.该模型在许多多类图像分类数据集上优于基线弱监督标签模型，提高了生成图像的质量，并通过合成样本的数据增强进一步提高了最终模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合程序化弱监督与生成对抗网络（GAN）的模型，以解决监督学习中标签数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 监督学习应用受限于高质量标签数据的获取成本，弱监督和生成模型虽可独立使用，但二者协同机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 设计融合弱监督标签估计与GAN的模型，通过离散潜在变量对齐弱监督源的样本依赖准确性，实现弱监督合成图像与伪标签的数据增强。
AI.result: 在多分类图像数据集上优于基线弱监督模型，提升生成图像质量，并通过合成样本增强最终模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次实现弱监督数据增强，通过潜在变量可解释性与生成质量提升，验证了弱监督与生成模型协同的有效性。

In this work, we propose a model fusing programmatic weak supervision and generative adversarial networks and provide theoretical justification motivating this fusion. The proposed approach captures discrete latent variables in the data alongside the weak supervision derived label estimate. Alignment of the two allows for better modeling of sample-dependent accuracies of the weak supervision sources, improving the estimate of unobserved labels. It is the first approach to enable data augmentation through weakly supervised synthetic images and pseudolabels. Additionally, its learned latent variables can be inspected qualitatively. The model outperforms baseline weak supervision label models on a number of multiclass image classification datasets, improves the quality of generated images, and further improves end-model performance through data augmentation with synthetic samples. 许多有前景的监督机器学习应用在获取足够数量和质量的标记数据方面面临障碍，从而造成了昂贵的瓶颈。为了克服这些限制，人们研究了不依赖于真实标签的技术，包括弱监督和生成建模。 While these techniques would seem to be usable in concert, improving one another, how to build an interface between them is not well-understood.在这项工作中，我们提出了一种融合程序化弱监督和生成对抗网络的模型，并提供了推动这种融合的理论依据。 The proposed approach captures discrete latent variables in the data alongside the weak supervision derived label estimate.两者的结合可以更好地对弱监督源的样本相关精度进行建模，从而改进对未观察到的标签的估计。 It is the first approach to enable data augmentation through weakly supervised synthetic images and pseudolabels. Additionally, its learned latent variables can be inspected qualitatively.该模型在许多多类图像分类数据集上优于基线弱监督标签模型，提高了生成图像的质量，并通过合成样本的数据增强进一步提高了最终模型的性能。 本文提出了一种融合程序化弱监督与生成对抗网络（GAN）的模型，以解决监督学习中标签数据不足的问题。 Benedikt Boecking,Nicholas Roberts,Willie Neiswanger,Stefano Ermon,Frederic Sala,Artur Dubrawski cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Guilherme Potje,Renato Martins,Felipe Cadar,Erickson R. Nascimento
title: Learning Geodesic-Aware Local Features from RGB-D Images
title_zh: 从 RGB-D 图像中学习测地线感知的局部特征
comment: This is a preprint version of the paper to appear at Computer Vision and Image Understanding (CVIU). The final journal version will be available at https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cviu.2022.103409
comments: This is a preprint version of the paper to appear at Computer Vision and Image Understanding (CVIU). The final journal version will be available at https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cviu.2022.103409
abstract: Most of the existing handcrafted and learning-based local descriptors are still at best approximately invariant to affine image transformations, often disregarding deformable surfaces. In this paper, we take one step further by proposing a new approach to compute descriptors from RGB-D images (where RGB refers to the pixel color brightness and D stands for depth information) that are invariant to isometric non-rigid deformations, as well as to scale changes and rotation. Our proposed description strategies are grounded on the key idea of learning feature representations on undistorted local image patches using surface geodesics. We design two complementary local descriptors strategies to compute geodesic-aware features efficiently: one efficient binary descriptor based on handcrafted binary tests (named GeoBit), and one learning-based descriptor (GeoPatch) with convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to compute features. In different experiments using real and publicly available RGB-D data benchmarks, they consistently outperforms state-of-the-art handcrafted and learning-based image and RGB-D descriptors in matching scores, as well as in object retrieval and non-rigid surface tracking experiments, with comparable processing times. We also provide to the community a new dataset with accurate matching annotations of RGB-D images of different objects (shirts, cloths, paintings, bags), subjected to strong non-rigid deformations, for evaluation benchmark of deformable surface correspondence algorithms.
summary: Most of the existing handcrafted and learning-based local descriptors are still at best approximately invariant to affine image transformations, often disregarding deformable surfaces. In this paper, we take one step further by proposing a new approach to compute descriptors from RGB-D images (where RGB refers to the pixel color brightness and D stands for depth information) that are invariant to isometric non-rigid deformations, as well as to scale changes and rotation. Our proposed description strategies are grounded on the key idea of learning feature representations on undistorted local image patches using surface geodesics. We design two complementary local descriptors strategies to compute geodesic-aware features efficiently: one efficient binary descriptor based on handcrafted binary tests (named GeoBit), and one learning-based descriptor (GeoPatch) with convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to compute features. In different experiments using real and publicly available RGB-D data benchmarks, they consistently outperforms state-of-the-art handcrafted and learning-based image and RGB-D descriptors in matching scores, as well as in object retrieval and non-rigid surface tracking experiments, with comparable processing times. We also provide to the community a new dataset with accurate matching annotations of RGB-D images of different objects (shirts, cloths, paintings, bags), subjected to strong non-rigid deformations, for evaluation benchmark of deformable surface correspondence algorithms.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的手工制作和基于学习的局部描述符最多仍然对仿射图像变换具有近似不变性，通常忽略可变形表面。在本文中，我们更进一步提出了一种从 RGB-D 图像（其中 RGB 指像素颜色亮度，D 代表深度信息）计算描述符的新方法，这些描述符对于等距非刚性变形以及尺度变化和旋转是不变的。我们提出的描述策略基于使用表面测地线学习未失真局部图像块的特征表示的关键思想。我们设计了两种互补的局部描述符策略来有效地计算测地线感知特征：一种基于手工二进制测试的高效二进制描述符（称为 GeoBit），以及一种基于学习的描述符（GeoPatch），使用卷积神经网络（CNN）来计算特征。在使用真实且公开的 RGB-D 数据基准的不同实验中，它们在匹配分数以及对象检索和非刚性表面跟踪实验中始终优于最先进的手工制作和基于学习的图像和 RGB-D 描述符，并且处理时间相当。我们还向社区提供了一个新的数据集，其中对不同物体（衬衫、衣服、绘画、包袋）的 RGB-D 图像进行了强非刚性变形的精确匹配注释，作为可变形表面对应算法的评估基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出从RGB-D图像中学习具有测地线感知能力的局部特征，以应对非刚性变形、缩放和旋转的不变性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有局部描述符对仿射变换仅具有近似不变性，忽视了可变形表面的复杂性，需设计对非刚性变形更鲁棒的特征描述方法。
AI.method: 基于测地线距离构建局部特征表示，设计两种互补策略：GeoBit（基于手工二值测试的高效二值描述符）和GeoPatch（利用卷积神经网络学习特征的描述符）。
AI.result: 在真实和公开RGB-D数据集上，两种方法在匹配分数、目标检索和非刚性表面跟踪实验中均优于现有方法，且处理时间相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效提升了非刚性变形下的特征匹配性能，并为社区提供了包含强非刚性变形标注的新型数据集。

authors_text: Meng Feng,Chieh-Chi Kao,Qingming Tang,Ming Sun,Viktor Rozgic,Spyros Matsoukas,Chao Wang
title: Federated Self-Supervised Learning for Acoustic Event Classification
title_zh: 用于声学事件分类的联合自监督学习
abstract: Standard acoustic event classification (AEC) solutions require large-scale collection of data from client devices for model optimization. Federated learning (FL) is a compelling framework that decouples data collection and model training to enhance customer privacy. In this work, we investigate the feasibility of applying FL to improve AEC performance while no customer data can be directly uploaded to the server. We assume no pseudo labels can be inferred from on-device user inputs, aligning with the typical use cases of AEC. We adapt self-supervised learning to the FL framework for on-device continual learning of representations, and it results in improved performance of the downstream AEC classifiers without labeled/pseudo-labeled data available. Compared to the baseline w/o FL, the proposed method improves precision up to 20.3\% relatively while maintaining the recall. Our work differs from prior work in FL in that our approach does not require user-generated learning targets, and the data we use is collected from our Beta program and is de-identified, to maximally simulate the production settings.
summary: Standard acoustic event classification (AEC) solutions require large-scale collection of data from client devices for model optimization. Federated learning (FL) is a compelling framework that decouples data collection and model training to enhance customer privacy. In this work, we investigate the feasibility of applying FL to improve AEC performance while no customer data can be directly uploaded to the server. We assume no pseudo labels can be inferred from on-device user inputs, aligning with the typical use cases of AEC. We adapt self-supervised learning to the FL framework for on-device continual learning of representations, and it results in improved performance of the downstream AEC classifiers without labeled/pseudo-labeled data available. Compared to the baseline w/o FL, the proposed method improves precision up to 20.3\% relatively while maintaining the recall. Our work differs from prior work in FL in that our approach does not require user-generated learning targets, and the data we use is collected from our Beta program and is de-identified, to maximally simulate the production settings.
abstract_zh: 标准声学事件分类 (AEC) 解决方案需要从客户端设备大规模收集数据以进行模型优化。联邦学习 (FL) 是一个引人注目的框架，它将数据收集和模型训练解耦，以增强客户隐私。在这项工作中，我们研究了在无法将客户数据直接上传到服务器的情况下应用 FL 来提高 AEC 性能的可行性。我们假设无法从设备上的用户输入推断出伪标签，这与 AEC 的典型用例保持一致。我们将自监督学习适应 FL 框架，以在设备上持续学习表示，从而在没有可用标记/伪标记数据的情况下提高下游 AEC 分类器的性能。与没有 FL 的基线相比，所提出的方法在保持召回率的同时，精度相对提高了 20.3%。我们的工作与 FL 之前的工作不同，我们的方法不需要用户生成的学习目标，并且我们使用的数据是从 Beta 程序收集的，并且是去标识化的，以最大程度地模拟生产设置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联邦自监督学习方法，用于在保护用户隐私的前提下提升声学事件分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统声学事件分类需收集大量用户数据，存在隐私风险。联邦学习可保护隐私，但现有方法依赖伪标签或用户生成目标，而实际场景中这些数据难以获取。
AI.method: 将自监督学习与联邦学习结合，在设备端进行无标签的持续表征学习，通过去标识化的真实用户数据训练模型。
AI.result: 相比基线方法，分类精度相对提升20.3%且保持召回率，验证了无需伪标签的联邦自监督学习有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法在无需用户生成学习目标的情况下，通过联邦自监督学习实现了隐私保护与声学事件分类性能的平衡。

authors_text: Botao Ye,Hong Chang,Bingpeng Ma,Shiguang Shan,Xilin Chen
title: Joint Feature Learning and Relation Modeling for Tracking: A One-Stream Framework
title_zh: 用于跟踪的联合特征学习和关系建模：单流框架
abstract: The current popular two-stream, two-stage tracking framework extracts the template and the search region features separately and then performs relation modeling, thus the extracted features lack the awareness of the target and have limited target-background discriminability. To tackle the above issue, we propose a novel one-stream tracking (OSTrack) framework that unifies feature learning and relation modeling by bridging the template-search image pairs with bidirectional information flows. In this way, discriminative target-oriented features can be dynamically extracted by mutual guidance. Since no extra heavy relation modeling module is needed and the implementation is highly parallelized, the proposed tracker runs at a fast speed. To further improve the inference efficiency, an in-network candidate early elimination module is proposed based on the strong similarity prior calculated in the one-stream framework. As a unified framework, OSTrack achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks, in particular, it shows impressive results on the one-shot tracking benchmark GOT-10k, i.e., achieving 73.7% AO, improving the existing best result (SwinTrack) by 4.3\%. Besides, our method maintains a good performance-speed trade-off and shows faster convergence. The code and models are available at https://github.com/botaoye/OSTrack.
summary: The current popular two-stream, two-stage tracking framework extracts the template and the search region features separately and then performs relation modeling, thus the extracted features lack the awareness of the target and have limited target-background discriminability. To tackle the above issue, we propose a novel one-stream tracking (OSTrack) framework that unifies feature learning and relation modeling by bridging the template-search image pairs with bidirectional information flows. In this way, discriminative target-oriented features can be dynamically extracted by mutual guidance. Since no extra heavy relation modeling module is needed and the implementation is highly parallelized, the proposed tracker runs at a fast speed. To further improve the inference efficiency, an in-network candidate early elimination module is proposed based on the strong similarity prior calculated in the one-stream framework. As a unified framework, OSTrack achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks, in particular, it shows impressive results on the one-shot tracking benchmark GOT-10k, i.e., achieving 73.7% AO, improving the existing best result (SwinTrack) by 4.3\%. Besides, our method maintains a good performance-speed trade-off and shows faster convergence. The code and models are available at https://github.com/botaoye/OSTrack.
abstract_zh: 目前流行的两流两阶段跟踪框架分别提取模板和搜索区域特征，然后进行关系建模，因此提取的特征缺乏对目标的感知，目标与背景的区分能力有限。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新颖的单流跟踪（OSTrack）框架，该框架通过将模板搜索图像对与双向信息流桥接来统一特征学习和关系建模。这样，可以通过相互引导动态提取有区别的面向目标的特征。由于不需要额外的重关系建模模块并且实现是高度并行的，因此所提出的跟踪器运行速度很快。为了进一步提高推理效率，基于one-stream框架中计算的强相似性先验，提出了一种网络内候选早期消除模块。作为一个统一的框架，OSTrack 在多个基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，特别是在单次跟踪基准测试 GOT-10k 上显示了令人印象深刻的结果，即实现了 73.7% 的 AO，将现有最佳结果 (SwinTrack) 提高了 4.3%。此外，我们的方法保持了良好的性能与速度权衡，并显示出更快的收敛速度。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/botaoye/OSTrack 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的单流跟踪框架（OSTrack），通过桥接模板-搜索图像对的双向信息流，实现特征学习与关系建模的联合优化，提升目标跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有双流双阶段跟踪框架分别提取模板和搜索区域特征，导致特征缺乏目标感知能力且目标-背景区分度有限。
AI.method: 设计单流框架实现特征学习与关系建模的统一，利用双向信息流动态提取目标导向特征，并引入网络内候选早停模块提升推理效率。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能，尤其在GOT-10k数据集上取得73.7%的AO值，较现有最佳方法SwinTrack提升4.3%，且保持良好的速度-性能平衡。
AI.conclusion: OSTrack通过统一框架设计有效解决了传统方法的局限性，在准确性与效率上均表现出显著优势。
