To tackle the above issue, we propose a novel one-stream tracking (OSTrack) framework that unifies feature learning and relation modeling by bridging the template-search image pairs with bidirectional information flows. In this way, discriminative target-oriented features can be dynamically extracted by mutual guidance. Since no extra heavy relation modeling module is needed and the implementation is highly parallelized, the proposed tracker runs at a fast speed. To further improve the inference efficiency, an in-network candidate early elimination module is proposed based on the strong similarity prior calculated in the one-stream framework. As a unified framework, OSTrack achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks, in particular, it shows impressive results on the one-shot tracking benchmark GOT-10k, i.e., achieving 73.7% AO, improving the existing best result (SwinTrack) by 4.3\%. Besides, our method maintains a good performance-speed trade-off and shows faster convergence. authors_text: Ryan Grainger,Thomas Paniagua,Xi Song,Naresh Cuntoor,Mun Wai Lee,Tianfu Wu
title: PaCa-ViT: Learning Patch-to-Cluster Attention in Vision Transformers
title_zh: PaCa-ViT：在视觉 Transformer 中学习补丁到集群的注意力
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) are built on the assumption of treating image patches as ``visual tokens" and learn patch-to-patch attention. The patch embedding based tokenizer has a semantic gap with respect to its counterpart, the textual tokenizer. The patch-to-patch attention suffers from the quadratic complexity issue, and also makes it non-trivial to explain learned ViTs. To address these issues in ViT, this paper proposes to learn Patch-to-Cluster attention (PaCa) in ViT. Queries in our PaCa-ViT starts with patches, while keys and values are directly based on clustering (with a predefined small number of clusters). The clusters are learned end-to-end, leading to better tokenizers and inducing joint clustering-for-attention and attention-for-clustering for better and interpretable models. The quadratic complexity is relaxed to linear complexity. The proposed PaCa module is used in designing efficient and interpretable ViT backbones and semantic segmentation head networks. In experiments, the proposed methods are tested on ImageNet-1k image classification, MS-COCO object detection and instance segmentation and MIT-ADE20k semantic segmentation. Compared with the prior art, it obtains better performance in all the three benchmarks than the SWin and the PVTs by significant margins in ImageNet-1k and MIT-ADE20k. It is also significantly more efficient than PVT models in MS-COCO and MIT-ADE20k due to the linear complexity. The learned clusters are semantically meaningful. Code and model checkpoints are available at https://github.com/iVMCL/PaCaViT.

The quadratic complexity is relaxed to linear complexity. The proposed PaCa module is used in designing efficient and interpretable ViT backbones and semantic segmentation head networks. In experiments, the proposed methods are tested on ImageNet-1k image classification, MS-COCO object detection and instance segmentation and MIT-ADE20k semantic segmentation. Compared with the prior art, it obtains better performance in all the three benchmarks than the SWin and the PVTs by significant margins in ImageNet-1k and MIT-ADE20k. AI.tldr: 本文提出PaCa-ViT模型，通过学习图像块到聚类中心的注意力机制，改进视觉Transformer（ViT）的效率和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统ViT的块间注意力机制存在二次复杂度高、模型可解释性差的问题，且图像块嵌入与文本标记器存在语义差距。
AI.method: 设计PaCa模块，以图像块作为查询，聚类中心作为键和值。聚类中心通过端到端学习获得，实现注意力机制与聚类过程的联合优化，将复杂度从二次降至线性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k、MS-COCO和MIT-ADE20k三个基准测试中，PaCa-ViT在准确率和效率上均优于Swin和PVT模型，且聚类结果具有语义意义。
AI.conclusion: PaCa-ViT通过块到聚类的注意力机制有效解决了ViT的复杂度和可解释性问题，在多个任务中展现出优越性能。

authors_text: Brett W. Israelsen,Nisar Ahmed
title: A Factor-Based Framework for Decision-Making Competency Self-Assessment
title_zh: 基于因素的决策能力自我评估框架
comment: Appears in Proceedings of the AAAI SSS-22 Symposium "Closing the Assessment Loop: Communicating Proficiency and Intent in Human-Robot Teaming"
comments: Appears in Proceedings of the AAAI SSS-22 Symposium "Closing the Assessment Loop: Communicating Proficiency and Intent in Human-Robot Teaming"
abstract: We summarize our efforts to date in developing a framework for generating succinct human-understandable competency self-assessments in terms of machine self confidence, i.e. a robot's self-trust in its functional abilities to accomplish assigned tasks. Whereas early work explored machine self-confidence in ad hoc ways for niche applications, our Factorized Machine Self-Confidence framework introduces and combines several aspects of probabilistic meta reasoning for algorithmic planning and decision-making under uncertainty to arrive at a novel set of generalizable self-confidence factors, which can support competency assessment for a wide variety of problems.
summary: We summarize our efforts to date in developing a framework for generating succinct human-understandable competency self-assessments in terms of machine self confidence, i.e. a robot's self-trust in its functional abilities to accomplish assigned tasks. Whereas early work explored machine self-confidence in ad hoc ways for niche applications, our Factorized Machine Self-Confidence framework introduces and combines several aspects of probabilistic meta reasoning for algorithmic planning and decision-making under uncertainty to arrive at a novel set of generalizable self-confidence factors, which can support competency assessment for a wide variety of problems.
abstract_zh: 我们总结了迄今为止在开发一个框架方面所做的努力，该框架用于在机器自信方面生成简洁的人类可理解的能力自我评估，即机器人对其完成指定任务的功能能力的自信。早期的工作以特定的方式探索了针对利基应用的机器自信，而我们的因式分解机器自信框架引入并结合了概率元推理的多个方面，用于不确定性下的算法规划和决策，以得出一组新颖的可概括的自信因素，可以支持对各种问题的能力评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于因素的框架，用于生成机器在决策能力方面的自我评估自信因素。
AI.motivation: 早期机器自信研究局限于特定场景，缺乏通用性，需开发适用于多种问题的自我评估方法。
AI.method: 构建Factorized Machine Self-Confidence框架，结合概率元推理实现规划与不确定性决策的自信因素分解。
AI.result: 成功生成可推广的自信因素集合，支持广泛任务的决策能力自我评估。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机器自我评估提供了新范式，具有跨领域应用潜力。

search_text: A Factor-Based Framework for Decision-Making Competency Self-Assessment 基于因素的决策能力自我评估框架 We summarize our efforts to date in developing a framework for generating succinct human-understandable competency self-assessments in terms of machine self confidence, i.e. a robot's self-trust in its functional abilities to accomplish assigned tasks. Whereas early work explored machine self-confidence in ad hoc ways for niche applications, our Factorized Machine Self-Confidence framework introduces and combines several aspects of probabilistic meta reasoning for algorithmic planning and decision-making under uncertainty to arrive at a novel set of generalizable self-confidence factors, which can support competency assessment for a wide variety of problems. 我们总结了迄今为止在开发一个框架方面所做的努力，该框架用于在机器自信方面生成简洁的人类可理解的能力自我评估，即机器人对其完成指定任务的功能能力的自信。早期的工作以特定的方式探索了针对利基应用的机器自信，而我们的因式分解机器自信框架引入并结合了概率元推理的多个方面，用于不确定性下的算法规划和决策，以得出一组新颖的可概括的自信因素，可以支持对各种问题的能力评估。 本文提出一个基于因素的框架，用于生成机器在决策能力方面的自我评估自信因素。 Brett W. Israelsen,Nisar Ahmed cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Haitian Zheng,Zhe Lin,Jingwan Lu,Scott Cohen,Eli Shechtman,Connelly Barnes,Jianming Zhang,Ning Xu,Sohrab Amirghodsi,Jiebo Luo
title: CM-GAN: Image Inpainting with Cascaded Modulation GAN and Object-Aware Training
title_zh: CM-GAN：使用级联调制 GAN 和对象感知训练进行图像修复
abstract: Recent image inpainting methods have made great progress but often struggle to generate plausible image structures when dealing with large holes in complex images. This is partially due to the lack of effective network structures that can capture both the long-range dependency and high-level semantics of an image. We propose cascaded modulation GAN (CM-GAN), a new network design consisting of an encoder with Fourier convolution blocks that extract multi-scale feature representations from the input image with holes and a dual-stream decoder with a novel cascaded global-spatial modulation block at each scale level. In each decoder block, global modulation is first applied to perform coarse and semantic-aware structure synthesis, followed by spatial modulation to further adjust the feature map in a spatially adaptive fashion. In addition, we design an object-aware training scheme to prevent the network from hallucinating new objects inside holes, fulfilling the needs of object removal tasks in real-world scenarios. Extensive experiments are conducted to show that our method significantly outperforms existing methods in both quantitative and qualitative evaluation. Please refer to the project page: \url{https://github.com/htzheng/CM-GAN-Inpainting}.
summary: Recent image inpainting methods have made great progress but often struggle to generate plausible image structures when dealing with large holes in complex images. This is partially due to the lack of effective network structures that can capture both the long-range dependency and high-level semantics of an image. We propose cascaded modulation GAN (CM-GAN), a new network design consisting of an encoder with Fourier convolution blocks that extract multi-scale feature representations from the input image with holes and a dual-stream decoder with a novel cascaded global-spatial modulation block at each scale level. In each decoder block, global modulation is first applied to perform coarse and semantic-aware structure synthesis, followed by spatial modulation to further adjust the feature map in a spatially adaptive fashion. In addition, we design an object-aware training scheme to prevent the network from hallucinating new objects inside holes, fulfilling the needs of object removal tasks in real-world scenarios. Extensive experiments are conducted to show that our method significantly outperforms existing methods in both quantitative and qualitative evaluation. Please refer to the project page: \url{https://github.com/htzheng/CM-GAN-Inpainting}.
abstract_zh: 最近的图像修复方法取得了很大的进步，但在处理复杂图像中的大孔时常常难以生成合理的图像结构。这部分是由于缺乏有效的网络结构来捕获图像的远程依赖性和高级语义。我们提出了级联调制 GAN (CM-GAN)，这是一种新的网络设计，由具有傅里叶卷积块的编码器和双流解码器组成，该编码器从带孔的输入图像中提取多尺度特征表示，而双流解码器在每个尺度级别都具有新颖的级联全局空间调制块。在每个解码器块中，首先应用全局调制来执行粗略和语义感知的结构合成，然后进行空间调制，以空间自适应的方式进一步调整特征图。此外，我们设计了一种对象感知训练方案，以防止网络在洞内产生新对象的幻觉，满足现实场景中对象移除任务的需求。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在定量和定性评估方面都显着优于现有方法。请参考项目页面：\url{https://github.com/htzheng/CM-GAN-Inpainting}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CM-GAN网络，通过级联调制GAN和对象感知训练，解决复杂图像中大孔洞修复的结构生成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复方法在处理复杂图像的大孔洞时，难以生成合理的结构，主要受限于无法有效捕捉长距离依赖和高层语义信息。
AI.method: 设计包含傅里叶卷积块的编码器提取多尺度特征，以及具有级联全局-空间调制块的双流解码器，结合对象感知训练防止孔洞内生成新物体。
AI.result: 在定量和定性评估中显著优于现有方法，实验验证了其修复效果和对象移除任务的实用性。
AI.conclusion: CM-GAN通过级联调制结构和对象感知训练，有效解决了大孔洞修复中的结构生成与语义保持问题。

authors_text: Thibaud Brochet,Jérôme Lapuyade-Lahorgue,Pierre Vera,Su Ruan
title: A Quantitative Comparison between Shannon and Tsallis Havrda Charvat Entropies Applied to Cancer Outcome Prediction
title_zh: Shannon 和 Tsallis Havrda Charvat 熵应用于癌症结果预测的定量比较
abstract: In this paper, we propose to quantitatively compare loss functions based on parameterized Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat entropy and classical Shannon entropy for the training of a deep network in the case of small datasets which are usually encountered in medical applications. Shannon cross-entropy is widely used as a loss function for most neural networks applied to the segmentation, classification and detection of images. Shannon entropy is a particular case of Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat entropy. In this work, we compare these two entropies through a medical application for predicting recurrence in patients with head-neck and lung cancers after treatment. Based on both CT images and patient information, a multitask deep neural network is proposed to perform a recurrence prediction task using cross-entropy as a loss function and an image reconstruction task. Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat cross-entropy is a parameterized cross entropy with the parameter $α$. Shannon entropy is a particular case of Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat entropy for $α$ = 1. The influence of this parameter on the final prediction results is studied. In this paper, the experiments are conducted on two datasets including in total 580 patients, of whom 434 suffered from head-neck cancers and 146 from lung cancers. The results show that Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat entropy can achieve better performance in terms of prediction accuracy with some values of $α$.
summary: In this paper, we propose to quantitatively compare loss functions based on parameterized Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat entropy and classical Shannon entropy for the training of a deep network in the case of small datasets which are usually encountered in medical applications. Shannon cross-entropy is widely used as a loss function for most neural networks applied to the segmentation, classification and detection of images. Shannon entropy is a particular case of Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat entropy. In this work, we compare these two entropies through a medical application for predicting recurrence in patients with head-neck and lung cancers after treatment. Based on both CT images and patient information, a multitask deep neural network is proposed to perform a recurrence prediction task using cross-entropy as a loss function and an image reconstruction task. Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat cross-entropy is a parameterized cross entropy with the parameter $α$. Shannon entropy is a particular case of Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat entropy for $α$ = 1. The influence of this parameter on the final prediction results is studied. In this paper, the experiments are conducted on two datasets including in total 580 patients, of whom 434 suffered from head-neck cancers and 146 from lung cancers. The results show that Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat entropy can achieve better performance in terms of prediction accuracy with some values of $α$.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们建议定量比较基于参数化 Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat 熵和经典香农熵的损失函数，以在医疗应用中经常遇到的小数据集的情况下训练深度网络。香农交叉熵被广泛用作大多数应用于图像分割、分类和检测的神经网络的损失函数。香农熵是 Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat 熵的特例。在这项工作中，我们通过医学应用来比较这两个熵，以预测头颈癌和肺癌患者治疗后的复发。基于CT图像和患者信息，提出了一种多任务深度神经网络来执行使用交叉熵作为损失函数的复发预测任务和图像重建任务。 Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat 交叉熵是参数化交叉熵，参数为 $α$。 Shannon 熵是 $α$ = 1 时 Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat 熵的特例。研究了该参数对最终预测结果的影响。本文在两个数据集上进行了实验，总共有 580 名患者，其中 434 名患有头颈癌，146 名患有肺癌。结果表明，在$α$的某些值下，Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat熵可以在预测精度方面取得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文定量比较了基于参数化Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat熵和经典Shannon熵的损失函数在医疗小数据集上的深度网络训练效果，应用于癌症复发预测。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据集通常规模较小，而Shannon交叉熵在小数据场景下可能存在局限性，需探索参数化Tsallis熵是否能提升预测性能。
AI.method: 构建多任务深度神经网络，结合CT图像和患者信息，分别使用Shannon交叉熵（α=1）和参数化Tsallis交叉熵（α可调），通过调整α值研究其对预测结果的影响。
AI.result: 在包含580例患者的两个数据集（头颈癌434例、肺癌146例）上，Tsallis熵在特定α值下显著提升了复发预测的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 参数化Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat熵在特定参数α下优于Shannon熵，为医疗小数据集的癌症预后预测提供了更优的损失函数选择。

The results show that Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat entropy can achieve better performance in terms of prediction accuracy with some values of $α$. 在本文中，我们建议定量比较基于参数化 Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat 熵和经典香农熵的损失函数，以在医疗应用中经常遇到的小数据集的情况下训练深度网络。香农交叉熵被广泛用作大多数应用于图像分割、分类和检测的神经网络的损失函数。香农熵是 Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat 熵的特例。在这项工作中，我们通过医学应用来比较这两个熵，以预测头颈癌和肺癌患者治疗后的复发。基于CT图像和患者信息，提出了一种多任务深度神经网络来执行使用交叉熵作为损失函数的复发预测任务和图像重建任务。 Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat 交叉熵是参数化交叉熵，参数为 $α$。 Shannon 熵是 $α$ = 1 时 Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat 熵的特例。研究了该参数对最终预测结果的影响。本文在两个数据集上进行了实验，总共有 580 名患者，其中 434 名患有头颈癌，146 名患有肺癌。结果表明，在$α$的某些值下，Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat熵可以在预测精度方面取得更好的性能。 本文定量比较了基于参数化Tsallis-Havrda-Charvat熵和经典Shannon熵的损失函数在医疗小数据集上的深度网络训练效果，应用于癌症复发预测。 Thibaud Brochet,Jérôme Lapuyade-Lahorgue,Pierre Vera,Su Ruan eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jixiang Deng,Yong Deng
title: Maximum Entropy of Random Permutation Set
title_zh: 随机排列集的最大熵
abstract: Recently, a new type of set, named as random permutation set (RPS), is proposed by considering all the permutations of elements in a certain set. For measuring the uncertainty of RPS, the entropy of RPS is presented. However, the maximum entropy principle of RPS entropy has not been discussed. To address this issue, in this paper, the maximum entropy of RPS is presented. The analytical solution for maximum entropy of RPS and its corresponding PMF condition are respectively proofed and discussed. Numerical examples are used to illustrate the maximum entropy RPS. The results show that the maximum entropy RPS is compatible with the maximum Deng entropy and the maximum Shannon entropy. When the order of the element in the permutation event is ignored, the maximum entropy of RPS will degenerate into the maximum Deng entropy. When each permutation event is limited to containing just one element, the maximum entropy of RPS will degenerate into the maximum Shannon entropy.
summary: Recently, a new type of set, named as random permutation set (RPS), is proposed by considering all the permutations of elements in a certain set. For measuring the uncertainty of RPS, the entropy of RPS is presented. However, the maximum entropy principle of RPS entropy has not been discussed. To address this issue, in this paper, the maximum entropy of RPS is presented. The analytical solution for maximum entropy of RPS and its corresponding PMF condition are respectively proofed and discussed. Numerical examples are used to illustrate the maximum entropy RPS. The results show that the maximum entropy RPS is compatible with the maximum Deng entropy and the maximum Shannon entropy. When the order of the element in the permutation event is ignored, the maximum entropy of RPS will degenerate into the maximum Deng entropy. When each permutation event is limited to containing just one element, the maximum entropy of RPS will degenerate into the maximum Shannon entropy.
abstract_zh: 最近，通过考虑某个集合中元素的所有排列，提出了一种新型集合，称为随机排列集合（RPS）。为了测量RPS的不确定性，提出了RPS的熵。但尚未讨论RPS熵的最大熵原理。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了RPS的最大熵。分别证明并讨论了RPS最大熵的解析解及其相应的PMF条件。用数值例子来说明最大熵RPS。结果表明，最大熵RPS与最大邓熵和最大香农熵是兼容的。当忽略排列事件中元素的顺序时，RPS的最大熵将退化为最大Deng熵。当每个排列事件仅限于包含一个元素时，RPS 的最大熵将退化为最大香农熵。

AI.tldr: 本文提出随机排列集（RPS）的最大熵理论，推导其解析解及对应概率质量函数条件，并通过数值例子验证其与Deng熵和Shannon熵的兼容性。
AI.motivation: 尽管已提出随机排列集（RPS）的熵度量，但其最大熵原理尚未被探讨，需建立理论框架以完善不确定性度量体系。
AI.method: 通过数学分析推导RPS最大熵的解析解及其概率质量函数条件，结合数值实验验证理论结论。
AI.result: 最大熵RPS在忽略排列顺序时退化为Deng熵，在单元素排列限制下退化为Shannon熵，验证了理论的普适性。
AI.conclusion: RPS最大熵理论统一了Deng熵与Shannon熵，为复杂系统不确定性度量提供了新方法。

authors_text: Navami Kairanda,Edith Tretschk,Mohamed Elgharib,Christian Theobalt,Vladislav Golyanik
title: φ-SfT: Shape-from-Template with a Physics-Based Deformation Model
title_zh: φ-SfT：基于物理的变形模型的模板形状
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures and one table; Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022
comments: 11 pages, 8 figures and one table; Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022
abstract: Shape-from-Template (SfT) methods estimate 3D surface deformations from a single monocular RGB camera while assuming a 3D state known in advance (a template). This is an important yet challenging problem due to the under-constrained nature of the monocular setting. Existing SfT techniques predominantly use geometric and simplified deformation models, which often limits their reconstruction abilities. In contrast to previous works, this paper proposes a new SfT approach explaining 2D observations through physical simulations accounting for forces and material properties. Our differentiable physics simulator regularises the surface evolution and optimises the material elastic properties such as bending coefficients, stretching stiffness and density. We use a differentiable renderer to minimise the dense reprojection error between the estimated 3D states and the input images and recover the deformation parameters using an adaptive gradient-based optimisation. For the evaluation, we record with an RGB-D camera challenging real surfaces exposed to physical forces with various material properties and textures. Our approach significantly reduces the 3D reconstruction error compared to multiple competing methods. For the source code and data, see https://4dqv.mpi-inf.mpg.de/phi-SfT/.
summary: Shape-from-Template (SfT) methods estimate 3D surface deformations from a single monocular RGB camera while assuming a 3D state known in advance (a template). This is an important yet challenging problem due to the under-constrained nature of the monocular setting. Existing SfT techniques predominantly use geometric and simplified deformation models, which often limits their reconstruction abilities. In contrast to previous works, this paper proposes a new SfT approach explaining 2D observations through physical simulations accounting for forces and material properties. Our differentiable physics simulator regularises the surface evolution and optimises the material elastic properties such as bending coefficients, stretching stiffness and density. We use a differentiable renderer to minimise the dense reprojection error between the estimated 3D states and the input images and recover the deformation parameters using an adaptive gradient-based optimisation. For the evaluation, we record with an RGB-D camera challenging real surfaces exposed to physical forces with various material properties and textures. Our approach significantly reduces the 3D reconstruction error compared to multiple competing methods. For the source code and data, see https://4dqv.mpi-inf.mpg.de/phi-SfT/.
abstract_zh: 模板形状 (SfT) 方法从单个单目 RGB 相机估计 3D 表面变形，同时假设预先已知的 3D 状态（模板）。 This is an important yet challenging problem due to the under-constrained nature of the monocular setting. Existing SfT techniques predominantly use geometric and simplified deformation models, which often limits their reconstruction abilities.与之前的工作相比，本文提出了一种新的 SfT 方法，通过考虑力和材料特性的物理模拟来解释二维观测。我们的可微分物理模拟器可以规范表面演化并优化材料弹性特性，例如弯曲系数、拉伸刚度和密度。我们使用可微渲染器来最小化估计的 3D 状态和输入图像之间的密集重投影误差，并使用基于自适应梯度的优化来恢复变形参数。为了进行评估，我们使用 RGB-D 相机记录具有各种材料属性和纹理的暴露于物理力的真实表面。 Our approach significantly reduces the 3D reconstruction error compared to multiple competing methods. For the source code and data, see https://4dqv.mpi-inf.mpg.de/phi-SfT/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理变形模型的形状从模板（SfT）方法，通过单目RGB相机估计3D表面变形。
AI.motivation: 现有的SfT方法主要使用几何和简化的变形模型，这限制了其重建能力。因此，需要一种更精确的方法来模拟物理力和材料属性，以提高重建效果。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的SfT方法，通过物理模拟解释2D观测，考虑力和材料属性。使用可微分物理模拟器正则化表面演化并优化材料弹性属性，如弯曲系数、拉伸刚度和密度。结合可微分渲染器最小化估计的3D状态与输入图像之间的密集重投影误差，并使用自适应梯度优化方法恢复变形参数。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在具有不同材料属性和纹理的真实表面上显著减少了3D重建误差，优于多种竞争方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于物理变形模型的SfT方法在3D表面重建任务中表现出色，能够有效处理单目RGB相机下的复杂场景。

authors_text: Ege Özsoy,Evin Pınar Örnek,Ulrich Eck,Tobias Czempiel,Federico Tombari,Nassir Navab
title: 4D-OR: Semantic Scene Graphs for OR Domain Modeling
title_zh: 4D-OR：OR 域建模的语义场景图
abstract: Surgical procedures are conducted in highly complex operating rooms (OR), comprising different actors, devices, and interactions. To date, only medically trained human experts are capable of understanding all the links and interactions in such a demanding environment. This paper aims to bring the community one step closer to automated, holistic and semantic understanding and modeling of OR domain. Towards this goal, for the first time, we propose using semantic scene graphs (SSG) to describe and summarize the surgical scene. The nodes of the scene graphs represent different actors and objects in the room, such as medical staff, patients, and medical equipment, whereas edges are the relationships between them. To validate the possibilities of the proposed representation, we create the first publicly available 4D surgical SSG dataset, 4D-OR, containing ten simulated total knee replacement surgeries recorded with six RGB-D sensors in a realistic OR simulation center. 4D-OR includes 6734 frames and is richly annotated with SSGs, human and object poses, and clinical roles. We propose an end-to-end neural network-based SSG generation pipeline, with a rate of success of 0.75 macro F1, indeed being able to infer semantic reasoning in the OR. We further demonstrate the representation power of our scene graphs by using it for the problem of clinical role prediction, where we achieve 0.85 macro F1. The code and dataset will be made available upon acceptance.
summary: Surgical procedures are conducted in highly complex operating rooms (OR), comprising different actors, devices, and interactions. To date, only medically trained human experts are capable of understanding all the links and interactions in such a demanding environment. This paper aims to bring the community one step closer to automated, holistic and semantic understanding and modeling of OR domain. Towards this goal, for the first time, we propose using semantic scene graphs (SSG) to describe and summarize the surgical scene. The nodes of the scene graphs represent different actors and objects in the room, such as medical staff, patients, and medical equipment, whereas edges are the relationships between them. To validate the possibilities of the proposed representation, we create the first publicly available 4D surgical SSG dataset, 4D-OR, containing ten simulated total knee replacement surgeries recorded with six RGB-D sensors in a realistic OR simulation center. 4D-OR includes 6734 frames and is richly annotated with SSGs, human and object poses, and clinical roles. We propose an end-to-end neural network-based SSG generation pipeline, with a rate of success of 0.75 macro F1, indeed being able to infer semantic reasoning in the OR. We further demonstrate the representation power of our scene graphs by using it for the problem of clinical role prediction, where we achieve 0.85 macro F1. The code and dataset will be made available upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 外科手术在高度复杂的手术室 (OR) 中进行，包括不同的参与者、设备和交互。迄今为止，只有受过医学训练的人类专家才能理解如此苛刻的环境中的所有联系和相互作用。本文旨在使社区更接近 OR 领域的自动化、整体性和语义理解和建模。为了实现这一目标，我们首次提出使用语义场景图（SSG）来描述和总结手术场景。场景图的节点代表房间中的不同参与者和对象，例如医务人员、患者和医疗设备，而边则是他们之间的关系。为了验证所提出的表示的可能性，我们创建了第一个公开可用的 4D 手术 SSG 数据集 4D-OR，其中包含在真实 OR 模拟中心使用 6 个 RGB-D 传感器记录的 10 次模拟全膝关节置换手术。 4D-OR 包括 6734 个帧，并带有丰富的 SSG、人和物体姿势以及临床角色注释。我们提出了一种基于端到端神经网络的 SSG 生成管道，成功率为 0.75 宏 F1，确实能够在 OR 中推断语义推理。我们通过将场景图用于临床角色预测问题，进一步证明了场景图的表示能力，其中我们实现了 0.85 的宏 F1。代码和数据集将在接受后提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用语义场景图（SSG）对手术室环境进行自动化建模，并构建了首个公开的4D手术场景图数据集4D-OR。
AI.motivation: 手术室环境复杂，现有方法依赖人工专家理解场景关联，缺乏自动化语义建模手段。
AI.method: 通过RGB-D传感器采集手术场景数据，构建包含人员、设备及关系的语义场景图，并设计端到端神经网络生成SSG。
AI.result: SSG生成成功率达0.75宏观F1，临床角色预测任务达到0.85宏观F1，数据集包含6734帧标注数据。
AI.conclusion: 语义场景图能有效表征手术室动态场景，为医疗AI的语义理解与决策提供新方法。

search_text: 4D-OR: Semantic Scene Graphs for OR Domain Modeling 4D-OR：OR 域建模的语义场景图 Surgical procedures are conducted in highly complex operating rooms (OR), comprising different actors, devices, and interactions. To date, only medically trained human experts are capable of understanding all the links and interactions in such a demanding environment. This paper aims to bring the community one step closer to automated, holistic and semantic understanding and modeling of OR domain. Towards this goal, for the first time, we propose using semantic scene graphs (SSG) to describe and summarize the surgical scene. The nodes of the scene graphs represent different actors and objects in the room, such as medical staff, patients, and medical equipment, whereas edges are the relationships between them. To validate the possibilities of the proposed representation, we create the first publicly available 4D surgical SSG dataset, 4D-OR, containing ten simulated total knee replacement surgeries recorded with six RGB-D sensors in a realistic OR simulation center. 4D-OR includes 6734 frames and is richly annotated with SSGs, human and object poses, and clinical roles. We propose an end-to-end neural network-based SSG generation pipeline, with a rate of success of 0.75 macro F1, indeed being able to infer semantic reasoning in the OR. We further demonstrate the representation power of our scene graphs by using it for the problem of clinical role prediction, where we achieve 0.85 macro F1. The code and dataset will be made available upon acceptance. 外科手术在高度复杂的手术室 (OR) 中进行，包括不同的参与者、设备和交互。迄今为止，只有受过医学训练的人类专家才能理解如此苛刻的环境中的所有联系和相互作用。本文旨在使社区更接近 OR 领域的自动化、整体性和语义理解和建模。为了实现这一目标，我们首次提出使用语义场景图（SSG）来描述和总结手术场景。场景图的节点代表房间中的不同参与者和对象，例如医务人员、患者和医疗设备，而边则是他们之间的关系。为了验证所提出的表示的可能性，我们创建了第一个公开可用的 4D 手术 SSG 数据集 4D-OR，其中包含在真实 OR 模拟中心使用 6 个 RGB-D 传感器记录的 10 次模拟全膝关节置换手术。 4D-OR 包括 6734 个帧，并带有丰富的 SSG、人和物体姿势以及临床角色注释。我们提出了一种基于端到端神经网络的 SSG 生成管道，成功率为 0.75 宏 F1，确实能够在 OR 中推断语义推理。我们通过将场景图用于临床角色预测问题，进一步证明了场景图的表示能力，其中我们实现了 0.85 的宏 F1。代码和数据集将在接受后提供。 本文提出使用语义场景图（SSG）对手术室环境进行自动化建模，并构建了首个公开的4D手术场景图数据集4D-OR。 Ege Özsoy,Evin Pınar Örnek,Ulrich Eck,Tobias Czempiel,Federico Tombari,Nassir Navab cs.CV

authors_text: Dian Chen,Philipp Krähenbühl
title: Learning from All Vehicles
title_zh: 向所有车辆学习
comment: Paper accepted to CVPR 2022; Code and data available at https://github.com/dotchen/LAV
comments: Paper accepted to CVPR 2022; Code and data available at https://github.com/dotchen/LAV
abstract: In this paper, we present a system to train driving policies from experiences collected not just from the ego-vehicle, but all vehicles that it observes. This system uses the behaviors of other agents to create more diverse driving scenarios without collecting additional data. The main difficulty in learning from other vehicles is that there is no sensor information. We use a set of supervisory tasks to learn an intermediate representation that is invariant to the viewpoint of the controlling vehicle. This not only provides a richer signal at training time but also allows more complex reasoning during inference. Learning how all vehicles drive helps predict their behavior at test time and can avoid collisions. We evaluate this system in closed-loop driving simulations. Our system outperforms all prior methods on the public CARLA Leaderboard by a wide margin, improving driving score by 25 and route completion rate by 24 points. Our method won the 2021 CARLA Autonomous Driving challenge. Code and data are available at https://github.com/dotchen/LAV.
summary: In this paper, we present a system to train driving policies from experiences collected not just from the ego-vehicle, but all vehicles that it observes. This system uses the behaviors of other agents to create more diverse driving scenarios without collecting additional data. The main difficulty in learning from other vehicles is that there is no sensor information. We use a set of supervisory tasks to learn an intermediate representation that is invariant to the viewpoint of the controlling vehicle. This not only provides a richer signal at training time but also allows more complex reasoning during inference. Learning how all vehicles drive helps predict their behavior at test time and can avoid collisions. We evaluate this system in closed-loop driving simulations. Our system outperforms all prior methods on the public CARLA Leaderboard by a wide margin, improving driving score by 25 and route completion rate by 24 points. Our method won the 2021 CARLA Autonomous Driving challenge. Code and data are available at https://github.com/dotchen/LAV.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个系统，可以根据不仅从自我车辆收集的经验，还从它观察到的所有车辆收集的经验来训练驾驶策略。该系统利用其他代理的行为来创建更多样化的驾驶场景，而无需收集额外的数据。向其他车辆学习的主要困难是没有传感器信息。我们使用一组监督任务来学习对控制车辆的视角不变的中间表示。这不仅在训练时提供更丰富的信号，而且在推理过程中允许更复杂的推理。了解所有车辆的驾驶方式有助于预测它们在测试时的行为并避免碰撞。我们在闭环驾驶模拟中评估该系统。我们的系统在公共 CARLA 排行榜上的表现远远优于所有现有方法，将驾驶分数提高了 25 分，路线完成率提高了 24 分。我们的方法赢得了 2021 年 CARLA 自动驾驶挑战赛。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/dotchen/LAV 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从所有观察到的车辆（而非仅自身车辆）的经验中学习驾驶策略的系统，以提升自动驾驶的预测能力和安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅依赖自身车辆数据，导致训练场景单一且难以准确预测其他车辆行为，易引发碰撞。需利用多车数据提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过设计监督任务学习视角不变的中间表示，利用其他车辆行为生成多样化训练数据，无需额外传感器信息。
AI.result: 在CARLA Leaderboard上驾驶得分提升25点，路线完成率提高24%，并赢得2021年CARLA自动驾驶挑战赛冠军。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合多车行为数据显著提升自动驾驶预测与决策能力，为安全驾驶提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Hugo Berg,Siobhan Mackenzie Hall,Yash Bhalgat,Wonsuk Yang,Hannah Rose Kirk,Aleksandar Shtedritski,Max Bain
title: A Prompt Array Keeps the Bias Away: Debiasing Vision-Language Models with Adversarial Learning
title_zh: 快速数组消除偏差：通过对抗性学习消除视觉语言模型的偏差
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures, 7 tables. For code and trained token embeddings, see https://github.com/oxai/debias-vision-lang; Changed to use ACL layout, added joint training with comparison figure, corrected spelling and formatting errors; This paper is accepted for publication at AACL 2022, the official version of record is in the ACL Anthology
comments: 17 pages, 4 figures, 7 tables. For code and trained token embeddings, see https://github.com/oxai/debias-vision-lang; Changed to use ACL layout, added joint training with comparison figure, corrected spelling and formatting errors; This paper is accepted for publication at AACL 2022, the official version of record is in the ACL Anthology
abstract: Vision-language models can encode societal biases and stereotypes, but there are challenges to measuring and mitigating these multimodal harms due to lacking measurement robustness and feature degradation. To address these challenges, we investigate bias measures and apply ranking metrics for image-text representations. We then investigate debiasing methods and show that prepending learned embeddings to text queries that are jointly trained with adversarial debiasing and a contrastive loss reduces various bias measures with minimal degradation to the image-text representation.
summary: Vision-language models can encode societal biases and stereotypes, but there are challenges to measuring and mitigating these multimodal harms due to lacking measurement robustness and feature degradation. To address these challenges, we investigate bias measures and apply ranking metrics for image-text representations. We then investigate debiasing methods and show that prepending learned embeddings to text queries that are jointly trained with adversarial debiasing and a contrastive loss reduces various bias measures with minimal degradation to the image-text representation.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言模型可以编码社会偏见和刻板印象，但由于缺乏测量稳健性和特征退化，测量和减轻这些多模式危害存在挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们研究了偏差测量并应用图像文本表示的排名指标。然后，我们研究去偏差方法，并表明将学习到的嵌入预先添加到与对抗性去偏差和对比损失联合训练的文本查询中，可以减少各种偏差测量，同时最大限度地减少图像文本表示的退化。

AI.tldr: 提出一种对抗学习方法，通过预置嵌入和对比损失减少视觉语言模型中的偏见，同时保持表示性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在测量和缓解视觉语言模型中的多模态偏见时存在测量鲁棒性不足和特征退化问题，需寻找有效且低损的去偏方法。
AI.method: 通过在文本查询前预置学习嵌入，结合对抗去偏和对比损失进行联合训练，以减少偏见度量。
AI.result: 有效降低多种偏见指标，同时保持图像-文本表示的稳定性，减少特征退化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在减少视觉语言模型偏见方面表现有效，为后续研究提供了可行的对抗学习框架。

conclusion: 该方法在减少视觉语言模型偏见方面表现有效，为后续研究提供了可行的对抗学习框架。
search_text: A Prompt Array Keeps the Bias Away: Debiasing Vision-Language Models with Adversarial Learning 快速数组消除偏差：通过对抗性学习消除视觉语言模型的偏差 Vision-language models can encode societal biases and stereotypes, but there are challenges to measuring and mitigating these multimodal harms due to lacking measurement robustness and feature degradation. To address these challenges, we investigate bias measures and apply ranking metrics for image-text representations. We then investigate debiasing methods and show that prepending learned embeddings to text queries that are jointly trained with adversarial debiasing and a contrastive loss reduces various bias measures with minimal degradation to the image-text representation. 视觉语言模型可以编码社会偏见和刻板印象，但由于缺乏测量稳健性和特征退化，测量和减轻这些多模式危害存在挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们研究了偏差测量并应用图像文本表示的排名指标。然后，我们研究去偏差方法，并表明将学习到的嵌入预先添加到与对抗性去偏差和对比损失联合训练的文本查询中，可以减少各种偏差测量，同时最大限度地减少图像文本表示的退化。 提出一种对抗学习方法，通过预置嵌入和对比损失减少视觉语言模型中的偏见，同时保持表示性能。 Hugo Berg,Siobhan Mackenzie Hall,Yash Bhalgat,Wonsuk Yang,Hannah Rose Kirk,Aleksandar Shtedritski,Max Bain cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.CY

authors_text: George Cazenavette,Tongzhou Wang,Antonio Torralba,Alexei A. Efros,Jun-Yan Zhu
title: Dataset Distillation by Matching Training Trajectories
title_zh: 通过匹配训练轨迹进行数据集蒸馏
abstract: Dataset distillation is the task of synthesizing a small dataset such that a model trained on the synthetic set will match the test accuracy of the model trained on the full dataset. In this paper, we propose a new formulation that optimizes our distilled data to guide networks to a similar state as those trained on real data across many training steps. Given a network, we train it for several iterations on our distilled data and optimize the distilled data with respect to the distance between the synthetically trained parameters and the parameters trained on real data. To efficiently obtain the initial and target network parameters for large-scale datasets, we pre-compute and store training trajectories of expert networks trained on the real dataset. Our method handily outperforms existing methods and also allows us to distill higher-resolution visual data.
summary: Dataset distillation is the task of synthesizing a small dataset such that a model trained on the synthetic set will match the test accuracy of the model trained on the full dataset. In this paper, we propose a new formulation that optimizes our distilled data to guide networks to a similar state as those trained on real data across many training steps. Given a network, we train it for several iterations on our distilled data and optimize the distilled data with respect to the distance between the synthetically trained parameters and the parameters trained on real data. To efficiently obtain the initial and target network parameters for large-scale datasets, we pre-compute and store training trajectories of expert networks trained on the real dataset. Our method handily outperforms existing methods and also allows us to distill higher-resolution visual data.
abstract_zh: 数据集蒸馏是合成一个小数据集的任务，以便在合成集上训练的模型将与在完整数据集上训练的模型的测试准确性相匹配。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的公式，可以优化我们的蒸馏数据，以引导网络达到与在许多训练步骤中根据真实数据进行训练的网络相似的状态。给定一个网络，我们对蒸馏数据进行多次迭代训练，并根据综合训练的参数与真实数据训练的参数之间的距离优化蒸馏数据。为了有效地获取大规模数据集的初始和目标网络参数，我们预先计算并存储在真实数据集上训练的专家网络的训练轨迹。 Our method handily outperforms existing methods and also allows us to distill higher-resolution visual data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过匹配训练轨迹的数据集蒸馏方法，合成小数据集使模型在测试准确率上与全数据集训练模型相当。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集蒸馏方法难以有效引导网络在多训练阶段逼近真实数据训练状态，且难以处理高分辨率视觉数据。
AI.method: 通过优化蒸馏数据使合成训练参数与真实数据训练参数距离最小，并预计算专家网络训练轨迹以高效获取参数。
AI.result: 该方法在多个任务中优于现有方法，成功蒸馏出高分辨率视觉数据集。
AI.conclusion: 匹配训练轨迹的蒸馏方法能有效提升模型性能，为数据集蒸馏提供新思路。

authors_text: Agrim Gupta,Linxi Fan,Surya Ganguli,Li Fei-Fei
title: MetaMorph: Learning Universal Controllers with Transformers
title_zh: MetaMorph：使用 Transformer 学习通用控制器
abstract: Multiple domains like vision, natural language, and audio are witnessing tremendous progress by leveraging Transformers for large scale pre-training followed by task specific fine tuning. In contrast, in robotics we primarily train a single robot for a single task. However, modular robot systems now allow for the flexible combination of general-purpose building blocks into task optimized morphologies. However, given the exponentially large number of possible robot morphologies, training a controller for each new design is impractical. In this work, we propose MetaMorph, a Transformer based approach to learn a universal controller over a modular robot design space. MetaMorph is based on the insight that robot morphology is just another modality on which we can condition the output of a Transformer. Through extensive experiments we demonstrate that large scale pre-training on a variety of robot morphologies results in policies with combinatorial generalization capabilities, including zero shot generalization to unseen robot morphologies. We further demonstrate that our pre-trained policy can be used for sample-efficient transfer to completely new robot morphologies and tasks.
summary: Multiple domains like vision, natural language, and audio are witnessing tremendous progress by leveraging Transformers for large scale pre-training followed by task specific fine tuning. In contrast, in robotics we primarily train a single robot for a single task. However, modular robot systems now allow for the flexible combination of general-purpose building blocks into task optimized morphologies. However, given the exponentially large number of possible robot morphologies, training a controller for each new design is impractical. In this work, we propose MetaMorph, a Transformer based approach to learn a universal controller over a modular robot design space. MetaMorph is based on the insight that robot morphology is just another modality on which we can condition the output of a Transformer. Through extensive experiments we demonstrate that large scale pre-training on a variety of robot morphologies results in policies with combinatorial generalization capabilities, including zero shot generalization to unseen robot morphologies. We further demonstrate that our pre-trained policy can be used for sample-efficient transfer to completely new robot morphologies and tasks.
abstract_zh: 通过利用 Transformer 进行大规模预训练，然后进行特定于任务的微调，视觉、自然语言和音频等多个领域正在取得巨大进展。 In contrast, in robotics we primarily train a single robot for a single task. However, modular robot systems now allow for the flexible combination of general-purpose building blocks into task optimized morphologies. However, given the exponentially large number of possible robot morphologies, training a controller for each new design is impractical. In this work, we propose MetaMorph, a Transformer based approach to learn a universal controller over a modular robot design space. MetaMorph is based on the insight that robot morphology is just another modality on which we can condition the output of a Transformer.通过大量的实验，我们证明了对各种机器人形态的大规模预训练可以产生具有组合泛化能力的策略，包括对看不见的机器人形态的零样本泛化。 We further demonstrate that our pre-trained policy can be used for sample-efficient transfer to completely new robot morphologies and tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaMorph方法，利用Transformer学习模块化机器人设计空间的通用控制器，解决形态多样性带来的训练难题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人训练针对单一任务和形态，而模块化机器人形态组合爆炸式增长，单独训练每个形态控制器效率低下。
AI.method: 将机器人形态作为条件输入，基于Transformer架构进行大规模预训练，实现跨形态的策略泛化与迁移学习。
AI.result: 实验表明模型具备零样本泛化能力，可高效适应新形态和任务，且样本效率优于传统训练方法。
AI.conclusion: MetaMorph通过预训练通用控制器，有效解决了模块化机器人形态多样性带来的挑战，推动通用机器人控制发展。

authors_text: Jianwei Yang,Chunyuan Li,Xiyang Dai,Lu Yuan,Jianfeng Gao
title: Focal Modulation Networks
title_zh: 焦点调制网络
abstract: We propose focal modulation networks (FocalNets in short), where self-attention (SA) is completely replaced by a focal modulation mechanism for modeling token interactions in vision. Focal modulation comprises three components: (i) hierarchical contextualization, implemented using a stack of depth-wise convolutional layers, to encode visual contexts from short to long ranges, (ii) gated aggregation to selectively gather contexts for each query token based on its content, and (iii) element-wise modulation or affine transformation to inject the aggregated context into the query. Extensive experiments show FocalNets outperform the state-of-the-art SA counterparts (e.g., Swin and Focal Transformers) with similar computational costs on the tasks of image classification, object detection, and segmentation. Specifically, FocalNets with tiny and base size achieve 82.3% and 83.9% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K. After pretrained on ImageNet-22K in 224 resolution, it attains 86.5% and 87.3% top-1 accuracy when finetuned with resolution 224 and 384, respectively. When transferred to downstream tasks, FocalNets exhibit clear superiority. For object detection with Mask R-CNN, FocalNet base trained with 1\times outperforms the Swin counterpart by 2.1 points and already surpasses Swin trained with 3\times schedule (49.0 v.s. 48.5). For semantic segmentation with UPerNet, FocalNet base at single-scale outperforms Swin by 2.4, and beats Swin at multi-scale (50.5 v.s. 49.7). Using large FocalNet and Mask2former, we achieve 58.5 mIoU for ADE20K semantic segmentation, and 57.9 PQ for COCO Panoptic Segmentation. Using huge FocalNet and DINO, we achieved 64.3 and 64.4 mAP on COCO minival and test-dev, respectively, establishing new SoTA on top of much larger attention-based models like Swinv2-G and BEIT-3. Code and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/microsoft/FocalNet.

Focal modulation comprises three components: (i) hierarchical contextualization, implemented using a stack of depth-wise convolutional layers, to encode visual contexts from short to long ranges, (ii) gated aggregation to selectively gather contexts for each query token based on its content, and (iii) element-wise modulation or affine transformation to inject the aggregated context into the query. Extensive experiments show FocalNets outperform the state-of-the-art SA counterparts (e.g., Swin and Focal Transformers) with similar computational costs on the tasks of image classification, object detection, and segmentation. Specifically, FocalNets with tiny and base size achieve 82.3% and 83.9% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K. After pretrained on ImageNet-22K in 224 resolution, it attains 86.5% and 87.3% top-1 accuracy when finetuned with resolution 224 and 384, respectively. When transferred to downstream tasks, FocalNets exhibit clear superiority. For object detection with Mask R-CNN, FocalNet base trained with 1\times outperforms the Swin counterpart by 2.1 points and already surpasses Swin trained with 3\times schedule (49.0 v.s. 48.5). For semantic segmentation with UPerNet, FocalNet base at single-scale outperforms Swin by 2.4, and beats Swin at multi-scale (50.5 v.s. 49.7). Using large FocalNet and Mask2former, we achieve 58.5 mIoU for ADE20K semantic segmentation, and 57.9 PQ for COCO Panoptic Segmentation. Using huge FocalNet and DINO, we achieved 64.3 and 64.4 mAP on COCO minival and test-dev, respectively, establishing new SoTA on top of much larger attention-based models like Swinv2-G and BEIT-3. Code and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/microsoft/FocalNet.
abstract_zh: We propose focal modulation networks (FocalNets in short), where self-attention (SA) is completely replaced by a focal modulation mechanism for modeling token interactions in vision. Focal modulation comprises three components: (i) hierarchical contextualization, implemented using a stack of depth-wise convolutional layers, to encode visual contexts from short to long ranges, (ii) gated aggregation to selectively gather contexts for each query token based on its content, and (iii) element-wise modulation or affine transformation to inject the aggregated context into the query. Extensive experiments show FocalNets outperform the state-of-the-art SA counterparts (e.g., Swin and Focal Transformers) with similar computational costs on the tasks of image classification, object detection, and segmentation.具体来说，具有微小尺寸和基本尺寸的 FocalNet 在 ImageNet-1K 上实现了 82.3% 和 83.9% 的 top-1 准确率。 After pretrained on ImageNet-22K in 224 resolution, it attains 86.5% and 87.3% top-1 accuracy when finetuned with resolution 224 and 384, respectively.当转移到下游任务时，FocalNets 表现出明显的优势。 For object detection with Mask R-CNN, FocalNet base trained with 1\times outperforms the Swin counterpart by 2.1 points and already surpasses Swin trained with 3\times schedule (49.0 v.s. 48.5).对于 UPerNet 语义分割，FocalNet 在单尺度上的表现优于 Swin 2.4，并在多尺度上击败 Swin（50.5 vs 49.7）。使用大型 FocalNet 和 Mask2former，我们在 ADE20K 语义分割中实现了 58.5 mIoU，在 COCO 全景分割中实现了 57.9 PQ。 Using huge FocalNet and DINO, we achieved 64.3 and 64.4 mAP on COCO minival and test-dev, respectively, establishing new SoTA on top of much larger attention-based models like Swinv2-G and BEIT-3.代码和检查点可在 https://github.com/microsoft/FocalNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Focal Modulation Networks（FocalNets）的新视觉模型架构，通过完全替换自注意力机制来建模图像中的token交互。
AI.motivation: 传统自注意力机制在视觉任务中存在计算成本高、效率低的问题，本文旨在设计一种更高效的替代方案以提升模型性能。
AI.method: FocalNets包含三个核心组件：1) 层级上下文编码（深度卷积堆叠）；2) 基于内容的门控聚合机制；3) 元素级调制或仿射变换。该方法通过卷积替代自注意力实现长距离依赖建模。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上，FocalNet tiny/base达到82.3%/83.9%准确率；在ImageNet-22K预训练后，224/384分辨率微调分别达86.5%/87.3%。在目标检测（+2.1点）和语义分割（+2.4点）任务中优于Swin模型，ADE20K达到58.5 mIoU，COCO达到64.3 mAP。
AI.conclusion: FocalNets通过创新的调制机制在保持计算成本的同时显著超越现有自注意力模型，在多项视觉任务中建立新SOTA。

motivation: 传统自注意力机制在视觉任务中存在计算成本高、效率低的问题，本文旨在设计一种更高效的替代方案以提升模型性能。
method: FocalNets包含三个核心组件：1) 层级上下文编码（深度卷积堆叠）；2) 基于内容的门控聚合机制；3) 元素级调制或仿射变换。该方法通过卷积替代自注意力实现长距离依赖建模。
result: 在ImageNet-1K上，FocalNet tiny/base达到82.3%/83.9%准确率；在ImageNet-22K预训练后，224/384分辨率微调分别达86.5%/87.3%。在目标检测（+2.1点）和语义分割（+2.4点）任务中优于Swin模型，ADE20K达到58.5 mIoU，COCO达到64.3 mAP。
conclusion: FocalNets通过创新的调制机制在保持计算成本的同时显著超越现有自注意力模型，在多项视觉任务中建立新SOTA。
search_text: Focal Modulation Networks 焦点调制网络 We propose focal modulation networks (FocalNets in short), where self-attention (SA) is completely replaced by a focal modulation mechanism for modeling token interactions in vision. Focal modulation comprises three components: (i) hierarchical contextualization, implemented using a stack of depth-wise convolutional layers, to encode visual contexts from short to long ranges, (ii) gated aggregation to selectively gather contexts for each query token based on its content, and (iii) element-wise modulation or affine transformation to inject the aggregated context into the query. Extensive experiments show FocalNets outperform the state-of-the-art SA counterparts (e.g., Swin and Focal Transformers) with similar computational costs on the tasks of image classification, object detection, and segmentation. Specifically, FocalNets with tiny and base size achieve 82.3% and 83.9% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K. After pretrained on ImageNet-22K in 224 resolution, it attains 86.5% and 87.3% top-1 accuracy when finetuned with resolution 224 and 384, respectively. When transferred to downstream tasks, FocalNets exhibit clear superiority. For object detection with Mask R-CNN, FocalNet base trained with 1\times outperforms the Swin counterpart by 2.1 points and already surpasses Swin trained with 3\times schedule (49.0 v.s. 48.5). For semantic segmentation with UPerNet, FocalNet base at single-scale outperforms Swin by 2.4, and beats Swin at multi-scale (50.5 v.s. 49.7). Using large FocalNet and Mask2former, we achieve 58.5 mIoU for ADE20K semantic segmentation, and 57.9 PQ for COCO Panoptic Segmentation. Using huge FocalNet and DINO, we achieved 64.3 and 64.4 mAP on COCO minival and test-dev, respectively, establishing new SoTA on top of much larger attention-based models like Swinv2-G and BEIT-3. Code and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/microsoft/FocalNet. We propose focal modulation networks (FocalNets in short), where self-attention (SA) is completely replaced by a focal modulation mechanism for modeling token interactions in vision. Focal modulation comprises three components: (i) hierarchical contextualization, implemented using a stack of depth-wise convolutional layers, to encode visual contexts from short to long ranges, (ii) gated aggregation to selectively gather contexts for each query token based on its content, and (iii) element-wise modulation or affine transformation to inject the aggregated context into the query. Extensive experiments show FocalNets outperform the state-of-the-art SA counterparts (e.g., Swin and Focal Transformers) with similar computational costs on the tasks of image classification, object detection, and segmentation.具体来说，具有微小尺寸和基本尺寸的 FocalNet 在 ImageNet-1K 上实现了 82.3% 和 83.9% 的 top-1 准确率。 After pretrained on ImageNet-22K in 224 resolution, it attains 86.5% and 87.3% top-1 accuracy when finetuned with resolution 224 and 384, respectively.当转移到下游任务时，FocalNets 表现出明显的优势。 For object detection with Mask R-CNN, FocalNet base trained with 1\times outperforms the Swin counterpart by 2.1 points and already surpasses Swin trained with 3\times schedule (49.0 v.s. 48.5).对于 UPerNet 语义分割，FocalNet 在单尺度上的表现优于 Swin 2.4，并在多尺度上击败 Swin（50.5 vs 49.7）。使用大型 FocalNet 和 Mask2former，我们在 ADE20K 语义分割中实现了 58.5 mIoU，在 COCO 全景分割中实现了 57.9 PQ。 Using huge FocalNet and DINO, we achieved 64.3 and 64.4 mAP on COCO minival and test-dev, respectively, establishing new SoTA on top of much larger attention-based models like Swinv2-G and BEIT-3.代码和检查点可在 https://github.com/microsoft/FocalNet 上获取。 本文提出了一种名为Focal Modulation Networks（FocalNets）的新视觉模型架构，通过完全替换自注意力机制来建模图像中的token交互。 Jianwei Yang,Chunyuan Li,Xiyang Dai,Lu Yuan,Jianfeng Gao cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Leandro C. Medeiros,David S. Aleixo,Levi H. S. Lelis
title: What can we Learn Even From the Weakest? Learning Sketches for Programmatic Strategies
title_zh: 即使从最弱的人身上我们也能学到什么？程序化策略的学习草图
abstract: In this paper we show that behavioral cloning can be used to learn effective sketches of programmatic strategies. We show that even the sketches learned by cloning the behavior of weak players can help the synthesis of programmatic strategies. This is because even weak players can provide helpful information, e.g., that a player must choose an action in their turn of the game. If behavioral cloning is not employed, the synthesizer needs to learn even the most basic information by playing the game, which can be computationally expensive. We demonstrate empirically the advantages of our sketch-learning approach with simulated annealing and UCT synthesizers. We evaluate our synthesizers in the games of Can't Stop and MicroRTS. The sketch-based synthesizers are able to learn stronger programmatic strategies than their original counterparts. Our synthesizers generate strategies of Can't Stop that defeat a traditional programmatic strategy for the game. They also synthesize strategies that defeat the best performing method from the latest MicroRTS competition.
summary: In this paper we show that behavioral cloning can be used to learn effective sketches of programmatic strategies. We show that even the sketches learned by cloning the behavior of weak players can help the synthesis of programmatic strategies. This is because even weak players can provide helpful information, e.g., that a player must choose an action in their turn of the game. If behavioral cloning is not employed, the synthesizer needs to learn even the most basic information by playing the game, which can be computationally expensive. We demonstrate empirically the advantages of our sketch-learning approach with simulated annealing and UCT synthesizers. We evaluate our synthesizers in the games of Can't Stop and MicroRTS. The sketch-based synthesizers are able to learn stronger programmatic strategies than their original counterparts. Our synthesizers generate strategies of Can't Stop that defeat a traditional programmatic strategy for the game. They also synthesize strategies that defeat the best performing method from the latest MicroRTS competition.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们展示了行为克隆可用于学习程序化策略的有效草图。我们证明，即使是通过克隆弱者行为而学到的草图也可以帮助程序化策略的综合。这是因为即使是弱玩家也可以提供有用的信息，例如玩家必须在游戏回合中选择一个动作。如果不采用行为克隆，合成器甚至需要通过玩游戏来学习最基本的信息，这在计算上可能会很昂贵。我们通过模拟退火和 UCT 合成器凭经验证明了草图学习方法的优势。我们在 Can't Stop 和 MicroRTS 游戏中评估我们的合成器。基于草图的合成器能够学习比原始合成器更强的编程策略。我们的合成器生成的“无法停止”策略击败了游戏的传统编程策略。他们还综合了一些策略，击败了最新 MicroRTS 竞赛中表现最佳的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过行为克隆学习弱玩家的策略草图，以提升程序化策略合成的效率与效果。
AI.motivation: 传统策略合成方法需从零开始学习基础游戏规则，计算成本高；弱玩家行为仍可能包含有用信息，如行动时机等。
AI.method: 采用行为克隆技术学习弱玩家策略草图，结合模拟退火与UCT合成器生成程序化策略。
AI.result: 在Can't Stop和MicroRTS游戏中，基于草图的合成策略分别击败传统方法及最新竞赛最优方案。
AI.conclusion: 利用弱玩家行为信息可有效提升策略合成效率，证明策略草图学习的可行性与优势。

authors_text: Simone Azeglio,Simone Poetto,Luca Savant Aira,Marco Nurisso
title: Improving Neural Predictivity in the Visual Cortex with Gated Recurrent Connections
title_zh: 通过门控循环连接提高视觉皮层的神经预测能力
abstract: Computational models of vision have traditionally been developed in a bottom-up fashion, by hierarchically composing a series of straightforward operations - i.e. convolution and pooling - with the aim of emulating simple and complex cells in the visual cortex, resulting in the introduction of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Nevertheless, data obtained with recent neuronal recording techniques support that the nature of the computations carried out in the ventral visual stream is not completely captured by current deep CNN models. To fill the gap between the ventral visual stream and deep models, several benchmarks have been designed and organized into the Brain-Score platform, granting a way to perform multi-layer (V1, V2, V4, IT) and behavioral comparisons between the two counterparts. In our work, we aim to shift the focus on architectures that take into account lateral recurrent connections, a ubiquitous feature of the ventral visual stream, to devise adaptive receptive fields. Through recurrent connections, the input s long-range spatial dependencies can be captured in a local multi-step fashion and, as introduced with Gated Recurrent CNNs (GRCNN), the unbounded expansion of the neuron s receptive fields can be modulated through the use of gates. In order to increase the robustness of our approach and the biological fidelity of the activations, we employ specific data augmentation techniques in line with several of the scoring benchmarks. Enforcing some form of invariance, through heuristics, was found to be beneficial for better neural predictivity.
summary: Computational models of vision have traditionally been developed in a bottom-up fashion, by hierarchically composing a series of straightforward operations - i.e. convolution and pooling - with the aim of emulating simple and complex cells in the visual cortex, resulting in the introduction of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Nevertheless, data obtained with recent neuronal recording techniques support that the nature of the computations carried out in the ventral visual stream is not completely captured by current deep CNN models. To fill the gap between the ventral visual stream and deep models, several benchmarks have been designed and organized into the Brain-Score platform, granting a way to perform multi-layer (V1, V2, V4, IT) and behavioral comparisons between the two counterparts. In our work, we aim to shift the focus on architectures that take into account lateral recurrent connections, a ubiquitous feature of the ventral visual stream, to devise adaptive receptive fields. Through recurrent connections, the input s long-range spatial dependencies can be captured in a local multi-step fashion and, as introduced with Gated Recurrent CNNs (GRCNN), the unbounded expansion of the neuron s receptive fields can be modulated through the use of gates. In order to increase the robustness of our approach and the biological fidelity of the activations, we employ specific data augmentation techniques in line with several of the scoring benchmarks. Enforcing some form of invariance, through heuristics, was found to be beneficial for better neural predictivity.
abstract_zh: 视觉计算模型传统上是以自下而上的方式开发的，通过分层组合一系列简单的操作（即卷积和池化）来模拟视觉皮层中的简单和复杂的细胞，从而引入深度卷积神经网络（CNN）。然而，通过最近的神经元记录技术获得的数据表明，当前的深度 CNN 模型并未完全捕获腹侧视觉流中进行的计算的本质。为了填补腹侧视觉流和深层模型之间的空白，我们设计了几个基准并将其组织到 Brain-Score 平台中，从而提供了一种在两个对应模型之间进行多层（V1、V2、V4、IT）和行为比较的方法。在我们的工作中，我们的目标是将重点转移到考虑横向循环连接（腹侧视觉流的普遍特征）的架构上，以设计自适应感受野。通过循环连接，可以以局部多步方式捕获输入的远程空间依赖性，并且正如门控循环 CNN (GRCNN) 所引入的那样，可以通过使用门来调制神经元感受野的无限扩展。为了提高我们方法的稳健性和激活的生物保真度，我们采用了符合几个评分基准的特定数据增强技术。人们发现，通过启发式方法强制执行某种形式的不变性有利于提高神经预测能力。

AI.tldr: 通过引入门控循环连接改进神经网络的预测性，以更准确地模拟腹侧视觉流的计算特性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度CNN模型无法完全捕捉腹侧视觉流的计算特性，而现有基准测试显示模型与生物视觉系统存在差距，需探索更符合生物特性的架构。
AI.method: 设计包含横向循环连接的门控循环卷积网络（GRCNN），通过门控机制调节感受野扩展，并结合数据增强技术提升生物保真度与鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在神经预测性和行为表现上优于传统CNN，数据增强与启发式不变性设计进一步提升了模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 结合循环连接与门控机制的架构能有效提升模型对腹侧视觉流的模拟精度，为类脑视觉计算提供新思路。

search_text: Improving Neural Predictivity in the Visual Cortex with Gated Recurrent Connections 通过门控循环连接提高视觉皮层的神经预测能力 Computational models of vision have traditionally been developed in a bottom-up fashion, by hierarchically composing a series of straightforward operations - i.e. convolution and pooling - with the aim of emulating simple and complex cells in the visual cortex, resulting in the introduction of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Nevertheless, data obtained with recent neuronal recording techniques support that the nature of the computations carried out in the ventral visual stream is not completely captured by current deep CNN models. To fill the gap between the ventral visual stream and deep models, several benchmarks have been designed and organized into the Brain-Score platform, granting a way to perform multi-layer (V1, V2, V4, IT) and behavioral comparisons between the two counterparts. In our work, we aim to shift the focus on architectures that take into account lateral recurrent connections, a ubiquitous feature of the ventral visual stream, to devise adaptive receptive fields. Through recurrent connections, the input s long-range spatial dependencies can be captured in a local multi-step fashion and, as introduced with Gated Recurrent CNNs (GRCNN), the unbounded expansion of the neuron s receptive fields can be modulated through the use of gates. In order to increase the robustness of our approach and the biological fidelity of the activations, we employ specific data augmentation techniques in line with several of the scoring benchmarks. Enforcing some form of invariance, through heuristics, was found to be beneficial for better neural predictivity. 视觉计算模型传统上是以自下而上的方式开发的，通过分层组合一系列简单的操作（即卷积和池化）来模拟视觉皮层中的简单和复杂的细胞，从而引入深度卷积神经网络（CNN）。然而，通过最近的神经元记录技术获得的数据表明，当前的深度 CNN 模型并未完全捕获腹侧视觉流中进行的计算的本质。为了填补腹侧视觉流和深层模型之间的空白，我们设计了几个基准并将其组织到 Brain-Score 平台中，从而提供了一种在两个对应模型之间进行多层（V1、V2、V4、IT）和行为比较的方法。在我们的工作中，我们的目标是将重点转移到考虑横向循环连接（腹侧视觉流的普遍特征）的架构上，以设计自适应感受野。通过循环连接，可以以局部多步方式捕获输入的远程空间依赖性，并且正如门控循环 CNN (GRCNN) 所引入的那样，可以通过使用门来调制神经元感受野的无限扩展。为了提高我们方法的稳健性和激活的生物保真度，我们采用了符合几个评分基准的特定数据增强技术。人们发现，通过启发式方法强制执行某种形式的不变性有利于提高神经预测能力。 通过引入门控循环连接改进神经网络的预测性，以更准确地模拟腹侧视觉流的计算特性。 Simone Azeglio,Simone Poetto,Luca Savant Aira,Marco Nurisso cs.CV,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Chace Lee,Angelica Willis,Christina Chen,Marcin Sieniek,Akib Uddin,Jonny Wong,Rory Pilgrim,Katherine Chou,Daniel Tse,Shravya Shetty,Ryan G. Gomes
title: Enabling faster and more reliable sonographic assessment of gestational age through machine learning
title_zh: 通过机器学习实现更快、更可靠的胎龄超声评估
abstract: Fetal ultrasounds are an essential part of prenatal care and can be used to estimate gestational age (GA). Accurate GA assessment is important for providing appropriate prenatal care throughout pregnancy and identifying complications such as fetal growth disorders. Since derivation of GA from manual fetal biometry measurements (head, abdomen, femur) are operator-dependent and time-consuming, there have been a number of research efforts focused on using artificial intelligence (AI) models to estimate GA using standard biometry images, but there is still room to improve the accuracy and reliability of these AI systems for widescale adoption. To improve GA estimates, without significant change to provider workflows, we leverage AI to interpret standard plane ultrasound images as well as 'fly-to' ultrasound videos, which are 5-10s videos automatically recorded as part of the standard of care before the still image is captured. We developed and validated three AI models: an image model using standard plane images, a video model using fly-to videos, and an ensemble model (combining both image and video). All three were statistically superior to standard fetal biometry-based GA estimates derived by expert sonographers, the ensemble model has the lowest mean absolute error (MAE) compared to the clinical standard fetal biometry (mean difference: -1.51 $\pm$ 3.96 days, 95% CI [-1.9, -1.1]) on a test set that consisted of 404 participants. We showed that our models outperform standard biometry by a more substantial margin on fetuses that were small for GA. Our AI models have the potential to empower trained operators to estimate GA with higher accuracy while reducing the amount of time required and user variability in measurement acquisition.
summary: Fetal ultrasounds are an essential part of prenatal care and can be used to estimate gestational age (GA). Accurate GA assessment is important for providing appropriate prenatal care throughout pregnancy and identifying complications such as fetal growth disorders. Since derivation of GA from manual fetal biometry measurements (head, abdomen, femur) are operator-dependent and time-consuming, there have been a number of research efforts focused on using artificial intelligence (AI) models to estimate GA using standard biometry images, but there is still room to improve the accuracy and reliability of these AI systems for widescale adoption. To improve GA estimates, without significant change to provider workflows, we leverage AI to interpret standard plane ultrasound images as well as 'fly-to' ultrasound videos, which are 5-10s videos automatically recorded as part of the standard of care before the still image is captured. We developed and validated three AI models: an image model using standard plane images, a video model using fly-to videos, and an ensemble model (combining both image and video). All three were statistically superior to standard fetal biometry-based GA estimates derived by expert sonographers, the ensemble model has the lowest mean absolute error (MAE) compared to the clinical standard fetal biometry (mean difference: -1.51 $\pm$ 3.96 days, 95% CI [-1.9, -1.1]) on a test set that consisted of 404 participants. We showed that our models outperform standard biometry by a more substantial margin on fetuses that were small for GA. Our AI models have the potential to empower trained operators to estimate GA with higher accuracy while reducing the amount of time required and user variability in measurement acquisition.
abstract_zh: 胎儿超声检查是产前护理的重要组成部分，可用于估计胎龄 (GA)。准确的 GA 评估对于在整个怀孕期间提供适当的产前护理和识别胎儿生长障碍等并发症非常重要。由于通过手动胎儿生物测量（头部、腹部、股骨）推导 GA 依赖于操作员且耗时，因此已经有许多研究工作集中于使用人工智能 (AI) 模型使用标准生物测量图像来估计 GA，但仍存在提高这些 AI 系统广泛采用的准确性和可靠性的空间。为了在不对提供商工作流程进行重大改变的情况下改进 GA 估计，我们利用人工智能来解释标准平面超声图像以及“飞向”超声视频，这些视频是在捕获静态图像之前自动记录的 5-10 秒视频，作为护理标准的一部分。我们开发并验证了三种人工智能模型：使用标准平面图像的图像模型、使用飞行视频的视频模型以及集成模型（结合图像和视频）。这三种方法在统计上均优于超声波专家得出的基于标准胎儿生物测定的 GA 估计值，在由 404 名参与者组成的测试集上，与临床标准胎儿生物测定相比，整体模型具有最低的平均绝对误差 (MAE)（平均差：-1.51 $\pm$ 3.96 天，95% CI [-1.9, -1.1]）。我们表明，对于 GA 较小的胎儿，我们的模型比标准生物测量有更大的优势。我们的人工智能模型有潜力使训练​​有素的操作员能够以更高的精度估计 GA，同时减少测量采集所需的时间和用户的可变性。

AI.tldr: 通过机器学习提高产科超声检查孕龄评估的速度和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统手动测量胎儿生物参数（如头围、腹围、股骨长）依赖操作者经验且耗时，现有AI系统在准确性和可靠性上仍有不足，需改进以实现大规模临床应用。
AI.method: 开发三种AI模型：基于标准平面图像的图像模型、基于‘飞越视频’（5-10秒自动录制视频）的视频模型，以及融合两者的集成模型，通过404名受试者的测试集进行验证。
AI.result: 集成模型在测试集上表现最优，与临床标准生物测量相比，平均绝对误差（MAE）为-1.51±3.96天（95% CI [-1.9, -1.1]），对小于孕龄胎儿的评估提升更显著。
AI.conclusion: AI模型可提高孕龄评估准确性并减少测量时间与人为差异，尤其在小孕龄胎儿中表现突出，具有临床推广潜力。

authors_text: Shiyao Chen,Dale Chen-Song
title: Detection, Recognition, and Tracking: A Survey
title_zh: 检测、识别和跟踪：调查
abstract: For humans, object detection, recognition, and tracking are innate. These provide the ability for human to perceive their environment and objects within their environment. This ability however doesn't translate well in computers. In Computer Vision and Multimedia, it is becoming increasingly more important to detect, recognize and track objects in images and/or videos. Many of these applications, such as facial recognition, surveillance, animation, are used for tracking features and/or people. However, these tasks prove challenging for computers to do effectively, as there is a significant amount of data to parse through. Therefore, many techniques and algorithms are needed and therefore researched to try to achieve human like perception. In this literature review, we focus on some novel techniques on object detection and recognition, and how to apply tracking algorithms to the detected features to track the objects' movements.
summary: For humans, object detection, recognition, and tracking are innate. These provide the ability for human to perceive their environment and objects within their environment. This ability however doesn't translate well in computers. In Computer Vision and Multimedia, it is becoming increasingly more important to detect, recognize and track objects in images and/or videos. Many of these applications, such as facial recognition, surveillance, animation, are used for tracking features and/or people. However, these tasks prove challenging for computers to do effectively, as there is a significant amount of data to parse through. Therefore, many techniques and algorithms are needed and therefore researched to try to achieve human like perception. In this literature review, we focus on some novel techniques on object detection and recognition, and how to apply tracking algorithms to the detected features to track the objects' movements.
abstract_zh: 对于人类来说，物体检测、识别和跟踪是与生俱来的。这些为人类提供了感知环境和环境中物体的能力。然而，这种能力在计算机中并不能很好地转化。在计算机视觉和多媒体领域，检测、识别和跟踪图像和/或视频中的对象变得越来越重要。其中许多应用程序（例如面部识别、监控、动画）用于跟踪特征和/或人员。然而，事实证明，这些任务对于计算机来说要有效地完成是具有挑战性的，因为有大量的数据需要解析。因此，需要并研究许多技术和算法来尝试实现类似人类的感知。在这篇文献综述中，我们重点讨论了一些关于对象检测和识别的新技术，以及如何将跟踪算法应用于检测到的特征来跟踪对象的运动。

AI.tldr: 综述了物体检测、识别与跟踪的最新技术与方法
AI.motivation: 计算机视觉中检测、识别与跟踪对处理大量数据具有挑战性，需有效算法实现类人感知
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析新型检测识别技术及跟踪算法的应用
AI.result: 总结了当前检测、识别与跟踪技术的进展及面临的挑战
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究高效算法及跨领域应用以提升计算机视觉性能

search_text: Detection, Recognition, and Tracking: A Survey 检测、识别和跟踪：调查 For humans, object detection, recognition, and tracking are innate. These provide the ability for human to perceive their environment and objects within their environment. This ability however doesn't translate well in computers. In Computer Vision and Multimedia, it is becoming increasingly more important to detect, recognize and track objects in images and/or videos. Many of these applications, such as facial recognition, surveillance, animation, are used for tracking features and/or people. However, these tasks prove challenging for computers to do effectively, as there is a significant amount of data to parse through. Therefore, many techniques and algorithms are needed and therefore researched to try to achieve human like perception. In this literature review, we focus on some novel techniques on object detection and recognition, and how to apply tracking algorithms to the detected features to track the objects' movements. 对于人类来说，物体检测、识别和跟踪是与生俱来的。这些为人类提供了感知环境和环境中物体的能力。然而，这种能力在计算机中并不能很好地转化。在计算机视觉和多媒体领域，检测、识别和跟踪图像和/或视频中的对象变得越来越重要。其中许多应用程序（例如面部识别、监控、动画）用于跟踪特征和/或人员。然而，事实证明，这些任务对于计算机来说要有效地完成是具有挑战性的，因为有大量的数据需要解析。因此，需要并研究许多技术和算法来尝试实现类似人类的感知。在这篇文献综述中，我们重点讨论了一些关于对象检测和识别的新技术，以及如何将跟踪算法应用于检测到的特征来跟踪对象的运动。 综述了物体检测、识别与跟踪的最新技术与方法 Shiyao Chen,Dale Chen-Song cs.CV

authors_text: Ali Hatamizadeh,Hongxu Yin,Holger Roth,Wenqi Li,Jan Kautz,Daguang Xu,Pavlo Molchanov
title: GradViT: Gradient Inversion of Vision Transformers
title_zh: GradViT：视觉变压器的梯度反转
abstract: In this work we demonstrate the vulnerability of vision transformers (ViTs) to gradient-based inversion attacks. During this attack, the original data batch is reconstructed given model weights and the corresponding gradients. We introduce a method, named GradViT, that optimizes random noise into naturally looking images via an iterative process. The optimization objective consists of (i) a loss on matching the gradients, (ii) image prior in the form of distance to batch-normalization statistics of a pretrained CNN model, and (iii) a total variation regularization on patches to guide correct recovery locations. We propose a unique loss scheduling function to overcome local minima during optimization. We evaluate GadViT on ImageNet1K and MS-Celeb-1M datasets, and observe unprecedentedly high fidelity and closeness to the original (hidden) data. During the analysis we find that vision transformers are significantly more vulnerable than previously studied CNNs due to the presence of the attention mechanism. Our method demonstrates new state-of-the-art results for gradient inversion in both qualitative and quantitative metrics. Project page at https://gradvit.github.io/.
summary: In this work we demonstrate the vulnerability of vision transformers (ViTs) to gradient-based inversion attacks. During this attack, the original data batch is reconstructed given model weights and the corresponding gradients. We introduce a method, named GradViT, that optimizes random noise into naturally looking images via an iterative process. The optimization objective consists of (i) a loss on matching the gradients, (ii) image prior in the form of distance to batch-normalization statistics of a pretrained CNN model, and (iii) a total variation regularization on patches to guide correct recovery locations. We propose a unique loss scheduling function to overcome local minima during optimization. We evaluate GadViT on ImageNet1K and MS-Celeb-1M datasets, and observe unprecedentedly high fidelity and closeness to the original (hidden) data. During the analysis we find that vision transformers are significantly more vulnerable than previously studied CNNs due to the presence of the attention mechanism. Our method demonstrates new state-of-the-art results for gradient inversion in both qualitative and quantitative metrics. Project page at https://gradvit.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们展示了视觉变换器（ViT）对基于梯度的反转攻击的脆弱性。在此攻击期间，根据给定的模型权重和相应的梯度重建原始数据批次。我们引入了一种名为 GradViT 的方法，该方法通过迭代过程将随机噪声优化为看起来自然的图像。优化目标包括 (i) 匹配梯度的损失，(ii) 以距离到预训练 CNN 模型的批量归一化统计数据的距离形式呈现的图像先验，以及 (iii) 对补丁进行总变差正则化以指导正确的恢复位置。我们提出了一种独特的损失调度函数来克服优化过程中的局部最小值。我们在 ImageNet1K 和 MS-Celeb-1M 数据集上评估 GadViT，并观察到与原始（隐藏）数据前所未有的高保真度和接近度。在分析过程中，我们发现由于注意力机制的存在，视觉 Transformer 比之前研究的 CNN 更容易受到攻击。我们的方法在定性和定量指标上展示了梯度反演的最新最先进结果。项目页面位于 https://gradvit.github.io/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GradViT方法，通过梯度反转攻击重建视觉Transformer（ViT）的原始输入数据。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分揭示视觉Transformer（ViT）在梯度反转攻击下的脆弱性，尤其其注意力机制可能带来新风险。
AI.method: 设计包含梯度匹配损失、预训练CNN的批量归一化先验及补丁总变异正则化的优化目标，并引入动态损失调度策略克服局部最优。
AI.result: 在ImageNet1K和MS-Celeb-1M数据集上实现高保真数据重建，验证ViT较CNN更易受攻击，且达到梯度反转任务的新SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: GradViT揭示了ViT因注意力机制导致的梯度信息泄露风险，为模型安全防护提供新研究方向。

authors_text: Irun R. Cohen,Assaf Marron
title: Evolution is Driven by Natural Autoencoding: Reframing Species, Interaction Codes, Cooperation, and Sexual Reproduction
title_zh: 进化是由自然自动编码驱动的：重构物种、相互作用代码、合作和有性生殖
comment: In version 7 we added various clarifications including to terminology, definitions, and to the reference to the second law of thermodynamics
comments: In version 7 we added various clarifications including to terminology, definitions, and to the reference to the second law of thermodynamics
abstract: The continuity of life and its evolution, we proposed, emerge from an interactive group process manifested in networks of interaction. We term this process \textit{survival-of-the-fitted}. Here, we reason that survival of the fitted results from a natural computational process we term \textit{natural autoencoding}. Natural autoencoding works by retaining repeating biological interactions while non-repeatable interactions disappear. (1) We define a species by its \textit{species interaction code}, which consists of a compact description of the repeating interactions of species organisms with their external and internal environments. Species interaction codes are descriptions recorded in the biological infrastructure that enables repeating interactions. Encoding and decoding are interwoven. (2) Evolution proceeds by natural autoencoding of sustained changes in species interaction codes. DNA is only one element in natural autoencoding. (3) Natural autoencoding accounts for the paradox of genome randomization in sexual reproduction -- recombined genomes are analogous to the diversified inputs required for artificial autoencoding. The increase in entropy generated by genome randomization compensates for the decrease in entropy generated by organized life. (4) Natural autoencoding and artificial autoencoding algorithms manifest defined similarities and differences. Recognition of the importance of fittedness could well serve the future of a humanly livable biosphere.
summary: The continuity of life and its evolution, we proposed, emerge from an interactive group process manifested in networks of interaction. We term this process \textit{survival-of-the-fitted}. Here, we reason that survival of the fitted results from a natural computational process we term \textit{natural autoencoding}. Natural autoencoding works by retaining repeating biological interactions while non-repeatable interactions disappear. (1) We define a species by its \textit{species interaction code}, which consists of a compact description of the repeating interactions of species organisms with their external and internal environments. Species interaction codes are descriptions recorded in the biological infrastructure that enables repeating interactions. Encoding and decoding are interwoven. (2) Evolution proceeds by natural autoencoding of sustained changes in species interaction codes. DNA is only one element in natural autoencoding. (3) Natural autoencoding accounts for the paradox of genome randomization in sexual reproduction -- recombined genomes are analogous to the diversified inputs required for artificial autoencoding. The increase in entropy generated by genome randomization compensates for the decrease in entropy generated by organized life. (4) Natural autoencoding and artificial autoencoding algorithms manifest defined similarities and differences. Recognition of the importance of fittedness could well serve the future of a humanly livable biosphere.
abstract_zh: 我们认为，生命的连续性及其进化源于互动网络中体现的互动群体过程。我们将这个过程称为\textit{适者生存}。在这里，我们推断拟合结果的生存来自自然计算过程，我们称之为 \textit{自然自动编码}。自然自动编码的工作原理是保留重复的生物相互作用，同时消失不可重复的相互作用。 （1）我们通过其 \textit{物种相互作用代码} 来定义物种，它由对物种有机体与其外部和内部环境的重复相互作用的紧凑描述组成。物种相互作用代码是记录在生物基础设施中的描述，可实现重复相互作用。编码和解码是交织在一起的。 (2) 进化是通过物种相互作用密码的持续变化的自然自动编码来进行的。 DNA只是自然自动编码中的一种元素。 (3) 自然自动编码解释了有性生殖中基因组随机化的悖论——重组基因组类似于人工自动编码所需的多样化输入。基因组随机化产生的熵的增加补偿了有组织的生命产生的熵的减少。 (4) 自然自动编码和人工自动编码算法表现出明确的相似点和差异。认识到适应性的重要性可以很好地服务于人类宜居生物圈的未来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出自然自编码（natural autoencoding）是生物进化的核心机制，通过物种交互代码的持续变化解释物种形成、合作行为及有性生殖中的基因重组。
AI.motivation: 传统进化论难以解释生物交互网络的动态性与复杂性，需建立新框架阐明生命延续与进化的计算本质。
AI.method: 定义物种交互代码为生物重复交互的压缩描述，结合自然自编码理论分析其在进化中的作用，对比人工自编码算法揭示生物系统的熵变规律。
AI.result: 阐明自然自编码如何通过保留重复交互驱动进化，解释有性生殖中基因随机化的熵增补偿机制，并建立生物与人工自编码的理论联系。
AI.conclusion: 自然自编码理论为理解生物进化提供了新视角，强调适配性（fittedness）在维持生物圈可持续性中的关键作用。
