title: Insights From the NeurIPS 2021 NetHack Challenge
title_zh: NeurIPS 2021 NetHack 挑战赛的见解
comment: Under review at PMLR for the NeuRIPS 2021 Competition Workshop Track, 10 pages + 10 in appendices
comments: Under review at PMLR for the NeuRIPS 2021 Competition Workshop Track, 10 pages + 10 in appendices
abstract: In this report, we summarize the takeaways from the first NeurIPS 2021 NetHack Challenge. Participants were tasked with developing a program or agent that can win (i.e., 'ascend' in) the popular dungeon-crawler game of NetHack by interacting with the NetHack Learning Environment (NLE), a scalable, procedurally generated, and challenging Gym environment for reinforcement learning (RL). The challenge showcased community-driven progress in AI with many diverse approaches significantly beating the previously best results on NetHack. Furthermore, it served as a direct comparison between neural (e.g., deep RL) and symbolic AI, as well as hybrid systems, demonstrating that on NetHack symbolic bots currently outperform deep RL by a large margin. Lastly, no agent got close to winning the game, illustrating NetHack's suitability as a long-term benchmark for AI research.
summary: In this report, we summarize the takeaways from the first NeurIPS 2021 NetHack Challenge. Participants were tasked with developing a program or agent that can win (i.e., 'ascend' in) the popular dungeon-crawler game of NetHack by interacting with the NetHack Learning Environment (NLE), a scalable, procedurally generated, and challenging Gym environment for reinforcement learning (RL). The challenge showcased community-driven progress in AI with many diverse approaches significantly beating the previously best results on NetHack. Furthermore, it served as a direct comparison between neural (e.g., deep RL) and symbolic AI, as well as hybrid systems, demonstrating that on NetHack symbolic bots currently outperform deep RL by a large margin. Lastly, no agent got close to winning the game, illustrating NetHack's suitability as a long-term benchmark for AI research.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们总结了首届 NeurIPS 2021 NetHack 挑战赛的要点。参与者的任务是开发一个程序或代理，通过与 NetHack 学习环境 (NLE) 交互，赢得（即“提升”）流行的 NetHack 地下城爬行游戏，NetHack 学习环境 (NLE) 是一个可扩展、按程序生成且具有挑战性的强化学习 (RL) Gym 环境。该挑战展示了社区驱动的人工智能进步，采用了多种不同的方法，显着击败了 NetHack 之前的最佳结果。此外，它还对神经（例如深度强化学习）和符号人工智能以及混合系统进行了直接比较，表明在 NetHack 上符号机器人目前的性能远远优于深度强化学习。最后，没有智能体接近赢得比赛，这说明 NetHack 适合作为人工智能研究的长期基准。

AI.tldr: 本文总结了NeurIPS 2021 NetHack挑战赛的成果，比较了不同AI方法在NetHack游戏中的表现。
AI.motivation: 推动AI社区在复杂、程序生成环境中取得进展，并为长期AI研究提供基准测试。
AI.method: 参赛者开发了多种方法，包括深度强化学习、符号AI及混合系统，通过NetHack Learning Environment进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 符号AI在NetHack中显著优于深度强化学习，但所有参赛智能体均未接近游戏胜利目标。
AI.conclusion: NetHack作为AI长期基准具有挑战性，符号AI当前表现更优，但需进一步突破以实现游戏胜利。

authors_text: Adenilton J. da Silva,Daniel K. Park
title: Linear-depth quantum circuits for multiqubit controlled gates
title_zh: 用于多量子位控制门的线性深度量子电路
abstract: Quantum circuit depth minimization is critical for practical applications of circuit-based quantum computation. In this work, we present a systematic procedure to decompose multiqubit controlled unitary gates, which is essential in many quantum algorithms, to controlled-NOT and single-qubit gates with which the quantum circuit depth only increases linearly with the number of control qubits. Our algorithm does not require any ancillary qubits and achieves a quadratic reduction of the circuit depth against known methods. We show the advantage of our algorithm with proof-of-principle experiments on the IBM quantum cloud platform.
summary: Quantum circuit depth minimization is critical for practical applications of circuit-based quantum computation. In this work, we present a systematic procedure to decompose multiqubit controlled unitary gates, which is essential in many quantum algorithms, to controlled-NOT and single-qubit gates with which the quantum circuit depth only increases linearly with the number of control qubits. Our algorithm does not require any ancillary qubits and achieves a quadratic reduction of the circuit depth against known methods. We show the advantage of our algorithm with proof-of-principle experiments on the IBM quantum cloud platform.
abstract_zh: 量子电路深度最小化对于基于电路的量子计算的实际应用至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种系统程序，用于将多量子位控制的单一门（这在许多量子算法中至关重要）分解为受控非门和单量子位门，其中量子电路深度仅随着控制量子位的数量线性增加。我们的算法不需要任何辅助量子位，并且相对于已知方法实现了电路深度的二次减少。我们通过 IBM 量子云平台上的原理验证实验展示了我们算法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分解多量子比特受控门的系统方法，通过使用受控非门和单量子比特门实现线性深度的量子电路。
AI.motivation: 量子电路深度最小化对提升基于电路的量子计算应用效率至关重要，而现有方法在处理多量子比特受控门时存在深度增长过快的问题。
AI.method: 通过无需辅助量子比特的系统性分解算法，将多量子比特受控单元门转化为受控非门和单量子比特门组合，使电路深度随控制量子比特数量线性增长。
AI.result: 实验验证显示该方法相比现有技术实现电路深度二次方级缩减，并在IBM量子云平台成功完成原理验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为量子算法实现提供了更高效的电路构造方案，在减少量子电路深度和资源消耗方面具有显著优势。

authors_text: Luca Franco,Leonardo Placidi,Francesco Giuliari,Irtiza Hasan,Marco Cristani,Fabio Galasso
title: Under the Hood of Transformer Networks for Trajectory Forecasting
title_zh: 用于轨迹预测的变压器网络的幕后
comment: Under review in Pattern Recognition journal
comments: Under review in Pattern Recognition journal
abstract: Transformer Networks have established themselves as the de-facto state-of-the-art for trajectory forecasting but there is currently no systematic study on their capability to model the motion patterns of people, without interactions with other individuals nor the social context. This paper proposes the first in-depth study of Transformer Networks (TF) and Bidirectional Transformers (BERT) for the forecasting of the individual motion of people, without bells and whistles. We conduct an exhaustive evaluation of input/output representations, problem formulations and sequence modeling, including a novel analysis of their capability to predict multi-modal futures. Out of comparative evaluation on the ETH+UCY benchmark, both TF and BERT are top performers in predicting individual motions, definitely overcoming RNNs and LSTMs. Furthermore, they remain within a narrow margin wrt more complex techniques, which include both social interactions and scene contexts. Source code will be released for all conducted experiments.
summary: Transformer Networks have established themselves as the de-facto state-of-the-art for trajectory forecasting but there is currently no systematic study on their capability to model the motion patterns of people, without interactions with other individuals nor the social context. This paper proposes the first in-depth study of Transformer Networks (TF) and Bidirectional Transformers (BERT) for the forecasting of the individual motion of people, without bells and whistles. We conduct an exhaustive evaluation of input/output representations, problem formulations and sequence modeling, including a novel analysis of their capability to predict multi-modal futures. Out of comparative evaluation on the ETH+UCY benchmark, both TF and BERT are top performers in predicting individual motions, definitely overcoming RNNs and LSTMs. Furthermore, they remain within a narrow margin wrt more complex techniques, which include both social interactions and scene contexts. Source code will be released for all conducted experiments.
abstract_zh: Transformer Networks 已经成为轨迹预测领域事实上最先进的技术，但目前还没有系统研究它们在不与其他个体或社会背景交互的情况下模拟人的运动模式的能力。本文提出了对变压器网络（TF）和双向变压器（BERT）的首次深入研究，用于预测人的个体运动，而不需要花哨的东西。我们对输入/输出表示、问题表述和序列建模进行了详尽的评估，包括对其预测多模式未来的能力进行了新颖的分析。根据 ETH+UCY 基准的比较评估，TF 和 BERT 在预测个体运动方面均表现最佳，绝对超越了 RNN 和 LSTM。此外，它们在更复杂的技术（包括社交互动和场景背景）方面仍然处于狭窄的范围内。所有进行的实验的源代码都将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了Transformer网络和双向Transformer（BERT）在无社交交互情况下的人类个体运动轨迹预测能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer已成为轨迹预测的主流方法，但缺乏对其在无社交交互和场景上下文情况下建模个体运动模式的系统性研究。
AI.method: 通过全面评估输入/输出表示、问题定义和序列建模方法，在ETH+UCY基准数据集上比较Transformer、BERT与RNN/LSTM等模型，并分析其多模态预测能力。
AI.result: Transformer和BERT在个体运动预测任务中显著优于RNN/LSTM，且与包含社交交互的复杂方法性能差距很小。
AI.conclusion: Transformer和BERT可作为无社交交互场景下个体轨迹预测的有效基础模型，其性能接近更复杂的社交感知方法。

Transformer Networks 已经成为轨迹预测领域事实上最先进的技术，但目前还没有系统研究它们在不与其他个体或社会背景交互的情况下模拟人的运动模式的能力。本文提出了对变压器网络（TF）和双向变压器（BERT）的首次深入研究，用于预测人的个体运动，而不需要花哨的东西。我们对输入/输出表示、问题表述和序列建模进行了详尽的评估，包括对其预测多模式未来的能力进行了新颖的分析。根据 ETH+UCY 基准的比较评估，TF 和 BERT 在预测个体运动方面均表现最佳，绝对超越了 RNN 和 LSTM。此外，它们在更复杂的技术（包括社交互动和场景背景）方面仍然处于狭窄的范围内。所有进行的实验的源代码都将被发布。 本文系统研究了Transformer网络和双向Transformer（BERT）在无社交交互情况下的人类个体运动轨迹预测能力。 Luca Franco,Leonardo Placidi,Francesco Giuliari,Irtiza Hasan,Marco Cristani,Fabio Galasso cs.CV

authors_text: Yuhang Zang,Wei Li,Kaiyang Zhou,Chen Huang,Chen Change Loy
title: Open-Vocabulary DETR with Conditional Matching
title_zh: 具有条件匹配的开放词汇 DETR
abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection, which is concerned with the problem of detecting novel objects guided by natural language, has gained increasing attention from the community. Ideally, we would like to extend an open-vocabulary detector such that it can produce bounding box predictions based on user inputs in form of either natural language or exemplar image. This offers great flexibility and user experience for human-computer interaction. To this end, we propose a novel open-vocabulary detector based on DETR -- hence the name OV-DETR -- which, once trained, can detect any object given its class name or an exemplar image. The biggest challenge of turning DETR into an open-vocabulary detector is that it is impossible to calculate the classification cost matrix of novel classes without access to their labeled images. To overcome this challenge, we formulate the learning objective as a binary matching one between input queries (class name or exemplar image) and the corresponding objects, which learns useful correspondence to generalize to unseen queries during testing. For training, we choose to condition the Transformer decoder on the input embeddings obtained from a pre-trained vision-language model like CLIP, in order to enable matching for both text and image queries. With extensive experiments on LVIS and COCO datasets, we demonstrate that our OV-DETR -- the first end-to-end Transformer-based open-vocabulary detector -- achieves non-trivial improvements over current state of the arts.
summary: Open-vocabulary object detection, which is concerned with the problem of detecting novel objects guided by natural language, has gained increasing attention from the community. Ideally, we would like to extend an open-vocabulary detector such that it can produce bounding box predictions based on user inputs in form of either natural language or exemplar image. This offers great flexibility and user experience for human-computer interaction. To this end, we propose a novel open-vocabulary detector based on DETR -- hence the name OV-DETR -- which, once trained, can detect any object given its class name or an exemplar image. The biggest challenge of turning DETR into an open-vocabulary detector is that it is impossible to calculate the classification cost matrix of novel classes without access to their labeled images. To overcome this challenge, we formulate the learning objective as a binary matching one between input queries (class name or exemplar image) and the corresponding objects, which learns useful correspondence to generalize to unseen queries during testing. For training, we choose to condition the Transformer decoder on the input embeddings obtained from a pre-trained vision-language model like CLIP, in order to enable matching for both text and image queries. With extensive experiments on LVIS and COCO datasets, we demonstrate that our OV-DETR -- the first end-to-end Transformer-based open-vocabulary detector -- achieves non-trivial improvements over current state of the arts.
abstract_zh: 开放词汇对象检测涉及自然语言引导下的新对象检测问题，越来越受到社区的关注。理想情况下，我们希望扩展开放词汇检测器，以便它可以基于自然语言或样本图像形式的用户输入生成边界框预测。这为人机交互提供了极大的灵活性和用户体验。为此，我们提出了一种基于 DETR 的新型开放词汇检测器（因此命名为 OV-DETR），一旦经过训练，它就可以检测给定其类名或示例图像的任何对象。将 DETR 转变为开放词汇检测器的最大挑战是，如果不访问新类别的标记图像，就不可能计算新类别的分类成本矩阵。为了克服这一挑战，我们将学习目标制定为输入查询（类名称或示例图像）与相应对象之间的二元匹配，它学习有用的对应关系以泛化到测试期间未见过的查询。对于训练，我们选择根据从预先训练的视觉语言模型（如 CLIP）获得的输入嵌入来调节 Transformer 解码器，以便能够匹配文本和图像查询。通过对 LVIS 和 COCO 数据集进行大量实验，我们证明了我们的 OV-DETR——第一个基于 Transformer 的端到端开放词汇检测器——在当前技术水平的基础上实现了重大改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于DETR的开放词汇目标检测器OV-DETR，能够通过自然语言或示例图像检测任意新物体。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测器难以处理开放词汇场景下的新类别，且用户需灵活支持文本或图像输入，需解决分类成本矩阵无法计算的挑战。
AI.method: 通过二元匹配学习目标，将输入查询（文本/图像）与目标物体匹配，并利用CLIP等预训练视觉-语言模型的嵌入条件化Transformer解码器。
AI.result: 在LVIS和COCO数据集上实验表明，OV-DETR作为首个端到端开放词汇检测器，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出首个端到端开放词汇检测框架，通过条件匹配和预训练模型嵌入解决了新类别检测难题，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Ariel Elnekave,Yair Weiss
title: Generating natural images with direct Patch Distributions Matching
title_zh: 通过直接补丁分布匹配生成自然图像
comment: Corrected typos In text and figures (Thanks to Ronen Schaffer)
comments: Corrected typos In text and figures (Thanks to Ronen Schaffer)
abstract: Many traditional computer vision algorithms generate realistic images by requiring that each patch in the generated image be similar to a patch in a training image and vice versa. Recently, this classical approach has been replaced by adversarial training with a patch discriminator. The adversarial approach avoids the computational burden of finding nearest neighbors of patches but often requires very long training times and may fail to match the distribution of patches. In this paper we leverage the recently developed Sliced Wasserstein Distance and develop an algorithm that explicitly and efficiently minimizes the distance between patch distributions in two images. Our method is conceptually simple, requires no training and can be implemented in a few lines of codes. On a number of image generation tasks we show that our results are often superior to single-image-GANs, require no training, and can generate high quality images in a few seconds. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/ariel415el/GPDM
summary: Many traditional computer vision algorithms generate realistic images by requiring that each patch in the generated image be similar to a patch in a training image and vice versa. Recently, this classical approach has been replaced by adversarial training with a patch discriminator. The adversarial approach avoids the computational burden of finding nearest neighbors of patches but often requires very long training times and may fail to match the distribution of patches. In this paper we leverage the recently developed Sliced Wasserstein Distance and develop an algorithm that explicitly and efficiently minimizes the distance between patch distributions in two images. Our method is conceptually simple, requires no training and can be implemented in a few lines of codes. On a number of image generation tasks we show that our results are often superior to single-image-GANs, require no training, and can generate high quality images in a few seconds. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/ariel415el/GPDM
abstract_zh: 许多传统的计算机视觉算法通过要求生成图像中的每个补丁与训练图像中的补丁相似来生成逼真的图像，反之亦然。最近，这种经典方法已被带有补丁鉴别器的对抗性训练所取代。对抗性方法避免了寻找补丁最近邻的计算负担，但通常需要很长的训练时间，并且可能无法匹配补丁的分布。在本文中，我们利用最近开发的切片 Wasserstein Distance 并开发了一种算法，可以显式有效地最小化两幅图像中补丁分布之间的距离。我们的方法在概念上很简单，不需要培训，并且可以通过几行代码来实现。在许多图像生成任务中，我们表明我们的结果通常优于单图像 GAN，不需要训练，并且可以在几秒钟内生成高质量的图像。我们的实现可以在 https://github.com/ariel415el/GPDM 上找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过直接匹配图像块分布生成自然图像的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统图像生成方法依赖图像块相似性或对抗训练，但存在计算量大、训练时间长或分布匹配不佳的问题。
AI.method: 利用切片Wasserstein距离，开发无需训练的算法直接最小化图像块分布差异。
AI.result: 在多个任务中生成质量优于单图像GAN的结果，且无需训练即可数秒内生成高质量图像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分布匹配实现了高效、高质量的图像生成，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Luke Metz,C. Daniel Freeman,James Harrison,Niru Maheswaranathan,Jascha Sohl-Dickstein
title: Practical tradeoffs between memory, compute, and performance in learned optimizers
title_zh: 学习优化器中内存、计算和性能之间的实际权衡
abstract: Optimization plays a costly and crucial role in developing machine learning systems. In learned optimizers, the few hyperparameters of commonly used hand-designed optimizers, e.g. Adam or SGD, are replaced with flexible parametric functions. The parameters of these functions are then optimized so that the resulting learned optimizer minimizes a target loss on a chosen class of models. Learned optimizers can both reduce the number of required training steps and improve the final test loss. However, they can be expensive to train, and once trained can be expensive to use due to computational and memory overhead for the optimizer itself. In this work, we identify and quantify the design features governing the memory, compute, and performance trade-offs for many learned and hand-designed optimizers. We further leverage our analysis to construct a learned optimizer that is both faster and more memory efficient than previous work. Our model and training code are open source.
summary: Optimization plays a costly and crucial role in developing machine learning systems. In learned optimizers, the few hyperparameters of commonly used hand-designed optimizers, e.g. Adam or SGD, are replaced with flexible parametric functions. The parameters of these functions are then optimized so that the resulting learned optimizer minimizes a target loss on a chosen class of models. Learned optimizers can both reduce the number of required training steps and improve the final test loss. However, they can be expensive to train, and once trained can be expensive to use due to computational and memory overhead for the optimizer itself. In this work, we identify and quantify the design features governing the memory, compute, and performance trade-offs for many learned and hand-designed optimizers. We further leverage our analysis to construct a learned optimizer that is both faster and more memory efficient than previous work. Our model and training code are open source.
abstract_zh: 优化在开发机器学习系统中起着成本高昂且至关重要的作用。在学习的优化器中，常用的手工设计的优化器的少数超参数，例如Adam 或 SGD 被灵活的参数函数取代。然后对这些函数的参数进行优化，以便生成的学习优化器最大限度地减少所选模型类别的目标损失。学习优化器既可以减少所需的训练步骤数量，又可以改善最终的测试损失。然而，它们的训练成本可能很高，而且一旦训练完毕，由于优化器本身的计算和内存开销，使用起来也可能很昂贵。在这项工作中，我们确定并量化了许多学习和手工设计的优化器的管理内存、计算和性能权衡的设计特征。我们进一步利用我们的分析来构建一个学习优化器，它比以前的工作更快、内存效率更高。我们的模型和训练代码是开源的。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究学习优化器中内存、计算与性能之间的权衡关系，并设计出更高效的学习优化器。
AI.motivation: 传统优化器的超参数被参数函数替代，但学习优化器在训练和使用时存在高计算和内存开销，需分析权衡以提高效率。
AI.method: 通过分析多种优化器的设计特征，量化内存、计算与性能的权衡关系，并基于此设计更高效的学习优化器。
AI.result: 提出一种比现有方法更快且内存效率更高的学习优化器，并开源相关代码。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统分析权衡关系，可有效设计出高效的学习优化器，为实际应用提供可行方案。

search_text: Practical tradeoffs between memory, compute, and performance in learned optimizers 学习优化器中内存、计算和性能之间的实际权衡 Optimization plays a costly and crucial role in developing machine learning systems. In learned optimizers, the few hyperparameters of commonly used hand-designed optimizers, e.g. Adam or SGD, are replaced with flexible parametric functions. The parameters of these functions are then optimized so that the resulting learned optimizer minimizes a target loss on a chosen class of models. Learned optimizers can both reduce the number of required training steps and improve the final test loss. However, they can be expensive to train, and once trained can be expensive to use due to computational and memory overhead for the optimizer itself. In this work, we identify and quantify the design features governing the memory, compute, and performance trade-offs for many learned and hand-designed optimizers. We further leverage our analysis to construct a learned optimizer that is both faster and more memory efficient than previous work. Our model and training code are open source. 优化在开发机器学习系统中起着成本高昂且至关重要的作用。在学习的优化器中，常用的手工设计的优化器的少数超参数，例如Adam 或 SGD 被灵活的参数函数取代。然后对这些函数的参数进行优化，以便生成的学习优化器最大限度地减少所选模型类别的目标损失。学习优化器既可以减少所需的训练步骤数量，又可以改善最终的测试损失。然而，它们的训练成本可能很高，而且一旦训练完毕，由于优化器本身的计算和内存开销，使用起来也可能很昂贵。在这项工作中，我们确定并量化了许多学习和手工设计的优化器的管理内存、计算和性能权衡的设计特征。我们进一步利用我们的分析来构建一个学习优化器，它比以前的工作更快、内存效率更高。我们的模型和训练代码是开源的。 本论文研究学习优化器中内存、计算与性能之间的权衡关系，并设计出更高效的学习优化器。 Luke Metz,C. Daniel Freeman,James Harrison,Niru Maheswaranathan,Jascha Sohl-Dickstein cs.LG,cs.NE,math.OC,stat.ML

authors_text: Usha Lokala,Aseem Srivastava,Triyasha Ghosh Dastidar,Tanmoy Chakraborty,Md Shad Akthar,Maryam Panahiazar,Amit Sheth
title: A Computational Approach to Understand Mental Health from Reddit: Knowledge-aware Multitask Learning Framework
title_zh: Reddit 上了解心理健康的计算方法：知识感知多任务学习框架
abstract: Analyzing gender is critical to study mental health (MH) support in CVD (cardiovascular disease). The existing studies on using social media for extracting MH symptoms consider symptom detection and tend to ignore user context, disease, or gender. The current study aims to design and evaluate a system to capture how MH symptoms associated with CVD are expressed differently with the gender on social media. We observe that the reliable detection of MH symptoms expressed by persons with heart disease in user posts is challenging because of the co-existence of (dis)similar MH symptoms in one post and due to variation in the description of symptoms based on gender. We collect a corpus of $150k$ items (posts and comments) annotated using the subreddit labels and transfer learning approaches. We propose GeM, a novel task-adaptive multi-task learning approach to identify the MH symptoms in CVD patients based on gender. Specifically, we adapt a knowledge-assisted RoBERTa based bi-encoder model to capture CVD-related MH symptoms. Moreover, it enhances the reliability for differentiating the gender language in MH symptoms when compared to the state-of-art language models. Our model achieves high (statistically significant) performance and predicts four labels of MH issues and two gender labels, which outperforms RoBERTa, improving the recall by 2.14% on the symptom identification task and by 2.55% on the gender identification task.

The existing studies on using social media for extracting MH symptoms consider symptom detection and tend to ignore user context, disease, or gender. The current study aims to design and evaluate a system to capture how MH symptoms associated with CVD are expressed differently with the gender on social media. We collect a corpus of $150k$ items (posts and comments) annotated using the subreddit labels and transfer learning approaches. We propose GeM, a novel task-adaptive multi-task learning approach to identify the MH symptoms in CVD patients based on gender. Specifically, we adapt a knowledge-assisted RoBERTa based bi-encoder model to capture CVD-related MH symptoms. Moreover, it enhances the reliability for differentiating the gender language in MH symptoms when compared to the state-of-art language models. Our model achieves high (statistically significant) performance and predicts four labels of MH issues and two gender labels, which outperforms RoBERTa, improving the recall by 2.14% on the symptom identification task and by 2.55% on the gender identification task.
abstract_zh: 分析性别对于研究 CVD（心血管疾病）的心理健康 (MH) 支持至关重要。现有的使用社交媒体提取 MH 症状的研究考虑了症状检测，并且往往忽略用户背景、疾病或性别。目前的研究旨在设计和评估一个系统，以捕获与 CVD 相关的 MH 症状如何在社交媒体上因性别而有不同的表达。我们观察到，可靠地检测用户帖子中心脏病患者表达的 MH 症状具有挑战性，因为一篇帖子中同时存在（不）相似的 MH 症状，并且由于性别对症状的描述存在差异。我们收集了价值 15 万美元的语料库（帖子和评论），并使用 subreddit 标签和迁移学习方法进行注释。我们提出了 GeM，一种新颖的任务自适应多任务学习方法，用于根据性别识别 CVD 患者的 MH 症状。具体来说，我们采用基于知识辅助的 RoBERTa 双编码器模型来捕获 CVD 相关的 MH 症状。此外，与最先进的语言模型相比，它提高了区分 MH 症状中性别语言的可靠性。我们的模型实现了较高的（具有统计显着性）性能，并预测了 MH 问题的四个标签和两个性别标签，其性能优于 RoBERTa，在症状识别任务上将召回率提高了 2.14%，在性别识别任务上提高了 2.55%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识增强的多任务学习框架GeM，用于从Reddit数据中识别心血管疾病（CVD）患者的心理健康（MH）症状，并分析性别差异对症状表达的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在利用社交媒体分析心理健康症状时，忽视了用户上下文、疾病类型及性别差异，导致症状检测可靠性不足。本文旨在通过考虑性别因素，提升对CVD患者MH症状的识别准确性。
AI.method: 构建包含15万条Reddit帖子和评论的标注语料库，设计GeM框架：采用知识辅助的RoBERTa双编码器模型，结合多任务学习同时预测MH症状标签和性别标签，通过迁移学习优化模型性能。
AI.result: GeM在症状识别任务中召回率提升2.14%，性别识别任务中提升2.55%，显著优于基线模型RoBERTa，且能有效区分性别相关的MH症状表达差异。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了结合领域知识的多任务学习框架在捕捉CVD患者性别特异性MH症状中的有效性，为社交媒体心理健康分析提供了新方法。

authors_text: Jakob Hoydis,Sebastian Cammerer,Fayçal Ait Aoudia,Avinash Vem,Nikolaus Binder,Guillermo Marcus,Alexander Keller
title: Sionna: An Open-Source Library for Next-Generation Physical Layer Research
title_zh: Sionna：用于下一代物理层研究的开源库
abstract: Sionna is a GPU-accelerated open-source library for link-level simulations based on TensorFlow. It enables the rapid prototyping of complex communication system architectures and provides native support for the integration of neural networks. Sionna implements a wide breadth of carefully tested state-of-the-art algorithms that can be used for benchmarking and end-to-end performance evaluation. This allows researchers to focus on their research, making it more impactful and reproducible, while saving time implementing components outside their area of expertise. This white paper provides a brief introduction to Sionna, explains its design principles and features, as well as future extensions, such as integrated ray tracing and custom CUDA kernels. We believe that Sionna is a valuable tool for research on next-generation communication systems, such as 6G, and we welcome contributions from our community.
summary: Sionna is a GPU-accelerated open-source library for link-level simulations based on TensorFlow. It enables the rapid prototyping of complex communication system architectures and provides native support for the integration of neural networks. Sionna implements a wide breadth of carefully tested state-of-the-art algorithms that can be used for benchmarking and end-to-end performance evaluation. This allows researchers to focus on their research, making it more impactful and reproducible, while saving time implementing components outside their area of expertise. This white paper provides a brief introduction to Sionna, explains its design principles and features, as well as future extensions, such as integrated ray tracing and custom CUDA kernels. We believe that Sionna is a valuable tool for research on next-generation communication systems, such as 6G, and we welcome contributions from our community.
abstract_zh: Sionna 是一个 GPU 加速的开源库，用于基于 TensorFlow 的链路级模拟。它能够快速构建复杂通信系统架构的原型，并为神经网络的集成提供原生支持。 Sionna 实施了多种经过仔细测试的最先进算法，可用于基准测试和端到端性能评估。这使得研究人员能够专注于他们的研究，使其更具影响力和可重复性，同时节省实施其专业领域之外的组件的时间。本白皮书简要介绍了 Sionna，解释了其设计原理和功能，以及未来的扩展，例如集成光线追踪和自定义 CUDA 内核。我们相信 Sionna 是研究 6G 等下一代通信系统的宝贵工具，我们欢迎社区做出贡献。

AI.tldr: 介绍Sionna库，用于加速下一代通信系统的物理层研究
AI.motivation: 解决通信系统研究中原型开发耗时、可重复性差的问题，促进6G等下一代技术研究
AI.method: 基于TensorFlow构建GPU加速库，集成神经网络和多种算法，支持自定义扩展
AI.result: 提供高效工具，提升通信系统研究的效率和可重复性，支持6G等前沿技术开发
AI.conclusion: Sionna为下一代通信系统研究提供有效工具，未来将扩展更多功能，推动社区协作

Sionna 是一个 GPU 加速的开源库，用于基于 TensorFlow 的链路级模拟。它能够快速构建复杂通信系统架构的原型，并为神经网络的集成提供原生支持。 Sionna 实施了多种经过仔细测试的最先进算法，可用于基准测试和端到端性能评估。这使得研究人员能够专注于他们的研究，使其更具影响力和可重复性，同时节省实施其专业领域之外的组件的时间。本白皮书简要介绍了 Sionna，解释了其设计原理和功能，以及未来的扩展，例如集成光线追踪和自定义 CUDA 内核。我们相信 Sionna 是研究 6G 等下一代通信系统的宝贵工具，我们欢迎社区做出贡献。 介绍Sionna库，用于加速下一代通信系统的物理层研究 Jakob Hoydis,Sebastian Cammerer,Fayçal Ait Aoudia,Avinash Vem,Nikolaus Binder,Guillermo Marcus,Alexander Keller cs.IT,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Thanh-Nghi Do
title: ImageNet Challenging Classification with the Raspberry Pi: An Incremental Local Stochastic Gradient Descent Algorithm
title_zh: 使用 Raspberry Pi 进行 ImageNet 挑战性分类：增量局部随机梯度下降算法
abstract: With rising powerful, low-cost embedded devices, the edge computing has become an increasingly popular choice. In this paper, we propose a new incremental local stochastic gradient descent (SGD) tailored on the Raspberry Pi to deal with large ImageNet ILSVRC 2010 dataset having 1,261,405 images with 1,000 classes. The local SGD splits the data block into $k$ partitions using $k$means algorithm and then it learns in the parallel way SGD models in each data partition to classify the data locally. The incremental local SGD sequentially loads small data blocks of the training dataset to learn local SGD models. The numerical test results on Imagenet dataset show that our incremental local SGD algorithm with the Raspberry Pi 4 is faster and more accurate than the state-of-the-art linear SVM run on a PC Intel(R) Core i7-4790 CPU, 3.6 GHz, 4 cores.
summary: With rising powerful, low-cost embedded devices, the edge computing has become an increasingly popular choice. In this paper, we propose a new incremental local stochastic gradient descent (SGD) tailored on the Raspberry Pi to deal with large ImageNet ILSVRC 2010 dataset having 1,261,405 images with 1,000 classes. The local SGD splits the data block into $k$ partitions using $k$means algorithm and then it learns in the parallel way SGD models in each data partition to classify the data locally. The incremental local SGD sequentially loads small data blocks of the training dataset to learn local SGD models. The numerical test results on Imagenet dataset show that our incremental local SGD algorithm with the Raspberry Pi 4 is faster and more accurate than the state-of-the-art linear SVM run on a PC Intel(R) Core i7-4790 CPU, 3.6 GHz, 4 cores.
abstract_zh: 随着功能强大、低成本的嵌入式设备的不断涌现，边缘计算已成为越来越受欢迎的选择。在本文中，我们提出了一种在 Raspberry Pi 上定制的新增量局部随机梯度下降 (SGD)，用于处理包含 1,261,405 个图像和 1,000 个类别的大型 ImageNet ILSVRC 2010 数据集。本地 SGD 使用 $k$means 算法将数据块分割为 $k$ 个分区，然后以并行方式学习每个数据分区中的 SGD 模型，以在本地对数据进行分类。增量局部 SGD 顺序加载训练数据集的小数据块来学习局部 SGD 模型。 Imagenet 数据集上的数值测试结果表明，我们使用 Raspberry Pi 4 的增量本地 SGD 算法比在 PC Intel(R) Core i7-4790 CPU（3.6 GHz、4 核）上运行的最先进的线性 SVM 更快、更准确。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种增量局部随机梯度下降算法，用于在树莓派等边缘设备上高效处理大规模ImageNet图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 随着边缘计算需求增长，传统PC端算法难以满足嵌入式设备的资源限制，需开发适用于低功耗硬件的高效分布式优化方法。
AI.method: 基于k-means算法划分数据块，采用并行局部SGD在树莓派上训练模型，通过增量加载小数据块实现持续优化。
AI.result: 树莓派4运行该算法在ImageNet数据集上的分类速度和准确率均优于PC端线性SVM模型。
AI.conclusion: 增量局部SGD算法有效提升了边缘设备处理大规模图像分类任务的性能，为嵌入式AI应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Souvik Dhara,Julia Gaudio,Elchanan Mossel,Colin Sandon
title: Spectral Algorithms Optimally Recover Planted Sub-structures
title_zh: 光谱算法最佳地恢复种植的子结构
comment: 28 pages, 2 figures; New content on submatrix localization
comments: 28 pages, 2 figures; New content on submatrix localization
abstract: Spectral algorithms are an important building block in machine learning and graph algorithms. We are interested in studying when such algorithms can be applied directly to provide optimal solutions to inference tasks. Previous works by Abbe, Fan, Wang and Zhong (2020) and by Dhara, Gaudio, Mossel and Sandon (2022) showed the optimality for community detection in the Stochastic Block Model (SBM), as well as in a censored variant of the SBM. Here we show that this optimality is somewhat universal as it carries over to other planted substructures such as the planted dense subgraph problem and submatrix localization problem, as well as to a censored version of the planted dense subgraph problem.
summary: Spectral algorithms are an important building block in machine learning and graph algorithms. We are interested in studying when such algorithms can be applied directly to provide optimal solutions to inference tasks. Previous works by Abbe, Fan, Wang and Zhong (2020) and by Dhara, Gaudio, Mossel and Sandon (2022) showed the optimality for community detection in the Stochastic Block Model (SBM), as well as in a censored variant of the SBM. Here we show that this optimality is somewhat universal as it carries over to other planted substructures such as the planted dense subgraph problem and submatrix localization problem, as well as to a censored version of the planted dense subgraph problem.
abstract_zh: 谱算法是机器学习和图算法的重要组成部分。我们有兴趣研究何时可以直接应用此类算法来为推理任务提供最佳解决方案。 Abbe、Fan、Wang 和zhong (2020) 以及 Dhara、Gaudio、Mossel 和 Sandon (2022) 之前的工作表明了随机块模型 (SBM) 以及 SBM 的审查变体中社区检测的最优性。在这里，我们证明这种最优性在某种程度上是普遍的，因为它适用于其他种植子结构，例如种植密集子图问题和子矩阵定位问题，以及种植密集子图问题的审查版本。

AI.tldr: 本文研究谱算法在多种植子结构恢复任务中的最优性，包括密集子图和子矩阵定位问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管谱算法在随机块模型（SBM）社区检测中已被证明具有最优性，但其在其他植子结构问题中的普遍适用性尚不明确。
AI.method: 基于Abbe等人（2020）和Dhara等人（2022）的理论框架，分析谱算法在植子图和子矩阵定位问题中的性能，并扩展到受控版本的问题。
AI.result: 证明谱算法在植子图、子矩阵定位及其受控版本中均能达到最优恢复性能，表明其适用性超越SBM。
AI.conclusion: 谱算法的最优性具有普遍性，可有效解决多种植子结构恢复任务，为相关领域提供理论支持。

authors_text: Sirajum Munira Shifat,Takitazwar Parthib,Sabikunnahar Talukder Pyaasa,Nila Maitra Chaity,Niloy Kumar,Md. Kishor Morol
title: A Real-time Junk Food Recognition System based on Machine Learning
title_zh: 基于机器学习的实时垃圾食品识别系统
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures, accepted in ICBBDB conference
comments: 15 pages, 7 figures, accepted in ICBBDB conference
abstract: $ $As a result of bad eating habits, humanity may be destroyed. People are constantly on the lookout for tasty foods, with junk foods being the most common source. As a consequence, our eating patterns are shifting, and we're gravitating toward junk food more than ever, which is bad for our health and increases our risk of acquiring health problems. Machine learning principles are applied in every aspect of our lives, and one of them is object recognition via image processing. However, because foods vary in nature, this procedure is crucial, and traditional methods like ANN, SVM, KNN, PLS etc., will result in a low accuracy rate. All of these issues were defeated by the Deep Neural Network. In this work, we created a fresh dataset of 10,000 data points from 20 junk food classifications to try to recognize junk foods. All of the data in the data set was gathered using the Google search engine, which is thought to be one-of-a-kind in every way. The goal was achieved using Convolution Neural Network (CNN) technology, which is well-known for image processing. We achieved a 98.05\% accuracy rate throughout the research, which was satisfactory. In addition, we conducted a test based on a real-life event, and the outcome was extraordinary. Our goal is to advance this research to the next level, so that it may be applied to a future study. Our ultimate goal is to create a system that would encourage people to avoid eating junk food and to be health-conscious. \keywords{ Machine Learning \and junk food \and object detection \and YOLOv3 \and custom food dataset.}
summary: $ $As a result of bad eating habits, humanity may be destroyed. People are constantly on the lookout for tasty foods, with junk foods being the most common source. As a consequence, our eating patterns are shifting, and we're gravitating toward junk food more than ever, which is bad for our health and increases our risk of acquiring health problems. Machine learning principles are applied in every aspect of our lives, and one of them is object recognition via image processing. However, because foods vary in nature, this procedure is crucial, and traditional methods like ANN, SVM, KNN, PLS etc., will result in a low accuracy rate. All of these issues were defeated by the Deep Neural Network. In this work, we created a fresh dataset of 10,000 data points from 20 junk food classifications to try to recognize junk foods. All of the data in the data set was gathered using the Google search engine, which is thought to be one-of-a-kind in every way. The goal was achieved using Convolution Neural Network (CNN) technology, which is well-known for image processing. We achieved a 98.05\% accuracy rate throughout the research, which was satisfactory. In addition, we conducted a test based on a real-life event, and the outcome was extraordinary. Our goal is to advance this research to the next level, so that it may be applied to a future study. Our ultimate goal is to create a system that would encourage people to avoid eating junk food and to be health-conscious. \keywords{ Machine Learning \and junk food \and object detection \and YOLOv3 \and custom food dataset.}
abstract_zh: $$由于不良的饮食习惯，人类可能会被毁灭。人们不断地寻找美味的食物，其中垃圾食品是最常见的来源。因此，我们的饮食模式正在发生变化，我们比以往任何时候都更倾向于垃圾食品，这对我们的健康有害，并增加了出现健康问题的风险。机器学习原理应用于我们生活的各个方面，其中之一就是通过图像处理进行对象识别。然而，由于食物性质不同，这一过程至关重要，而传统的方法如ANN、SVM、KNN、PLS等会导致准确率较低。所有这些问题都被深度神经网络击败了。在这项工作中，我们创建了一个包含 20 个垃圾食品分类的 10,000 个数据点的新数据集，以尝试识别垃圾食品。该数据集中的所有数据都是使用谷歌搜索引擎收集的，该搜索引擎在各方面都被认为是独一无二的。该目标是通过使用在图像处理方面众所周知的卷积神经网络（CNN）技术来实现的。我们在整个研究过程中取得了 98.05% 的准确率，这是令人满意的。此外，我们还根据现实生活中的事件进行了测试，结果非常出色。我们的目标是将这项研究推进到一个新的水平，以便它可以应用于未来的研究。我们的最终目标是创建一个系统，鼓励人们避免吃垃圾食品并保持健康意识。 \keywords{ 机器学习\和垃圾食品\和对象检测\和YOLOv3 \和自定义食物数据集。}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的实时垃圾食品识别系统，旨在通过图像处理技术提高垃圾食品识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 由于不良饮食习惯导致健康问题日益严重，传统机器学习方法在食品识别中的准确率较低，亟需开发更高效的解决方案以促进健康饮食。
AI.method: 构建包含10,000个样本的定制化垃圾食品数据集，采用卷积神经网络（CNN）和YOLOv3算法进行图像识别，并通过Google搜索获取多样化数据。
AI.result: 系统在实验中达到98.05%的识别准确率，且在实际场景测试中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为垃圾食品识别提供了高精度方案，未来可进一步优化系统以推广健康饮食行为。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的实时垃圾食品识别系统，旨在通过图像处理技术提高垃圾食品识别的准确性。
ai_content.motivation: 由于不良饮食习惯导致健康问题日益严重，传统机器学习方法在食品识别中的准确率较低，亟需开发更高效的解决方案以促进健康饮食。
ai_content.method: 构建包含10,000个样本的定制化垃圾食品数据集，采用卷积神经网络（CNN）和YOLOv3算法进行图像识别，并通过Google搜索获取多样化数据。
ai_content.result: 系统在实验中达到98.05%的识别准确率，且在实际场景测试中表现优异。
ai_content.conclusion: 该研究为垃圾食品识别提供了高精度方案，未来可进一步优化系统以推广健康饮食行为。

search_text: A Real-time Junk Food Recognition System based on Machine Learning 基于机器学习的实时垃圾食品识别系统 $ $As a result of bad eating habits, humanity may be destroyed. People are constantly on the lookout for tasty foods, with junk foods being the most common source. As a consequence, our eating patterns are shifting, and we're gravitating toward junk food more than ever, which is bad for our health and increases our risk of acquiring health problems. Machine learning principles are applied in every aspect of our lives, and one of them is object recognition via image processing. However, because foods vary in nature, this procedure is crucial, and traditional methods like ANN, SVM, KNN, PLS etc., will result in a low accuracy rate. All of these issues were defeated by the Deep Neural Network. In this work, we created a fresh dataset of 10,000 data points from 20 junk food classifications to try to recognize junk foods. All of the data in the data set was gathered using the Google search engine, which is thought to be one-of-a-kind in every way. The goal was achieved using Convolution Neural Network (CNN) technology, which is well-known for image processing. We achieved a 98.05\% accuracy rate throughout the research, which was satisfactory. In addition, we conducted a test based on a real-life event, and the outcome was extraordinary. Our goal is to advance this research to the next level, so that it may be applied to a future study. Our ultimate goal is to create a system that would encourage people to avoid eating junk food and to be health-conscious. \keywords{ Machine Learning \and junk food \and object detection \and YOLOv3 \and custom food dataset.} $$由于不良的饮食习惯，人类可能会被毁灭。人们不断地寻找美味的食物，其中垃圾食品是最常见的来源。因此，我们的饮食模式正在发生变化，我们比以往任何时候都更倾向于垃圾食品，这对我们的健康有害，并增加了出现健康问题的风险。机器学习原理应用于我们生活的各个方面，其中之一就是通过图像处理进行对象识别。然而，由于食物性质不同，这一过程至关重要，而传统的方法如ANN、SVM、KNN、PLS等会导致准确率较低。所有这些问题都被深度神经网络击败了。在这项工作中，我们创建了一个包含 20 个垃圾食品分类的 10,000 个数据点的新数据集，以尝试识别垃圾食品。该数据集中的所有数据都是使用谷歌搜索引擎收集的，该搜索引擎在各方面都被认为是独一无二的。该目标是通过使用在图像处理方面众所周知的卷积神经网络（CNN）技术来实现的。我们在整个研究过程中取得了 98.05% 的准确率，这是令人满意的。此外，我们还根据现实生活中的事件进行了测试，结果非常出色。我们的目标是将这项研究推进到一个新的水平，以便它可以应用于未来的研究。我们的最终目标是创建一个系统，鼓励人们避免吃垃圾食品并保持健康意识。 \keywords{ 机器学习\和垃圾食品\和对象检测\和YOLOv3 \和自定义食物数据集。} 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的实时垃圾食品识别系统，旨在通过图像处理技术提高垃圾食品识别的准确性。 Sirajum Munira Shifat,Takitazwar Parthib,Sabikunnahar Talukder Pyaasa,Nila Maitra Chaity,Niloy Kumar,Md. Kishor Morol cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Debora Caldarola,Barbara Caputo,Marco Ciccone
title: Improving Generalization in Federated Learning by Seeking Flat Minima
title_zh: 通过寻求平坦最小值来提高联邦学习的泛化能力
abstract: Models trained in federated settings often suffer from degraded performances and fail at generalizing, especially when facing heterogeneous scenarios. In this work, we investigate such behavior through the lens of geometry of the loss and Hessian eigenspectrum, linking the model's lack of generalization capacity to the sharpness of the solution. Motivated by prior studies connecting the sharpness of the loss surface and the generalization gap, we show that i) training clients locally with Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) or its adaptive version (ASAM) and ii) averaging stochastic weights (SWA) on the server-side can substantially improve generalization in Federated Learning and help bridging the gap with centralized models. By seeking parameters in neighborhoods having uniform low loss, the model converges towards flatter minima and its generalization significantly improves in both homogeneous and heterogeneous scenarios. Empirical results demonstrate the effectiveness of those optimizers across a variety of benchmark vision datasets (e.g. CIFAR10/100, Landmarks-User-160k, IDDA) and tasks (large scale classification, semantic segmentation, domain generalization).
summary: Models trained in federated settings often suffer from degraded performances and fail at generalizing, especially when facing heterogeneous scenarios. In this work, we investigate such behavior through the lens of geometry of the loss and Hessian eigenspectrum, linking the model's lack of generalization capacity to the sharpness of the solution. Motivated by prior studies connecting the sharpness of the loss surface and the generalization gap, we show that i) training clients locally with Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) or its adaptive version (ASAM) and ii) averaging stochastic weights (SWA) on the server-side can substantially improve generalization in Federated Learning and help bridging the gap with centralized models. By seeking parameters in neighborhoods having uniform low loss, the model converges towards flatter minima and its generalization significantly improves in both homogeneous and heterogeneous scenarios. Empirical results demonstrate the effectiveness of those optimizers across a variety of benchmark vision datasets (e.g. CIFAR10/100, Landmarks-User-160k, IDDA) and tasks (large scale classification, semantic segmentation, domain generalization).
abstract_zh: Models trained in federated settings often suffer from degraded performances and fail at generalizing, especially when facing heterogeneous scenarios.在这项工作中，我们通过损失的几何形状和 Hessian 特征谱来研究这种行为，将模型泛化能力的缺乏与解决方案的清晰度联系起来。 Motivated by prior studies connecting the sharpness of the loss surface and the generalization gap, we show that i) training clients locally with Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) or its adaptive version (ASAM) and ii) averaging stochastic weights (SWA) on the server-side can substantially improve generalization in Federated Learning and help bridging the gap with centralized models.通过在具有均匀低损耗的邻域中寻找参数，该模型向更平坦的最小值收敛，并且其泛化能力在同质和异构场景中均得到显着提高。实证结果证明了这些优化器在各种基准视觉数据集（例如 CIFAR10/100、Landmarks-User-160k、IDDA）和任务（大规模分类、语义分割、领域泛化）中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过寻找平坦极小值来提升联邦学习中的模型泛化能力，提出结合Sharpness-Aware Minimization（SAM）和随机权重平均（SWA）的方法。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中模型在异构场景下泛化能力差，传统方法难以解决此问题。作者发现模型泛化能力与损失函数曲率（sharpness）相关，尖锐极小值会导致泛化性能下降。
AI.method: 在客户端采用SAM/ASAM优化器进行本地训练，服务器端通过SWA对随机权重进行平均，引导模型收敛到平坦极小值区域。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在CIFAR10/100、Landmarks-User-160k、IDDA等数据集上显著提升泛化性能，适用于分类、分割和领域适应任务。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合使用SAM/ASAM与SWA，联邦学习模型能在同构和异构场景中均实现更优泛化，有效缩小与集中式模型的性能差距。

search_text: Improving Generalization in Federated Learning by Seeking Flat Minima 通过寻求平坦最小值来提高联邦学习的泛化能力 Models trained in federated settings often suffer from degraded performances and fail at generalizing, especially when facing heterogeneous scenarios. In this work, we investigate such behavior through the lens of geometry of the loss and Hessian eigenspectrum, linking the model's lack of generalization capacity to the sharpness of the solution. Motivated by prior studies connecting the sharpness of the loss surface and the generalization gap, we show that i) training clients locally with Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) or its adaptive version (ASAM) and ii) averaging stochastic weights (SWA) on the server-side can substantially improve generalization in Federated Learning and help bridging the gap with centralized models. By seeking parameters in neighborhoods having uniform low loss, the model converges towards flatter minima and its generalization significantly improves in both homogeneous and heterogeneous scenarios. Empirical results demonstrate the effectiveness of those optimizers across a variety of benchmark vision datasets (e.g. CIFAR10/100, Landmarks-User-160k, IDDA) and tasks (large scale classification, semantic segmentation, domain generalization). Models trained in federated settings often suffer from degraded performances and fail at generalizing, especially when facing heterogeneous scenarios.在这项工作中，我们通过损失的几何形状和 Hessian 特征谱来研究这种行为，将模型泛化能力的缺乏与解决方案的清晰度联系起来。 Motivated by prior studies connecting the sharpness of the loss surface and the generalization gap, we show that i) training clients locally with Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) or its adaptive version (ASAM) and ii) averaging stochastic weights (SWA) on the server-side can substantially improve generalization in Federated Learning and help bridging the gap with centralized models.通过在具有均匀低损耗的邻域中寻找参数，该模型向更平坦的最小值收敛，并且其泛化能力在同质和异构场景中均得到显着提高。实证结果证明了这些优化器在各种基准视觉数据集（例如 CIFAR10/100、Landmarks-User-160k、IDDA）和任务（大规模分类、语义分割、领域泛化）中的有效性。 本文研究如何通过寻找平坦极小值来提升联邦学习中的模型泛化能力，提出结合Sharpness-Aware Minimization（SAM）和随机权重平均（SWA）的方法。 Debora Caldarola,Barbara Caputo,Marco Ciccone cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Songsong Wu,Hao Tang,Xiao-Yuan Jing,Haifeng Zhao,Jianjun Qian,Nicu Sebe,Yan Yan
title: Cross-View Panorama Image Synthesis
title_zh: 跨视角全景图像合成
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the problem of synthesizing a ground-view panorama image conditioned on a top-view aerial image, which is a challenging problem due to the large gap between the two image domains with different view-points. Instead of learning cross-view mapping in a feedforward pass, we propose a novel adversarial feedback GAN framework named PanoGAN with two key components: an adversarial feedback module and a dual branch discrimination strategy. First, the aerial image is fed into the generator to produce a target panorama image and its associated segmentation map in favor of model training with layout semantics. Second, the feature responses of the discriminator encoded by our adversarial feedback module are fed back to the generator to refine the intermediate representations, so that the generation performance is continually improved through an iterative generation process. Third, to pursue high-fidelity and semantic consistency of the generated panorama image, we propose a pixel-segmentation alignment mechanism under the dual branch discrimiantion strategy to facilitate cooperation between the generator and the discriminator. Extensive experimental results on two challenging cross-view image datasets show that PanoGAN enables high-quality panorama image generation with more convincing details than state-of-the-art approaches. The source code and trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/sswuai/PanoGAN}.
summary: In this paper, we tackle the problem of synthesizing a ground-view panorama image conditioned on a top-view aerial image, which is a challenging problem due to the large gap between the two image domains with different view-points. Instead of learning cross-view mapping in a feedforward pass, we propose a novel adversarial feedback GAN framework named PanoGAN with two key components: an adversarial feedback module and a dual branch discrimination strategy. First, the aerial image is fed into the generator to produce a target panorama image and its associated segmentation map in favor of model training with layout semantics. Second, the feature responses of the discriminator encoded by our adversarial feedback module are fed back to the generator to refine the intermediate representations, so that the generation performance is continually improved through an iterative generation process. Third, to pursue high-fidelity and semantic consistency of the generated panorama image, we propose a pixel-segmentation alignment mechanism under the dual branch discrimiantion strategy to facilitate cooperation between the generator and the discriminator. Extensive experimental results on two challenging cross-view image datasets show that PanoGAN enables high-quality panorama image generation with more convincing details than state-of-the-art approaches. The source code and trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/sswuai/PanoGAN}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了以俯视航空图像为条件合成地视全景图像的问题，由于具有不同视点的两个图像域之间存在较大差距，这是一个具有挑战性的问题。 Instead of learning cross-view mapping in a feedforward pass, we propose a novel adversarial feedback GAN framework named PanoGAN with two key components: an adversarial feedback module and a dual branch discrimination strategy. First, the aerial image is fed into the generator to produce a target panorama image and its associated segmentation map in favor of model training with layout semantics. Second, the feature responses of the discriminator encoded by our adversarial feedback module are fed back to the generator to refine the intermediate representations, so that the generation performance is continually improved through an iterative generation process. Third, to pursue high-fidelity and semantic consistency of the generated panorama image, we propose a pixel-segmentation alignment mechanism under the dual branch discrimiantion strategy to facilitate cooperation between the generator and the discriminator. Extensive experimental results on two challenging cross-view image datasets show that PanoGAN enables high-quality panorama image generation with more convincing details than state-of-the-art approaches. The source code and trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/sswuai/PanoGAN}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗反馈的生成对抗网络（PanoGAN），用于根据航拍图像合成高质量的地面视角全景图像。
AI.motivation: 由于航拍图像与地面视角全景图像存在显著的视角和语义差异，现有方法难以生成细节逼真且语义一致的全景图像。
AI.method: 设计包含对抗反馈模块和双分支判别策略的PanoGAN框架，通过迭代优化生成器与判别器的交互，并引入像素-分割对齐机制确保生成图像的高保真度和语义一致性。
AI.result: 在两个跨视角数据集上实验表明，PanoGAN生成的全景图像在细节真实性和语义一致性上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PanoGAN通过对抗反馈和双分支判别策略有效解决了跨视角图像合成难题，代码和模型已开源供研究使用。

search_text: Cross-View Panorama Image Synthesis 跨视角全景图像合成 In this paper, we tackle the problem of synthesizing a ground-view panorama image conditioned on a top-view aerial image, which is a challenging problem due to the large gap between the two image domains with different view-points. Instead of learning cross-view mapping in a feedforward pass, we propose a novel adversarial feedback GAN framework named PanoGAN with two key components: an adversarial feedback module and a dual branch discrimination strategy. First, the aerial image is fed into the generator to produce a target panorama image and its associated segmentation map in favor of model training with layout semantics. Second, the feature responses of the discriminator encoded by our adversarial feedback module are fed back to the generator to refine the intermediate representations, so that the generation performance is continually improved through an iterative generation process. Third, to pursue high-fidelity and semantic consistency of the generated panorama image, we propose a pixel-segmentation alignment mechanism under the dual branch discrimiantion strategy to facilitate cooperation between the generator and the discriminator. Extensive experimental results on two challenging cross-view image datasets show that PanoGAN enables high-quality panorama image generation with more convincing details than state-of-the-art approaches. The source code and trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/sswuai/PanoGAN}. 在本文中，我们解决了以俯视航空图像为条件合成地视全景图像的问题，由于具有不同视点的两个图像域之间存在较大差距，这是一个具有挑战性的问题。 Instead of learning cross-view mapping in a feedforward pass, we propose a novel adversarial feedback GAN framework named PanoGAN with two key components: an adversarial feedback module and a dual branch discrimination strategy. First, the aerial image is fed into the generator to produce a target panorama image and its associated segmentation map in favor of model training with layout semantics. Second, the feature responses of the discriminator encoded by our adversarial feedback module are fed back to the generator to refine the intermediate representations, so that the generation performance is continually improved through an iterative generation process. Third, to pursue high-fidelity and semantic consistency of the generated panorama image, we propose a pixel-segmentation alignment mechanism under the dual branch discrimiantion strategy to facilitate cooperation between the generator and the discriminator. Extensive experimental results on two challenging cross-view image datasets show that PanoGAN enables high-quality panorama image generation with more convincing details than state-of-the-art approaches. The source code and trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/sswuai/PanoGAN}. 本文提出一种基于对抗反馈的生成对抗网络（PanoGAN），用于根据航拍图像合成高质量的地面视角全景图像。 Songsong Wu,Hao Tang,Xiao-Yuan Jing,Haifeng Zhao,Jianjun Qian,Nicu Sebe,Yan Yan cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Risto Trajanov,Stefan Dimeski,Martin Popovski,Peter Korošec,Tome Eftimov
title: Explainable Landscape Analysis in Automated Algorithm Performance Prediction
title_zh: 自动算法性能预测中的可解释景观分析
comment: To appear in International Conference on the Applications of Evolutionary Computation 2022 (Part of EvoStar 2022). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.11633
comments: To appear in International Conference on the Applications of Evolutionary Computation 2022 (Part of EvoStar 2022). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.11633
abstract: Predicting the performance of an optimization algorithm on a new problem instance is crucial in order to select the most appropriate algorithm for solving that problem instance. For this purpose, recent studies learn a supervised machine learning (ML) model using a set of problem landscape features linked to the performance achieved by the optimization algorithm. However, these models are black-box with the only goal of achieving good predictive performance, without providing explanations which landscape features contribute the most to the prediction of the performance achieved by the optimization algorithm. In this study, we investigate the expressiveness of problem landscape features utilized by different supervised ML models in automated algorithm performance prediction. The experimental results point out that the selection of the supervised ML method is crucial, since different supervised ML regression models utilize the problem landscape features differently and there is no common pattern with regard to which landscape features are the most informative.
summary: Predicting the performance of an optimization algorithm on a new problem instance is crucial in order to select the most appropriate algorithm for solving that problem instance. For this purpose, recent studies learn a supervised machine learning (ML) model using a set of problem landscape features linked to the performance achieved by the optimization algorithm. However, these models are black-box with the only goal of achieving good predictive performance, without providing explanations which landscape features contribute the most to the prediction of the performance achieved by the optimization algorithm. In this study, we investigate the expressiveness of problem landscape features utilized by different supervised ML models in automated algorithm performance prediction. The experimental results point out that the selection of the supervised ML method is crucial, since different supervised ML regression models utilize the problem landscape features differently and there is no common pattern with regard to which landscape features are the most informative.
abstract_zh: Predicting the performance of an optimization algorithm on a new problem instance is crucial in order to select the most appropriate algorithm for solving that problem instance.为此，最近的研究使用一组与优化算法所实现的性能相关的问题景观特征来学习监督机器学习 (ML) 模型。然而，这些模型是黑盒模型，其唯一目标是实现良好的预测性能，而没有提供哪些景观特征对优化算法所实现的性能预测贡献最大的解释。在本研究中，我们研究了不同监督机器学习模型在自动算法性能预测中利用的问题景观特征的表达能力。 The experimental results point out that the selection of the supervised ML method is crucial, since different supervised ML regression models utilize the problem landscape features differently and there is no common pattern with regard to which landscape features are the most informative.

AI.tldr: 本文研究不同监督机器学习模型在自动化算法性能预测中对问题景观特征的表达能力，并分析其可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有预测模型虽能实现高性能预测，但缺乏对关键景观特征的解释，阻碍了算法选择的透明性和可信度。
AI.method: 通过实验比较多种监督回归模型在问题景观特征上的表现，分析不同模型对特征的利用差异。
AI.result: 实验表明不同ML方法对景观特征的利用方式存在显著差异，不存在统一的最具信息量的特征模式。
AI.conclusion: 监督学习方法的选择直接影响特征表达效果，需结合可解释性需求优化模型与特征匹配。

authors_text: Morten Rieger Hannemose,Josefine Vilsbøll Sundgaard,Niels Kvorning Ternov,Rasmus R. Paulsen,Anders Nymark Christensen
title: Was that so hard? Estimating human classification difficulty
title_zh: 有那么难吗？ Estimating human classification difficulty
abstract: When doctors are trained to diagnose a specific disease, they learn faster when presented with cases in order of increasing difficulty. This creates the need for automatically estimating how difficult it is for doctors to classify a given case. In this paper, we introduce methods for estimating how hard it is for a doctor to diagnose a case represented by a medical image, both when ground truth difficulties are available for training, and when they are not. Our methods are based on embeddings obtained with deep metric learning. Additionally, we introduce a practical method for obtaining ground truth human difficulty for each image case in a dataset using self-assessed certainty. We apply our methods to two different medical datasets, achieving high Kendall rank correlation coefficients, showing that we outperform existing methods by a large margin on our problem and data.
summary: When doctors are trained to diagnose a specific disease, they learn faster when presented with cases in order of increasing difficulty. This creates the need for automatically estimating how difficult it is for doctors to classify a given case. In this paper, we introduce methods for estimating how hard it is for a doctor to diagnose a case represented by a medical image, both when ground truth difficulties are available for training, and when they are not. Our methods are based on embeddings obtained with deep metric learning. Additionally, we introduce a practical method for obtaining ground truth human difficulty for each image case in a dataset using self-assessed certainty. We apply our methods to two different medical datasets, achieving high Kendall rank correlation coefficients, showing that we outperform existing methods by a large margin on our problem and data.
abstract_zh: 当医生接受过诊断特定疾病的培训时，当按照难度递增的顺序呈现病例时，他们学得更快。这就需要自动估计医生对给定病例进行分类的难度。在本文中，我们介绍了估计医生诊断医学图像所代表的病例的难度的方法，无论是在地面实况困难可用于训练还是不可用时。我们的方法基于通过深度度量学习获得的嵌入。此外，我们还介绍了一种实用方法，可以使用自我评估的确定性来获取数据集中每个图像案例的真实人类难度。我们将我们的方法应用于两个不同的医学数据集，实现了高肯德尔等级相关系数，这表明我们在问题和数据上远远优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度度量学习嵌入的方法，用于估计医生对医疗图像分类任务的难度，并通过自评确定性获取真实难度数据。
AI.motivation: 医生在训练诊断疾病时按难度递增顺序学习更高效，但缺乏自动评估案例难度的工具，需开发相应方法优化训练流程。
AI.method: 利用深度度量学习生成嵌入向量，结合有/无真实难度数据的两种场景，同时引入基于自我评估确定性的难度标注方法。
AI.result: 在两个医疗数据集上实现高Kendall等级相关系数，显著优于现有方法，在难度估计任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效量化诊断难度，为个性化医学培训和案例排序提供可靠依据，具有重要临床应用价值。

authors_text: Donghyun Kim,Kaihong Wang,Stan Sclaroff,Kate Saenko
title: A Broad Study of Pre-training for Domain Generalization and Adaptation
title_zh: 领域泛化和适应预训练的广泛研究
abstract: Deep models must learn robust and transferable representations in order to perform well on new domains. While domain transfer methods (e.g., domain adaptation, domain generalization) have been proposed to learn transferable representations across domains, they are typically applied to ResNet backbones pre-trained on ImageNet. Thus, existing works pay little attention to the effects of pre-training on domain transfer tasks. In this paper, we provide a broad study and in-depth analysis of pre-training for domain adaptation and generalization, namely: network architectures, size, pre-training loss, and datasets. We observe that simply using a state-of-the-art backbone outperforms existing state-of-the-art domain adaptation baselines and set new baselines on Office-Home and DomainNet improving by 10.7\% and 5.5\%. We hope that this work can provide more insights for future domain transfer research.
summary: Deep models must learn robust and transferable representations in order to perform well on new domains. While domain transfer methods (e.g., domain adaptation, domain generalization) have been proposed to learn transferable representations across domains, they are typically applied to ResNet backbones pre-trained on ImageNet. Thus, existing works pay little attention to the effects of pre-training on domain transfer tasks. In this paper, we provide a broad study and in-depth analysis of pre-training for domain adaptation and generalization, namely: network architectures, size, pre-training loss, and datasets. We observe that simply using a state-of-the-art backbone outperforms existing state-of-the-art domain adaptation baselines and set new baselines on Office-Home and DomainNet improving by 10.7\% and 5.5\%. We hope that this work can provide more insights for future domain transfer research.
abstract_zh: Deep models must learn robust and transferable representations in order to perform well on new domains.虽然域转移方法（例如域适应、域泛化）已被提出来学习跨域的可转移表示，但它们通常应用于在 ImageNet 上预训练的 ResNet 主干。 Thus, existing works pay little attention to the effects of pre-training on domain transfer tasks.在本文中，我们对领域适应和泛化的预训练进行了广泛的研究和深入的分析，即：网络架构、大小、预训练损失和数据集。我们观察到，仅使用最先进的主干网就优于现有最先进的域适应基线，并在 Office-Home 和 DomainNet 上设置了新的基线，分别提高了 10.7% 和 5.5%。 We hope that this work can provide more insights for future domain transfer research.

AI.tldr: 本文全面研究了预训练对领域泛化和适应的影响，分析了网络架构、规模、预训练损失及数据集的作用。
AI.motivation: 现有领域迁移方法多依赖ImageNet预训练的ResNet，但忽视了预训练本身对领域迁移效果的影响，需深入探究预训练因素的作用。
AI.method: 通过对比不同网络架构、规模、预训练损失函数及数据集，评估其对领域适应和泛化任务的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，采用先进主干网络在Office-Home和DomainNet数据集上分别提升10.7%和5.5%，超越现有基线。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了预训练因素对领域迁移的重要性，为后续研究提供了新方向和基准。

tldr: 本文全面研究了预训练对领域泛化和适应的影响，分析了网络架构、规模、预训练损失及数据集的作用。
motivation: 现有领域迁移方法多依赖ImageNet预训练的ResNet，但忽视了预训练本身对领域迁移效果的影响，需深入探究预训练因素的作用。
method: 通过对比不同网络架构、规模、预训练损失函数及数据集，评估其对领域适应和泛化任务的影响。

conclusion: 本研究揭示了预训练因素对领域迁移的重要性，为后续研究提供了新方向和基准。
search_text: A Broad Study of Pre-training for Domain Generalization and Adaptation 领域泛化和适应预训练的广泛研究 Deep models must learn robust and transferable representations in order to perform well on new domains. While domain transfer methods (e.g., domain adaptation, domain generalization) have been proposed to learn transferable representations across domains, they are typically applied to ResNet backbones pre-trained on ImageNet. Thus, existing works pay little attention to the effects of pre-training on domain transfer tasks. In this paper, we provide a broad study and in-depth analysis of pre-training for domain adaptation and generalization, namely: network architectures, size, pre-training loss, and datasets. We observe that simply using a state-of-the-art backbone outperforms existing state-of-the-art domain adaptation baselines and set new baselines on Office-Home and DomainNet improving by 10.7\% and 5.5\%. We hope that this work can provide more insights for future domain transfer research. Deep models must learn robust and transferable representations in order to perform well on new domains.虽然域转移方法（例如域适应、域泛化）已被提出来学习跨域的可转移表示，但它们通常应用于在 ImageNet 上预训练的 ResNet 主干。 Thus, existing works pay little attention to the effects of pre-training on domain transfer tasks.在本文中，我们对领域适应和泛化的预训练进行了广泛的研究和深入的分析，即：网络架构、大小、预训练损失和数据集。我们观察到，仅使用最先进的主干网就优于现有最先进的域适应基线，并在 Office-Home 和 DomainNet 上设置了新的基线，分别提高了 10.7% 和 5.5%。 We hope that this work can provide more insights for future domain transfer research. 本文全面研究了预训练对领域泛化和适应的影响，分析了网络架构、规模、预训练损失及数据集的作用。 Donghyun Kim,Kaihong Wang,Stan Sclaroff,Kate Saenko cs.CV

authors_text: Richard D. Lange,David S. Rolnick,Konrad P. Kording
title: Clustering units in neural networks: upstream vs downstream information
title_zh: 神经网络中的聚类单元：上游信息与下游信息
comment: 12 main text pages, 4 main figures, 5 supplemental figures. Will be submitted to TMLR
comments: 12 main text pages, 4 main figures, 5 supplemental figures. Will be submitted to TMLR
abstract: It has been hypothesized that some form of "modular" structure in artificial neural networks should be useful for learning, compositionality, and generalization. However, defining and quantifying modularity remains an open problem. We cast the problem of detecting functional modules into the problem of detecting clusters of similar-functioning units. This begs the question of what makes two units functionally similar. For this, we consider two broad families of methods: those that define similarity based on how units respond to structured variations in inputs ("upstream"), and those based on how variations in hidden unit activations affect outputs ("downstream"). We conduct an empirical study quantifying modularity of hidden layer representations of simple feedforward, fully connected networks, across a range of hyperparameters. For each model, we quantify pairwise associations between hidden units in each layer using a variety of both upstream and downstream measures, then cluster them by maximizing their "modularity score" using established tools from network science. We find two surprising results: first, dropout dramatically increased modularity, while other forms of weight regularization had more modest effects. Second, although we observe that there is usually good agreement about clusters within both upstream methods and downstream methods, there is little agreement about the cluster assignments across these two families of methods. This has important implications for representation-learning, as it suggests that finding modular representations that reflect structure in inputs (e.g. disentanglement) may be a distinct goal from learning modular representations that reflect structure in outputs (e.g. compositionality).

This has important implications for representation-learning, as it suggests that finding modular representations that reflect structure in inputs (e.g. disentanglement) may be a distinct goal from learning modular representations that reflect structure in outputs (e.g. compositionality).

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经网络中单元的聚类方法，通过比较上游信息（输入响应）和下游信息（输出影响）来量化隐藏层的模块化结构。
AI.motivation: 尽管模块化结构对神经网络的学习和泛化能力有益，但如何定义和量化模块化仍是未解难题，需探索不同信息来源对模块化的影响。
AI.method: 采用上游（输入变化响应）和下游（激活变化对输出的影响）两种相似性度量方法，结合网络科学工具对隐藏层单元进行聚类，并通过实验验证不同超参数下的模块化得分。
AI.result: 发现Dropout显著提升模块化，而权重正则化效果有限；上游与下游方法在聚类结果上存在显著分歧。
AI.conclusion: 模块化表示的目标可能分为两类：反映输入结构（如解耦）和输出结构（如组合性），需分别优化。

authors_text: Yuhang Lu,Touradj Ebrahimi
title: A New Approach to Improve Learning-based Deepfake Detection in Realistic Conditions
title_zh: 一种改进现实条件下基于学习的 Deepfake 检测的新方法
abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks have achieved exceptional results on multiple detection and recognition tasks. However, the performance of such detectors are often evaluated in public benchmarks under constrained and non-realistic situations. The impact of conventional distortions and processing operations found in imaging workflows such as compression, noise, and enhancement are not sufficiently studied. Currently, only a few researches have been done to improve the detector robustness to unseen perturbations. This paper proposes a more effective data augmentation scheme based on real-world image degradation process. This novel technique is deployed for deepfake detection tasks and has been evaluated by a more realistic assessment framework. Extensive experiments show that the proposed data augmentation scheme improves generalization ability to unpredictable data distortions and unseen datasets.
summary: Deep convolutional neural networks have achieved exceptional results on multiple detection and recognition tasks. However, the performance of such detectors are often evaluated in public benchmarks under constrained and non-realistic situations. The impact of conventional distortions and processing operations found in imaging workflows such as compression, noise, and enhancement are not sufficiently studied. Currently, only a few researches have been done to improve the detector robustness to unseen perturbations. This paper proposes a more effective data augmentation scheme based on real-world image degradation process. This novel technique is deployed for deepfake detection tasks and has been evaluated by a more realistic assessment framework. Extensive experiments show that the proposed data augmentation scheme improves generalization ability to unpredictable data distortions and unseen datasets.
abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络在多项检测和识别任务上取得了优异的结果。然而，此类检测器的性能通常是在受限和非现实情况下在公共基准中进行评估的。成像工作流程中的传统失真和处理操作（例如压缩、噪声和增强）的影响尚未得到充分研究。目前，只有少数研究来提高探测器对不可见扰动的鲁棒性。本文提出了一种基于现实世界图像退化过程的更有效的数据增强方案。这项新技术被部署用于深度伪造检测任务，并已通过更现实的评估框架进行了评估。大量实验表明，所提出的数据增强方案提高了对不可预测的数据失真和未见过的数据集的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于真实图像退化过程的数据增强方法，以提升深度伪造检测在真实场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测模型在受控环境下表现良好，但对实际图像处理中的压缩、噪声等失真因素鲁棒性不足，缺乏对未预见扰动的适应能力。
AI.method: 设计模拟真实图像退化流程的数据增强方案，通过引入压缩、噪声等真实处理步骤构建更贴近实际的评估框架。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著提升了检测模型对未知数据失真和新数据集的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于真实退化过程的数据增强能有效增强深度伪造检测模型在复杂现实场景中的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Wooseok Lee,Sanghyun Son,Kyoung Mu Lee
title: AP-BSN: Self-Supervised Denoising for Real-World Images via Asymmetric PD and Blind-Spot Network
title_zh: AP-BSN：通过非对称 PD 和盲点网络对真实世界图像进行自监督去噪
abstract: Blind-spot network (BSN) and its variants have made significant advances in self-supervised denoising. Nevertheless, they are still bound to synthetic noisy inputs due to less practical assumptions like pixel-wise independent noise. Hence, it is challenging to deal with spatially correlated real-world noise using self-supervised BSN. Recently, pixel-shuffle downsampling (PD) has been proposed to remove the spatial correlation of real-world noise. However, it is not trivial to integrate PD and BSN directly, which prevents the fully self-supervised denoising model on real-world images. We propose an Asymmetric PD (AP) to address this issue, which introduces different PD stride factors for training and inference. We systematically demonstrate that the proposed AP can resolve inherent trade-offs caused by specific PD stride factors and make BSN applicable to practical scenarios. To this end, we develop AP-BSN, a state-of-the-art self-supervised denoising method for real-world sRGB images. We further propose random-replacing refinement, which significantly improves the performance of our AP-BSN without any additional parameters. Extensive studies demonstrate that our method outperforms the other self-supervised and even unpaired denoising methods by a large margin, without using any additional knowledge, e.g., noise level, regarding the underlying unknown noise.
summary: Blind-spot network (BSN) and its variants have made significant advances in self-supervised denoising. Nevertheless, they are still bound to synthetic noisy inputs due to less practical assumptions like pixel-wise independent noise. Hence, it is challenging to deal with spatially correlated real-world noise using self-supervised BSN. Recently, pixel-shuffle downsampling (PD) has been proposed to remove the spatial correlation of real-world noise. However, it is not trivial to integrate PD and BSN directly, which prevents the fully self-supervised denoising model on real-world images. We propose an Asymmetric PD (AP) to address this issue, which introduces different PD stride factors for training and inference. We systematically demonstrate that the proposed AP can resolve inherent trade-offs caused by specific PD stride factors and make BSN applicable to practical scenarios. To this end, we develop AP-BSN, a state-of-the-art self-supervised denoising method for real-world sRGB images. We further propose random-replacing refinement, which significantly improves the performance of our AP-BSN without any additional parameters. Extensive studies demonstrate that our method outperforms the other self-supervised and even unpaired denoising methods by a large margin, without using any additional knowledge, e.g., noise level, regarding the underlying unknown noise.
abstract_zh: 盲点网络（BSN）及其变体在自监督去噪方面取得了重大进展。然而，由于不太实际的假设（例如像素独立噪声），它们仍然受到合成噪声输入的限制。 Hence, it is challenging to deal with spatially correlated real-world noise using self-supervised BSN. Recently, pixel-shuffle downsampling (PD) has been proposed to remove the spatial correlation of real-world noise. However, it is not trivial to integrate PD and BSN directly, which prevents the fully self-supervised denoising model on real-world images. We propose an Asymmetric PD (AP) to address this issue, which introduces different PD stride factors for training and inference.我们系统地证明了所提出的 AP 可以解决由特定 PD 步长因子引起的固有权衡，并使 BSN 适用于实际场景。 To this end, we develop AP-BSN, a state-of-the-art self-supervised denoising method for real-world sRGB images. We further propose random-replacing refinement, which significantly improves the performance of our AP-BSN without any additional parameters.广泛的研究表明，我们的方法在很大程度上优于其他自监督甚至不配对的去噪方法，而无需使用任何额外的知识，例如关于潜在未知噪声的噪声水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AP-BSN方法，通过不对称像素shuffle下采样（AP）和盲点网络（BSN）实现无需监督的真实世界图像去噪。
AI.motivation: 现有BSN方法因依赖合成噪声数据且难以处理真实世界空间相关噪声，导致在实际应用中效果受限。
AI.method: 设计不对称PD结构（训练与推理使用不同下采样步长），结合盲点网络与随机替换优化策略，消除空间噪声相关性并提升去噪性能。
AI.result: 在真实世界sRGB图像去噪任务中，AP-BSN显著优于其他自监督及无配对去噪方法，且无需噪声水平等先验知识。
AI.conclusion: 通过不对称PD与盲点网络的协同设计，AP-BSN有效解决了真实世界噪声处理难题，为自监督去噪提供了新思路。

search_text: AP-BSN: Self-Supervised Denoising for Real-World Images via Asymmetric PD and Blind-Spot Network AP-BSN：通过非对称 PD 和盲点网络对真实世界图像进行自监督去噪 Blind-spot network (BSN) and its variants have made significant advances in self-supervised denoising. Nevertheless, they are still bound to synthetic noisy inputs due to less practical assumptions like pixel-wise independent noise. Hence, it is challenging to deal with spatially correlated real-world noise using self-supervised BSN. Recently, pixel-shuffle downsampling (PD) has been proposed to remove the spatial correlation of real-world noise. However, it is not trivial to integrate PD and BSN directly, which prevents the fully self-supervised denoising model on real-world images. We propose an Asymmetric PD (AP) to address this issue, which introduces different PD stride factors for training and inference. We systematically demonstrate that the proposed AP can resolve inherent trade-offs caused by specific PD stride factors and make BSN applicable to practical scenarios. To this end, we develop AP-BSN, a state-of-the-art self-supervised denoising method for real-world sRGB images. We further propose random-replacing refinement, which significantly improves the performance of our AP-BSN without any additional parameters. Extensive studies demonstrate that our method outperforms the other self-supervised and even unpaired denoising methods by a large margin, without using any additional knowledge, e.g., noise level, regarding the underlying unknown noise. 盲点网络（BSN）及其变体在自监督去噪方面取得了重大进展。然而，由于不太实际的假设（例如像素独立噪声），它们仍然受到合成噪声输入的限制。 Hence, it is challenging to deal with spatially correlated real-world noise using self-supervised BSN. Recently, pixel-shuffle downsampling (PD) has been proposed to remove the spatial correlation of real-world noise. However, it is not trivial to integrate PD and BSN directly, which prevents the fully self-supervised denoising model on real-world images. We propose an Asymmetric PD (AP) to address this issue, which introduces different PD stride factors for training and inference.我们系统地证明了所提出的 AP 可以解决由特定 PD 步长因子引起的固有权衡，并使 BSN 适用于实际场景。 To this end, we develop AP-BSN, a state-of-the-art self-supervised denoising method for real-world sRGB images. We further propose random-replacing refinement, which significantly improves the performance of our AP-BSN without any additional parameters.广泛的研究表明，我们的方法在很大程度上优于其他自监督甚至不配对的去噪方法，而无需使用任何额外的知识，例如关于潜在未知噪声的噪声水平。 本文提出AP-BSN方法，通过不对称像素shuffle下采样（AP）和盲点网络（BSN）实现无需监督的真实世界图像去噪。 Wooseok Lee,Sanghyun Son,Kyoung Mu Lee cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yuhang Lu,Ruizhi Luo,Touradj Ebrahimi
title: A Novel Framework for Assessment of Learning-based Detectors in Realistic Conditions with Application to Deepfake Detection
title_zh: 一种在现实条件下评估基于学习的探测器并应用于 Deepfake 检测的新框架
abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks have shown remarkable results on multiple detection tasks. Despite the significant progress, the performance of such detectors are often assessed in public benchmarks under non-realistic conditions. Specifically, impact of conventional distortions and processing operations such as compression, noise, and enhancement are not sufficiently studied. This paper proposes a rigorous framework to assess performance of learning-based detectors in more realistic situations. An illustrative example is shown under deepfake detection context. Inspired by the assessment results, a data augmentation strategy based on natural image degradation process is designed, which significantly improves the generalization ability of two deepfake detectors.
summary: Deep convolutional neural networks have shown remarkable results on multiple detection tasks. Despite the significant progress, the performance of such detectors are often assessed in public benchmarks under non-realistic conditions. Specifically, impact of conventional distortions and processing operations such as compression, noise, and enhancement are not sufficiently studied. This paper proposes a rigorous framework to assess performance of learning-based detectors in more realistic situations. An illustrative example is shown under deepfake detection context. Inspired by the assessment results, a data augmentation strategy based on natural image degradation process is designed, which significantly improves the generalization ability of two deepfake detectors.
abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络在多项检测任务上表现出了显着的效果。尽管取得了重大进展，但此类探测器的性能经常在非现实条件下的公共基准中进行评估。 Specifically, impact of conventional distortions and processing operations such as compression, noise, and enhancement are not sufficiently studied.本文提出了一个严格的框架来评估基于学习的检测器在更现实的情况下的性能。 Deepfake 检测环境下显示了一个说明性示例。 Inspired by the assessment results, a data augmentation strategy based on natural image degradation process is designed, which significantly improves the generalization ability of two deepfake detectors.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新框架，在真实条件下评估基于学习的检测器的性能，并应用于深度伪造检测。
AI.motivation: 现有检测器性能评估多在非真实条件下进行，未充分考虑压缩、噪声等传统失真因素，需更真实的评估方法。
AI.method: 构建评估框架，结合自然图像退化过程设计数据增强策略，模拟真实环境下的图像处理操作。
AI.result: 数据增强策略显著提升两个深度伪造检测器的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过真实条件评估与数据增强结合，有效提升检测器泛化能力，推动其在实际应用中的可靠性。
