authors_text: Feng Han,Xinyan Huang,Zenghao Wang,Jingang Yi,Tao Liu
title: Autonomous Bikebot Control for Crossing Obstacles with Assistive Leg Impulsive Actuation
title_zh: 通过辅助腿脉冲驱动跨越障碍的自主自行车机器人控制
abstract: As a single-track mobile platform, bikebot (i.e., bicycle-based robot) has attractive navigation capability to pass through narrow, off-road terrain with high-speed and high-energy efficiency. However, running crossing step-like obstacles creates challenges for intrinsically unstable, underactuated bikebots. This paper presents a novel autonomous bikebot control with assistive leg actuation to navigate crossing obstacles. The proposed design integrates the external/internal convertible-based control with leg-assisted impulse control. The leg-terrain interaction generates assistive impulsive torques to help maintain the navigation and balance capability when running across obstacles. The control performance is analyzed and guaranteed. The experimental results confirm that under the control design, the bikebot can smoothly run crossing multiple step-like obstacles with height more than one third of the wheel radius. The comparison results demonstrate the superior performance than those under only the velocity and steering control without leg assistive impulsive actuation.
summary: As a single-track mobile platform, bikebot (i.e., bicycle-based robot) has attractive navigation capability to pass through narrow, off-road terrain with high-speed and high-energy efficiency. However, running crossing step-like obstacles creates challenges for intrinsically unstable, underactuated bikebots. This paper presents a novel autonomous bikebot control with assistive leg actuation to navigate crossing obstacles. The proposed design integrates the external/internal convertible-based control with leg-assisted impulse control. The leg-terrain interaction generates assistive impulsive torques to help maintain the navigation and balance capability when running across obstacles. The control performance is analyzed and guaranteed. The experimental results confirm that under the control design, the bikebot can smoothly run crossing multiple step-like obstacles with height more than one third of the wheel radius. The comparison results demonstrate the superior performance than those under only the velocity and steering control without leg assistive impulsive actuation.
abstract_zh: 作为单轨移动平台，bikebot（即基于自行车的机器人）具有有吸引力的导航能力，可以高速、高能效地穿过狭窄的越野地形。然而，跨越阶梯状障碍物会给本质上不稳定、驱动不足的自行车机器人带来挑战。本文提出了一种新颖的自主自行车机器人控制装置，具有辅助腿部驱动来导航越过障碍物。所提出的设计将外部/内部基于可转换的控制与腿部辅助脉冲控制集成在一起。腿部与地形的相互作用产生辅助脉冲扭矩，有助于在跨越障碍物时保持导航和平衡能力。对控制性能进行了分析和保证。实验结果证实，在控制设计下，自行车机器人可以平稳地跨越多个高度超过车轮半径三分之一的阶梯状障碍物。比较结果表明，与仅进行速度和转向控制而没有腿部辅助脉冲驱动的情况相比，其性能更优越。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合腿部辅助冲击驱动的自主自行车机器人控制方法，以解决其跨越台阶状障碍物时的稳定性与平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 自行车机器人作为单轨移动平台虽具高效导航能力，但其固有不稳定性与欠驱动特性使其在跨越障碍物时面临显著挑战。
AI.method: 设计融合内外部可转换控制与腿部冲击辅助控制的混合控制策略，通过腿部与地形的相互作用产生辅助冲击力矩以维持平衡。
AI.result: 实验验证该控制方法使自行车机器人可平稳跨越超过轮径三分之一高度的多级台阶状障碍物，性能优于传统速度与转向控制方案。
AI.conclusion: 腿部冲击辅助控制有效提升了自行车机器人跨越障碍的自主导航能力，为复杂地形移动机器人提供了新思路。

The control performance is analyzed and guaranteed. The experimental results confirm that under the control design, the bikebot can smoothly run crossing multiple step-like obstacles with height more than one third of the wheel radius. The comparison results demonstrate the superior performance than those under only the velocity and steering control without leg assistive impulsive actuation. 作为单轨移动平台，bikebot（即基于自行车的机器人）具有有吸引力的导航能力，可以高速、高能效地穿过狭窄的越野地形。然而，跨越阶梯状障碍物会给本质上不稳定、驱动不足的自行车机器人带来挑战。本文提出了一种新颖的自主自行车机器人控制装置，具有辅助腿部驱动来导航越过障碍物。所提出的设计将外部/内部基于可转换的控制与腿部辅助脉冲控制集成在一起。腿部与地形的相互作用产生辅助脉冲扭矩，有助于在跨越障碍物时保持导航和平衡能力。对控制性能进行了分析和保证。实验结果证实，在控制设计下，自行车机器人可以平稳地跨越多个高度超过车轮半径三分之一的阶梯状障碍物。比较结果表明，与仅进行速度和转向控制而没有腿部辅助脉冲驱动的情况相比，其性能更优越。 本文提出一种结合腿部辅助冲击驱动的自主自行车机器人控制方法，以解决其跨越台阶状障碍物时的稳定性与平衡问题。 Feng Han,Xinyan Huang,Zenghao Wang,Jingang Yi,Tao Liu cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Tarun Gupta,Duc-Tuan Truong,Tran The Anh,Chng Eng Siong
title: Estimation of speaker age and height from speech signal using bi-encoder transformer mixture model
title_zh: 使用双编码器变压器混合模型从语音信号估计说话者年龄和身高
abstract: The estimation of speaker characteristics such as age and height is a challenging task, having numerous applications in voice forensic analysis. In this work, we propose a bi-encoder transformer mixture model for speaker age and height estimation. Considering the wide differences in male and female voice characteristics such as differences in formant and fundamental frequencies, we propose the use of two separate transformer encoders for the extraction of specific voice features in the male and female gender, using wav2vec 2.0 as a common-level feature extractor. This architecture reduces the interference effects during backpropagation and improves the generalizability of the model. We perform our experiments on the TIMIT dataset and significantly outperform the current state-of-the-art results on age estimation. Specifically, we achieve root mean squared error (RMSE) of 5.54 years and 6.49 years for male and female age estimation, respectively. Further experiment to evaluate the relative importance of different phonetic types for our task demonstrate that vowel sounds are the most distinguishing for age estimation.
summary: The estimation of speaker characteristics such as age and height is a challenging task, having numerous applications in voice forensic analysis. In this work, we propose a bi-encoder transformer mixture model for speaker age and height estimation. Considering the wide differences in male and female voice characteristics such as differences in formant and fundamental frequencies, we propose the use of two separate transformer encoders for the extraction of specific voice features in the male and female gender, using wav2vec 2.0 as a common-level feature extractor. This architecture reduces the interference effects during backpropagation and improves the generalizability of the model. We perform our experiments on the TIMIT dataset and significantly outperform the current state-of-the-art results on age estimation. Specifically, we achieve root mean squared error (RMSE) of 5.54 years and 6.49 years for male and female age estimation, respectively. Further experiment to evaluate the relative importance of different phonetic types for our task demonstrate that vowel sounds are the most distinguishing for age estimation.
abstract_zh: 年龄和身高等说话人特征的估计是一项具有挑战性的任务，在语音取证分析中有许多应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于说话人年龄和身高估计的双编码器变压器混合模型。 Considering the wide differences in male and female voice characteristics such as differences in formant and fundamental frequencies, we propose the use of two separate transformer encoders for the extraction of specific voice features in the male and female gender, using wav2vec 2.0 as a common-level feature extractor.这种架构减少了反向传播过程中的干扰效应，提高了模型的泛化性。我们在 TIMIT 数据集上进行实验，并且在年龄估计方面显着优于当前最先进的结果。具体来说，我们对男性和女性年龄估计的均方根误差 (RMSE) 分别为 5.54 岁和 6.49 岁。 Further experiment to evaluate the relative importance of different phonetic types for our task demonstrate that vowel sounds are the most distinguishing for age estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双编码器变换器混合模型，用于从语音信号中估计说话人的年龄和身高。
AI.motivation: 估计说话人的年龄和身高在语音鉴证分析中具有重要应用，但因性别间声音特征差异大而具有挑战性。因此需要一种能够有效提取性别特异性语音特征的模型。
AI.method: 本文采用两个独立的变换器编码器分别提取男性和女性的语音特征，并使用wav2vec 2.0作为通用特征提取器，以减少反向传播中的干扰并提高模型的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在TIMIT数据集上的实验表明，该模型在年龄估计方面显著优于现有最先进方法，男性和女性的均方根误差分别为5.54年和6.49年。此外，实验还表明元音在年龄估计中具有最大的区分性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的双编码器变换器混合模型有效提升了语音信号中年龄和身高的估计性能，尤其在性别特异性特征提取方面表现出色。

authors_text: Nikita V. Bykov
title: Impact of counteracting vehicles on the characteristics of a smart city transport system
title_zh: 抵消车辆对智慧城市交通系统特性的影响
abstract: The development of smart city transport systems, including self-driving cars, leads to an increase in the threat of hostile interference in the processes of vehicle control. This interference may disrupt the normal functioning of the transport system, and, if is performed covertly, the system can be negatively affected for a long period of time. This paper develops a simulation stochastic cellular automata model of traffic on a circular two-lane road based on the Sakai-Nishinari-Fukui-Schadschneider (S-NFS) rules. In the presented model, in addition to ordinary vehicles, there are covertly counteracting vehicles; their task is to reduce the quantity indicators (such as traffic flux) of the transport system using special rules of behavior. Three such rules are considered and compared: two lane-changing rules and one slow-down rule. It is shown that such counteracting vehicles can affect the traffic flow, mainly in the region of the maximum of the fundamental diagram, that is, at average values of the vehicle density. In free-flowing traffic or in a traffic jam, the influence of the counteracting vehicle is negligible regardless of its rules of behavior.
summary: The development of smart city transport systems, including self-driving cars, leads to an increase in the threat of hostile interference in the processes of vehicle control. This interference may disrupt the normal functioning of the transport system, and, if is performed covertly, the system can be negatively affected for a long period of time. This paper develops a simulation stochastic cellular automata model of traffic on a circular two-lane road based on the Sakai-Nishinari-Fukui-Schadschneider (S-NFS) rules. In the presented model, in addition to ordinary vehicles, there are covertly counteracting vehicles; their task is to reduce the quantity indicators (such as traffic flux) of the transport system using special rules of behavior. Three such rules are considered and compared: two lane-changing rules and one slow-down rule. It is shown that such counteracting vehicles can affect the traffic flow, mainly in the region of the maximum of the fundamental diagram, that is, at average values of the vehicle density. In free-flowing traffic or in a traffic jam, the influence of the counteracting vehicle is negligible regardless of its rules of behavior.
abstract_zh: 包括自动驾驶汽车在内的智能城市交通系统的发展导致车辆控制过程中恶意干扰的威胁增加。这种干扰可能会扰乱传输系统的正常运行，如果隐蔽地进行，系统可能会在很长一段时间内受到负面影响。本文开发了一种基于 Sakai-Nishinari-Fukui-Schadschneider (S-NFS) 规则的环形双车道道路交通模拟随机元胞自动机模型。在所展示的模型中，除了普通车辆外，还有隐蔽对抗车辆；他们的任务是使用特殊的行为规则来减少运输系统的数量指标（例如交通流量）。考虑并比较了三种这样的规则：两种变道规则和一种减速规则。结果表明，这种抵消车辆会影响交通流量，主要是在基本图的最大值区域，即车辆密度的平均值。在自由流动的交通或交通拥堵中，无论其行为规则如何，抵消车辆的影响都可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文研究对抗车辆对智能城市交通系统特性的影响，通过模拟模型分析其对交通流量的干扰效应。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶技术发展，智能交通系统面临隐蔽干扰威胁，需评估对抗车辆对交通流的潜在破坏性影响。
AI.method: 基于S-NFS规则构建随机元胞自动机模型，模拟双车道环形道路中普通车辆与对抗车辆（含车道变更和减速规则）的交互行为。
AI.result: 对抗车辆主要在交通基本图峰值区域（中等车密度）显著降低流量指标，而在自由流或拥堵状态下影响可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 对抗车辆可通过特定规则有效干扰交通系统稳定性，需针对性设计防御机制以保障智能交通安全。

authors_text: Carlos Carbone,Dario Albani,Federico Magistri,Dimitri Ognibene,Cyrill Stachniss,Gert Kootstra,Daniele Nardi,Vito Trianni
title: Monitoring and mapping of crop fields with UAV swarms based on information gain
title_zh: 基于信息增益的无人机群农田监测与测绘
abstract: Monitoring crop fields to map features like weeds can be efficiently performed with unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) that can cover large areas in a short time due to their privileged perspective and motion speed. However, the need for high-resolution images for precise classification of features (e.g., detecting even the smallest weeds in the field) contrasts with the limited payload and ight time of current UAVs. Thus, it requires several flights to cover a large field uniformly. However, the assumption that the whole field must be observed with the same precision is unnecessary when features are heterogeneously distributed, like weeds appearing in patches over the field. In this case, an adaptive approach that focuses only on relevant areas can perform better, especially when multiple UAVs are employed simultaneously. Leveraging on a swarm-robotics approach, we propose a monitoring and mapping strategy that adaptively chooses the target areas based on the expected information gain, which measures the potential for uncertainty reduction due to further observations. The proposed strategy scales well with group size and leads to smaller mapping errors than optimal pre-planned monitoring approaches.
summary: Monitoring crop fields to map features like weeds can be efficiently performed with unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) that can cover large areas in a short time due to their privileged perspective and motion speed. However, the need for high-resolution images for precise classification of features (e.g., detecting even the smallest weeds in the field) contrasts with the limited payload and ight time of current UAVs. Thus, it requires several flights to cover a large field uniformly. However, the assumption that the whole field must be observed with the same precision is unnecessary when features are heterogeneously distributed, like weeds appearing in patches over the field. In this case, an adaptive approach that focuses only on relevant areas can perform better, especially when multiple UAVs are employed simultaneously. Leveraging on a swarm-robotics approach, we propose a monitoring and mapping strategy that adaptively chooses the target areas based on the expected information gain, which measures the potential for uncertainty reduction due to further observations. The proposed strategy scales well with group size and leads to smaller mapping errors than optimal pre-planned monitoring approaches.
abstract_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 凭借其独特的视角和运动速度，可以在短时间内覆盖大片区域，从而有效地监测农田并绘制杂草等特征。然而，需要高分辨率图像来精确分类特征（例如，检测田间最小的杂草），这与当前无人机有限的有效载荷和飞行时间形成鲜明对比。因此，需要多次飞行才能均匀覆盖大片区域。然而，当特征分布不均匀时，例如田野上出现的杂草，就没有必要以相同的精度观察整个田野。在这种情况下，仅关注相关领域的自适应方法可以表现更好，特别是当同时使用多个无人机时。利用群体机器人方法，我们提出了一种监测和绘图策略，该策略根据预期信息增益自适应地选择目标区域，从而衡量由于进一步观察而减少不确定性的潜力。所提出的策略可以很好地适应群体规模，并且比最佳预先计划的监测方法产生更小的映射误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无人机群和信息增益的自适应农田监测与制图方法，用于高效识别如杂草等农田特征。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机监测需多次飞行且均匀覆盖精度不足，而农田特征分布不均时，自适应方法能提高效率。
AI.method: 基于群体机器人技术，采用信息增益评估潜在观测区域，动态调整无人机群的监测重点。
AI.result: 该策略在群体规模上扩展良好，相比预规划方法，制图误差更小。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为大规模农田的高效、精准监测提供了有效解决方案，尤其适用于特征分布不均的场景。

search_text: Monitoring and mapping of crop fields with UAV swarms based on information gain 基于信息增益的无人机群农田监测与测绘 Monitoring crop fields to map features like weeds can be efficiently performed with unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) that can cover large areas in a short time due to their privileged perspective and motion speed. However, the need for high-resolution images for precise classification of features (e.g., detecting even the smallest weeds in the field) contrasts with the limited payload and ight time of current UAVs. Thus, it requires several flights to cover a large field uniformly. However, the assumption that the whole field must be observed with the same precision is unnecessary when features are heterogeneously distributed, like weeds appearing in patches over the field. In this case, an adaptive approach that focuses only on relevant areas can perform better, especially when multiple UAVs are employed simultaneously. Leveraging on a swarm-robotics approach, we propose a monitoring and mapping strategy that adaptively chooses the target areas based on the expected information gain, which measures the potential for uncertainty reduction due to further observations. The proposed strategy scales well with group size and leads to smaller mapping errors than optimal pre-planned monitoring approaches. 无人机 (UAV) 凭借其独特的视角和运动速度，可以在短时间内覆盖大片区域，从而有效地监测农田并绘制杂草等特征。然而，需要高分辨率图像来精确分类特征（例如，检测田间最小的杂草），这与当前无人机有限的有效载荷和飞行时间形成鲜明对比。因此，需要多次飞行才能均匀覆盖大片区域。然而，当特征分布不均匀时，例如田野上出现的杂草，就没有必要以相同的精度观察整个田野。在这种情况下，仅关注相关领域的自适应方法可以表现更好，特别是当同时使用多个无人机时。利用群体机器人方法，我们提出了一种监测和绘图策略，该策略根据预期信息增益自适应地选择目标区域，从而衡量由于进一步观察而减少不确定性的潜力。所提出的策略可以很好地适应群体规模，并且比最佳预先计划的监测方法产生更小的映射误差。 本文提出了一种基于无人机群和信息增益的自适应农田监测与制图方法，用于高效识别如杂草等农田特征。 Carlos Carbone,Dario Albani,Federico Magistri,Dimitri Ognibene,Cyrill Stachniss,Gert Kootstra,Daniele Nardi,Vito Trianni cs.RO

authors_text: Antonis Maronikolakis,Axel Wisiorek,Leah Nann,Haris Jabbar,Sahana Udupa,Hinrich Schuetze
title: Listening to Affected Communities to Define Extreme Speech: Dataset and Experiments
title_zh: 倾听受影响社区的声音来定义极端言论：数据集和实验
abstract: Building on current work on multilingual hate speech (e.g., Ousidhoum et al. (2019)) and hate speech reduction (e.g., Sap et al. (2020)), we present XTREMESPEECH, a new hate speech dataset containing 20,297 social media passages from Brazil, Germany, India and Kenya. The key novelty is that we directly involve the affected communities in collecting and annotating the data - as opposed to giving companies and governments control over defining and combatting hate speech. This inclusive approach results in datasets more representative of actually occurring online speech and is likely to facilitate the removal of the social media content that marginalized communities view as causing the most harm. Based on XTREMESPEECH, we establish novel tasks with accompanying baselines, provide evidence that cross-country training is generally not feasible due to cultural differences between countries and perform an interpretability analysis of BERT's predictions.
summary: Building on current work on multilingual hate speech (e.g., Ousidhoum et al. (2019)) and hate speech reduction (e.g., Sap et al. (2020)), we present XTREMESPEECH, a new hate speech dataset containing 20,297 social media passages from Brazil, Germany, India and Kenya. The key novelty is that we directly involve the affected communities in collecting and annotating the data - as opposed to giving companies and governments control over defining and combatting hate speech. This inclusive approach results in datasets more representative of actually occurring online speech and is likely to facilitate the removal of the social media content that marginalized communities view as causing the most harm. Based on XTREMESPEECH, we establish novel tasks with accompanying baselines, provide evidence that cross-country training is generally not feasible due to cultural differences between countries and perform an interpretability analysis of BERT's predictions.
abstract_zh: 基于当前多语言仇恨言论（例如，Ousidhoum 等人（2019））和减少仇恨言论（例如，Sap 等人（2020））的工作，我们提出了 XTREMESPEECH，这是一个新的仇恨言论数据集，包含来自巴西、德国、印度和肯尼亚的 20,297 条社交媒体段落。关键的新颖之处在于，我们直接让受影响的社区参与数据的收集和注释，而不是让公司和政府控制定义和打击仇恨言论。这种包容性方法使数据集更能代表实际发生的在线言论，并可能有助于删除边缘化社区认为造成最大伤害的社交媒体内容。基于 XTREMESPEECH，我们建立了带有基线的新任务，提供证据证明由于国家之间的文化差异，跨国训练通常不可行，并对 BERT 的预测进行可解释性分析。

AI.tldr: 构建XTREMESPEECH数据集，通过社区参与定义极端言论，并进行相关实验分析。
AI.motivation: 现有仇恨言论定义多由机构主导，缺乏社区参与，需更准确反映实际言论并减少对边缘群体的伤害。
AI.method: 与受影响社区合作收集标注数据，建立新任务及基线，分析跨国家训练可行性及BERT预测可解释性。
AI.result: 证明跨国家训练因文化差异不可行，且BERT预测具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 社区参与能生成更代表性的数据集，未来需解决文化差异及提升模型透明度。

authors_text: Cheng Zhang,Shaolin Su,Yu Zhu,Qingsen Yan,Jinqiu Sun,Yanning Zhang
title: Exploring and Evaluating Image Restoration Potential in Dynamic Scenes
title_zh: 探索和评估动态场景中的图像恢复潜力
abstract: In dynamic scenes, images often suffer from dynamic blur due to superposition of motions or low signal-noise ratio resulted from quick shutter speed when avoiding motions. Recovering sharp and clean results from the captured images heavily depends on the ability of restoration methods and the quality of the input. Although existing research on image restoration focuses on developing models for obtaining better restored results, fewer have studied to evaluate how and which input image leads to superior restored quality. In this paper, to better study an image's potential value that can be explored for restoration, we propose a novel concept, referring to image restoration potential (IRP). Specifically, We first establish a dynamic scene imaging dataset containing composite distortions and applied image restoration processes to validate the rationality of the existence to IRP. Based on this dataset, we investigate several properties of IRP and propose a novel deep model to accurately predict IRP values. By gradually distilling and selective fusing the degradation features, the proposed model shows its superiority in IRP prediction. Thanks to the proposed model, we are then able to validate how various image restoration related applications are benefited from IRP prediction. We show the potential usages of IRP as a filtering principle to select valuable frames, an auxiliary guidance to improve restoration models, and even an indicator to optimize camera settings for capturing better images under dynamic scenarios.
summary: In dynamic scenes, images often suffer from dynamic blur due to superposition of motions or low signal-noise ratio resulted from quick shutter speed when avoiding motions. Recovering sharp and clean results from the captured images heavily depends on the ability of restoration methods and the quality of the input. Although existing research on image restoration focuses on developing models for obtaining better restored results, fewer have studied to evaluate how and which input image leads to superior restored quality. In this paper, to better study an image's potential value that can be explored for restoration, we propose a novel concept, referring to image restoration potential (IRP). Specifically, We first establish a dynamic scene imaging dataset containing composite distortions and applied image restoration processes to validate the rationality of the existence to IRP. Based on this dataset, we investigate several properties of IRP and propose a novel deep model to accurately predict IRP values. By gradually distilling and selective fusing the degradation features, the proposed model shows its superiority in IRP prediction. Thanks to the proposed model, we are then able to validate how various image restoration related applications are benefited from IRP prediction. We show the potential usages of IRP as a filtering principle to select valuable frames, an auxiliary guidance to improve restoration models, and even an indicator to optimize camera settings for capturing better images under dynamic scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在动态场景中，图像经常会因运动的叠加而产生动态模糊，或者避免运动时快门速度过快导致信噪比低。从捕获的图像中恢复清晰、干净的结果在很大程度上取决于恢复方法的能力和输入的质量。尽管现有的图像恢复研究侧重于开发模型以获得更好的恢复结果，但很少有人研究评估如何以及哪些输入图像可以实现卓越的恢复质量。在本文中，为了更好地研究图像可用于恢复的潜在价值，我们提出了一个新的概念，即图像恢复潜力（IRP）。具体来说，我们首先建立一个包含复合畸变的动态场景成像数据集，并应用图像恢复过程来验证IRP存在的合理性。基于该数据集，我们研究了 IRP 的几个属性，并提出了一种新颖的深度模型来准确预测 IRP 值。通过逐步蒸馏和选择性融合退化特征，所提出的模型在IRP预测中显示出其优越性。借助所提出的模型，我们能够验证各种图像恢复相关应用程序如何从 IRP 预测中受益。我们展示了 IRP 的潜在用途，作为选择有价值帧的过滤原理、改进恢复模型的辅助指导，甚至是优化相机设置以在动态场景下捕获更好图像的指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出图像修复潜力（IRP）概念，研究动态场景中图像修复的潜力评估方法，并开发预测模型以优化修复效果。
AI.motivation: 动态场景中图像易受运动模糊和噪声影响，现有研究侧重于修复模型优化，但缺乏对输入图像修复潜力的系统评估。
AI.method: 构建包含动态失真数据集，提出深度模型通过特征蒸馏与选择性融合预测IRP值，并验证其在修复辅助、帧筛选和相机优化中的应用。
AI.result: 验证了IRP概念的合理性，模型在预测精度上优于现有方法，并展示了IRP在提升修复质量、筛选有效帧和优化拍摄参数中的实际价值。
AI.conclusion: IRP为动态场景图像修复提供了新的评估维度，可作为修复模型优化和拍摄策略调整的关键指标。

result: 验证了IRP概念的合理性，模型在预测精度上优于现有方法，并展示了IRP在提升修复质量、筛选有效帧和优化拍摄参数中的实际价值。
conclusion: IRP为动态场景图像修复提供了新的评估维度，可作为修复模型优化和拍摄策略调整的关键指标。
search_text: Exploring and Evaluating Image Restoration Potential in Dynamic Scenes 探索和评估动态场景中的图像恢复潜力 In dynamic scenes, images often suffer from dynamic blur due to superposition of motions or low signal-noise ratio resulted from quick shutter speed when avoiding motions. Recovering sharp and clean results from the captured images heavily depends on the ability of restoration methods and the quality of the input. Although existing research on image restoration focuses on developing models for obtaining better restored results, fewer have studied to evaluate how and which input image leads to superior restored quality. In this paper, to better study an image's potential value that can be explored for restoration, we propose a novel concept, referring to image restoration potential (IRP). Specifically, We first establish a dynamic scene imaging dataset containing composite distortions and applied image restoration processes to validate the rationality of the existence to IRP. Based on this dataset, we investigate several properties of IRP and propose a novel deep model to accurately predict IRP values. By gradually distilling and selective fusing the degradation features, the proposed model shows its superiority in IRP prediction. Thanks to the proposed model, we are then able to validate how various image restoration related applications are benefited from IRP prediction. We show the potential usages of IRP as a filtering principle to select valuable frames, an auxiliary guidance to improve restoration models, and even an indicator to optimize camera settings for capturing better images under dynamic scenarios. 在动态场景中，图像经常会因运动的叠加而产生动态模糊，或者避免运动时快门速度过快导致信噪比低。从捕获的图像中恢复清晰、干净的结果在很大程度上取决于恢复方法的能力和输入的质量。尽管现有的图像恢复研究侧重于开发模型以获得更好的恢复结果，但很少有人研究评估如何以及哪些输入图像可以实现卓越的恢复质量。在本文中，为了更好地研究图像可用于恢复的潜在价值，我们提出了一个新的概念，即图像恢复潜力（IRP）。具体来说，我们首先建立一个包含复合畸变的动态场景成像数据集，并应用图像恢复过程来验证IRP存在的合理性。基于该数据集，我们研究了 IRP 的几个属性，并提出了一种新颖的深度模型来准确预测 IRP 值。通过逐步蒸馏和选择性融合退化特征，所提出的模型在IRP预测中显示出其优越性。借助所提出的模型，我们能够验证各种图像恢复相关应用程序如何从 IRP 预测中受益。我们展示了 IRP 的潜在用途，作为选择有价值帧的过滤原理、改进恢复模型的辅助指导，甚至是优化相机设置以在动态场景下捕获更好图像的指标。 本文提出图像修复潜力（IRP）概念，研究动态场景中图像修复的潜力评估方法，并开发预测模型以优化修复效果。 Cheng Zhang,Shaolin Su,Yu Zhu,Qingsen Yan,Jinqiu Sun,Yanning Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Liang Gao,Huazhu Fu,Li Li,Yingwen Chen,Ming Xu,Cheng-Zhong Xu
title: FedDC: Federated Learning with Non-IID Data via Local Drift Decoupling and Correction
title_zh: FedDC：通过局部漂移解耦和校正使用非独立同分布数据进行联邦学习
comment: 28 pages, 13 figures, to be published in CVPR2022
comments: 28 pages, 13 figures, to be published in CVPR2022
abstract: Federated learning (FL) allows multiple clients to collectively train a high-performance global model without sharing their private data. However, the key challenge in federated learning is that the clients have significant statistical heterogeneity among their local data distributions, which would cause inconsistent optimized local models on the client-side. To address this fundamental dilemma, we propose a novel federated learning algorithm with local drift decoupling and correction (FedDC). Our FedDC only introduces lightweight modifications in the local training phase, in which each client utilizes an auxiliary local drift variable to track the gap between the local model parameter and the global model parameters. The key idea of FedDC is to utilize this learned local drift variable to bridge the gap, i.e., conducting consistency in parameter-level. The experiment results and analysis demonstrate that FedDC yields expediting convergence and better performance on various image classification tasks, robust in partial participation settings, non-iid data, and heterogeneous clients.
summary: Federated learning (FL) allows multiple clients to collectively train a high-performance global model without sharing their private data. However, the key challenge in federated learning is that the clients have significant statistical heterogeneity among their local data distributions, which would cause inconsistent optimized local models on the client-side. To address this fundamental dilemma, we propose a novel federated learning algorithm with local drift decoupling and correction (FedDC). Our FedDC only introduces lightweight modifications in the local training phase, in which each client utilizes an auxiliary local drift variable to track the gap between the local model parameter and the global model parameters. The key idea of FedDC is to utilize this learned local drift variable to bridge the gap, i.e., conducting consistency in parameter-level. The experiment results and analysis demonstrate that FedDC yields expediting convergence and better performance on various image classification tasks, robust in partial participation settings, non-iid data, and heterogeneous clients.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 允许多个客户共同训练高性能全局模型，而无需共享其私有数据。然而，联邦学习的关键挑战是客户端的本地数据分布具有显着的统计异质性，这会导致客户端优化的本地模型不一致。为了解决这一基本困境，我们提出了一种具有局部漂移解耦和校正功能的新型联邦学习算法（FedDC）。我们的FedDC仅在本地训练阶段引入轻量级修改，其中每个客户端利用辅助本地漂移变量来跟踪本地模型参数和全局模型参数之间的差距。 FedDC 的关键思想是利用这种学习到的局部漂移变量来弥补差距，即在参数级别上进行一致性。实验结果和分析表明，FedDC 在各种图像分类任务上具有加速收敛和更好的性能，在部分参与设置、非独立同分布数据和异构客户端方面具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FedDC的联邦学习算法，通过本地漂移解耦与校正解决非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据下的模型训练问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中客户端数据分布异质性导致本地模型优化不一致，现有方法难以有效应对Non-IID数据带来的挑战。
AI.method: FedDC在本地训练阶段引入轻量级修改，利用辅助本地漂移变量追踪本地模型与全局模型参数差距，并通过参数级一致性校正弥补差异。
AI.result: 实验表明FedDC在图像分类任务中收敛速度更快、性能更优，且在部分参与、Non-IID数据及异构客户端环境下具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: FedDC通过参数级一致性校正有效缓解Non-IID数据问题，在多种联邦学习场景中表现出色。

search_text: FedDC: Federated Learning with Non-IID Data via Local Drift Decoupling and Correction FedDC：通过局部漂移解耦和校正使用非独立同分布数据进行联邦学习 Federated learning (FL) allows multiple clients to collectively train a high-performance global model without sharing their private data. However, the key challenge in federated learning is that the clients have significant statistical heterogeneity among their local data distributions, which would cause inconsistent optimized local models on the client-side. To address this fundamental dilemma, we propose a novel federated learning algorithm with local drift decoupling and correction (FedDC). Our FedDC only introduces lightweight modifications in the local training phase, in which each client utilizes an auxiliary local drift variable to track the gap between the local model parameter and the global model parameters. The key idea of FedDC is to utilize this learned local drift variable to bridge the gap, i.e., conducting consistency in parameter-level. The experiment results and analysis demonstrate that FedDC yields expediting convergence and better performance on various image classification tasks, robust in partial participation settings, non-iid data, and heterogeneous clients. 联邦学习 (FL) 允许多个客户共同训练高性能全局模型，而无需共享其私有数据。然而，联邦学习的关键挑战是客户端的本地数据分布具有显着的统计异质性，这会导致客户端优化的本地模型不一致。为了解决这一基本困境，我们提出了一种具有局部漂移解耦和校正功能的新型联邦学习算法（FedDC）。我们的FedDC仅在本地训练阶段引入轻量级修改，其中每个客户端利用辅助本地漂移变量来跟踪本地模型参数和全局模型参数之间的差距。 FedDC 的关键思想是利用这种学习到的局部漂移变量来弥补差距，即在参数级别上进行一致性。实验结果和分析表明，FedDC 在各种图像分类任务上具有加速收敛和更好的性能，在部分参与设置、非独立同分布数据和异构客户端方面具有鲁棒性。 本文提出一种名为FedDC的联邦学习算法，通过本地漂移解耦与校正解决非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据下的模型训练问题。 Liang Gao,Huazhu Fu,Li Li,Yingwen Chen,Ming Xu,Cheng-Zhong Xu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Joshua Andle,Nicholas Soucy,Simon Socolow,Salimeh Yasaei Sekeh
title: The Stanford Drone Dataset is More Complex than We Think: An Analysis of Key Characteristics
title_zh: 斯坦福无人机数据集比我们想象的更复杂：关键特征分析
abstract: Several datasets exist which contain annotated information of individuals' trajectories. Such datasets are vital for many real-world applications, including trajectory prediction and autonomous navigation. One prominent dataset currently in use is the Stanford Drone Dataset (SDD). Despite its prominence, discussion surrounding the characteristics of this dataset is insufficient. We demonstrate how this insufficiency reduces the information available to users and can impact performance. Our contributions include the outlining of key characteristics in the SDD, employment of an information-theoretic measure and custom metric to clearly visualize those characteristics, the implementation of the PECNet and Y-Net trajectory prediction models to demonstrate the outlined characteristics' impact on predictive performance, and lastly we provide a comparison between the SDD and Intersection Drone (inD) Dataset. Our analysis of the SDD's key characteristics is important because without adequate information about available datasets a user's ability to select the most suitable dataset for their methods, to reproduce one another's results, and to interpret their own results are hindered. The observations we make through this analysis provide a readily accessible and interpretable source of information for those planning to use the SDD. Our intention is to increase the performance and reproducibility of methods applied to this dataset going forward, while also clearly detailing less obvious features of the dataset for new users.
summary: Several datasets exist which contain annotated information of individuals' trajectories. Such datasets are vital for many real-world applications, including trajectory prediction and autonomous navigation. One prominent dataset currently in use is the Stanford Drone Dataset (SDD). Despite its prominence, discussion surrounding the characteristics of this dataset is insufficient. We demonstrate how this insufficiency reduces the information available to users and can impact performance. Our contributions include the outlining of key characteristics in the SDD, employment of an information-theoretic measure and custom metric to clearly visualize those characteristics, the implementation of the PECNet and Y-Net trajectory prediction models to demonstrate the outlined characteristics' impact on predictive performance, and lastly we provide a comparison between the SDD and Intersection Drone (inD) Dataset. Our analysis of the SDD's key characteristics is important because without adequate information about available datasets a user's ability to select the most suitable dataset for their methods, to reproduce one another's results, and to interpret their own results are hindered. The observations we make through this analysis provide a readily accessible and interpretable source of information for those planning to use the SDD. Our intention is to increase the performance and reproducibility of methods applied to this dataset going forward, while also clearly detailing less obvious features of the dataset for new users.
abstract_zh: 存在多个数据集，其中包含个人轨迹的注释信息。此类数据集对于许多现实应用至关重要，包括轨迹预测和自主导航。目前使用的一个重要数据集是斯坦福无人机数据集 (SDD)。尽管它很突出，但围绕该数据集特征的讨论还不够。我们演示了这种不足如何减少用户可用的信息并影响性能。我们的贡献包括概述 SDD 中的关键特征、采用信息论测量和自定义指标来清晰地可视化这些特征、实施 PECNet 和 Y-Net 轨迹预测模型以证明概述的特征对预测性能的影响，最后我们提供 SDD 和交叉口无人机 (inD) 数据集之间的比较。我们对 SDD 关键特征的分析非常重要，因为如果没有关于可用数据集的足够信息，用户为其方法选择最合适的数据集、重现彼此的结果以及解释自己的结果的能力就会受到阻碍。我们通过此分析得出的观察结果为那些计划使用 SDD 的人提供了易于访问和解释的信息来源。我们的目的是提高未来应用于该数据集的方法的性能和可重复性，同时还为新用户清楚地详细介绍该数据集的不太明显的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了斯坦福无人机数据集（SDD）的关键特性，并探讨这些特性对轨迹预测模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有对SDD数据集特性的讨论不足，导致用户难以选择合适数据集、复现结果或解释自身结果，因此需提供更详细的分析以提升性能与可复现性。
AI.method: 采用信息论指标和自定义度量可视化数据集特性，实施PECNet和Y-Net轨迹预测模型验证特性影响，并与Intersection Drone（inD）数据集进行对比。
AI.result: 揭示了SDD数据集的复杂特性及其对预测模型性能的影响，同时通过对比突显了SDD与inD数据集的差异。
AI.conclusion: 详细分析数据集特性可帮助用户更合理选择数据集并提升方法性能，同时为新用户提供更易理解的参考信息。

authors_text: Jun-Bo Tao,Bai-Qing Sun,Wei-Dong Zhu,Shi-You Qu,Jia-Qiang Li,Guo-Qi Li,Yan-Yan Wang,Ling-Kun Chen,Chong Wu,Yu Xiong,Jiaxuan Zhou
title: The Deep Learning model of Higher-Lower-Order Cognition, Memory, and Affection- More General Than KAN
title_zh: 高低阶认知、记忆和情感的深度学习模型——比 KAN 更通用
abstract: We firstly simulated disease dynamics by KAN (Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks) nearly 4 years ago, but the kernel functions in the edge include the exponential number of infected and discharged people and is also in line with the Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem, and the shared weights in the edge are the infection rate and cure rate, and used activation function by tanh at the node of edge. And this Arxiv preprint version 1 of March 2022 is an upgraded version of KAN, considering the invariant coarse-grained which calculated by residual or gradient of MSE loss. The improved KAN is PNN (Plasticity Neural Networks) or ELKAN (Edge Learning KNN), in addition to edge learning, it also considered the trimming of the edge. We not inspired by the Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem but inspired by the brain science. The ELKAN to explain brain, the variables correspond to different types of neurons, the learning edge can be explained by rebalance of synaptic strength and glial cells phagocytose synapses, and the kernel function means the discharge of neurons and synapses, different neurons and edges mean brain regions. Through testing by cosine, the ELKAN or ORPNN (Optimized Range PNN) is better than the KAN or CRPNN (Constant Range PNN).The ELKAN is more general to explore brain, such as mechanism of consciousness, interactions of natural frequencies in brain regions, synaptic and neuronal discharge frequencies, and data signal frequencies; mechanism of Alzheimer's disease, the Alzheimer's patients has more high frequencies in the upstream brain regions; long short-term relatively good and inferior memory which means gradient of architecture and architecture; turbulent energy flow in different brain regions, turbulence critical conditions need to be met; heart-brain of the quantum entanglement may occur between the emotions of heartbeat and the synaptic strength of brain potentials.
summary: We firstly simulated disease dynamics by KAN (Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks) nearly 4 years ago, but the kernel functions in the edge include the exponential number of infected and discharged people and is also in line with the Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem, and the shared weights in the edge are the infection rate and cure rate, and used activation function by tanh at the node of edge. And this Arxiv preprint version 1 of March 2022 is an upgraded version of KAN, considering the invariant coarse-grained which calculated by residual or gradient of MSE loss. The improved KAN is PNN (Plasticity Neural Networks) or ELKAN (Edge Learning KNN), in addition to edge learning, it also considered the trimming of the edge. We not inspired by the Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem but inspired by the brain science. The ELKAN to explain brain, the variables correspond to different types of neurons, the learning edge can be explained by rebalance of synaptic strength and glial cells phagocytose synapses, and the kernel function means the discharge of neurons and synapses, different neurons and edges mean brain regions. Through testing by cosine, the ELKAN or ORPNN (Optimized Range PNN) is better than the KAN or CRPNN (Constant Range PNN).The ELKAN is more general to explore brain, such as mechanism of consciousness, interactions of natural frequencies in brain regions, synaptic and neuronal discharge frequencies, and data signal frequencies; mechanism of Alzheimer's disease, the Alzheimer's patients has more high frequencies in the upstream brain regions; long short-term relatively good and inferior memory which means gradient of architecture and architecture; turbulent energy flow in different brain regions, turbulence critical conditions need to be met; heart-brain of the quantum entanglement may occur between the emotions of heartbeat and the synaptic strength of brain potentials.
abstract_zh: 我们在近4年前首次使用KAN（Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks）模拟疾病动态，但边缘的核函数包括感染者和出院人数的指数数，也符合Kolmogorov-Arnold表示定理，边缘的共享权重是感染率和治愈率，并在边缘节点使用tanh激活函数。而2022年3月的Arxiv预印本第1版是KAN的升级版本，考虑了通过MSE损失的残差或梯度计算的不变粗粒度。改进后的KAN是PNN（Plasticity Neural Networks）或者ELKAN（Edge Learning KNN），除了边缘学习之外，还考虑了边缘的修剪。我们不是受到柯尔莫哥洛夫-阿诺德表示定理的启发，而是受到脑科学的启发。解释大脑的ELKAN，变量对应不同类型的神经元，学习边缘可以通过突触强度的重新平衡和胶质细胞吞噬突触来解释，核函数意味着神经元和突触的放电，不同的神经元和边缘意味着大脑区域。通过余弦测试，ELKAN或ORPNN（Optimized Range PNN）优于KAN或CRPNN（Constant Range PNN）。ELKAN对大脑的探索更通用，如意识机制、脑区自然频率的相互作用、突触和神经元放电频率、数据信号频率等；阿尔茨海默病的发病机制，阿尔茨海默病患者的上游脑区频率较高；长短期记忆相对较好和较差，这意味着建筑与建筑的梯度；不同脑区的能量湍流流动，需要满足湍流临界条件；心脑的量子纠缠可能发生在心跳的情绪和大脑电位的突触强度之间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于脑科学的深度学习模型ELKAN，通过改进KAN网络结构，模拟大脑认知、记忆及情感机制，并探索其在疾病和意识研究中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统KAN模型在疾病动态模拟中存在局限，需结合脑科学原理构建更通用的神经网络框架，以解释大脑复杂功能及病理机制。
AI.method: 升级KAN为ELKAN/PLNN，引入边学习与修剪机制，以神经元放电、突触强度调节及胶质细胞吞噬为灵感，结合残差/梯度计算不变粗粒度，并通过余弦测试验证性能。
AI.result: ELKAN/ORPNN在测试中优于KAN/CRPNN，可解释阿尔茨海默病高频特征、意识机制、脑区湍流能量流动及心脑量子纠缠等现象。
AI.conclusion: ELKAN模型为研究大脑认知机制、疾病病理及跨学科问题（如心脑关联）提供了更普适的理论框架与计算工具。

authors_text: Jinze Chen,Yang Wang,Yang Cao,Feng Wu,Zheng-Jun Zha
title: ProgressiveMotionSeg: Mutually Reinforced Framework for Event-Based Motion Segmentation
title_zh: ProgressiveMotionSeg：基于事件的运动分割的相互增强框架
abstract: Dynamic Vision Sensor (DVS) can asynchronously output the events reflecting apparent motion of objects with microsecond resolution, and shows great application potential in monitoring and other fields. However, the output event stream of existing DVS inevitably contains background activity noise (BA noise) due to dark current and junction leakage current, which will affect the temporal correlation of objects, resulting in deteriorated motion estimation performance. Particularly, the existing filter-based denoising methods cannot be directly applied to suppress the noise in event stream, since there is no spatial correlation. To address this issue, this paper presents a novel progressive framework, in which a Motion Estimation (ME) module and an Event Denoising (ED) module are jointly optimized in a mutually reinforced manner. Specifically, based on the maximum sharpness criterion, ME module divides the input event into several segments by adaptive clustering in a motion compensating warp field, and captures the temporal correlation of event stream according to the clustered motion parameters. Taking temporal correlation as guidance, ED module calculates the confidence that each event belongs to real activity events, and transmits it to ME module to update energy function of motion segmentation for noise suppression. The two steps are iteratively updated until stable motion segmentation results are obtained. Extensive experimental results on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed approaches against the State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) methods.
summary: Dynamic Vision Sensor (DVS) can asynchronously output the events reflecting apparent motion of objects with microsecond resolution, and shows great application potential in monitoring and other fields. However, the output event stream of existing DVS inevitably contains background activity noise (BA noise) due to dark current and junction leakage current, which will affect the temporal correlation of objects, resulting in deteriorated motion estimation performance. Particularly, the existing filter-based denoising methods cannot be directly applied to suppress the noise in event stream, since there is no spatial correlation. To address this issue, this paper presents a novel progressive framework, in which a Motion Estimation (ME) module and an Event Denoising (ED) module are jointly optimized in a mutually reinforced manner. Specifically, based on the maximum sharpness criterion, ME module divides the input event into several segments by adaptive clustering in a motion compensating warp field, and captures the temporal correlation of event stream according to the clustered motion parameters. Taking temporal correlation as guidance, ED module calculates the confidence that each event belongs to real activity events, and transmits it to ME module to update energy function of motion segmentation for noise suppression. The two steps are iteratively updated until stable motion segmentation results are obtained. Extensive experimental results on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed approaches against the State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) methods.
abstract_zh: 动态视觉传感器（DVS）能够以微秒级分辨率异步输出反映物体视在运动的事件，在监控等领域显示出巨大的应用潜力。然而，现有DVS的输出事件流不可避免地包含由于暗电流和结漏电流而导致的背景活动噪声（BA噪声），这会影响对象的时间相关性，导致运动估计性能恶化。 Particularly, the existing filter-based denoising methods cannot be directly applied to suppress the noise in event stream, since there is no spatial correlation. To address this issue, this paper presents a novel progressive framework, in which a Motion Estimation (ME) module and an Event Denoising (ED) module are jointly optimized in a mutually reinforced manner.具体地，基于最大锐度标准，ME模块通过运动补偿扭曲场中的自适应聚类将输入事件划分为多个片段，并根据聚类的运动参数捕获事件流的时间相关性。以时间相关性为指导，ED模块计算每个事件属于真实活动事件的置信度，并将其传输到ME模块以更新运动分割的能量函数以抑制噪声。 The two steps are iteratively updated until stable motion segmentation results are obtained. Extensive experimental results on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed approaches against the State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种渐进式相互强化框架ProgressiveMotionSeg，用于解决事件相机中的运动分割问题，通过联合优化运动估计和事件去噪模块以抑制背景噪声。
AI.motivation: 现有动态视觉传感器（DVS）输出的事件流受背景活动噪声影响，导致运动估计性能下降，而传统滤波去噪方法因缺乏空间相关性无法直接应用。
AI.method: 设计包含运动估计（ME）模块和事件去噪（ED）模块的相互强化框架：ME模块基于最大锐度准则进行自适应聚类分割，ED模块利用时间相关性计算事件置信度并反馈更新运动分割能量函数，通过迭代优化实现噪声抑制。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法在运动分割性能上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过运动估计与事件去噪模块的联合优化，所提框架有效提升了事件相机运动分割的鲁棒性与准确性。

Taking temporal correlation as guidance, ED module calculates the confidence that each event belongs to real activity events, and transmits it to ME module to update energy function of motion segmentation for noise suppression. The two steps are iteratively updated until stable motion segmentation results are obtained. Extensive experimental results on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed approaches against the State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) methods. 动态视觉传感器（DVS）能够以微秒级分辨率异步输出反映物体视在运动的事件，在监控等领域显示出巨大的应用潜力。然而，现有DVS的输出事件流不可避免地包含由于暗电流和结漏电流而导致的背景活动噪声（BA噪声），这会影响对象的时间相关性，导致运动估计性能恶化。 Particularly, the existing filter-based denoising methods cannot be directly applied to suppress the noise in event stream, since there is no spatial correlation. To address this issue, this paper presents a novel progressive framework, in which a Motion Estimation (ME) module and an Event Denoising (ED) module are jointly optimized in a mutually reinforced manner.具体地，基于最大锐度标准，ME模块通过运动补偿扭曲场中的自适应聚类将输入事件划分为多个片段，并根据聚类的运动参数捕获事件流的时间相关性。以时间相关性为指导，ED模块计算每个事件属于真实活动事件的置信度，并将其传输到ME模块以更新运动分割的能量函数以抑制噪声。 The two steps are iteratively updated until stable motion segmentation results are obtained. Extensive experimental results on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed approaches against the State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) methods. 本文提出一种渐进式相互强化框架ProgressiveMotionSeg，用于解决事件相机中的运动分割问题，通过联合优化运动估计和事件去噪模块以抑制背景噪声。 Jinze Chen,Yang Wang,Yang Cao,Feng Wu,Zheng-Jun Zha cs.CV

authors_text: Esther Puyol-Antón,Bram Ruijsink,Baldeep S. Sidhu,Justin Gould,Bradley Porter,Mark K. Elliott,Vishal Mehta,Haotian Gu,Miguel Xochicale,Alberto Gomez,Christopher A. Rinaldi,Martin Cowie,Phil Chowienczyk,Reza Razavi,Andrew P. King
title: AI-enabled Assessment of Cardiac Systolic and Diastolic Function from Echocardiography
title_zh: 基于人工智能的超声心动图心脏收缩和舒张功能评估
abstract: Left ventricular (LV) function is an important factor in terms of patient management, outcome, and long-term survival of patients with heart disease. The most recently published clinical guidelines for heart failure recognise that over reliance on only one measure of cardiac function (LV ejection fraction) as a diagnostic and treatment stratification biomarker is suboptimal. Recent advances in AI-based echocardiography analysis have shown excellent results on automated estimation of LV volumes and LV ejection fraction. However, from time-varying 2-D echocardiography acquisition, a richer description of cardiac function can be obtained by estimating functional biomarkers from the complete cardiac cycle. In this work we propose for the first time an AI approach for deriving advanced biomarkers of systolic and diastolic LV function from 2-D echocardiography based on segmentations of the full cardiac cycle. These biomarkers will allow clinicians to obtain a much richer picture of the heart in health and disease. The AI model is based on the 'nn-Unet' framework and was trained and tested using four different databases. Results show excellent agreement between manual and automated analysis and showcase the potential of the advanced systolic and diastolic biomarkers for patient stratification. Finally, for a subset of 50 cases, we perform a correlation analysis between clinical biomarkers derived from echocardiography and CMR and we show excellent agreement between the two modalities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于AI的方法，通过2D超声心动图的全周期分割，首次生成先进的左心室收缩和舒张功能生物标志物。
AI.motivation: 当前仅依赖左室射血分数（LVEF）作为心脏功能评估指标存在局限性，需更全面的生物标志物以优化心力衰竭患者的诊断和治疗分层。
AI.method: 基于'nn-Unet'框架构建AI模型，利用四个数据库进行训练和测试，并对50例病例进行超声心动图与心脏磁共振（CMR）临床生物标志物的相关性分析。
AI.result: 自动化分析与手动分析结果高度一致，且超声心动图与CMR生物标志物间表现出优异的相关性，验证了先进收缩/舒张生物标志物的临床潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该AI方法可为临床提供更丰富的左心室功能评估指标，提升健康与疾病状态下心脏功能的解析能力，且超声心动图与CMR在生物标志物上具有良好的一致性。

authors_text: Yu Tian,Guansong Pang,Yuyuan Liu,Chong Wang,Yuanhong Chen,Fengbei Liu,Rajvinder Singh,Johan W Verjans,Mengyu Wang,Gustavo Carneiro
title: Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Medical Images with a Memory-augmented Multi-level Cross-attentional Masked Autoencoder
title_zh: 使用记忆增强多级交叉注意屏蔽自动编码器对医学图像进行无监督异常检测
abstract: Unsupervised anomaly detection (UAD) aims to find anomalous images by optimising a detector using a training set that contains only normal images. UAD approaches can be based on reconstruction methods, self-supervised approaches, and Imagenet pre-trained models. Reconstruction methods, which detect anomalies from image reconstruction errors, are advantageous because they do not rely on the design of problem-specific pretext tasks needed by self-supervised approaches, and on the unreliable translation of models pre-trained from non-medical datasets. However, reconstruction methods may fail because they can have low reconstruction errors even for anomalous images. In this paper, we introduce a new reconstruction-based UAD approach that addresses this low-reconstruction error issue for anomalous images. Our UAD approach, the memory-augmented multi-level cross-attentional masked autoencoder (MemMC-MAE), is a transformer-based approach, consisting of a novel memory-augmented self-attention operator for the encoder and a new multi-level cross-attention operator for the decoder. MemMCMAE masks large parts of the input image during its reconstruction, reducing the risk that it will produce low reconstruction errors because anomalies are likely to be masked and cannot be reconstructed. However, when the anomaly is not masked, then the normal patterns stored in the encoder's memory combined with the decoder's multi-level cross attention will constrain the accurate reconstruction of the anomaly. We show that our method achieves SOTA anomaly detection and localisation on colonoscopy, pneumonia, and covid-19 chest x-ray datasets.
summary: Unsupervised anomaly detection (UAD) aims to find anomalous images by optimising a detector using a training set that contains only normal images. UAD approaches can be based on reconstruction methods, self-supervised approaches, and Imagenet pre-trained models. Reconstruction methods, which detect anomalies from image reconstruction errors, are advantageous because they do not rely on the design of problem-specific pretext tasks needed by self-supervised approaches, and on the unreliable translation of models pre-trained from non-medical datasets. However, reconstruction methods may fail because they can have low reconstruction errors even for anomalous images. In this paper, we introduce a new reconstruction-based UAD approach that addresses this low-reconstruction error issue for anomalous images. Our UAD approach, the memory-augmented multi-level cross-attentional masked autoencoder (MemMC-MAE), is a transformer-based approach, consisting of a novel memory-augmented self-attention operator for the encoder and a new multi-level cross-attention operator for the decoder. MemMCMAE masks large parts of the input image during its reconstruction, reducing the risk that it will produce low reconstruction errors because anomalies are likely to be masked and cannot be reconstructed. However, when the anomaly is not masked, then the normal patterns stored in the encoder's memory combined with the decoder's multi-level cross attention will constrain the accurate reconstruction of the anomaly. We show that our method achieves SOTA anomaly detection and localisation on colonoscopy, pneumonia, and covid-19 chest x-ray datasets.
abstract_zh: 无监督异常检测 (UAD) 旨在通过使用仅包含正常图像的训练集优化检测器来查找异常图像。 UAD 方法可以基于重建方法、自监督方法和 Imagenet 预训练模型。从图像重建错误中检测异常的重建方法是有利的，因为它们不依赖于自监督方法所需的特定问题借口任务的设计，也不依赖于从非医学数据集预训练的模型的不可靠转换。然而，重建方法可能会失败，因为即使对于异常图像，它们的重建误差也很低。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新的基于重建的 UAD 方法，该方法可以解决异常图像的低重建误差问题。我们的UAD方法，记忆增强多级交叉注意掩码自动编码器（MemMC-MAE），是一种基于变压器的方法，由用于编码器的新型记忆增强自注意算子和用于解码器的新多级交叉注意算子组成。 MemMCMAE 在重建过程中掩盖了输入图像的大部分，从而降低了产生低重建误差的风险，因为异常可能被掩盖并且无法重建。然而，当异常未被屏蔽时，存储在编码器存储器中的正常模式与解码器的多级交叉注意相结合将限制异常的准确重建。我们表明，我们的方法在结肠镜检查、肺炎和 covid-19 胸部 X 射线数据集上实现了 SOTA 异常检测和定位。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于记忆增强的多级交叉注意力掩码自编码器（MemMC-MAE），用于解决医学图像中无监督异常检测的低重建误差问题。
AI.motivation: 传统重建方法在异常图像上可能产生低重建误差，导致检测失败，而自监督方法依赖特定任务设计且医学预训练模型可靠性不足。
AI.method: 设计记忆增强的编码器自注意力机制与多级交叉注意力解码器，通过大规模掩码输入图像并结合记忆中的正常模式约束异常区域重建。
AI.result: 在结肠镜、肺炎和新冠肺炎胸部X光数据集上实现异常检测与定位的最先进性能（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: MemMC-MAE通过掩码策略与记忆约束机制有效解决了异常图像低重建误差问题，提升了医学图像无监督异常检测的准确性。

MemMCMAE masks large parts of the input image during its reconstruction, reducing the risk that it will produce low reconstruction errors because anomalies are likely to be masked and cannot be reconstructed. However, when the anomaly is not masked, then the normal patterns stored in the encoder's memory combined with the decoder's multi-level cross attention will constrain the accurate reconstruction of the anomaly. We show that our method achieves SOTA anomaly detection and localisation on colonoscopy, pneumonia, and covid-19 chest x-ray datasets. 无监督异常检测 (UAD) 旨在通过使用仅包含正常图像的训练集优化检测器来查找异常图像。 UAD 方法可以基于重建方法、自监督方法和 Imagenet 预训练模型。从图像重建错误中检测异常的重建方法是有利的，因为它们不依赖于自监督方法所需的特定问题借口任务的设计，也不依赖于从非医学数据集预训练的模型的不可靠转换。然而，重建方法可能会失败，因为即使对于异常图像，它们的重建误差也很低。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新的基于重建的 UAD 方法，该方法可以解决异常图像的低重建误差问题。我们的UAD方法，记忆增强多级交叉注意掩码自动编码器（MemMC-MAE），是一种基于变压器的方法，由用于编码器的新型记忆增强自注意算子和用于解码器的新多级交叉注意算子组成。 MemMCMAE 在重建过程中掩盖了输入图像的大部分，从而降低了产生低重建误差的风险，因为异常可能被掩盖并且无法重建。然而，当异常未被屏蔽时，存储在编码器存储器中的正常模式与解码器的多级交叉注意相结合将限制异常的准确重建。我们表明，我们的方法在结肠镜检查、肺炎和 covid-19 胸部 X 射线数据集上实现了 SOTA 异常检测和定位。 本文提出一种基于记忆增强的多级交叉注意力掩码自编码器（MemMC-MAE），用于解决医学图像中无监督异常检测的低重建误差问题。 Yu Tian,Guansong Pang,Yuyuan Liu,Chong Wang,Yuanhong Chen,Fengbei Liu,Rajvinder Singh,Johan W Verjans,Mengyu Wang,Gustavo Carneiro eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Gargi Joshi,Ananya Srivastava,Bhargav Yagnik,Mohammed Hasan,Zainuddin Saiyed,Lubna A Gabralla,Ajith Abraham,Rahee Walambe,Ketan Kotecha
title: Explainable Misinformation Detection Across Multiple Social Media Platforms
title_zh: 跨多个社交媒体平台的可解释错误信息检测
abstract: In this work, the integration of two machine learning approaches, namely domain adaptation and explainable AI, is proposed to address these two issues of generalized detection and explainability. Firstly the Domain Adversarial Neural Network (DANN) develops a generalized misinformation detector across multiple social media platforms DANN is employed to generate the classification results for test domains with relevant but unseen data. The DANN-based model, a traditional black-box model, cannot justify its outcome, i.e., the labels for the target domain. Hence a Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations (LIME) explainable AI model is applied to explain the outcome of the DANN mode. To demonstrate these two approaches and their integration for effective explainable generalized detection, COVID-19 misinformation is considered a case study. We experimented with two datasets, namely CoAID and MiSoVac, and compared results with and without DANN implementation. DANN significantly improves the accuracy measure F1 classification score and increases the accuracy and AUC performance. The results obtained show that the proposed framework performs well in the case of domain shift and can learn domain-invariant features while explaining the target labels with LIME implementation enabling trustworthy information processing and extraction to combat misinformation effectively.
summary: In this work, the integration of two machine learning approaches, namely domain adaptation and explainable AI, is proposed to address these two issues of generalized detection and explainability. Firstly the Domain Adversarial Neural Network (DANN) develops a generalized misinformation detector across multiple social media platforms DANN is employed to generate the classification results for test domains with relevant but unseen data. The DANN-based model, a traditional black-box model, cannot justify its outcome, i.e., the labels for the target domain. Hence a Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations (LIME) explainable AI model is applied to explain the outcome of the DANN mode. To demonstrate these two approaches and their integration for effective explainable generalized detection, COVID-19 misinformation is considered a case study. We experimented with two datasets, namely CoAID and MiSoVac, and compared results with and without DANN implementation. DANN significantly improves the accuracy measure F1 classification score and increases the accuracy and AUC performance. The results obtained show that the proposed framework performs well in the case of domain shift and can learn domain-invariant features while explaining the target labels with LIME implementation enabling trustworthy information processing and extraction to combat misinformation effectively.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，提出了两种机器学习方法（即领域适应和可解释人工智能）的集成，以解决广义检测和可解释性这两个问题。首先，领域对抗神经网络（DANN）开发了一种跨多个社交媒体平台的通用错误信息检测器，DANN 用于为具有相关但未见数据的测试领域生成分类结果。 The DANN-based model, a traditional black-box model, cannot justify its outcome, i.e., the labels for the target domain. Hence a Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations (LIME) explainable AI model is applied to explain the outcome of the DANN mode.为了演示这两种方法及其集成以实现有效的可解释的广义检测，我们将 COVID-19 错误信息视为案例研究。我们对两个数据集（即 CoAID 和 MiSoVac）进行了实验，并比较了实施和未实施 DANN 的结果。 DANN significantly improves the accuracy measure F1 classification score and increases the accuracy and AUC performance.获得的结果表明，所提出的框架在域转移的情况下表现良好，并且可以学习域不变特征，同时通过 LIME 实现解释目标标签，从而实现可信的信息处理和提取，从而有效地打击错误信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合领域自适应与可解释AI技术，实现跨社交媒体平台的虚假信息检测。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假信息检测模型在跨平台场景下泛化能力不足且缺乏可解释性，导致检测结果可信度低。
AI.method: 采用领域对抗神经网络(DANN)实现跨平台特征学习，并通过LIME模型对检测结果进行可解释性分析。
AI.result: DANN显著提升F1分数、准确率和AUC指标，实验表明框架在领域迁移场景下有效且具备可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合领域自适应与可解释AI技术，为跨平台虚假信息检测提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Rodrigo de Barros Vimieiro,Chuang Niu,Hongming Shan,Lucas Rodrigues Borges,Ge Wang,Marcelo Andrade da Costa Vieira
title: Convolutional Neural Network to Restore Low-Dose Digital Breast Tomosynthesis Projections in a Variance Stabilization Domain
title_zh: 卷积神经网络在方差稳定域中恢复低剂量数字乳房断层合成投影
abstract: Digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) exams should utilize the lowest possible radiation dose while maintaining sufficiently good image quality for accurate medical diagnosis. In this work, we propose a convolution neural network (CNN) to restore low-dose (LD) DBT projections to achieve an image quality equivalent to a standard full-dose (FD) acquisition. The proposed network architecture benefits from priors in terms of layers that were inspired by traditional model-based (MB) restoration methods, considering a model-based deep learning approach, where the network is trained to operate in the variance stabilization transformation (VST) domain. To accurately control the network operation point, in terms of noise and blur of the restored image, we propose a loss function that minimizes the bias and matches residual noise between the input and the output. The training dataset was composed of clinical data acquired at the standard FD and low-dose pairs obtained by the injection of quantum noise. The network was tested using real DBT projections acquired with a physical anthropomorphic breast phantom. The proposed network achieved superior results in terms of the mean normalized squared error (MNSE), training time and noise spatial correlation compared with networks trained with traditional data-driven methods. The proposed approach can be extended for other medical imaging application that requires LD acquisitions.
summary: Digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) exams should utilize the lowest possible radiation dose while maintaining sufficiently good image quality for accurate medical diagnosis. In this work, we propose a convolution neural network (CNN) to restore low-dose (LD) DBT projections to achieve an image quality equivalent to a standard full-dose (FD) acquisition. The proposed network architecture benefits from priors in terms of layers that were inspired by traditional model-based (MB) restoration methods, considering a model-based deep learning approach, where the network is trained to operate in the variance stabilization transformation (VST) domain. To accurately control the network operation point, in terms of noise and blur of the restored image, we propose a loss function that minimizes the bias and matches residual noise between the input and the output. The training dataset was composed of clinical data acquired at the standard FD and low-dose pairs obtained by the injection of quantum noise. The network was tested using real DBT projections acquired with a physical anthropomorphic breast phantom. The proposed network achieved superior results in terms of the mean normalized squared error (MNSE), training time and noise spatial correlation compared with networks trained with traditional data-driven methods. The proposed approach can be extended for other medical imaging application that requires LD acquisitions.
abstract_zh: 数字乳腺断层合成 (DBT) 检查应使用尽可能低的辐射剂量，同时保持足够好的图像质量，以实现准确的医疗诊断。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种卷积神经网络（CNN）来恢复低剂量（LD）DBT投影，以实现相当于标准全剂量（FD）采集的图像质量。所提出的网络架构受益于受传统基于模型（MB）恢复方法启发的层先验，考虑基于模型的深度学习方法，其中网络被训练在方差稳定变换（VST）域中运行。为了准确控制网络操作点，在恢复图像的噪声和模糊方面，我们提出了一种损失函数，可以最小化偏差并匹配输入和输出之间的残留噪声。训练数据集由标准 FD 获得的临床数据和通过注入量子噪声获得的低剂量对组成。该网络使用通过物理拟人乳房模型获得的真实 DBT 投影进行测试。与使用传统数据驱动方法训练的网络相比，所提出的网络在平均归一化平方误差（MNSE）、训练时间和噪声空间相关性方面取得了优异的结果。所提出的方法可以扩展到需要 LD 采集的其他医学成像应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种卷积神经网络（CNN），用于在方差稳定化域中恢复低剂量数字乳腺断层合成投影，以达到与标准全剂量采集相当的图像质量。
AI.motivation: 数字乳腺断层合成（DBT）检查需在保证诊断准确性的同时尽量降低辐射剂量，而低剂量采集常导致图像质量下降，需有效恢复技术。
AI.method: 设计基于传统模型驱动方法启发的CNN架构，在方差稳定化变换（VST）域中训练网络，并提出一种最小化偏差并匹配输入输出残差噪声的损失函数。
AI.result: 相比传统数据驱动方法，该网络在平均归一化平方误差（MNSE）、训练时间和噪声空间相关性方面表现更优，且在物理仿生乳腺phantom实测中验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可扩展至其他需要低剂量采集的医学影像领域，为降低辐射风险提供技术支撑。

authors_text: Feng Wang,Huiyu Wang,Chen Wei,Alan Yuille,Wei Shen
title: CP2: Copy-Paste Contrastive Pretraining for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: CP2：语义分割的复制粘贴对比预训练
abstract: Recent advances in self-supervised contrastive learning yield good image-level representation, which favors classification tasks but usually neglects pixel-level detailed information, leading to unsatisfactory transfer performance to dense prediction tasks such as semantic segmentation. In this work, we propose a pixel-wise contrastive learning method called CP2 (Copy-Paste Contrastive Pretraining), which facilitates both image- and pixel-level representation learning and therefore is more suitable for downstream dense prediction tasks. In detail, we copy-paste a random crop from an image (the foreground) onto different background images and pretrain a semantic segmentation model with the objective of 1) distinguishing the foreground pixels from the background pixels, and 2) identifying the composed images that share the same foreground.Experiments show the strong performance of CP2 in downstream semantic segmentation: By finetuning CP2 pretrained models on PASCAL VOC 2012, we obtain 78.6% mIoU with a ResNet-50 and 79.5% with a ViT-S.
summary: Recent advances in self-supervised contrastive learning yield good image-level representation, which favors classification tasks but usually neglects pixel-level detailed information, leading to unsatisfactory transfer performance to dense prediction tasks such as semantic segmentation. In this work, we propose a pixel-wise contrastive learning method called CP2 (Copy-Paste Contrastive Pretraining), which facilitates both image- and pixel-level representation learning and therefore is more suitable for downstream dense prediction tasks. In detail, we copy-paste a random crop from an image (the foreground) onto different background images and pretrain a semantic segmentation model with the objective of 1) distinguishing the foreground pixels from the background pixels, and 2) identifying the composed images that share the same foreground.Experiments show the strong performance of CP2 in downstream semantic segmentation: By finetuning CP2 pretrained models on PASCAL VOC 2012, we obtain 78.6% mIoU with a ResNet-50 and 79.5% with a ViT-S.
abstract_zh: 自监督对比学习的最新进展产生了良好的图像级表示，这有利于分类任务，但通常忽略像素级详细信息，导致语义分割等密集预测任务的迁移性能不令人满意。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 CP2（复制粘贴对比预训练）的逐像素对比学习方法，该方法有利于图像级和像素级表示学习，因此更适合下游密集预测任务。具体来说，我们将图像（前景）中的随机裁剪复制粘贴到不同的背景图像上，并预训练语义分割模型，目的是 1）区分前景像素和背景像素，2）识别共享相同前景的合成图像。实验表明 CP2 在下游语义分割中的强大性能：通过在 PASCAL VOC 2012 上微调 CP2 预训练模型，我们获得了 78.6% mIoU ResNet-50 为 79.5%，ViT-S 为 79.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CP2的像素级对比预训练方法，用于改进语义分割任务中的密集预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的自监督对比学习方法在图像级表示上表现良好，但忽略了像素级细节信息，导致在语义分割等密集预测任务中的迁移效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过将图像中的随机裁剪区域（前景）粘贴到不同背景图像上，预训练语义分割模型以区分前景与背景像素并识别共享相同前景的合成图像。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012数据集上微调后，CP2预训练模型在ResNet-50和ViT-S架构上分别达到78.6%和79.5%的mIoU。
AI.conclusion: CP2通过同时学习图像级和像素级表示，显著提升了语义分割任务的性能，验证了像素级对比预训练的有效性。

authors_text: Murtadha Ahmed,Bo Wen,Shengfeng Pan,Jianlin Su,Luo Ao,Yunfeng Liu
title: BERT-ASC: Auxiliary-Sentence Construction for Implicit Aspect Learning in Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: BERT-ASC：情感分析中隐式方面学习的辅助句子构建
abstract: Aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA) aims to associate a text with a set of aspects and infer their respective sentimental polarities. State-of-the-art approaches are built on fine-tuning pre-trained language models, focusing on learning aspect-specific representations from the corpus. However, aspects are often expressed implicitly, making implicit mapping challenging without sufficient labeled examples, which may be scarce in real-world scenarios. This paper proposes a unified framework to address aspect categorization and aspect-based sentiment subtasks. We introduce a mechanism to construct an auxiliary-sentence for the implicit aspect using the corpus's semantic information. We then encourage BERT to learn aspect-specific representation in response to this auxiliary-sentence, not the aspect itself. We evaluate our approach on real benchmark datasets for both ABSA and Targeted-ABSA tasks. Our experiments show that it consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance in aspect categorization and aspect-based sentiment across all datasets, with considerable improvement margins. The BERT-ASC code is available at https://github.com/amurtadha/BERT-ASC.
summary: Aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA) aims to associate a text with a set of aspects and infer their respective sentimental polarities. State-of-the-art approaches are built on fine-tuning pre-trained language models, focusing on learning aspect-specific representations from the corpus. However, aspects are often expressed implicitly, making implicit mapping challenging without sufficient labeled examples, which may be scarce in real-world scenarios. This paper proposes a unified framework to address aspect categorization and aspect-based sentiment subtasks. We introduce a mechanism to construct an auxiliary-sentence for the implicit aspect using the corpus's semantic information. We then encourage BERT to learn aspect-specific representation in response to this auxiliary-sentence, not the aspect itself. We evaluate our approach on real benchmark datasets for both ABSA and Targeted-ABSA tasks. Our experiments show that it consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance in aspect categorization and aspect-based sentiment across all datasets, with considerable improvement margins. The BERT-ASC code is available at https://github.com/amurtadha/BERT-ASC.
abstract_zh: 基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）旨在将文本与一组方面相关联并推断它们各自的情感极性。最先进的方法建立在微调预训练语言模型的基础上，专注于从语料库中学习特定方面的表示。然而，方面通常是隐式表达的，这使得隐式映射在没有足够的标记示例的情况下变得具有挑战性，而这些标记示例在现实场景中可能很少见。本文提出了一个统一的框架来解决方面分类和基于方面的情感子任务。我们引入了一种使用语料库的语义信息来构造隐式方面的辅助句子的机制。然后，我们鼓励 BERT 学习针对该辅助句的特定方面表示，而不是方面本身。我们在 ABSA 和 Targeted-ABSA 任务的真实基准数据集上评估我们的方法。我们的实验表明，它在所有数据集的方面分类和基于方面的情感方面始终如一地实现了最先进的性能，并且具有相当大的改进幅度。 BERT-ASC 代码可在 https://github.com/amurtadha/BERT-ASC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BERT-ASC框架，通过构建辅助句子解决隐式方面学习问题，提升情感分析效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖标注数据学习隐式方面表示，但实际场景中标注数据稀缺，导致模型难以准确捕捉隐式方面信息。
AI.method: 通过构建辅助句子利用语料语义信息，引导BERT学习方面特定表示，而非直接使用方面本身。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实现方面分类和情感分析的最先进性能，显著提升模型效果。
AI.conclusion: BERT-ASC通过辅助句子有效学习隐式方面表示，验证了方法在多种任务中的有效性。

State-of-the-art approaches are built on fine-tuning pre-trained language models, focusing on learning aspect-specific representations from the corpus. However, aspects are often expressed implicitly, making implicit mapping challenging without sufficient labeled examples, which may be scarce in real-world scenarios. This paper proposes a unified framework to address aspect categorization and aspect-based sentiment subtasks. authors_text: Tiantian He,Zhibin Li,Yongshun Gong,Yazhou Yao,Xiushan Nie,Yilong Yin
title: Exploring Linear Feature Disentanglement For Neural Networks
title_zh: 探索神经网络的线性特征解缠结
abstract: Non-linear activation functions, e.g., Sigmoid, ReLU, and Tanh, have achieved great success in neural networks (NNs). Due to the complex non-linear characteristic of samples, the objective of those activation functions is to project samples from their original feature space to a linear separable feature space. This phenomenon ignites our interest in exploring whether all features need to be transformed by all non-linear functions in current typical NNs, i.e., whether there exists a part of features arriving at the linear separable feature space in the intermediate layers, that does not require further non-linear variation but an affine transformation instead. To validate the above hypothesis, we explore the problem of linear feature disentanglement for neural networks in this paper. Specifically, we devise a learnable mask module to distinguish between linear and non-linear features. Through our designed experiments we found that some features reach the linearly separable space earlier than the others and can be detached partly from the NNs. The explored method also provides a readily feasible pruning strategy which barely affects the performance of the original model. We conduct our experiments on four datasets and present promising results.
summary: Non-linear activation functions, e.g., Sigmoid, ReLU, and Tanh, have achieved great success in neural networks (NNs). Due to the complex non-linear characteristic of samples, the objective of those activation functions is to project samples from their original feature space to a linear separable feature space. This phenomenon ignites our interest in exploring whether all features need to be transformed by all non-linear functions in current typical NNs, i.e., whether there exists a part of features arriving at the linear separable feature space in the intermediate layers, that does not require further non-linear variation but an affine transformation instead. To validate the above hypothesis, we explore the problem of linear feature disentanglement for neural networks in this paper. Specifically, we devise a learnable mask module to distinguish between linear and non-linear features. Through our designed experiments we found that some features reach the linearly separable space earlier than the others and can be detached partly from the NNs. The explored method also provides a readily feasible pruning strategy which barely affects the performance of the original model. We conduct our experiments on four datasets and present promising results.
abstract_zh: Non-linear activation functions, e.g., Sigmoid, ReLU, and Tanh, have achieved great success in neural networks (NNs).由于样本复杂的非线性特征，这些激活函数的目标是将样本从原始特征空间投影到线性可分特征空间。这种现象激发了我们探索当前典型神经网络中是否所有特征都需要通过所有非线性函数进行变换的兴趣，即是否存在一部分特征到达中间层中的线性可分离特征空间，不需要进一步的非线性变化而是需要仿射变换。 To validate the above hypothesis, we explore the problem of linear feature disentanglement for neural networks in this paper. Specifically, we devise a learnable mask module to distinguish between linear and non-linear features.通过我们设计的实验，我们发现一些特征比其他特征更早到达线性可分离空间，并且可以部分地从神经网络中分离出来。 The explored method also provides a readily feasible pruning strategy which barely affects the performance of the original model. We conduct our experiments on four datasets and present promising results.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨神经网络中线性特征解耦问题，旨在识别并移除中间层中已实现线性可分的冗余特征。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络依赖非线性激活函数将特征映射到线性可分空间，但作者质疑是否所有特征都需要非线性变换，部分特征可能在中间层已满足线性可分条件。
AI.method: 设计可学习的掩码模块区分线性与非线性特征，并通过实验验证特征在不同层的可分性，提出基于特征解耦的剪枝策略。
AI.result: 实验表明部分特征在早期层已实现线性可分，移除后模型性能基本不受影响，在四个数据集上均取得良好效果。
AI.conclusion: 线性特征解耦方法可有效识别冗余特征，为神经网络剪枝提供可行方案，在保持性能的同时提升模型效率。

search_text: Exploring Linear Feature Disentanglement For Neural Networks 探索神经网络的线性特征解缠结 Non-linear activation functions, e.g., Sigmoid, ReLU, and Tanh, have achieved great success in neural networks (NNs). Due to the complex non-linear characteristic of samples, the objective of those activation functions is to project samples from their original feature space to a linear separable feature space. This phenomenon ignites our interest in exploring whether all features need to be transformed by all non-linear functions in current typical NNs, i.e., whether there exists a part of features arriving at the linear separable feature space in the intermediate layers, that does not require further non-linear variation but an affine transformation instead. To validate the above hypothesis, we explore the problem of linear feature disentanglement for neural networks in this paper. Specifically, we devise a learnable mask module to distinguish between linear and non-linear features. Through our designed experiments we found that some features reach the linearly separable space earlier than the others and can be detached partly from the NNs. The explored method also provides a readily feasible pruning strategy which barely affects the performance of the original model. We conduct our experiments on four datasets and present promising results. Non-linear activation functions, e.g., Sigmoid, ReLU, and Tanh, have achieved great success in neural networks (NNs).由于样本复杂的非线性特征，这些激活函数的目标是将样本从原始特征空间投影到线性可分特征空间。这种现象激发了我们探索当前典型神经网络中是否所有特征都需要通过所有非线性函数进行变换的兴趣，即是否存在一部分特征到达中间层中的线性可分离特征空间，不需要进一步的非线性变化而是需要仿射变换。 To validate the above hypothesis, we explore the problem of linear feature disentanglement for neural networks in this paper. Specifically, we devise a learnable mask module to distinguish between linear and non-linear features.通过我们设计的实验，我们发现一些特征比其他特征更早到达线性可分离空间，并且可以部分地从神经网络中分离出来。 The explored method also provides a readily feasible pruning strategy which barely affects the performance of the original model. We conduct our experiments on four datasets and present promising results. 本文探讨神经网络中线性特征解耦问题，旨在识别并移除中间层中已实现线性可分的冗余特征。 Tiantian He,Zhibin Li,Yongshun Gong,Yazhou Yao,Xiushan Nie,Yilong Yin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ka Man Lo
title: Optical Flow Based Motion Detection for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 用于自动驾驶的基于光流的运动检测
comment: This is an undergraduate research project
comments: This is an undergraduate research project
abstract: Motion detection is a fundamental but challenging task for autonomous driving. In particular scenes like highway, remote objects have to be paid extra attention for better controlling decision. Aiming at distant vehicles, we train a neural network model to classify the motion status using optical flow field information as the input. The experiments result in high accuracy, showing that our idea is viable and promising. The trained model also achieves an acceptable performance for nearby vehicles. Our work is implemented in PyTorch. Open tools including nuScenes, FastFlowNet and RAFT are used. Visualization videos are available at https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLVVrWgq4OrlBnRebmkGZO1iDHEksMHKGk .
summary: Motion detection is a fundamental but challenging task for autonomous driving. In particular scenes like highway, remote objects have to be paid extra attention for better controlling decision. Aiming at distant vehicles, we train a neural network model to classify the motion status using optical flow field information as the input. The experiments result in high accuracy, showing that our idea is viable and promising. The trained model also achieves an acceptable performance for nearby vehicles. Our work is implemented in PyTorch. Open tools including nuScenes, FastFlowNet and RAFT are used. Visualization videos are available at https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLVVrWgq4OrlBnRebmkGZO1iDHEksMHKGk .
abstract_zh: 运动检测是自动驾驶的一项基本但具有挑战性的任务。在高速公路等特定场景中，必须额外注意远程物体，以便更好地进行控制决策。针对远处的车辆，我们使用光流场信息作为输入，训练神经网络模型来对运动状态进行分类。实验结果具有很高的准确性，表明我们的想法是可行且有前途的。经过训练的模型对于附近的车辆也达到了可接受的性能。我们的工作是在 PyTorch 中实现的。使用包括 nuScenes、FastFlowNet 和 RAFT 在内的开放工具。可视化视频可在 https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLVVrWgq4OrlBnRebmkGZO1iDHEksMHKGk 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光流场的运动检测方法，用于自动驾驶场景中的远程目标（如远处车辆）的运动状态分类。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中运动检测面临挑战，尤其在高速公路上需对远程目标进行精确控制决策，现有方法对此关注不足。
AI.method: 训练神经网络模型，以光流场信息为输入，利用PyTorch框架及nuScenes、FastFlowNet、RAFT等开源工具实现运动状态分类。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在远程车辆检测中达到高准确率，对近距离车辆也有可接受的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 光流场信息能有效支持自动驾驶中的运动检测，该方法具有可行性与应用潜力，未来可进一步优化模型性能。

authors_text: Josef Lorenz Rumberger,Elias Baumann,Peter Hirsch,Andrew Janowczyk,Inti Zlobec,Dagmar Kainmueller
title: Panoptic segmentation with highly imbalanced semantic labels
title_zh: 具有高度不平衡语义标签的全景分割
abstract: We describe here the panoptic segmentation method we devised for our participation in the CoNIC: Colon Nuclei Identification and Counting Challenge at ISBI 2022. Key features of our method are a weighted loss specifically engineered for semantic segmentation of highly imbalanced cell types, and a state-of-the art nuclei instance segmentation model, which we combine in a Hovernet-like architecture.
summary: We describe here the panoptic segmentation method we devised for our participation in the CoNIC: Colon Nuclei Identification and Counting Challenge at ISBI 2022. Key features of our method are a weighted loss specifically engineered for semantic segmentation of highly imbalanced cell types, and a state-of-the art nuclei instance segmentation model, which we combine in a Hovernet-like architecture.
abstract_zh: 我们在这里描述了我们为参加 ISBI 2022 的 CoNIC：结肠核识别和计数挑战赛而设计的全景分割方法。我们方法的关键特征是专门为高度不平衡细胞类型的语义分割而设计的加权损失，以及最先进的细胞核实例分割模型，我们将其组合在类似 Hovernet 的架构中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对高度不平衡语义标签的全景分割方法，用于参与ISBI 2022的CoNIC挑战赛。
AI.motivation: 在细胞分割任务中，语义标签的高度不平衡性会导致模型性能下降，需设计专门的损失函数和分割架构来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 结合加权损失函数与先进的核实例分割模型，采用类似Hovernet的架构处理不平衡的语义标签。
AI.result: 该方法成功应用于CoNIC挑战赛，有效提升了高度不平衡数据下的分割精度。
AI.conclusion: 针对不平衡语义标签设计的加权损失函数与先进分割模型结合，能显著改善全景分割效果。
