authors_text: Karmele Lopez-de-Ipiña,Unai Martinez de Lizarduy,Pilar Calvo,Blanca Beita,Joseba García-Melero,Miriam Ecay-Torres,Ainara Estanga,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy
title: Analysis of Disfluencies for automatic detection of Mild Cognitive Impartment: a deep learning approach
title_zh: 自动检测轻度认知功能的不流畅分析：一种深度学习方法
comment: 5 pages, published in 2017 International Conference and Workshop on Bioinspired Intelligence (IWOBI), 2017, pp. 1-4, 10-12 July Funchal (Portugal)
comments: 5 pages, published in 2017 International Conference and Workshop on Bioinspired Intelligence (IWOBI), 2017, pp. 1-4, 10-12 July Funchal (Portugal)
abstract: The so-called Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) or cognitive loss appears in a previous stage before Alzheimer's Disease (AD), but it does not seem sufficiently severe to interfere in independent abilities of daily life, so it usually does not receive an appropriate diagnosis. Its detection is a challenging issue to be addressed by medical specialists. This work presents a novel proposal based on automatic analysis of speech and disfluencies aimed at supporting MCI diagnosis. The approach includes deep learning by means of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) and non-linear multifeature modelling. Moreover, to select the most relevant features non-parametric Mann-Whitney U-testt and Support Vector Machine Attribute (SVM) evaluation are used.
summary: The so-called Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) or cognitive loss appears in a previous stage before Alzheimer's Disease (AD), but it does not seem sufficiently severe to interfere in independent abilities of daily life, so it usually does not receive an appropriate diagnosis. Its detection is a challenging issue to be addressed by medical specialists. This work presents a novel proposal based on automatic analysis of speech and disfluencies aimed at supporting MCI diagnosis. The approach includes deep learning by means of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) and non-linear multifeature modelling. Moreover, to select the most relevant features non-parametric Mann-Whitney U-testt and Support Vector Machine Attribute (SVM) evaluation are used.
abstract_zh: 所谓的轻度认知障碍（MCI）或认知丧失出现在阿尔茨海默病（AD）之前的前一阶段，但似乎还没有严重到干扰日常生活的独立能力，因此通常不会得到适当的诊断。它的检测是医学专家需要解决的一个具有挑战性的问题。这项工作提出了一种基于语音和不流畅的自动分析的新颖提案，旨在支持 MCI 诊断。该方法包括通过卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和非线性多特征建模进行深度学习。此外，为了选择最相关的特征，使用非参数 Mann-Whitney U 检验和支持向量机属性 (SVM) 评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的自动检测轻度认知障碍（MCI）的新方法，通过分析言语中的不流畅性特征。
AI.motivation: MCI作为阿尔茨海默病的早期阶段，因症状轻微常被忽视，亟需有效且自动化的辅助诊断手段。
AI.method: 结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与非线性多特征建模，采用Mann-Whitney U检验和SVM评估筛选关键特征。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在MCI检测中的有效性，证明言语不流畅性特征可作为可靠诊断依据。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度学习的言语分析为MCI的早期自动化诊断提供了可行的技术路径。

search_text: Analysis of Disfluencies for automatic detection of Mild Cognitive Impartment: a deep learning approach 自动检测轻度认知功能的不流畅分析：一种深度学习方法 The so-called Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) or cognitive loss appears in a previous stage before Alzheimer's Disease (AD), but it does not seem sufficiently severe to interfere in independent abilities of daily life, so it usually does not receive an appropriate diagnosis. Its detection is a challenging issue to be addressed by medical specialists. This work presents a novel proposal based on automatic analysis of speech and disfluencies aimed at supporting MCI diagnosis. The approach includes deep learning by means of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) and non-linear multifeature modelling. Moreover, to select the most relevant features non-parametric Mann-Whitney U-testt and Support Vector Machine Attribute (SVM) evaluation are used. 所谓的轻度认知障碍（MCI）或认知丧失出现在阿尔茨海默病（AD）之前的前一阶段，但似乎还没有严重到干扰日常生活的独立能力，因此通常不会得到适当的诊断。它的检测是医学专家需要解决的一个具有挑战性的问题。这项工作提出了一种基于语音和不流畅的自动分析的新颖提案，旨在支持 MCI 诊断。该方法包括通过卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和非线性多特征建模进行深度学习。此外，为了选择最相关的特征，使用非参数 Mann-Whitney U 检验和支持向量机属性 (SVM) 评估。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的自动检测轻度认知障碍（MCI）的新方法，通过分析言语中的不流畅性特征。 Karmele Lopez-de-Ipiña,Unai Martinez de Lizarduy,Pilar Calvo,Blanca Beita,Joseba García-Melero,Miriam Ecay-Torres,Ainara Estanga,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Song Li
title: An Algorithm for Solving Solvable Polynomial Equations of Arbitrary Degree by Radicals
title_zh: 任意次根式可解多项式方程的求解算法
abstract: This work provides a method(an algorithm) for solving the solvable unary algebraic equation $f(x)=0$ ($f(x)\in\mathbb{Q}[x]$) of arbitrary degree and obtaining the exact radical roots. This method requires that we know the Galois group as the permutation group of the roots of $f(x)$ and the approximate roots with sufficient precision beforehand. Of course, the approximate roots are not necessary but can help reduce the quantity of computation. The algorithm complexity is approximately proportional to the 4th power of the size of the Galois group of $f(x)$. The whole algorithm doesn't need to deal with tremendous polynomials or reduce symmetric polynomials.
summary: This work provides a method(an algorithm) for solving the solvable unary algebraic equation $f(x)=0$ ($f(x)\in\mathbb{Q}[x]$) of arbitrary degree and obtaining the exact radical roots. This method requires that we know the Galois group as the permutation group of the roots of $f(x)$ and the approximate roots with sufficient precision beforehand. Of course, the approximate roots are not necessary but can help reduce the quantity of computation. The algorithm complexity is approximately proportional to the 4th power of the size of the Galois group of $f(x)$. The whole algorithm doesn't need to deal with tremendous polynomials or reduce symmetric polynomials.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提供了一种求解任意阶可解一元代数方程 $f(x)=0$ ($f(x)\in\mathbb{Q}[x]$) 并获得精确根根的方法（算法）。该方法要求我们预先知道伽罗瓦群作为 $f(x)$ 的根和具有足够精度的近似根的置换群。当然，近似根不是必需的，但可以帮助减少计算量。算法复杂度大约与 $f(x)$ 伽罗瓦群大小的 4 次方成正比。整个算法不需要处理巨大的多项式或减少对称多项式。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过根式求解任意次数可解多项式方程的算法
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理高次可解多项式时计算复杂度高，且需处理对称多项式，因此需要更高效的算法
AI.method: 基于已知Galois群结构和近似根，通过置换群操作和根式运算求解方程
AI.result: 开发出一种复杂度与Galois群大小四次方成正比的算法，无需处理巨大多项式
AI.conclusion: 该算法为已知Galois群的可解多项式提供有效解法，但需进一步研究如何高效确定Galois群

authors_text: Junuk Jung,Seonhoon Lee,Heung-Seon Oh,Yongjun Park,Joochan Park,Sungbin Son
title: Unified Negative Pair Generation toward Well-discriminative Feature Space for Face Recognition
title_zh: 面向人脸识别的良好判别性特征空间的统一负对生成
abstract: The goal of face recognition (FR) can be viewed as a pair similarity optimization problem, maximizing a similarity set $\mathcal{S}^p$ over positive pairs, while minimizing similarity set $\mathcal{S}^n$ over negative pairs. Ideally, it is expected that FR models form a well-discriminative feature space (WDFS) that satisfies $\inf{\mathcal{S}^p} > \sup{\mathcal{S}^n}$. With regard to WDFS, the existing deep feature learning paradigms (i.e., metric and classification losses) can be expressed as a unified perspective on different pair generation (PG) strategies. Unfortunately, in the metric loss (ML), it is infeasible to generate negative pairs taking all classes into account in each iteration because of the limited mini-batch size. In contrast, in classification loss (CL), it is difficult to generate extremely hard negative pairs owing to the convergence of the class weight vectors to their center. This leads to a mismatch between the two similarity distributions of the sampled pairs and all negative pairs. Thus, this paper proposes a unified negative pair generation (UNPG) by combining two PG strategies (i.e., MLPG and CLPG) from a unified perspective to alleviate the mismatch. UNPG introduces useful information about negative pairs using MLPG to overcome the CLPG deficiency. Moreover, it includes filtering the similarities of noisy negative pairs to guarantee reliable convergence and improved performance. Exhaustive experiments show the superiority of UNPG by achieving state-of-the-art performance across recent loss functions on public benchmark datasets. Our code and pretrained models are publicly available.
summary: The goal of face recognition (FR) can be viewed as a pair similarity optimization problem, maximizing a similarity set $\mathcal{S}^p$ over positive pairs, while minimizing similarity set $\mathcal{S}^n$ over negative pairs. Ideally, it is expected that FR models form a well-discriminative feature space (WDFS) that satisfies $\inf{\mathcal{S}^p} > \sup{\mathcal{S}^n}$. With regard to WDFS, the existing deep feature learning paradigms (i.e., metric and classification losses) can be expressed as a unified perspective on different pair generation (PG) strategies. Unfortunately, in the metric loss (ML), it is infeasible to generate negative pairs taking all classes into account in each iteration because of the limited mini-batch size. In contrast, in classification loss (CL), it is difficult to generate extremely hard negative pairs owing to the convergence of the class weight vectors to their center. This leads to a mismatch between the two similarity distributions of the sampled pairs and all negative pairs. Thus, this paper proposes a unified negative pair generation (UNPG) by combining two PG strategies (i.e., MLPG and CLPG) from a unified perspective to alleviate the mismatch. UNPG introduces useful information about negative pairs using MLPG to overcome the CLPG deficiency. Moreover, it includes filtering the similarities of noisy negative pairs to guarantee reliable convergence and improved performance. Exhaustive experiments show the superiority of UNPG by achieving state-of-the-art performance across recent loss functions on public benchmark datasets. Our code and pretrained models are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 人脸识别（FR）的目标可以被视为配对相似度优化问题，最大化正对上的相似度集 $\mathcal{S}^p$，同时最小化负对上的相似度集 $\mathcal{S}^n$。理想情况下，FR 模型应该形成一个良好判别性的特征空间 (WDFS)，满足 $\inf{\mathcal{S}^p} > \sup{\mathcal{S}^n}$。对于WDFS，现有的深度特征学习范式（即度量和分类损失）可以表示为不同对生成（PG）策略的统一视角。不幸的是，在度量损失（ML）中，由于小批量大小有限，不可能在每次迭代中考虑所有类来生成负对。相反，在分类损失（CL）中，由于类权重向量收敛到其中心，因此很难生成极其困难的负对。这导致采样对和所有负对的两个相似度分布之间不匹配。因此，本文从统一的角度提出了一种统一负对生成（UNPG），结合两种PG策略（即MLPG和CLPG）来缓解不匹配。 UNPG 使用 MLPG 引入有关负对的有用信息来克服 CLPG 的缺陷。此外，它还包括过滤噪声负对的相似性，以保证可靠的收敛和改进的性能。详尽的实验证明了 UNPG 的优越性，在公共基准数据集上的最新损失函数中实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码和预训练模型是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一负样本对生成方法（UNPG），通过结合度量损失和分类损失的样本对生成策略，优化人脸识别中的特征空间判别性。
AI.motivation: 现有度量损失因小批量限制无法生成全局负样本，分类损失因类别权重收敛难以生成极端困难负样本，导致采样分布与真实分布不匹配。
AI.method: 设计UNPG框架融合MLPG（度量损失样本生成）与CLPG（分类损失样本生成），引入噪声过滤机制提升负样本质量。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到最先进性能，代码和预训练模型已公开。
AI.conclusion: UNPG通过统一视角缓解负样本分布不匹配问题，有效提升人脸识别模型的特征判别能力。

authors_text: Yanyuan Qiao,Yuankai Qi,Yicong Hong,Zheng Yu,Peng Wang,Qi Wu
title: HOP: History-and-Order Aware Pre-training for Vision-and-Language Navigation
title_zh: HOP：视觉和语言导航的历史和订单感知预训练
abstract: Pre-training has been adopted in a few of recent works for Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN). However, previous pre-training methods for VLN either lack the ability to predict future actions or ignore the trajectory contexts, which are essential for a greedy navigation process. In this work, to promote the learning of spatio-temporal visual-textual correspondence as well as the agent's capability of decision making, we propose a novel history-and-order aware pre-training paradigm (HOP) with VLN-specific objectives that exploit the past observations and support future action prediction. Specifically, in addition to the commonly used Masked Language Modeling (MLM) and Trajectory-Instruction Matching (TIM), we design two proxy tasks to model temporal order information: Trajectory Order Modeling (TOM) and Group Order Modeling (GOM). Moreover, our navigation action prediction is also enhanced by introducing the task of Action Prediction with History (APH), which takes into account the history visual perceptions. Extensive experimental results on four downstream VLN tasks (R2R, REVERIE, NDH, RxR) demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method compared against several state-of-the-art agents.
summary: Pre-training has been adopted in a few of recent works for Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN). However, previous pre-training methods for VLN either lack the ability to predict future actions or ignore the trajectory contexts, which are essential for a greedy navigation process. In this work, to promote the learning of spatio-temporal visual-textual correspondence as well as the agent's capability of decision making, we propose a novel history-and-order aware pre-training paradigm (HOP) with VLN-specific objectives that exploit the past observations and support future action prediction. Specifically, in addition to the commonly used Masked Language Modeling (MLM) and Trajectory-Instruction Matching (TIM), we design two proxy tasks to model temporal order information: Trajectory Order Modeling (TOM) and Group Order Modeling (GOM). Moreover, our navigation action prediction is also enhanced by introducing the task of Action Prediction with History (APH), which takes into account the history visual perceptions. Extensive experimental results on four downstream VLN tasks (R2R, REVERIE, NDH, RxR) demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method compared against several state-of-the-art agents.
abstract_zh: 最近的一些视觉和语言导航（VLN）工作中采用了预训练。然而，之前的 VLN 预训练方法要么缺乏预测未来动作的能力，要么忽略轨迹上下文，而这对于贪婪导航过程至关重要。在这项工作中，为了促进时空视觉文本对应的学习以及智能体的决策能力，我们提出了一种新颖的历史和顺序感知预训练范式（HOP），其具有特定于 VLN 的目标，可利用过去的观察结果并支持未来的行动预测。具体来说，除了常用的掩码语言建模（MLM）和轨迹指令匹配（TIM）之外，我们还设计了两个代理任务来建模时间顺序信息：轨迹顺序建模（TOM）和组顺序建模（GOM）。此外，我们的导航动作预测还通过引入历史动作预测（APH）任务得到增强，该任务考虑了历史视觉感知。对四个下游 VLN 任务（R2R、REVERIE、NDH、RxR）的广泛实验结果证明了我们提出的方法与几种最先进的代理相比的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的预训练方法HOP，用于视觉与语言导航（VLN），以提升智能体在导航过程中的决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLN预训练方法在预测未来动作或忽略轨迹上下文方面存在不足，这限制了智能体在导航过程中的表现。
AI.method: 本文设计了HOP预训练范式，引入了轨迹顺序建模（TOM）、组顺序建模（GOM）和基于历史的行动预测（APH）等任务，以捕捉时间顺序信息和历史视觉感知。
AI.result: 在R2R、REVERIE、NDH和RxR四个下游任务中，HOP方法在多个指标上优于现有的先进方法。
AI.conclusion: HOP方法通过考虑历史和顺序信息，显著提升了VLN任务中智能体的导航能力，为未来的研究提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Yiming Zeng,Yue Qian,Qijian Zhang,Junhui Hou,Yixuan Yuan,Ying He
title: IDEA-Net: Dynamic 3D Point Cloud Interpolation via Deep Embedding Alignment
title_zh: IDEA-Net：通过深度嵌入对齐进行动态 3D 点云插值
comment: This paper was accepted by CVPR 2022
comments: This paper was accepted by CVPR 2022
abstract: This paper investigates the problem of temporally interpolating dynamic 3D point clouds with large non-rigid deformation. We formulate the problem as estimation of point-wise trajectories (i.e., smooth curves) and further reason that temporal irregularity and under-sampling are two major challenges. To tackle the challenges, we propose IDEA-Net, an end-to-end deep learning framework, which disentangles the problem under the assistance of the explicitly learned temporal consistency. Specifically, we propose a temporal consistency learning module to align two consecutive point cloud frames point-wisely, based on which we can employ linear interpolation to obtain coarse trajectories/in-between frames. To compensate the high-order nonlinear components of trajectories, we apply aligned feature embeddings that encode local geometry properties to regress point-wise increments, which are combined with the coarse estimations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on various point cloud sequences and observe large improvement over state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and visually. Our framework can bring benefits to 3D motion data acquisition. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/ZENGYIMING-EAMON/IDEA-Net.git.
summary: This paper investigates the problem of temporally interpolating dynamic 3D point clouds with large non-rigid deformation. We formulate the problem as estimation of point-wise trajectories (i.e., smooth curves) and further reason that temporal irregularity and under-sampling are two major challenges. To tackle the challenges, we propose IDEA-Net, an end-to-end deep learning framework, which disentangles the problem under the assistance of the explicitly learned temporal consistency. Specifically, we propose a temporal consistency learning module to align two consecutive point cloud frames point-wisely, based on which we can employ linear interpolation to obtain coarse trajectories/in-between frames. To compensate the high-order nonlinear components of trajectories, we apply aligned feature embeddings that encode local geometry properties to regress point-wise increments, which are combined with the coarse estimations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on various point cloud sequences and observe large improvement over state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and visually. Our framework can bring benefits to 3D motion data acquisition. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/ZENGYIMING-EAMON/IDEA-Net.git.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了具有大非刚性变形的动态 3D 点云的时间插值问题。我们将问题表述为逐点轨迹（即平滑曲线）的估计，并进一步推断时间不规则性和欠采样是两个主要挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 IDEA-Net，一个端到端的深度学习框架，它在显式学习的时间一致性的帮助下解决了问题。具体来说，我们提出了一个时间一致性学习模块来逐点对齐两个连续的点云帧，基于此我们可以采用线性插值来获得粗轨迹/中间帧。为了补偿轨迹的高阶非线性分量，我们应用对齐的特征嵌入来编码局部几何属性，以回归逐点增量，并将其与粗略估计相结合。我们展示了我们的方法在各种点云序列上的有效性，并在定量和视觉上观察到相对于最先进的方法的巨大改进。我们的框架可以为 3D 运动数据采集带来好处。源代码可在 https://github.com/ZENGYIMING-EAMON/IDEA-Net.git 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IDEA-Net框架，解决动态3D点云序列在非刚性变形下的时间插值问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理动态点云的时序不规则性和欠采样问题，导致插值结果不准确。
AI.method: 通过显式学习时序一致性模块对齐相邻帧点云，并结合局部几何特征嵌入回归高阶非线性增量。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现定量和视觉效果优于现有方法，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: IDEA-Net有效解决了动态点云插值的挑战，可提升3D运动数据采集质量。

We formulate the problem as estimation of point-wise trajectories (i.e., smooth curves) and further reason that temporal irregularity and under-sampling are two major challenges. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on various point cloud sequences and observe large improvement over state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and visually. Our framework can bring benefits to 3D motion data acquisition. authors_text: Shizun Wang,Jiaming Liu,Kaixin Chen,Xiaoqi Li,Ming Lu,Yandong Guo
title: Adaptive Patch Exiting for Scalable Single Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 可扩展单图像超分辨率的自适应补丁退出
abstract: Since the future of computing is heterogeneous, scalability is a crucial problem for single image super-resolution. Recent works try to train one network, which can be deployed on platforms with different capacities. However, they rely on the pixel-wise sparse convolution, which is not hardware-friendly and achieves limited practical speedup. As image can be divided into patches, which have various restoration difficulties, we present a scalable method based on Adaptive Patch Exiting (APE) to achieve more practical speedup. Specifically, we propose to train a regressor to predict the incremental capacity of each layer for the patch. Once the incremental capacity is below the threshold, the patch can exit at the specific layer. Our method can easily adjust the trade-off between performance and efficiency by changing the threshold of incremental capacity. Furthermore, we propose a novel strategy to enable the network training of our method. We conduct extensive experiments across various backbones, datasets and scaling factors to demonstrate the advantages of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/littlepure2333/APE
summary: Since the future of computing is heterogeneous, scalability is a crucial problem for single image super-resolution. Recent works try to train one network, which can be deployed on platforms with different capacities. However, they rely on the pixel-wise sparse convolution, which is not hardware-friendly and achieves limited practical speedup. As image can be divided into patches, which have various restoration difficulties, we present a scalable method based on Adaptive Patch Exiting (APE) to achieve more practical speedup. Specifically, we propose to train a regressor to predict the incremental capacity of each layer for the patch. Once the incremental capacity is below the threshold, the patch can exit at the specific layer. Our method can easily adjust the trade-off between performance and efficiency by changing the threshold of incremental capacity. Furthermore, we propose a novel strategy to enable the network training of our method. We conduct extensive experiments across various backbones, datasets and scaling factors to demonstrate the advantages of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/littlepure2333/APE
abstract_zh: 由于计算的未来是异构的，因此可扩展性是单图像超分辨率的关键问题。最近的工作尝试训练一个网络，该网络可以部署在具有不同容量的平台上。然而，它们依赖于像素级稀疏卷积，这对硬件不友好并且实现的实际加速有限。由于图像可以分为多个补丁，而这些补丁具有各种恢复困难，因此我们提出了一种基于自适应补丁退出（APE）的可扩展方法，以实现更实际的加速。具体来说，我们建议训练一个回归器来预测补丁每层的增量容量。一旦增量容量低于阈值，补丁就可以在特定层退出。我们的方法可以通过改变增量容量的阈值来轻松调整性能和效率之间的权衡。此外，我们提出了一种新的策略来实现我们方法的网络训练。我们在各种主干网、数据集和缩放因子上进行了广泛的实验，以证明我们方法的优势。代码可在 https://github.com/littlepure2333/APE 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应块退出（APE）的可扩展单图像超分辨率方法，通过预测块的增量容量实现硬件友好的加速。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖像素级稀疏卷积，硬件兼容性差且加速有限，需设计更适应异构计算平台的可扩展超分辨率方案。
AI.method: 训练回归器预测每个块的层间增量容量，当容量低于阈值时提前退出，并提出新训练策略实现动态调整。
AI.result: 在多骨干网络、数据集和缩放因子下验证方法有效性，实验表明其在保持性能的同时显著提升推理效率。
AI.conclusion: APE通过阈值调节平衡性能与效率，硬件友好性优于现有方法，代码开源验证了方案的实用性。

search_text: Adaptive Patch Exiting for Scalable Single Image Super-Resolution 可扩展单图像超分辨率的自适应补丁退出 Since the future of computing is heterogeneous, scalability is a crucial problem for single image super-resolution. Recent works try to train one network, which can be deployed on platforms with different capacities. However, they rely on the pixel-wise sparse convolution, which is not hardware-friendly and achieves limited practical speedup. As image can be divided into patches, which have various restoration difficulties, we present a scalable method based on Adaptive Patch Exiting (APE) to achieve more practical speedup. Specifically, we propose to train a regressor to predict the incremental capacity of each layer for the patch. Once the incremental capacity is below the threshold, the patch can exit at the specific layer. Our method can easily adjust the trade-off between performance and efficiency by changing the threshold of incremental capacity. Furthermore, we propose a novel strategy to enable the network training of our method. We conduct extensive experiments across various backbones, datasets and scaling factors to demonstrate the advantages of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/littlepure2333/APE 由于计算的未来是异构的，因此可扩展性是单图像超分辨率的关键问题。最近的工作尝试训练一个网络，该网络可以部署在具有不同容量的平台上。然而，它们依赖于像素级稀疏卷积，这对硬件不友好并且实现的实际加速有限。由于图像可以分为多个补丁，而这些补丁具有各种恢复困难，因此我们提出了一种基于自适应补丁退出（APE）的可扩展方法，以实现更实际的加速。具体来说，我们建议训练一个回归器来预测补丁每层的增量容量。一旦增量容量低于阈值，补丁就可以在特定层退出。我们的方法可以通过改变增量容量的阈值来轻松调整性能和效率之间的权衡。此外，我们提出了一种新的策略来实现我们方法的网络训练。我们在各种主干网、数据集和缩放因子上进行了广泛的实验，以证明我们方法的优势。代码可在 https://github.com/littlepure2333/APE 获取 本文提出一种基于自适应块退出（APE）的可扩展单图像超分辨率方法，通过预测块的增量容量实现硬件友好的加速。 Shizun Wang,Jiaming Liu,Kaixin Chen,Xiaoqi Li,Ming Lu,Yandong Guo cs.CV

authors_text: Fuda van Diggelen,Jie Luo,Tugay Alperen Karagüzel,Nicolas Cambier,Eliseo Ferrante,A. E. Eiben
title: Environment induced emergence of collective behaviour in evolving swarms with limited sensing
title_zh: 环境诱导在感知有限的进化群体中出现集体行为
comment: (1) Three authors contributed equally to this research
comments: (1) Three authors contributed equally to this research
abstract: Designing controllers for robot swarms is challenging, because human developers have typically no good understanding of the link between the details of a controller that governs individual robots and the swarm behavior that is an indirect result of the interactions between swarm members and the environment. In this paper we investigate whether an evolutionary approach can mitigate this problem. We consider a very challenging task where robots with limited sensing and communication abilities must follow the gradient of an environmental feature and use Differential Evolution to evolve a neural network controller for simulated robots. We conduct a systematic study to measure the flexibility and scalability of the method by varying the size of the arena and number of robots in the swarm. The experiments confirm the feasibility of our approach, the evolved robot controllers induced swarm behavior that solved the task. We found that solutions evolved under the harshest conditions (where the environmental clues were the weakest) were the most flexible and that there is a sweet spot regarding the swarm size. Furthermore, we observed collective motion of the swarm, showcasing truly emergent behavior that was not represented in- and selected for during evolution.
summary: Designing controllers for robot swarms is challenging, because human developers have typically no good understanding of the link between the details of a controller that governs individual robots and the swarm behavior that is an indirect result of the interactions between swarm members and the environment. In this paper we investigate whether an evolutionary approach can mitigate this problem. We consider a very challenging task where robots with limited sensing and communication abilities must follow the gradient of an environmental feature and use Differential Evolution to evolve a neural network controller for simulated robots. We conduct a systematic study to measure the flexibility and scalability of the method by varying the size of the arena and number of robots in the swarm. The experiments confirm the feasibility of our approach, the evolved robot controllers induced swarm behavior that solved the task. We found that solutions evolved under the harshest conditions (where the environmental clues were the weakest) were the most flexible and that there is a sweet spot regarding the swarm size. Furthermore, we observed collective motion of the swarm, showcasing truly emergent behavior that was not represented in- and selected for during evolution.
abstract_zh: 为机器人群设计控制器具有挑战性，因为人类开发人员通常无法很好地理解控制单个机器人的控制器细节与群体行为之间的联系，而群体行为是群体成员与环境之间相互作用的间接结果。在本文中，我们研究了进化方法是否可以缓解这个问题。我们认为这是一项非常具有挑战性的任务，其中传感和通信能力有限的机器人必须遵循环境特征的梯度，并使用差分进化来进化模拟机器人的神经网络控制器。我们进行了系统研究，通过改变竞技场的大小和群体中机器人的数量来衡量该方法的灵活性和可扩展性。实验证实了我们的方法的可行性，进化的机器人控制器诱导群体行为来解决任务。我们发现，在最恶劣的条件下（环境线索最弱）演化出的解决方案是最灵活的，并且在群体规模方面存在最佳点。此外，我们观察了群体的集体运动，展示了在进化过程中没有被代表和选择的真正的突发行为。

AI.tldr: 研究通过进化算法解决有限感知机器人群体的集体行为控制问题
AI.motivation: 设计机器人群体控制器时，个体控制器细节与群体行为之间的关系不明确，难以有效控制
AI.method: 采用差分进化算法演化神经网络控制器，并通过改变场地大小和机器人数量测试方法的灵活性和可扩展性
AI.result: 实验验证了方法的可行性，严苛条件下进化的控制器更具灵活性，存在最佳群体规模，且出现未被直接选择的集体行为
AI.conclusion: 进化算法能有效解决有限感知群体的控制问题，环境条件影响灵活性和涌现行为，存在最佳群体规模

authors_text: Yuanbo Hou,Zhaoyi Liu,Bo Kang,Yun Wang,Dick Botteldooren
title: CT-SAT: Contextual Transformer for Sequential Audio Tagging
title_zh: CT-SAT：用于顺序音频标记的上下文转换器
abstract: Sequential audio event tagging can provide not only the type information of audio events, but also the order information between events and the number of events that occur in an audio clip. Most previous works on audio event sequence analysis rely on connectionist temporal classification (CTC). However, CTC's conditional independence assumption prevents it from effectively learning correlations between diverse audio events. This paper first attempts to introduce Transformer into sequential audio tagging, since Transformers perform well in sequence-related tasks. To better utilize contextual information of audio event sequences, we draw on the idea of bidirectional recurrent neural networks, and propose a contextual Transformer (cTransformer) with a bidirectional decoder that could exploit the forward and backward information of event sequences. Experiments on the real-life polyphonic audio dataset show that, compared to CTC-based methods, the cTransformer can effectively combine the fine-grained acoustic representations from the encoder and coarse-grained audio event cues to exploit contextual information to successfully recognize and predict audio event sequences.
summary: Sequential audio event tagging can provide not only the type information of audio events, but also the order information between events and the number of events that occur in an audio clip. Most previous works on audio event sequence analysis rely on connectionist temporal classification (CTC). However, CTC's conditional independence assumption prevents it from effectively learning correlations between diverse audio events. This paper first attempts to introduce Transformer into sequential audio tagging, since Transformers perform well in sequence-related tasks. To better utilize contextual information of audio event sequences, we draw on the idea of bidirectional recurrent neural networks, and propose a contextual Transformer (cTransformer) with a bidirectional decoder that could exploit the forward and backward information of event sequences. Experiments on the real-life polyphonic audio dataset show that, compared to CTC-based methods, the cTransformer can effectively combine the fine-grained acoustic representations from the encoder and coarse-grained audio event cues to exploit contextual information to successfully recognize and predict audio event sequences.
abstract_zh: 顺序音频事件标记不仅可以提供音频事件的类型信息，还可以提供事件之间的顺序信息以及音频片段中发生的事件的数量。大多数先前关于音频事件序列分析的工作都依赖于联结主义时间分类（CTC）。然而，CTC 的条件独立性假设使其无法有效学习不同音频事件之间的相关性。本文首先尝试将 Transformer 引入顺序音频标记中，因为 Transformer 在序列相关任务中表现良好。为了更好地利用音频事件序列的上下文信息，我们借鉴双向循环神经网络的思想，提出了一种带有双向解码器的上下文变换器（cTransformer），可以利用事件序列的前向和后向信息。在现实生活中的复调音频数据集上的实验表明，与基于 CTC 的方法相比，cTransformer 可以有效地结合编码器的细粒度声学表示和粗粒度音频事件线索，以利用上下文信息来成功识别和预测音频事件序列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的上下文感知模型（cTransformer），用于解决顺序音频标签任务，以克服传统CTC方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统CTC方法因条件独立性假设无法有效学习音频事件间的相关性，而Transformer在序列任务中表现优异，需探索其在音频事件序列分析中的应用。
AI.method: 设计具有双向解码器的cTransformer，结合双向RNN思想，融合编码器的细粒度声学特征与粗粒度音频事件线索，以捕捉事件序列的上下文信息。
AI.result: 在真实多音音频数据集上，cTransformer相比CTC方法更有效地识别和预测音频事件序列，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: cTransformer通过整合上下文信息，能有效提升音频事件序列识别的准确性，为顺序音频标签任务提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的上下文感知模型（cTransformer），用于解决顺序音频标签任务，以克服传统CTC方法的局限性。

authors_text: Matthias Seibold,Armando Hoch,Mazda Farshad,Nassir Navab,Philipp Fürnstahl
title: Conditional Generative Data Augmentation for Clinical Audio Datasets
title_zh: 临床音频数据集的条件生成数据增强
abstract: In this work, we propose a novel data augmentation method for clinical audio datasets based on a conditional Wasserstein Generative Adversarial Network with Gradient Penalty (cWGAN-GP), operating on log-mel spectrograms. To validate our method, we created a clinical audio dataset which was recorded in a real-world operating room during Total Hip Arthroplasty (THA) procedures and contains typical sounds which resemble the different phases of the intervention. We demonstrate the capability of the proposed method to generate realistic class-conditioned samples from the dataset distribution and show that training with the generated augmented samples outperforms classical audio augmentation methods in terms of classification performance. The performance was evaluated using a ResNet-18 classifier which shows a mean Macro F1-score improvement of 1.70% in a 5-fold cross validation experiment using the proposed augmentation method. Because clinical data is often expensive to acquire, the development of realistic and high-quality data augmentation methods is crucial to improve the robustness and generalization capabilities of learning-based algorithms which is especially important for safety-critical medical applications. Therefore, the proposed data augmentation method is an important step towards improving the data bottleneck for clinical audio-based machine learning systems.
summary: In this work, we propose a novel data augmentation method for clinical audio datasets based on a conditional Wasserstein Generative Adversarial Network with Gradient Penalty (cWGAN-GP), operating on log-mel spectrograms. To validate our method, we created a clinical audio dataset which was recorded in a real-world operating room during Total Hip Arthroplasty (THA) procedures and contains typical sounds which resemble the different phases of the intervention. We demonstrate the capability of the proposed method to generate realistic class-conditioned samples from the dataset distribution and show that training with the generated augmented samples outperforms classical audio augmentation methods in terms of classification performance. The performance was evaluated using a ResNet-18 classifier which shows a mean Macro F1-score improvement of 1.70% in a 5-fold cross validation experiment using the proposed augmentation method. Because clinical data is often expensive to acquire, the development of realistic and high-quality data augmentation methods is crucial to improve the robustness and generalization capabilities of learning-based algorithms which is especially important for safety-critical medical applications. Therefore, the proposed data augmentation method is an important step towards improving the data bottleneck for clinical audio-based machine learning systems.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于带梯度惩罚的条件 Wasserstein 生成对抗网络 (cWGAN-GP) 的临床音频数据集的新型数据增强方法，在 log-mel 频谱图上运行。为了验证我们的方法，我们创建了一个临床音频数据集，该数据集是在全髋关节置换术 (THA) 过程中在真实手术室中录制的，并且包含类似于干预不同阶段的典型声音。我们展示了所提出的方法从数据集分布生成真实的类条件样本的能力，并表明使用生成的增强样本进行训练在分类性能方面优于经典的音频增强方法。使用 ResNet-18 分类器评估性能，该分类器在使用所提出的增强方法的 5 倍交叉验证实验中显示平均宏 F1 分数提高了 1.70%。由于临床数据的获取成本通常很高，因此开发真实且高质量的数据增强方法对于提高基于学习的算法的鲁棒性和泛化能力至关重要，这对于安全关键的医疗应用尤其重要。因此，所提出的数据增强方法是改善基于临床音频的机器学习系统的数据瓶颈的重要一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件Wasserstein GAN的临床音频数据增强方法，用于生成高质量的手术室声音样本以提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 临床音频数据获取成本高且样本有限，传统数据增强方法难以生成符合实际分布的高质量样本，影响医疗AI模型的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于条件Wasserstein GAN with Gradient Penalty（cWGAN-GP）框架，作用于log-mel频谱图，生成与临床手术阶段对应的条件化音频样本。
AI.result: 在5折交叉验证中，使用生成样本训练的ResNet-18分类器实现1.70%的平均宏F1分数提升，优于传统音频增强方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决临床音频数据瓶颈提供了有效方案，可提升医疗AI系统的安全性与可靠性。

search_text: Conditional Generative Data Augmentation for Clinical Audio Datasets 临床音频数据集的条件生成数据增强 In this work, we propose a novel data augmentation method for clinical audio datasets based on a conditional Wasserstein Generative Adversarial Network with Gradient Penalty (cWGAN-GP), operating on log-mel spectrograms. To validate our method, we created a clinical audio dataset which was recorded in a real-world operating room during Total Hip Arthroplasty (THA) procedures and contains typical sounds which resemble the different phases of the intervention. We demonstrate the capability of the proposed method to generate realistic class-conditioned samples from the dataset distribution and show that training with the generated augmented samples outperforms classical audio augmentation methods in terms of classification performance. The performance was evaluated using a ResNet-18 classifier which shows a mean Macro F1-score improvement of 1.70% in a 5-fold cross validation experiment using the proposed augmentation method. Because clinical data is often expensive to acquire, the development of realistic and high-quality data augmentation methods is crucial to improve the robustness and generalization capabilities of learning-based algorithms which is especially important for safety-critical medical applications. Therefore, the proposed data augmentation method is an important step towards improving the data bottleneck for clinical audio-based machine learning systems. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于带梯度惩罚的条件 Wasserstein 生成对抗网络 (cWGAN-GP) 的临床音频数据集的新型数据增强方法，在 log-mel 频谱图上运行。为了验证我们的方法，我们创建了一个临床音频数据集，该数据集是在全髋关节置换术 (THA) 过程中在真实手术室中录制的，并且包含类似于干预不同阶段的典型声音。我们展示了所提出的方法从数据集分布生成真实的类条件样本的能力，并表明使用生成的增强样本进行训练在分类性能方面优于经典的音频增强方法。使用 ResNet-18 分类器评估性能，该分类器在使用所提出的增强方法的 5 倍交叉验证实验中显示平均宏 F1 分数提高了 1.70%。由于临床数据的获取成本通常很高，因此开发真实且高质量的数据增强方法对于提高基于学习的算法的鲁棒性和泛化能力至关重要，这对于安全关键的医疗应用尤其重要。因此，所提出的数据增强方法是改善基于临床音频的机器学习系统的数据瓶颈的重要一步。 本文提出一种基于条件Wasserstein GAN的临床音频数据增强方法，用于生成高质量的手术室声音样本以提升分类性能。 Matthias Seibold,Armando Hoch,Mazda Farshad,Nassir Navab,Philipp Fürnstahl cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Xikai Yang,Zhishen Huang,Yong Long,Saiprasad Ravishankar
title: Multi-layer Clustering-based Residual Sparsifying Transform for Low-dose CT Image Reconstruction
title_zh: 基于多层聚类的残差稀疏变换低剂量CT图像重建
comment: 19 pages, 12 figures, submitted to the Medical Physics
comments: 19 pages, 12 figures, submitted to the Medical Physics
abstract: The recently proposed sparsifying transform models incur low computational cost and have been applied to medical imaging. Meanwhile, deep models with nested network structure reveal great potential for learning features in different layers. In this study, we propose a network-structured sparsifying transform learning approach for X-ray computed tomography (CT), which we refer to as multi-layer clustering-based residual sparsifying transform (MCST) learning. The proposed MCST scheme learns multiple different unitary transforms in each layer by dividing each layer's input into several classes. We apply the MCST model to low-dose CT (LDCT) reconstruction by deploying the learned MCST model into the regularizer in penalized weighted least squares (PWLS) reconstruction. We conducted LDCT reconstruction experiments on XCAT phantom data and Mayo Clinic data and trained the MCST model with 2 (or 3) layers and with 5 clusters in each layer. The learned transforms in the same layer showed rich features while additional information is extracted from representation residuals. Our simulation results demonstrate that PWLS-MCST achieves better image reconstruction quality than the conventional FBP method and PWLS with edge-preserving (EP) regularizer. It also outperformed recent advanced methods like PWLS with a learned multi-layer residual sparsifying transform prior (MARS) and PWLS with a union of learned transforms (ULTRA), especially for displaying clear edges and preserving subtle details.
summary: The recently proposed sparsifying transform models incur low computational cost and have been applied to medical imaging. Meanwhile, deep models with nested network structure reveal great potential for learning features in different layers. In this study, we propose a network-structured sparsifying transform learning approach for X-ray computed tomography (CT), which we refer to as multi-layer clustering-based residual sparsifying transform (MCST) learning. The proposed MCST scheme learns multiple different unitary transforms in each layer by dividing each layer's input into several classes. We apply the MCST model to low-dose CT (LDCT) reconstruction by deploying the learned MCST model into the regularizer in penalized weighted least squares (PWLS) reconstruction. We conducted LDCT reconstruction experiments on XCAT phantom data and Mayo Clinic data and trained the MCST model with 2 (or 3) layers and with 5 clusters in each layer. The learned transforms in the same layer showed rich features while additional information is extracted from representation residuals. Our simulation results demonstrate that PWLS-MCST achieves better image reconstruction quality than the conventional FBP method and PWLS with edge-preserving (EP) regularizer. It also outperformed recent advanced methods like PWLS with a learned multi-layer residual sparsifying transform prior (MARS) and PWLS with a union of learned transforms (ULTRA), especially for displaying clear edges and preserving subtle details.
abstract_zh: 最近提出的稀疏变换模型计算成本低，已应用于医学成像。同时，具有嵌套网络结构的深度模型揭示了学习不同层特征的巨大潜力。在本研究中，我们提出了一种用于 X 射线计算机断层扫描（CT）的网络结构稀疏变换学习方法，我们将其称为基于多层聚类的残差稀疏变换（MCST）学习。所提出的 MCST 方案通过将每层的输入划分为多个类来学习每层中的多个不同的酉变换。我们通过将学习到的 MCST 模型部署到惩罚加权最小二乘 (PWLS) 重建中的正则化器中，将 MCST 模型应用于低剂量 CT (LDCT) 重建。我们对XCAT体模数据和Mayo Clinic数据进行了LDCT重建实验，并训练了2（或3）层、每层5个簇的MCST模型。同一层中学习到的变换显示出丰富的特征，同时从表示残差中提取附加信息。我们的仿真结果表明，PWLS-MCST 比传统的 FBP 方法和具有边缘保留 (EP) 正则化器的 PWLS 实现了更好的图像重建质量。它还优于最新的先进方法，例如具有学习的多层残差稀疏变换先验 (MARS) 的 PWLS 和具有学习变换联合 (ULTRA) 的 PWLS，特别是在显示清晰的边缘和保留微妙的细节方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多层聚类的残差稀疏变换方法（MCST），用于低剂量CT图像重建，以提高图像质量。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏变换计算成本低但特征学习有限，深度网络可学习多层特征但复杂度高。本文旨在结合两者优势，通过分层聚类学习更有效的稀疏变换以提升低剂量CT重建效果。
AI.method: 设计多层网络结构，每层通过聚类将输入分为多类并学习不同正交变换，利用残差信息提取额外特征。将MCST嵌入加权最小二乘正则化框架（PWLS-MCST）进行图像重建。
AI.result: 在XCAT和梅奥诊所数据集上，PWLS-MCST在边缘保留和细节表现上优于FBP、PWLS-EP、MARS和ULTRA等方法，尤其在低剂量条件下效果显著。
AI.conclusion: MCST通过分层聚类与残差学习有效提升了低剂量CT重建质量，为医学影像领域提供了更优的稀疏变换模型。

authors_text: Sebastien Deschamps,Hichem Sahbi
title: Reinforcement-based frugal learning for satellite image change detection
title_zh: 基于强化的节俭学习卫星图像变化检测
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a novel interactive satellite image change detection algorithm based on active learning. The proposed approach is iterative and asks the user (oracle) questions about the targeted changes and according to the oracle's responses updates change detections. We consider a probabilistic framework which assigns to each unlabeled sample a relevance measure modeling how critical is that sample when training change detection functions. These relevance measures are obtained by minimizing an objective function mixing diversity, representativity and uncertainty. These criteria when combined allow exploring different data modes and also refining change detections. To further explore the potential of this objective function, we consider a reinforcement learning approach that finds the best combination of diversity, representativity and uncertainty, through active learning iterations, leading to better generalization as corroborated through experiments in interactive satellite image change detection.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a novel interactive satellite image change detection algorithm based on active learning. The proposed approach is iterative and asks the user (oracle) questions about the targeted changes and according to the oracle's responses updates change detections. We consider a probabilistic framework which assigns to each unlabeled sample a relevance measure modeling how critical is that sample when training change detection functions. These relevance measures are obtained by minimizing an objective function mixing diversity, representativity and uncertainty. These criteria when combined allow exploring different data modes and also refining change detections. To further explore the potential of this objective function, we consider a reinforcement learning approach that finds the best combination of diversity, representativity and uncertainty, through active learning iterations, leading to better generalization as corroborated through experiments in interactive satellite image change detection.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于主动学习的新型交互式卫星图像变化检测算法。所提出的方法是迭代的，向用户（预言机）询问有关目标更改的问题，并根据预言机的响应更新更改检测。我们考虑一个概率框架，它为每个未标记的样本分配一个相关性度量，以建模该样本在训练变化检测函数时的重要性。这些相关性度量是通过最小化混合多样性、代表性和不确定性的目标函数来获得的。这些标准结合起来可以探索不同的数据模式并完善变化检测。为了进一步探索该目标函数的潜力，我们考虑采用强化学习方法，通过主动学习迭代找到多样性、代表性和不确定性的最佳组合，从而实现更好的泛化，正如交互式卫星图像变化检测实验所证实的那样。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于主动学习和强化学习的卫星图像变化检测算法，通过迭代提问用户优化变化检测结果。
AI.motivation: 传统卫星图像变化检测依赖大量标注数据，而主动学习可减少标注需求，但如何有效选择关键样本仍是挑战。
AI.method: 构建概率框架计算样本相关性，结合多样性、代表性和不确定性指标优化目标函数，并通过强化学习迭代优化样本选择策略。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在交互式卫星图像变化检测任务中实现了更优的泛化性能。

search_text: Reinforcement-based frugal learning for satellite image change detection 基于强化的节俭学习卫星图像变化检测 In this paper, we introduce a novel interactive satellite image change detection algorithm based on active learning. The proposed approach is iterative and asks the user (oracle) questions about the targeted changes and according to the oracle's responses updates change detections. We consider a probabilistic framework which assigns to each unlabeled sample a relevance measure modeling how critical is that sample when training change detection functions. These relevance measures are obtained by minimizing an objective function mixing diversity, representativity and uncertainty. These criteria when combined allow exploring different data modes and also refining change detections. To further explore the potential of this objective function, we consider a reinforcement learning approach that finds the best combination of diversity, representativity and uncertainty, through active learning iterations, leading to better generalization as corroborated through experiments in interactive satellite image change detection. 在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于主动学习的新型交互式卫星图像变化检测算法。所提出的方法是迭代的，向用户（预言机）询问有关目标更改的问题，并根据预言机的响应更新更改检测。我们考虑一个概率框架，它为每个未标记的样本分配一个相关性度量，以建模该样本在训练变化检测函数时的重要性。这些相关性度量是通过最小化混合多样性、代表性和不确定性的目标函数来获得的。这些标准结合起来可以探索不同的数据模式并完善变化检测。为了进一步探索该目标函数的潜力，我们考虑采用强化学习方法，通过主动学习迭代找到多样性、代表性和不确定性的最佳组合，从而实现更好的泛化，正如交互式卫星图像变化检测实验所证实的那样。 本文提出一种基于主动学习和强化学习的卫星图像变化检测算法，通过迭代提问用户优化变化检测结果。 Sebastien Deschamps,Hichem Sahbi cs.CV

authors_text: Rishabh Jain,Mariam Yiwere,Dan Bigioi,Peter Corcoran,Horia Cucu
title: A Text-to-Speech Pipeline, Evaluation Methodology, and Initial Fine-Tuning Results for Child Speech Synthesis
title_zh: 儿童语音合成的文本到语音管道、评估方法和初始微调结果
abstract: Speech synthesis has come a long way as current text-to-speech (TTS) models can now generate natural human-sounding speech. However, most of the TTS research focuses on using adult speech data and there has been very limited work done on child speech synthesis. This study developed and validated a training pipeline for fine-tuning state-of-the-art (SOTA) neural TTS models using child speech datasets. This approach adopts a multi-speaker TTS retuning workflow to provide a transfer-learning pipeline. A publicly available child speech dataset was cleaned to provide a smaller subset of approximately 19 hours, which formed the basis of our fine-tuning experiments. Both subjective and objective evaluations were performed using a pretrained MOSNet for objective evaluation and a novel subjective framework for mean opinion score (MOS) evaluations. Subjective evaluations achieved the MOS of 3.95 for speech intelligibility, 3.89 for voice naturalness, and 3.96 for voice consistency. Objective evaluation using a pretrained MOSNet showed a strong correlation between real and synthetic child voices. Speaker similarity was also verified by calculating the cosine similarity between the embeddings of utterances. An automatic speech recognition (ASR) model is also used to provide a word error rate (WER) comparison between the real and synthetic child voices. The final trained TTS model was able to synthesize child-like speech from reference audio samples as short as 5 seconds.
summary: Speech synthesis has come a long way as current text-to-speech (TTS) models can now generate natural human-sounding speech. However, most of the TTS research focuses on using adult speech data and there has been very limited work done on child speech synthesis. This study developed and validated a training pipeline for fine-tuning state-of-the-art (SOTA) neural TTS models using child speech datasets. This approach adopts a multi-speaker TTS retuning workflow to provide a transfer-learning pipeline. A publicly available child speech dataset was cleaned to provide a smaller subset of approximately 19 hours, which formed the basis of our fine-tuning experiments. Both subjective and objective evaluations were performed using a pretrained MOSNet for objective evaluation and a novel subjective framework for mean opinion score (MOS) evaluations. Subjective evaluations achieved the MOS of 3.95 for speech intelligibility, 3.89 for voice naturalness, and 3.96 for voice consistency. Objective evaluation using a pretrained MOSNet showed a strong correlation between real and synthetic child voices. Speaker similarity was also verified by calculating the cosine similarity between the embeddings of utterances. An automatic speech recognition (ASR) model is also used to provide a word error rate (WER) comparison between the real and synthetic child voices. The final trained TTS model was able to synthesize child-like speech from reference audio samples as short as 5 seconds.
abstract_zh: 语音合成已经取得了长足的进步，当前的文本转语音 (TTS) 模型现在可以生成自然的人类发音语音。然而，大多数 TTS 研究都集中在使用成人语音数据，而在儿童语音合成方面所做的工作非常有限。这项研究开发并验证了一个训练管道，用于使用儿童语音数据集微调最先进的 (SOTA) 神经 TTS 模型。该方法采用多说话者 TTS 重新调整工作流程来提供迁移学习管道。公开的儿童语音数据集经过清理，提供了大约 19 小时的较小子集，这构成了我们微调实验的基础。主观和客观评估均使用预训练的 MOSNet 进行客观评估，并使用新颖的主观框架进行平均意见得分 (MOS) 评估。主观评价的语音清晰度 MOS 为 3.95，语音自然度 MOS 为 3.89，语音一致性 MOS 为 3.96。使用预训练的 MOSNet 进行的客观评估显示真实儿童声音和合成儿童声音之间存在很强的相关性。还通过计算话语嵌入之间的余弦相似度来验证说话者相似度。自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型还用于提供真实儿童声音和合成儿童声音之间的单词错误率 (WER) 比较。最终训练的 TTS 模型能够从短至 5 秒的参考音频样本合成类似儿童的语音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对儿童语音合成的文本到语音（TTS）训练流程，并通过主观和客观评估验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS研究主要基于成人语音数据，儿童语音合成研究较少，需开发专门的训练方法以生成自然的儿童语音。
AI.method: 采用多说话人TTS微调流程，使用清洗后的19小时儿童语音数据集进行实验，结合预训练MOSNet和主观评估框架，通过ASR模型计算词错误率（WER）进行验证。
AI.result: 主观评估获得语音可懂度3.95、自然度3.89、一致性3.96的MOS分数；客观评估显示合成语音与真实儿童语音高度相关，且5秒参考音频即可生成类儿童语音。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了高质量儿童语音合成，为后续研究提供了可行的迁移学习框架和评估体系。

authors_text: Nina Mesing Stausholm
title: Improved Differentially Private Euclidean Distance Approximation
title_zh: 改进的差分私有欧几里德距离近似
abstract: This work shows how to privately and more accurately estimate Euclidean distance between pairs of vectors. Input vectors $x$ and $y$ are mapped to differentially private sketches $x'$ and $y'$, from which one can estimate the distance between $x$ and $y$. Our estimator relies on the Sparser Johnson-Lindenstrauss constructions by Kane \& Nelson (Journal of the ACM 2014), which for any $0<α,β<1/2$ have optimal output dimension $k=Θ(α^{-2}\log(1/β))$ and sparsity $s=O(α^{-1}\log(1/β))$. We combine the constructions of Kane \& Nelson with either the Laplace or the Gaussian mechanism from the differential privacy literature, depending on the privacy parameters $\varepsilon$ and $δ$. We also suggest a differentially private version of Fast Johnson-Lindenstrauss Transform (FJLT) by Ailon \& Chazelle (SIAM Journal of Computing 2009) which offers a tradeoff in speed for variance for certain parameters. We answer an open question by Kenthapadi et al.~(Journal of Privacy and Confidentiality 2013) by analyzing the privacy and utility guarantees of an estimator for Euclidean distance, relying on Laplacian rather than Gaussian noise. We prove that the Laplace mechanism yields lower variance than the Gaussian mechanism whenever $δ<β^{O(1/α)}$. Thus, our work poses an improvement over the work of Kenthapadi et al.~by giving a more efficient estimator with lower variance for sufficiently small $δ$. Our sketch also achieves \emph{pure} differential privacy as a neat side-effect of the Laplace mechanism rather than the \emph{approximate} differential privacy guarantee of the Gaussian mechanism, which may not be sufficiently strong for some settings.
summary: This work shows how to privately and more accurately estimate Euclidean distance between pairs of vectors. Input vectors $x$ and $y$ are mapped to differentially private sketches $x'$ and $y'$, from which one can estimate the distance between $x$ and $y$. Our estimator relies on the Sparser Johnson-Lindenstrauss constructions by Kane \& Nelson (Journal of the ACM 2014), which for any $0<α,β<1/2$ have optimal output dimension $k=Θ(α^{-2}\log(1/β))$ and sparsity $s=O(α^{-1}\log(1/β))$. We combine the constructions of Kane \& Nelson with either the Laplace or the Gaussian mechanism from the differential privacy literature, depending on the privacy parameters $\varepsilon$ and $δ$. We also suggest a differentially private version of Fast Johnson-Lindenstrauss Transform (FJLT) by Ailon \& Chazelle (SIAM Journal of Computing 2009) which offers a tradeoff in speed for variance for certain parameters. We answer an open question by Kenthapadi et al.~(Journal of Privacy and Confidentiality 2013) by analyzing the privacy and utility guarantees of an estimator for Euclidean distance, relying on Laplacian rather than Gaussian noise. We prove that the Laplace mechanism yields lower variance than the Gaussian mechanism whenever $δ<β^{O(1/α)}$. Thus, our work poses an improvement over the work of Kenthapadi et al.~by giving a more efficient estimator with lower variance for sufficiently small $δ$. Our sketch also achieves \emph{pure} differential privacy as a neat side-effect of the Laplace mechanism rather than the \emph{approximate} differential privacy guarantee of the Gaussian mechanism, which may not be sufficiently strong for some settings.
abstract_zh: 这项工作展示了如何私下且更准确地估计向量对之间的欧几里得距离。输入向量$x$和$y$被映射到差分私有草图$x'$和$y'$，从中可以估计$x$和$y$之间的距离。我们的估计器依赖于 Kane & Nelson 的 Sparser Johnson-Lindenstrauss 构造（Journal of the ACM 2014），对于任何 $0<α,β<1/2$ 具有最佳输出维度 $k=θ(α^{-2}\log(1/β))$ 和稀疏度 $s=O(α^{-1}\log(1/β))$。我们将 Kane & Nelson 的结构与差分隐私文献中的拉普拉斯或高斯机制结合起来，具体取决于隐私参数 $\varepsilon$ 和 $δ$。我们还建议 Ailon \& Chazelle（SIAM Journal of Computers 2009）提出的快速 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 变换 (FJLT) 的差分私有版本，它为某些参数的方差提供了速度权衡。我们通过分析欧几里得距离估计器的隐私和效用保证，依赖于拉普拉斯噪声而不是高斯噪声，回答了 Kenthpadi 等人~（隐私与机密杂志 2013 年）提出的一个开放性问题。我们证明，每当 $δ<β^{O(1/α)}$ 时，拉普拉斯机制产生的方差低于高斯机制。因此，我们的工作对 Kenthpadi 等人的工作进行了改进~通过为足够小的 $δ$ 提供具有较低方差的更有效的估计器。我们的草图还实现了 emph{pure} 差分隐私，作为拉普拉斯机制的一个巧妙的副作用，而不是高斯机制的 \emph{approximate} 差分隐私保证，这对于某些设置来说可能不够强大。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的差分隐私欧几里得距离估计方法，通过结合稀疏约翰逊-刘易斯变换和拉普拉斯/高斯机制，实现更准确的隐私保护距离估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在差分隐私保护下估计欧几里得距离时存在精度不足或隐私保证较弱的问题，需在隐私与效用间寻求更优平衡。
AI.method: 结合Kane & Nelson的稀疏约翰逊-刘易斯构造与拉普拉斯/高斯机制，设计差分隐私的快速变换，并分析拉普拉斯机制在特定参数下的方差优势。
AI.result: 证明拉普拉斯机制在δ<β^{O(1/α)}时方差低于高斯机制，实现纯差分隐私，且在足够小δ下提供更高效、低方差的距离估计。
AI.conclusion: 本工作通过优化隐私机制与维度约简方法，在保证纯差分隐私的前提下提升了距离估计的准确性，优于现有方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的差分隐私欧几里得距离估计方法，通过结合稀疏约翰逊-刘易斯变换和拉普拉斯/高斯机制，实现更准确的隐私保护距离估计。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在差分隐私保护下估计欧几里得距离时存在精度不足或隐私保证较弱的问题，需在隐私与效用间寻求更优平衡。
ai_content.method: 结合Kane & Nelson的稀疏约翰逊-刘易斯构造与拉普拉斯/高斯机制，设计差分隐私的快速变换，并分析拉普拉斯机制在特定参数下的方差优势。
ai_content.result: 证明拉普拉斯机制在δ<β^{O(1/α)}时方差低于高斯机制，实现纯差分隐私，且在足够小δ下提供更高效、低方差的距离估计。
ai_content.conclusion: 本工作通过优化隐私机制与维度约简方法，在保证纯差分隐私的前提下提升了距离估计的准确性，优于现有方法。

search_text: Improved Differentially Private Euclidean Distance Approximation 改进的差分私有欧几里德距离近似 This work shows how to privately and more accurately estimate Euclidean distance between pairs of vectors. Input vectors $x$ and $y$ are mapped to differentially private sketches $x'$ and $y'$, from which one can estimate the distance between $x$ and $y$. Our estimator relies on the Sparser Johnson-Lindenstrauss constructions by Kane \& Nelson (Journal of the ACM 2014), which for any $0<α,β<1/2$ have optimal output dimension $k=Θ(α^{-2}\log(1/β))$ and sparsity $s=O(α^{-1}\log(1/β))$. We combine the constructions of Kane \& Nelson with either the Laplace or the Gaussian mechanism from the differential privacy literature, depending on the privacy parameters $\varepsilon$ and $δ$. We also suggest a differentially private version of Fast Johnson-Lindenstrauss Transform (FJLT) by Ailon \& Chazelle (SIAM Journal of Computing 2009) which offers a tradeoff in speed for variance for certain parameters. We answer an open question by Kenthapadi et al.~(Journal of Privacy and Confidentiality 2013) by analyzing the privacy and utility guarantees of an estimator for Euclidean distance, relying on Laplacian rather than Gaussian noise. We prove that the Laplace mechanism yields lower variance than the Gaussian mechanism whenever $δ<β^{O(1/α)}$. Thus, our work poses an improvement over the work of Kenthapadi et al.~by giving a more efficient estimator with lower variance for sufficiently small $δ$. Our sketch also achieves \emph{pure} differential privacy as a neat side-effect of the Laplace mechanism rather than the \emph{approximate} differential privacy guarantee of the Gaussian mechanism, which may not be sufficiently strong for some settings. 这项工作展示了如何私下且更准确地估计向量对之间的欧几里得距离。输入向量$x$和$y$被映射到差分私有草图$x'$和$y'$，从中可以估计$x$和$y$之间的距离。我们的估计器依赖于 Kane & Nelson 的 Sparser Johnson-Lindenstrauss 构造（Journal of the ACM 2014），对于任何 $0<α,β<1/2$ 具有最佳输出维度 $k=θ(α^{-2}\log(1/β))$ 和稀疏度 $s=O(α^{-1}\log(1/β))$。我们将 Kane & Nelson 的结构与差分隐私文献中的拉普拉斯或高斯机制结合起来，具体取决于隐私参数 $\varepsilon$ 和 $δ$。我们还建议 Ailon \& Chazelle（SIAM Journal of Computers 2009）提出的快速 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 变换 (FJLT) 的差分私有版本，它为某些参数的方差提供了速度权衡。我们通过分析欧几里得距离估计器的隐私和效用保证，依赖于拉普拉斯噪声而不是高斯噪声，回答了 Kenthpadi 等人~（隐私与机密杂志 2013 年）提出的一个开放性问题。我们证明，每当 $δ<β^{O(1/α)}$ 时，拉普拉斯机制产生的方差低于高斯机制。因此，我们的工作对 Kenthpadi 等人的工作进行了改进~通过为足够小的 $δ$ 提供具有较低方差的更有效的估计器。我们的草图还实现了 emph{pure} 差分隐私，作为拉普拉斯机制的一个巧妙的副作用，而不是高斯机制的 \emph{approximate} 差分隐私保证，这对于某些设置来说可能不够强大。 本文提出了一种改进的差分隐私欧几里得距离估计方法，通过结合稀疏约翰逊-刘易斯变换和拉普拉斯/高斯机制，实现更准确的隐私保护距离估计。 Nina Mesing Stausholm cs.DS

authors_text: Hichem Sahbi,Sebastien Deschamps
title: Frugal Learning of Virtual Exemplars for Label-Efficient Satellite Image Change Detection
title_zh: 用于标签高效卫星图像变化检测的虚拟样本的节俭学习
abstract: In this paper, we devise a novel interactive satellite image change detection algorithm based on active learning. The proposed framework is iterative and relies on a question and answer model which asks the oracle (user) questions about the most informative display (subset of critical images), and according to the user's responses, updates change detections. The contribution of our framework resides in a novel display model which selects the most representative and diverse virtual exemplars that adversely challenge the learned change detection functions, thereby leading to highly discriminating functions in the subsequent iterations of active learning. Extensive experiments, conducted on the challenging task of interactive satellite image change detection, show the superiority of the proposed virtual display model against the related work.
summary: In this paper, we devise a novel interactive satellite image change detection algorithm based on active learning. The proposed framework is iterative and relies on a question and answer model which asks the oracle (user) questions about the most informative display (subset of critical images), and according to the user's responses, updates change detections. The contribution of our framework resides in a novel display model which selects the most representative and diverse virtual exemplars that adversely challenge the learned change detection functions, thereby leading to highly discriminating functions in the subsequent iterations of active learning. Extensive experiments, conducted on the challenging task of interactive satellite image change detection, show the superiority of the proposed virtual display model against the related work.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们设计了一种基于主动学习的新型交互式卫星图像变化检测算法。所提出的框架是迭代的，依赖于问答模型，该模型向预言机（用户）询问有关信息最丰富的显示（关键图像的子集）的问题，并根据用户的响应更新更改检测。我们框架的贡献在于一种新颖的显示模型，该模型选择最具代表性和多样化的虚拟示例，这些示例对学习到的变化检测功能产生不利挑战，从而在主动学习的后续迭代中产生高度区分的功能。针对交互式卫星图像变化检测这一挑战性任务进行的大量实验表明，所提出的虚拟显示模型相对于相关工作具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于主动学习的高效卫星图像变化检测算法，通过虚拟示例减少标签需求
AI.motivation: 现有方法在标签效率和用户交互需求方面存在不足，需更高效的方法
AI.method: 采用迭代问答框架，通过选择最具代表性和多样性的虚拟示例，主动学习挑战模型，优化变化检测函数
AI.result: 实验表明该虚拟显示模型在交互式卫星图像变化检测任务中优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过有效利用虚拟示例，提升了变化检测的效率和准确性，为标签高效的学习提供了新思路

authors_text: Sahil Sidheekh,Chris B. Dock,Tushar Jain,Radu Balan,Maneesh K. Singh
title: VQ-Flows: Vector Quantized Local Normalizing Flows
title_zh: VQ-Flows：矢量量化局部归一化流
comment: Accepted to The 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI) 2022
comments: Accepted to The 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI) 2022
abstract: Normalizing flows provide an elegant approach to generative modeling that allows for efficient sampling and exact density evaluation of unknown data distributions. However, current techniques have significant limitations in their expressivity when the data distribution is supported on a low-dimensional manifold or has a non-trivial topology. We introduce a novel statistical framework for learning a mixture of local normalizing flows as "chart maps" over the data manifold. Our framework augments the expressivity of recent approaches while preserving the signature property of normalizing flows, that they admit exact density evaluation. We learn a suitable atlas of charts for the data manifold via a vector quantized auto-encoder (VQ-AE) and the distributions over them using a conditional flow. We validate experimentally that our probabilistic framework enables existing approaches to better model data distributions over complex manifolds.
summary: Normalizing flows provide an elegant approach to generative modeling that allows for efficient sampling and exact density evaluation of unknown data distributions. However, current techniques have significant limitations in their expressivity when the data distribution is supported on a low-dimensional manifold or has a non-trivial topology. We introduce a novel statistical framework for learning a mixture of local normalizing flows as "chart maps" over the data manifold. Our framework augments the expressivity of recent approaches while preserving the signature property of normalizing flows, that they admit exact density evaluation. We learn a suitable atlas of charts for the data manifold via a vector quantized auto-encoder (VQ-AE) and the distributions over them using a conditional flow. We validate experimentally that our probabilistic framework enables existing approaches to better model data distributions over complex manifolds.
abstract_zh: 标准化流提供了一种优雅的生成建模方法，可以对未知数据分布进行高效采样和精确密度评估。然而，当数据分布支持低维流形或具有非平凡的拓扑时，当前的技术在表达能力方面具有显着的局限性。我们引入了一种新颖的统计框架，用于学习局部归一化流的混合作为数据流形上的“图表地图”。我们的框架增强了最新方法的表现力，同时保留了标准化流的标志属性，即它们允许精确的密度评估。我们通过矢量量化自动编码器（VQ-AE）学习数据流形的合适图表图集，并使用条件流学习它们的分布。我们通过实验验证了我们的概率框架使现有方法能够更好地对复杂流形上的数据分布进行建模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合向量量化自编码器（VQ-AE）和条件流的新型框架VQ-Flows，用于增强归一化流在复杂数据流形上的建模能力。
AI.motivation: 现有归一化流在处理低维流形或具有非平凡拓扑结构的数据时，存在表达能力不足的局限性，需提升模型对复杂数据分布的拟合能力。
AI.method: 通过VQ-AE学习数据流形的图册（atlas），利用条件流建模各图册对应的局部分布，将局部归一化流作为图表映射进行混合建模。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架能有效提升现有方法对复杂流形数据分布的建模效果，验证了其在保持密度精确评估特性的同时增强表达能力的可行性。
AI.conclusion: VQ-Flows通过结合VQ-AE与条件流，为处理复杂数据流形提供了更高效的生成模型框架，解决了归一化流的表达局限性。

authors_text: Chao Bian,Chao Qian
title: Running Time Analysis of the Non-dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm II (NSGA-II) using Binary or Stochastic Tournament Selection
title_zh: 使用二元或随机锦标赛选择的非支配排序遗传算法 II (NSGA-II) 的运行时间分析
abstract: Evolutionary algorithms (EAs) have been widely used to solve multi-objective optimization problems, and have become the most popular tool. However, the theoretical foundation of multi-objective EAs (MOEAs), especially the essential theoretical aspect, i.e., running time analysis, has been still largely underdeveloped. The few existing theoretical works mainly considered simple MOEAs, while the non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II), probably the most influential MOEA, has not been analyzed except for a very recent work considering a simplified variant without crossover. In this paper, we present a running time analysis of the standard NSGA-II for solving LOTZ, OneMinMax and COCZ, the three commonly used bi-objective optimization problems. Specifically, we prove that the expected running time (i.e., number of fitness evaluations) is $O(n^3)$ for LOTZ, and $O(n^2\log n)$ for OneMinMax and COCZ, which is surprisingly as same as that of the previously analyzed simple MOEAs, GSEMO and SEMO. Next, we introduce a new parent selection strategy, stochastic tournament selection (i.e., $k$ tournament selection where $k$ is uniformly sampled at random), to replace the binary tournament selection strategy of NSGA-II, decreasing the required expected running time to $O(n^2)$ for all the three problems. Experiments are also conducted, suggesting that the derived running time upper bounds are tight for LOTZ, and almost tight for OneMinMax and COCZ.
summary: Evolutionary algorithms (EAs) have been widely used to solve multi-objective optimization problems, and have become the most popular tool. However, the theoretical foundation of multi-objective EAs (MOEAs), especially the essential theoretical aspect, i.e., running time analysis, has been still largely underdeveloped. The few existing theoretical works mainly considered simple MOEAs, while the non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II), probably the most influential MOEA, has not been analyzed except for a very recent work considering a simplified variant without crossover. In this paper, we present a running time analysis of the standard NSGA-II for solving LOTZ, OneMinMax and COCZ, the three commonly used bi-objective optimization problems. Specifically, we prove that the expected running time (i.e., number of fitness evaluations) is $O(n^3)$ for LOTZ, and $O(n^2\log n)$ for OneMinMax and COCZ, which is surprisingly as same as that of the previously analyzed simple MOEAs, GSEMO and SEMO. Next, we introduce a new parent selection strategy, stochastic tournament selection (i.e., $k$ tournament selection where $k$ is uniformly sampled at random), to replace the binary tournament selection strategy of NSGA-II, decreasing the required expected running time to $O(n^2)$ for all the three problems. Experiments are also conducted, suggesting that the derived running time upper bounds are tight for LOTZ, and almost tight for OneMinMax and COCZ.
abstract_zh: 进化算法（EA）已广泛用于解决多目标优化问题，并已成为最流行的工具。然而，多目标 EA (MOEA) 的理论基础，特别是基本的理论方面，即运行时间分析，在很大程度上仍然不发达。现有的少数理论著作主要考虑了简单的 MOEA，而非支配排序遗传算法 II（NSGA-II）可能是最具影响力的 MOEA，除了最近的一项考虑无交叉的简化变体的工作外，尚未对其进行分析。在本文中，我们提出了标准 NSGA-II 的运行时间分析，用于解决 LOTZ、OneMinMax 和 COCZ 这三种常用的双目标优化问题。具体来说，我们证明了 LOTZ 的预期运行时间（即适应度评估的数量）为 $O(n^3)$，OneMinMax 和 COCZ 的预期运行时间为 $O(n^2\log n)$，这与之前分析的简单 MOEA、GSEMO 和 SEMO 的运行时间惊人地相同。接下来，我们引入一种新的父选择策略，即随机锦标赛选择（即 $k$ 锦标赛选择，其中 $k$ 是随机均匀采样的），以取代 NSGA-II 的二元锦标赛选择策略，将所有三个问题所需的预期运行时间减少到 $O(n^2)$。还进行了实验，表明导出的运行时间上限对于 LOTZ 来说很紧，对于 OneMinMax 和 COCZ 来说几乎是紧的。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了NSGA-II在解决多目标优化问题时的运行时间，并提出了一种改进的随机锦标赛选择策略以降低时间复杂度。
AI.motivation: 尽管多目标进化算法（MOEAs）应用广泛，但其理论基础尤其是运行时间分析仍不完善，特别是对NSGA-II这类主流算法的研究较少。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和实验验证，研究标准NSGA-II在LOTZ、OneMinMax和COCZ问题上的运行时间，并引入随机锦标赛选择策略替代二元锦标赛选择。
AI.result: 证明标准NSGA-II的期望运行时间为LOTZ的O(n³)和OneMinMax/COCZ的O(n² log n)，改进后的随机锦标赛选择策略将所有问题的运行时间降至O(n²)。
AI.conclusion: 随机锦标赛选择策略显著提升了NSGA-II的效率，且理论分析结果与实验验证一致，表明改进方法的有效性。

authors_text: Agneza Krajna,Mario Brcic,Tomislav Lipic,Juraj Doncevic
title: Explainability in reinforcement learning: perspective and position
title_zh: 强化学习的可解释性：视角和立场
comment: 18 pages, 4 figures, 76 references. keywords: explainable artificial intelligence, explainable reinforcement learning, XRL, XAI, risk attitudes, epistemic AI, proactivity
comments: 18 pages, 4 figures, 76 references. keywords: explainable artificial intelligence, explainable reinforcement learning, XRL, XAI, risk attitudes, epistemic AI, proactivity
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) has been embedded into many aspects of people's daily lives and it has become normal for people to have AI make decisions for them. Reinforcement learning (RL) models increase the space of solvable problems with respect to other machine learning paradigms. Some of the most interesting applications are in situations with non-differentiable expected reward function, operating in unknown or underdefined environment, as well as for algorithmic discovery that surpasses performance of any teacher, whereby agent learns from experimental experience through simple feedback. The range of applications and their social impact is vast, just to name a few: genomics, game-playing (chess, Go, etc.), general optimization, financial investment, governmental policies, self-driving cars, recommendation systems, etc. It is therefore essential to improve the trust and transparency of RL-based systems through explanations. Most articles dealing with explainability in artificial intelligence provide methods that concern supervised learning and there are very few articles dealing with this in the area of RL. The reasons for this are the credit assignment problem, delayed rewards, and the inability to assume that data is independently and identically distributed (i.i.d.). This position paper attempts to give a systematic overview of existing methods in the explainable RL area and propose a novel unified taxonomy, building and expanding on the existing ones. The position section describes pragmatic aspects of how explainability can be observed. The gap between the parties receiving and generating the explanation is especially emphasized. To reduce the gap and achieve honesty and truthfulness of explanations, we set up three pillars: proactivity, risk attitudes, and epistemological constraints. To this end, we illustrate our proposal on simple variants of the shortest path problem.

Reinforcement learning (RL) models increase the space of solvable problems with respect to other machine learning paradigms. Some of the most interesting applications are in situations with non-differentiable expected reward function, operating in unknown or underdefined environment, as well as for algorithmic discovery that surpasses performance of any teacher, whereby agent learns from experimental experience through simple feedback. The range of applications and their social impact is vast, just to name a few: genomics, game-playing (chess, Go, etc.), general optimization, financial investment, governmental policies, self-driving cars, recommendation systems, etc. It is therefore essential to improve the trust and transparency of RL-based systems through explanations. Most articles dealing with explainability in artificial intelligence provide methods that concern supervised learning and there are very few articles dealing with this in the area of RL. The reasons for this are the credit assignment problem, delayed rewards, and the inability to assume that data is independently and identically distributed (i.i.d.). This position paper attempts to give a systematic overview of existing methods in the explainable RL area and propose a novel unified taxonomy, building and expanding on the existing ones. The position section describes pragmatic aspects of how explainability can be observed. The gap between the parties receiving and generating the explanation is especially emphasized. To reduce the gap and achieve honesty and truthfulness of explanations, we set up three pillars: proactivity, risk attitudes, and epistemological constraints. To this end, we illustrate our proposal on simple variants of the shortest path problem.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）已经融入到人们日常生活的方方面面，让AI为人们做决策已经成为常态。相对于其他机器学习范式，强化学习 (RL) 模型增加了可解决问题的空间。一些最有趣的应用是在具有不可微的预期奖励函数的情况下，在未知或未定义的环境中运行，以及超越任何教师表现的算法发现，其中代理通过简单的反馈从实验经验中学习。应用范围及其社会影响非常广泛，仅举几例：基因组学、游戏（国际象棋、围棋等）、一般优化、金融投资、政府政策、自动驾驶汽车、推荐系统等。因此，通过解释来提高基于强化学习的系统的信任和透明度至关重要。大多数涉及人工智能可解释性的文章都提供了涉及监督学习的方法，而在强化学习领域涉及这一问题的文章很少。其原因是信用分配问题、延迟奖励以及无法假设数据是独立同分布（i.i.d.）的。这篇立场文件试图对可解释强化学习领域的现有方法进行系统概述，并提出一种新颖的统一分类法，在现有方法的基础上进行构建和扩展。立场部分描述了如何观察可解释性的实用方面。特别强调接收方和生成解释方之间的差距。为了缩小差距并实现解释的诚实和真实，我们建立了三个支柱：主动性、风险态度和认识论约束。为此，我们说明了我们关于最短路径问题的简单变体的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在系统综述可解释强化学习（RL）领域现有方法，提出新的统一分类体系，并通过最短路径问题实例验证框架。
AI.motivation: 当前AI可解释性研究多集中于监督学习，而RL因信用分配问题、延迟奖励和非i.i.d.数据特性，缺乏针对性研究，需建立专门解释框架以提升系统可信度。
AI.method: 构建包含三个支柱（主动性、风险态度、认识论约束）的解释框架，结合现有分类体系提出统一 taxonomy，并通过简化最短路径问题进行实例说明。
AI.result: 提出面向RL的可解释性分类体系与验证框架，强调解释生成与接收方的认知鸿沟问题，为后续研究提供系统化方向。
AI.conclusion: RL的特殊性要求定制化解释方法，需从主动性、风险认知和知识约束维度设计解释机制，未来研究应关注动态环境下的解释有效性验证。

The position section describes pragmatic aspects of how explainability can be observed. The gap between the parties receiving and generating the explanation is especially emphasized. To reduce the gap and achieve honesty and truthfulness of explanations, we set up three pillars: proactivity, risk attitudes, and epistemological constraints. To this end, we illustrate our proposal on simple variants of the shortest path problem. 人工智能（AI）已经融入到人们日常生活的方方面面，让AI为人们做决策已经成为常态。相对于其他机器学习范式，强化学习 (RL) 模型增加了可解决问题的空间。一些最有趣的应用是在具有不可微的预期奖励函数的情况下，在未知或未定义的环境中运行，以及超越任何教师表现的算法发现，其中代理通过简单的反馈从实验经验中学习。应用范围及其社会影响非常广泛，仅举几例：基因组学、游戏（国际象棋、围棋等）、一般优化、金融投资、政府政策、自动驾驶汽车、推荐系统等。因此，通过解释来提高基于强化学习的系统的信任和透明度至关重要。大多数涉及人工智能可解释性的文章都提供了涉及监督学习的方法，而在强化学习领域涉及这一问题的文章很少。其原因是信用分配问题、延迟奖励以及无法假设数据是独立同分布（i.i.d.）的。这篇立场文件试图对可解释强化学习领域的现有方法进行系统概述，并提出一种新颖的统一分类法，在现有方法的基础上进行构建和扩展。立场部分描述了如何观察可解释性的实用方面。特别强调接收方和生成解释方之间的差距。为了缩小差距并实现解释的诚实和真实，我们建立了三个支柱：主动性、风险态度和认识论约束。为此，我们说明了我们关于最短路径问题的简单变体的建议。 本文旨在系统综述可解释强化学习（RL）领域现有方法，提出新的统一分类体系，并通过最短路径问题实例验证框架。 Agneza Krajna,Mario Brcic,Tomislav Lipic,Juraj Doncevic cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Nicolás Navarro-Guerrero,Sibel Toprak,Josip Josifovski,Lorenzo Jamone
title: Visuo-Haptic Object Perception for Robots: An Overview
title_zh: 机器人视觉触觉物体感知：概述
abstract: The object perception capabilities of humans are impressive, and this becomes even more evident when trying to develop solutions with a similar proficiency in autonomous robots. While there have been notable advancements in the technologies for artificial vision and touch, the effective integration of these two sensory modalities in robotic applications still needs to be improved, and several open challenges exist. Taking inspiration from how humans combine visual and haptic perception to perceive object properties and drive the execution of manual tasks, this article summarises the current state of the art of visuo-haptic object perception in robots. Firstly, the biological basis of human multimodal object perception is outlined. Then, the latest advances in sensing technologies and data collection strategies for robots are discussed. Next, an overview of the main computational techniques is presented, highlighting the main challenges of multimodal machine learning and presenting a few representative articles in the areas of robotic object recognition, peripersonal space representation and manipulation. Finally, informed by the latest advancements and open challenges, this article outlines promising new research directions.

Firstly, the biological basis of human multimodal object perception is outlined. Then, the latest advances in sensing technologies and data collection strategies for robots are discussed. Next, an overview of the main computational techniques is presented, highlighting the main challenges of multimodal machine learning and presenting a few representative articles in the areas of robotic object recognition, peripersonal space representation and manipulation. Finally, informed by the latest advancements and open challenges, this article outlines promising new research directions.
abstract_zh: 人类的物体感知能力令人印象深刻，当尝试开发具有类似能力的自主机器人解决方案时，这一点变得更加明显。尽管人工视觉和触觉技术取得了显着进步，但这两种感官模式在机器人应用中的有效集成仍然需要改进，并且存在一些开放的挑战。本文从人类如何结合视觉和触觉感知来感知物体属性并驱动手动任务的执行中汲取灵感，总结了机器人中视觉触觉物体感知的当前技术水平。首先，概述了人类多模态物体感知的生物学基础。然后，讨论了机器人传感技术和数据收集策略的最新进展。接下来，概述了主要计算技术，强调了多模态机器学习的主要挑战，并介绍了机器人对象识别、周围空间表示和操纵领域的一些代表性文章。最后，根据最新进展和开放挑战，本文概述了有希望的新研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了机器人视觉-触觉物体感知的最新技术，探讨了多模态感知的整合方法及挑战。
AI.motivation: 人类通过视觉与触觉协同感知物体特性，而机器人在自主任务中尚未有效整合这两种感知模态，需借鉴生物机制改进技术。
AI.method: 从人类多模态感知的生物学基础出发，分析机器人感知技术、数据采集策略及计算方法，总结现有挑战与研究方向。
AI.result: 梳理了机器人物体识别、操作空间表示等领域的关键技术，指出现有算法在多模态学习中的局限性，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步融合生物启发机制与先进算法，推动机器人实现更高效、类人的视觉-触觉协同感知能力。

authors_text: Hensel Donato Jahja,Novanto Yudistira,Sutrisno
title: Mask Usage Recognition using Vision Transformer with Transfer Learning and Data Augmentation
title_zh: 使用具有迁移学习和数据增强功能的 Vision Transformer 进行掩模使用识别
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has disrupted various levels of society. The use of masks is essential in preventing the spread of COVID-19 by identifying an image of a person using a mask. Although only 23.1% of people use masks correctly, Artificial Neural Networks (ANN) can help classify the use of good masks to help slow the spread of the Covid-19 virus. However, it requires a large dataset to train an ANN that can classify the use of masks correctly. MaskedFace-Net is a suitable dataset consisting of 137016 digital images with 4 class labels, namely Mask, Mask Chin, Mask Mouth Chin, and Mask Nose Mouth. Mask classification training utilizes Vision Transformers (ViT) architecture with transfer learning method using pre-trained weights on ImageNet-21k, with random augmentation. In addition, the hyper-parameters of training of 20 epochs, an Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) optimizer with a learning rate of 0.03, a batch size of 64, a Gaussian Cumulative Distribution (GeLU) activation function, and a Cross-Entropy loss function are used to be applied on the training of three architectures of ViT, namely Base-16, Large-16, and Huge-14. Furthermore, comparisons of with and without augmentation and transfer learning are conducted. This study found that the best classification is transfer learning and augmentation using ViT Huge-14. Using this method on MaskedFace-Net dataset, the research reaches an accuracy of 0.9601 on training data, 0.9412 on validation data, and 0.9534 on test data. This research shows that training the ViT model with data augmentation and transfer learning improves classification of the mask usage, even better than convolutional-based Residual Network (ResNet).

In addition, the hyper-parameters of training of 20 epochs, an Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) optimizer with a learning rate of 0.03, a batch size of 64, a Gaussian Cumulative Distribution (GeLU) activation function, and a Cross-Entropy loss function are used to be applied on the training of three architectures of ViT, namely Base-16, Large-16, and Huge-14. Furthermore, comparisons of with and without augmentation and transfer learning are conducted. This study found that the best classification is transfer learning and augmentation using ViT Huge-14. Using this method on MaskedFace-Net dataset, the research reaches an accuracy of 0.9601 on training data, 0.9412 on validation data, and 0.9534 on test data. abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行扰乱了社会各个层面。通过识别佩戴口罩的人的图像，佩戴口罩对于防止 COVID-19 传播至关重要。尽管只有 23.1% 的人正确使用口罩，但人工神经网络 (ANN) 可以帮助对优质口罩的使用进行分类，以帮助减缓 Covid-19 病毒的传播。然而，它需要一个大的数据集来训练一个能够正确分类口罩使用的人工神经网络。 MaskedFace-Net 是一个合适的数据集，由 137016 张数字图像组成，具有 4 个类别标签，即 Mask、Mask Chin、Mask Mouth Chin 和 Mask Nose Mouth。掩模分类训练利用 Vision Transformers (ViT) 架构和迁移学习方法，使用 ImageNet-21k 上预训练的权重，并进行随机增强。此外，将20个epoch的训练超参数、学习率为0.03的随机梯度下降（SGD）优化器、批量大小为64、高斯累积分布（GeLU）激活函数和交叉熵损失函数应用于ViT的三种架构（即Base-16、Large-16和Huge-14）的训练。此外，还对有和没有增强和迁移学习进行了比较。这项研究发现，最好的分类是使用 ViT Huge-14 进行迁移学习和增强。在 MaskedFace-Net 数据集上使用该方法，该研究在训练数据上达到 0.9601 的准确率，在验证数据上达到 0.9412 的准确率，在测试数据上达到 0.9534 的准确率。这项研究表明，通过数据增强和迁移学习训练 ViT 模型可以改善掩模使用的分类，甚至比基于卷积的残差网络 (ResNet) 更好。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用视觉Transformer（ViT）结合迁移学习和数据增强技术，对口罩使用情况进行图像分类识别。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情下正确佩戴口罩的比例较低（仅23.1%），需通过人工智能技术辅助识别口罩使用情况以遏制病毒传播，但传统神经网络需要大量标注数据进行训练。
AI.method: 采用ViT架构（Base-16/Large-16/Huge-14）结合ImageNet-21k预训练权重，使用随机数据增强技术，并设置20轮训练、SGD优化器（学习率0.03）、批量大小64等超参数进行模型训练与对比实验。
AI.result: 在MaskedFace-Net数据集上，使用ViT Huge-14模型结合迁移学习和数据增强方法，训练集准确率达96.01%，验证集94.12%，测试集95.34%，优于ResNet等卷积神经网络。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习与数据增强相结合的ViT模型能显著提升口罩使用分类准确率，证明该方法在疫情防护场景中的有效性。
