Using this method on MaskedFace-Net dataset, the research reaches an accuracy of 0.9601 on training data, 0.9412 on validation data, and 0.9534 on test data. This research shows that training the ViT model with data augmentation and transfer learning improves classification of the mask usage, even better than convolutional-based Residual Network (ResNet). COVID-19 大流行扰乱了社会各个层面。通过识别佩戴口罩的人的图像，佩戴口罩对于防止 COVID-19 传播至关重要。尽管只有 23.1% 的人正确使用口罩，但人工神经网络 (ANN) 可以帮助对优质口罩的使用进行分类，以帮助减缓 Covid-19 病毒的传播。然而，它需要一个大的数据集来训练一个能够正确分类口罩使用的人工神经网络。 MaskedFace-Net 是一个合适的数据集，由 137016 张数字图像组成，具有 4 个类别标签，即 Mask、Mask Chin、Mask Mouth Chin 和 Mask Nose Mouth。掩模分类训练利用 Vision Transformers (ViT) 架构和迁移学习方法，使用 ImageNet-21k 上预训练的权重，并进行随机增强。此外，将20个epoch的训练超参数、学习率为0.03的随机梯度下降（SGD）优化器、批量大小为64、高斯累积分布（GeLU）激活函数和交叉熵损失函数应用于ViT的三种架构（即Base-16、Large-16和Huge-14）的训练。此外，还对有和没有增强和迁移学习进行了比较。这项研究发现，最好的分类是使用 ViT Huge-14 进行迁移学习和增强。在 MaskedFace-Net 数据集上使用该方法，该研究在训练数据上达到 0.9601 的准确率，在验证数据上达到 0.9412 的准确率，在测试数据上达到 0.9534 的准确率。这项研究表明，通过数据增强和迁移学习训练 ViT 模型可以改善掩模使用的分类，甚至比基于卷积的残差网络 (ResNet) 更好。 本论文提出利用视觉Transformer（ViT）结合迁移学习和数据增强技术，对口罩使用情况进行图像分类识别。 Hensel Donato Jahja,Novanto Yudistira,Sutrisno cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Abol Basher,Jani Boutellier
title: Convolutional Neural Network-based Efficient Dense Point Cloud Generation using Unsigned Distance Fields
title_zh: 使用无符号距离场的基于卷积神经网络的高效密集点云生成
abstract: Dense point cloud generation from a sparse or incomplete point cloud is a crucial and challenging problem in 3D computer vision and computer graphics. So far, the existing methods are either computationally too expensive, suffer from limited resolution, or both. In addition, some methods are strictly limited to watertight surfaces -- another major obstacle for a number of applications. To address these issues, we propose a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network that learns and predicts the unsigned distance field for arbitrary 3D shapes for dense point cloud generation using the recently emerged concept of implicit function learning. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed architecture outperforms the state of the art by 7.8x less model parameters, 2.4x faster inference time and up to 24.8% improved generation quality compared to the state-of-the-art.
summary: Dense point cloud generation from a sparse or incomplete point cloud is a crucial and challenging problem in 3D computer vision and computer graphics. So far, the existing methods are either computationally too expensive, suffer from limited resolution, or both. In addition, some methods are strictly limited to watertight surfaces -- another major obstacle for a number of applications. To address these issues, we propose a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network that learns and predicts the unsigned distance field for arbitrary 3D shapes for dense point cloud generation using the recently emerged concept of implicit function learning. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed architecture outperforms the state of the art by 7.8x less model parameters, 2.4x faster inference time and up to 24.8% improved generation quality compared to the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 从稀疏或不完整的点云生成密集点云是 3D 计算机视觉和计算机图形学中的一个关键且具有挑战性的问题。到目前为止，现有的方法要么计算成本太高，要么分辨率有限，或者两者兼而有之。此外，一些方法严格限于防水表面——这是许多应用的另一个主要障碍。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种轻量级卷积神经网络，它使用最近出现的隐式函数学习概念来学习和预测任意 3D 形状的无符号距离场，以生成密集点云。实验表明，与现有技术相比，所提出的架构的模型参数减少了 7.8 倍，推理时间加快了 2.4 倍，生成质量提高了 24.8%，优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络和无符号距离场的高效密集点云生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有点云生成方法存在计算成本高、分辨率受限或仅适用于封闭表面等缺陷，亟需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计轻量级CNN网络，通过隐式函数学习预测任意3D形状的无符号距离场实现点云生成。
AI.result: 相比现有技术，模型参数减少7.8倍，推理速度提升2.4倍，生成质量改善24.8%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持生成质量的同时显著提升计算效率，突破了封闭表面限制，优于当前主流技术。

authors_text: Haobo Jiang,Jin Xie,Jian Yang
title: Action Candidate Driven Clipped Double Q-learning for Discrete and Continuous Action Tasks
title_zh: 用于离散和连续动作任务的动作候选驱动的剪辑双 Q 学习
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2105.00704
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2105.00704
abstract: Double Q-learning is a popular reinforcement learning algorithm in Markov decision process (MDP) problems. Clipped Double Q-learning, as an effective variant of Double Q-learning, employs the clipped double estimator to approximate the maximum expected action value. Due to the underestimation bias of the clipped double estimator, the performance of clipped Double Q-learning may be degraded in some stochastic environments. In this paper, in order to reduce the underestimation bias, we propose an action candidate-based clipped double estimator for Double Q-learning. Specifically, we first select a set of elite action candidates with high action values from one set of estimators. Then, among these candidates, we choose the highest valued action from the other set of estimators. Finally, we use the maximum value in the second set of estimators to clip the action value of the chosen action in the first set of estimators and the clipped value is used for approximating the maximum expected action value. Theoretically, the underestimation bias in our clipped Double Q-learning decays monotonically as the number of action candidates decreases. Moreover, the number of action candidates controls the trade-off between the overestimation and underestimation biases. In addition, we also extend our clipped Double Q-learning to continuous action tasks via approximating the elite continuous action candidates. We empirically verify that our algorithm can more accurately estimate the maximum expected action value on some toy environments and yield good performance on several benchmark problems.
summary: Double Q-learning is a popular reinforcement learning algorithm in Markov decision process (MDP) problems. Clipped Double Q-learning, as an effective variant of Double Q-learning, employs the clipped double estimator to approximate the maximum expected action value. Due to the underestimation bias of the clipped double estimator, the performance of clipped Double Q-learning may be degraded in some stochastic environments. In this paper, in order to reduce the underestimation bias, we propose an action candidate-based clipped double estimator for Double Q-learning. Specifically, we first select a set of elite action candidates with high action values from one set of estimators. Then, among these candidates, we choose the highest valued action from the other set of estimators. Finally, we use the maximum value in the second set of estimators to clip the action value of the chosen action in the first set of estimators and the clipped value is used for approximating the maximum expected action value. Theoretically, the underestimation bias in our clipped Double Q-learning decays monotonically as the number of action candidates decreases. Moreover, the number of action candidates controls the trade-off between the overestimation and underestimation biases. In addition, we also extend our clipped Double Q-learning to continuous action tasks via approximating the elite continuous action candidates. We empirically verify that our algorithm can more accurately estimate the maximum expected action value on some toy environments and yield good performance on several benchmark problems.
abstract_zh: 双 Q 学习是马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 问题中流行的强化学习算法。 Clipped Double Q-learning 作为 Double Q-learning 的有效变体，采用 Clipped Double 估计器来逼近最大期望动作值。由于削波双估计器的低估偏差，削波双 Q 学习的性能在某些随机环境中可能会下降。在本文中，为了减少低估偏差，我们提出了一种基于动作候选的双 Q 学习裁剪双估计器。具体来说，我们首先从一组估计器中选择一组具有高行动值的精英行动候选者。然后，在这些候选者中，我们从另一组估计器中选择价值最高的行动。最后，我们使用第二组估计器中的最大值来裁剪第一组估计器中所选动作的动作值，并且裁剪后的值用于近似最大期望动作值。理论上，随着候选动作数量的减少，我们的双 Q 学习中的低估偏差单调衰减。此外，候选行动的数量控制着高估和低估偏差之间的权衡。此外，我们还通过近似精英连续行动候选者，将剪辑的双 Q 学习扩展到连续行动任务。我们凭经验验证我们的算法可以更准确地估计某些玩具环境中的最大预期动作值，并在几个基准问题上产生良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动作候选的截断双重Q学习算法，旨在减少在离散和连续动作任务中的低估偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有的截断双重Q学习在随机环境中存在低估偏差，导致性能下降，需改进以提升估计准确性。
AI.method: 通过从一个估计器集合中选择高价值动作候选，再用另一个估计器集合中的最大值进行截断，平衡过估计与低估偏差，并扩展至连续动作任务。
AI.result: 算法在多个基准问题和玩具环境中更准确地估计最大期望动作值，且表现出良好的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低低估偏差，通过调整动作候选数量控制偏差平衡，适用于离散和连续动作任务。

authors_text: Yuntong Ye,Changfeng Yu,Yi Chang,Lin Zhu,Xile Zhao,Luxin Yan,Yonghong Tian
title: Unsupervised Deraining: Where Contrastive Learning Meets Self-similarity
title_zh: 无监督去雨：对比学习遇到自相似性的地方
abstract: Image deraining is a typical low-level image restoration task, which aims at decomposing the rainy image into two distinguishable layers: the clean image layer and the rain layer. Most of the existing learning-based deraining methods are supervisedly trained on synthetic rainy-clean pairs. The domain gap between the synthetic and real rains makes them less generalized to different real rainy scenes. Moreover, the existing methods mainly utilize the property of the two layers independently, while few of them have considered the mutually exclusive relationship between the two layers. In this work, we propose a novel non-local contrastive learning (NLCL) method for unsupervised image deraining. Consequently, we not only utilize the intrinsic self-similarity property within samples but also the mutually exclusive property between the two layers, so as to better differ the rain layer from the clean image. Specifically, the non-local self-similarity image layer patches as the positives are pulled together and similar rain layer patches as the negatives are pushed away. Thus the similar positive/negative samples that are close in the original space benefit us to enrich more discriminative representation. Apart from the self-similarity sampling strategy, we analyze how to choose an appropriate feature encoder in NLCL. Extensive experiments on different real rainy datasets demonstrate that the proposed method obtains state-of-the-art performance in real deraining.
summary: Image deraining is a typical low-level image restoration task, which aims at decomposing the rainy image into two distinguishable layers: the clean image layer and the rain layer. Most of the existing learning-based deraining methods are supervisedly trained on synthetic rainy-clean pairs. The domain gap between the synthetic and real rains makes them less generalized to different real rainy scenes. Moreover, the existing methods mainly utilize the property of the two layers independently, while few of them have considered the mutually exclusive relationship between the two layers. In this work, we propose a novel non-local contrastive learning (NLCL) method for unsupervised image deraining. Consequently, we not only utilize the intrinsic self-similarity property within samples but also the mutually exclusive property between the two layers, so as to better differ the rain layer from the clean image. Specifically, the non-local self-similarity image layer patches as the positives are pulled together and similar rain layer patches as the negatives are pushed away. Thus the similar positive/negative samples that are close in the original space benefit us to enrich more discriminative representation. Apart from the self-similarity sampling strategy, we analyze how to choose an appropriate feature encoder in NLCL. Extensive experiments on different real rainy datasets demonstrate that the proposed method obtains state-of-the-art performance in real deraining.
abstract_zh: 图像去雨是一种典型的低级图像恢复任务，其目的是将雨图像分解为两个可区分的层：干净图像层和雨层。大多数现有的基于学习的除雨方法都是在合成的雨天-干净对上进行监督训练的。合成降雨和真实降雨之间的域差距使得它们不太适用于不同的真实雨景。而且，现有的方法主要是独立利用两层的特性，很少考虑两层之间的互斥关系。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于无监督图像去雨的新型非局部对比学习（NLCL）方法。因此，我们不仅利用样本内固有的自相似性，而且利用两层之间的互斥性，以便更好地将雨层与干净图像区分开。具体来说，当正片被拉在一起时，非​​局部自相似图像层补丁被拉在一起，而作为负片的类似雨层补丁被推开。因此，原始空间中接近的相似正/负样本有利于我们丰富更具辨别力的表示。除了自相似性采样策略之外，我们还分析了如何在 NLCL 中选择合适的特征编码器。对不同真实下雨数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的方法在真实除雨中获得了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督图像去雨方法，结合对比学习与自相似性特性，解决现有方法依赖合成数据导致的泛化不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去雨方法依赖合成雨-清晰图像对进行监督训练，存在合成与真实雨场景的领域差距，且未充分利用雨层与清晰层的互斥特性。
AI.method: 设计非局部对比学习（NLCL）框架，通过自相似性采样策略，将样本内自相似区域作为正样本拉近，雨层相似区域作为负样本推开，同时分析特征编码器的选择机制。
AI.result: 在多个真实雨数据集上取得当前最优去雨效果，验证了无监督学习下对比学习与自相似性结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合利用自相似性与层间互斥性，无需监督即可实现更鲁棒的图像去雨，为低照度场景下的无监督修复提供新思路。

search_text: Unsupervised Deraining: Where Contrastive Learning Meets Self-similarity 无监督去雨：对比学习遇到自相似性的地方 Image deraining is a typical low-level image restoration task, which aims at decomposing the rainy image into two distinguishable layers: the clean image layer and the rain layer. Most of the existing learning-based deraining methods are supervisedly trained on synthetic rainy-clean pairs. The domain gap between the synthetic and real rains makes them less generalized to different real rainy scenes. Moreover, the existing methods mainly utilize the property of the two layers independently, while few of them have considered the mutually exclusive relationship between the two layers. In this work, we propose a novel non-local contrastive learning (NLCL) method for unsupervised image deraining. Consequently, we not only utilize the intrinsic self-similarity property within samples but also the mutually exclusive property between the two layers, so as to better differ the rain layer from the clean image. Specifically, the non-local self-similarity image layer patches as the positives are pulled together and similar rain layer patches as the negatives are pushed away. Thus the similar positive/negative samples that are close in the original space benefit us to enrich more discriminative representation. Apart from the self-similarity sampling strategy, we analyze how to choose an appropriate feature encoder in NLCL. Extensive experiments on different real rainy datasets demonstrate that the proposed method obtains state-of-the-art performance in real deraining. 图像去雨是一种典型的低级图像恢复任务，其目的是将雨图像分解为两个可区分的层：干净图像层和雨层。大多数现有的基于学习的除雨方法都是在合成的雨天-干净对上进行监督训练的。合成降雨和真实降雨之间的域差距使得它们不太适用于不同的真实雨景。而且，现有的方法主要是独立利用两层的特性，很少考虑两层之间的互斥关系。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于无监督图像去雨的新型非局部对比学习（NLCL）方法。因此，我们不仅利用样本内固有的自相似性，而且利用两层之间的互斥性，以便更好地将雨层与干净图像区分开。具体来说，当正片被拉在一起时，非​​局部自相似图像层补丁被拉在一起，而作为负片的类似雨层补丁被推开。因此，原始空间中接近的相似正/负样本有利于我们丰富更具辨别力的表示。除了自相似性采样策略之外，我们还分析了如何在 NLCL 中选择合适的特征编码器。对不同真实下雨数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的方法在真实除雨中获得了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种无监督图像去雨方法，结合对比学习与自相似性特性，解决现有方法依赖合成数据导致的泛化不足问题。 Yuntong Ye,Changfeng Yu,Yi Chang,Lin Zhu,Xile Zhao,Luxin Yan,Yonghong Tian cs.CV

authors_text: Zhisheng Zhong,Jiequan Cui,Zeming Li,Eric Lo,Jian Sun,Jiaya Jia
title: Rebalanced Siamese Contrastive Mining for Long-Tailed Recognition
title_zh: 用于长尾识别的重新平衡暹罗对比挖掘
abstract: Deep neural networks perform poorly on heavily class-imbalanced datasets. Given the promising performance of contrastive learning, we propose Rebalanced Siamese Contrastive Mining (ResCom) to tackle imbalanced recognition. Based on the mathematical analysis and simulation results, we claim that supervised contrastive learning suffers a dual class-imbalance problem at both the original batch and Siamese batch levels, which is more serious than long-tailed classification learning. In this paper, at the original batch level, we introduce a class-balanced supervised contrastive loss to assign adaptive weights for different classes. At the Siamese batch level, we present a class-balanced queue, which maintains the same number of keys for all classes. Furthermore, we note that the imbalanced contrastive loss gradient with respect to the contrastive logits can be decoupled into the positives and negatives, and easy positives and easy negatives will make the contrastive gradient vanish. We propose supervised hard positive and negative pairs mining to pick up informative pairs for contrastive computation and improve representation learning. Finally, to approximately maximize the mutual information between the two views, we propose Siamese Balanced Softmax and joint it with the contrastive loss for one-stage training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ResCom outperforms the previous methods by large margins on multiple long-tailed recognition benchmarks. Our code and models are made publicly available at: https://github.com/dvlab-research/ResCom.
summary: Deep neural networks perform poorly on heavily class-imbalanced datasets. Given the promising performance of contrastive learning, we propose Rebalanced Siamese Contrastive Mining (ResCom) to tackle imbalanced recognition. Based on the mathematical analysis and simulation results, we claim that supervised contrastive learning suffers a dual class-imbalance problem at both the original batch and Siamese batch levels, which is more serious than long-tailed classification learning. In this paper, at the original batch level, we introduce a class-balanced supervised contrastive loss to assign adaptive weights for different classes. At the Siamese batch level, we present a class-balanced queue, which maintains the same number of keys for all classes. Furthermore, we note that the imbalanced contrastive loss gradient with respect to the contrastive logits can be decoupled into the positives and negatives, and easy positives and easy negatives will make the contrastive gradient vanish. We propose supervised hard positive and negative pairs mining to pick up informative pairs for contrastive computation and improve representation learning. Finally, to approximately maximize the mutual information between the two views, we propose Siamese Balanced Softmax and joint it with the contrastive loss for one-stage training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ResCom outperforms the previous methods by large margins on multiple long-tailed recognition benchmarks. Our code and models are made publicly available at: https://github.com/dvlab-research/ResCom.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在类别严重不平衡的数据集上表现不佳。鉴于对比学习的良好表现，我们提出重新平衡暹罗对比挖掘（ResCom）来解决不平衡的识别问题。基于数学分析和仿真结果，我们认为监督对比学习在原始批次和连体批次级别都存在双重类不平衡问题，比长尾分类学习更严重。在本文中，在原始批次级别，我们引入了类平衡的监督对比损失来为不同的类分配自适应权重。在暹罗批处理级别，我们提出了一个类平衡队列，它为所有类维护相同数量的键。此外，我们注意到，相对于对比逻辑的不平衡对比损失梯度可以解耦为正值和负值，并且简单的正值和简单的负值将使对比梯度消失。我们提出有监督的硬正负对挖掘，以获取信息对进行对比计算并改进表示学习。最后，为了近似最大化两个视图之间的互信息，我们提出了 Siamese Balanced Softmax 并将其与对比损失结合起来进行一阶段训练。大量实验表明，ResCom 在多个长尾识别基准上大幅优于之前的方法。我们的代码和模型已公开发布：https://github.com/dvlab-research/ResCom。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ResCom的重平衡暹罗对比挖掘方法，用于解决长尾识别中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 监督对比学习在原始批次和Siamese批次层面存在双重类别不平衡问题，导致模型在长尾数据集上表现不佳。
AI.method: 在原始批次层面引入类平衡监督对比损失，自适应分配类别权重；在Siamese批次层面设计类平衡队列，保持各类别键数量一致；通过挖掘困难正负样本对优化对比梯度，并结合Siamese Balanced Softmax最大化互信息。
AI.result: 在多个长尾识别基准测试中，ResCom显著优于现有方法，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: ResCom通过解决双重类别不平衡问题，有效提升了长尾识别任务的性能。

authors_text: Haoyu Li,Yun Liu,Junichi Yamagishi
title: Joint Noise Reduction and Listening Enhancement for Full-End Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 联合降噪和听力增强，实现全程语音增强
abstract: Speech enhancement (SE) methods mainly focus on recovering clean speech from noisy input. In real-world speech communication, however, noises often exist in not only speaker but also listener environments. Although SE methods can suppress the noise contained in the speaker's voice, they cannot deal with the noise that is physically present in the listener side. To address such a complicated but common scenario, we investigate a deep learning-based joint framework integrating noise reduction (NR) with listening enhancement (LE), in which the NR module first suppresses noise and the LE module then modifies the denoised speech, i.e., the output of the NR module, to further improve speech intelligibility. The enhanced speech can thus be less noisy and more intelligible for listeners. Experimental results show that our proposed method achieves promising results and significantly outperforms the disjoint processing methods in terms of various speech evaluation metrics.
summary: Speech enhancement (SE) methods mainly focus on recovering clean speech from noisy input. In real-world speech communication, however, noises often exist in not only speaker but also listener environments. Although SE methods can suppress the noise contained in the speaker's voice, they cannot deal with the noise that is physically present in the listener side. To address such a complicated but common scenario, we investigate a deep learning-based joint framework integrating noise reduction (NR) with listening enhancement (LE), in which the NR module first suppresses noise and the LE module then modifies the denoised speech, i.e., the output of the NR module, to further improve speech intelligibility. The enhanced speech can thus be less noisy and more intelligible for listeners. Experimental results show that our proposed method achieves promising results and significantly outperforms the disjoint processing methods in terms of various speech evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 语音增强（SE）方法主要关注从噪声输入中恢复干净的语音。然而，在现实世界的语音通信中，噪声通常不仅存在于说话者环境中，而且还存在于听者环境中。虽然 SE 方法可以抑制说话者语音中包含的噪声，但它们无法处理实际存在于听者一侧的噪声。为了解决这种复杂但常见的场景，我们研究了一种基于深度学习的将降噪（NR）与听力增强（LE）相结合的联合框架，其中NR模块首先抑制噪声，LE模块然后修改去噪语音，即NR模块的输出，以进一步提高语音清晰度。因此，增强后的语音噪音更小并且对于听众来说更容易理解。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法取得了有希望的结果，并且在各种语音评估指标方面显着优于不相交处理方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合降噪与听觉增强的深度学习框架，旨在同时解决说话人和听者环境中的噪声问题，提升语音清晰度。
AI.motivation: 传统语音增强方法仅能处理说话人语音中的噪声，无法应对听者环境中的噪声，导致实际应用中语音清晰度不足，需联合处理以提升效果。
AI.method: 采用深度学习框架，集成降噪模块（NR）和听觉增强模块（LE），先通过NR抑制噪声，再利用LE优化降噪后的语音以提高可懂度。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多个语音评估指标上显著优于传统分离处理方法，展现出更高的语音清晰度和可懂度。
AI.conclusion: 联合降噪与听觉增强框架有效提升了复杂环境下的语音质量，验证了该方法在实际应用中的优越性。

search_text: Joint Noise Reduction and Listening Enhancement for Full-End Speech Enhancement 联合降噪和听力增强，实现全程语音增强 Speech enhancement (SE) methods mainly focus on recovering clean speech from noisy input. In real-world speech communication, however, noises often exist in not only speaker but also listener environments. Although SE methods can suppress the noise contained in the speaker's voice, they cannot deal with the noise that is physically present in the listener side. To address such a complicated but common scenario, we investigate a deep learning-based joint framework integrating noise reduction (NR) with listening enhancement (LE), in which the NR module first suppresses noise and the LE module then modifies the denoised speech, i.e., the output of the NR module, to further improve speech intelligibility. The enhanced speech can thus be less noisy and more intelligible for listeners. Experimental results show that our proposed method achieves promising results and significantly outperforms the disjoint processing methods in terms of various speech evaluation metrics. 语音增强（SE）方法主要关注从噪声输入中恢复干净的语音。然而，在现实世界的语音通信中，噪声通常不仅存在于说话者环境中，而且还存在于听者环境中。虽然 SE 方法可以抑制说话者语音中包含的噪声，但它们无法处理实际存在于听者一侧的噪声。为了解决这种复杂但常见的场景，我们研究了一种基于深度学习的将降噪（NR）与听力增强（LE）相结合的联合框架，其中NR模块首先抑制噪声，LE模块然后修改去噪语音，即NR模块的输出，以进一步提高语音清晰度。因此，增强后的语音噪音更小并且对于听众来说更容易理解。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法取得了有希望的结果，并且在各种语音评估指标方面显着优于不相交处理方法。 本文提出了一种联合降噪与听觉增强的深度学习框架，旨在同时解决说话人和听者环境中的噪声问题，提升语音清晰度。 Haoyu Li,Yun Liu,Junichi Yamagishi eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Zhe Ye,Jiahao Chen,Diqun Yan
title: Residual-Guided Non-Intrusive Speech Quality Assessment
title_zh: 剩余引导的非侵入式语音质量评估
abstract: This paper proposes an approach to improve Non-Intrusive speech quality assessment(NI-SQA) based on the residuals between impaired speech and enhanced speech. The difficulty in our task is particularly lack of information, for which the corresponding reference speech is absent. We generate an enhanced speech on the impaired speech to compensate for the absence of the reference audio, then pair the information of residuals with the impaired speech. Compared to feeding the impaired speech directly into the model, residuals could bring some extra helpful information from the contrast in enhancement. The human ear is sensitive to certain noises but different to deep learning model. Causing the Mean Opinion Score(MOS) the model predicted is not enough to fit our subjective sensitive well and causes deviation. These residuals have a close relationship to reference speech and then improve the ability of the deep learning models to predict MOS. During the training phase, experimental results demonstrate that paired with residuals can quickly obtain better evaluation indicators under the same conditions. Furthermore, our final results improved 31.3 percent and 14.1 percent, respectively, in PLCC and RMSE.
summary: This paper proposes an approach to improve Non-Intrusive speech quality assessment(NI-SQA) based on the residuals between impaired speech and enhanced speech. The difficulty in our task is particularly lack of information, for which the corresponding reference speech is absent. We generate an enhanced speech on the impaired speech to compensate for the absence of the reference audio, then pair the information of residuals with the impaired speech. Compared to feeding the impaired speech directly into the model, residuals could bring some extra helpful information from the contrast in enhancement. The human ear is sensitive to certain noises but different to deep learning model. Causing the Mean Opinion Score(MOS) the model predicted is not enough to fit our subjective sensitive well and causes deviation. These residuals have a close relationship to reference speech and then improve the ability of the deep learning models to predict MOS. During the training phase, experimental results demonstrate that paired with residuals can quickly obtain better evaluation indicators under the same conditions. Furthermore, our final results improved 31.3 percent and 14.1 percent, respectively, in PLCC and RMSE.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于受损语音和增强语音之间的残差来改进非侵入式语音质量评估（NI-SQA）的方法。我们任务的困难尤其在于缺乏信息，缺乏相应的参考语音。我们对受损语音生成增强语音以补偿参考音频的缺失，然后将残差信息与受损语音配对。与将受损语音直接输入模型相比，残差可以从增强的对比度中带来一些额外的有用信息。人耳对某些噪声敏感，但与深度学习模型不同。导致模型预测的平均意见得分（MOS）不足以很好地契合我们的主观敏感度而产生偏差。这些残差与参考语音有密切的关系，从而提高了深度学习模型预测 MOS 的能力。在训练阶段，实验结果表明，与残差配对可以在相同条件下快速获得更好的评价指标。此外，我们的最终结果在 PLCC 和 RMSE 方面分别提高了 31.3% 和 14.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于残差信息的非侵入式语音质量评估方法，通过生成增强语音与受损语音的残差来提升模型预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统非侵入式语音质量评估因缺乏参考语音导致预测结果与人类主观感知存在偏差，而残差信息与参考语音密切相关，可为模型提供额外有效特征。
AI.method: 在受损语音上生成增强语音，计算其与受损语音的残差并将其与受损语音特征配对输入模型，利用残差对比信息提升MOS预测能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在PLCC指标上提升31.3%，RMSE指标提升14.1%，且训练收敛速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 残差引导的非侵入式评估方法有效提升了模型对语音质量的预测精度，验证了残差信息在弥补参考语音缺失中的关键作用。

authors_text: Xuyang Bai,Zeyu Hu,Xinge Zhu,Qingqiu Huang,Yilun Chen,Hongbo Fu,Chiew-Lan Tai
title: TransFusion: Robust LiDAR-Camera Fusion for 3D Object Detection with Transformers
title_zh: TransFusion：使用 Transformer 进行 3D 物体检测的强大 LiDAR-相机融合
comment: Accepted to CVPR2022; Code at \url{https://github.com/XuyangBai/TransFusion}; Based on this work, we achieve the 1st place in the leaderboard of nuScenes tracking
comments: Accepted to CVPR2022; Code at \url{https://github.com/XuyangBai/TransFusion}; Based on this work, we achieve the 1st place in the leaderboard of nuScenes tracking
abstract: LiDAR and camera are two important sensors for 3D object detection in autonomous driving. Despite the increasing popularity of sensor fusion in this field, the robustness against inferior image conditions, e.g., bad illumination and sensor misalignment, is under-explored. Existing fusion methods are easily affected by such conditions, mainly due to a hard association of LiDAR points and image pixels, established by calibration matrices. We propose TransFusion, a robust solution to LiDAR-camera fusion with a soft-association mechanism to handle inferior image conditions. Specifically, our TransFusion consists of convolutional backbones and a detection head based on a transformer decoder. The first layer of the decoder predicts initial bounding boxes from a LiDAR point cloud using a sparse set of object queries, and its second decoder layer adaptively fuses the object queries with useful image features, leveraging both spatial and contextual relationships. The attention mechanism of the transformer enables our model to adaptively determine where and what information should be taken from the image, leading to a robust and effective fusion strategy. We additionally design an image-guided query initialization strategy to deal with objects that are difficult to detect in point clouds. TransFusion achieves state-of-the-art performance on large-scale datasets. We provide extensive experiments to demonstrate its robustness against degenerated image quality and calibration errors. We also extend the proposed method to the 3D tracking task and achieve the 1st place in the leaderboard of nuScenes tracking, showing its effectiveness and generalization capability.
summary: LiDAR and camera are two important sensors for 3D object detection in autonomous driving. Despite the increasing popularity of sensor fusion in this field, the robustness against inferior image conditions, e.g., bad illumination and sensor misalignment, is under-explored. Existing fusion methods are easily affected by such conditions, mainly due to a hard association of LiDAR points and image pixels, established by calibration matrices. We propose TransFusion, a robust solution to LiDAR-camera fusion with a soft-association mechanism to handle inferior image conditions. Specifically, our TransFusion consists of convolutional backbones and a detection head based on a transformer decoder. The first layer of the decoder predicts initial bounding boxes from a LiDAR point cloud using a sparse set of object queries, and its second decoder layer adaptively fuses the object queries with useful image features, leveraging both spatial and contextual relationships. The attention mechanism of the transformer enables our model to adaptively determine where and what information should be taken from the image, leading to a robust and effective fusion strategy. We additionally design an image-guided query initialization strategy to deal with objects that are difficult to detect in point clouds. TransFusion achieves state-of-the-art performance on large-scale datasets. We provide extensive experiments to demonstrate its robustness against degenerated image quality and calibration errors. We also extend the proposed method to the 3D tracking task and achieve the 1st place in the leaderboard of nuScenes tracking, showing its effectiveness and generalization capability.
abstract_zh: 激光雷达和摄像头是自动驾驶中 3D 物体检测的两个重要传感器。尽管传感器融合在该领域越来越受欢迎，但针对较差图像条件（例如不良照明和传感器未对准）的鲁棒性尚未得到充分探索。现有的融合方法很容易受到这种情况的影响，这主要是由于通过校准矩阵建立的激光雷达点和图像像素的硬关联。我们提出了 TransFusion，这是一种强大的 LiDAR-相机融合解决方案，具有软关联机制来处理较差的图像条件。具体来说，我们的 TransFusion 由卷积主干和基于 Transformer 解码器的检测头组成。解码器的第一层使用一组稀疏的对象查询来预测激光雷达点云的初始边界框，第二层解码器层利用空间和上下文关系，自适应地将对象查询与有用的图像特征融合。变压器的注意力机制使我们的模型能够自适应地确定应从图像中获取何处以及何种信息，从而形成稳健且有效的融合策略。我们还设计了一种图像引导的查询初始化策略来处理点云中难以检测的对象。 TransFusion 在大规模数据集上实现了最先进的性能。我们提供了大量的实验来证明其对图像质量退化和校准误差的鲁棒性。我们还将所提出的方法扩展到 3D 跟踪任务，并在 nuScenes 跟踪排行榜中获得第一名，显示了其有效性和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransFusion方法，通过软关联机制提升LiDAR与相机融合在3D目标检测中的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有融合方法因依赖标定矩阵进行硬关联，在光照不足或传感器错位等劣质图像条件下表现不佳，需更鲁棒的融合策略。
AI.method: 基于Transformer解码器设计双层结构：第一层通过稀疏物体查询预测LiDAR点云初始框，第二层利用注意力机制自适应融合图像特征；引入图像引导的查询初始化策略增强点云难检物体的检测能力。
AI.result: 在大规模数据集上达到SOTA性能，证明对图像退化和标定误差的鲁棒性，并在nuScenes追踪任务中登顶 leaderboard。
AI.conclusion: TransFusion通过软关联机制和Transformer架构有效解决了传感器融合中的鲁棒性问题，展示了其在自动驾驶场景中的广泛适用性。

ai_content_json.result: 在大规模数据集上达到SOTA性能，证明对图像退化和标定误差的鲁棒性，并在nuScenes追踪任务中登顶 leaderboard。
ai_content_json.conclusion: TransFusion通过软关联机制和Transformer架构有效解决了传感器融合中的鲁棒性问题，展示了其在自动驾驶场景中的广泛适用性。

tldr: 本文提出TransFusion方法，通过软关联机制提升LiDAR与相机融合在3D目标检测中的鲁棒性。
motivation: 现有融合方法因依赖标定矩阵进行硬关联，在光照不足或传感器错位等劣质图像条件下表现不佳，需更鲁棒的融合策略。
method: 基于Transformer解码器设计双层结构：第一层通过稀疏物体查询预测LiDAR点云初始框，第二层利用注意力机制自适应融合图像特征；引入图像引导的查询初始化策略增强点云难检物体的检测能力。
result: 在大规模数据集上达到SOTA性能，证明对图像退化和标定误差的鲁棒性，并在nuScenes追踪任务中登顶 leaderboard。

search_text: TransFusion: Robust LiDAR-Camera Fusion for 3D Object Detection with Transformers TransFusion：使用 Transformer 进行 3D 物体检测的强大 LiDAR-相机融合 LiDAR and camera are two important sensors for 3D object detection in autonomous driving. Despite the increasing popularity of sensor fusion in this field, the robustness against inferior image conditions, e.g., bad illumination and sensor misalignment, is under-explored. Existing fusion methods are easily affected by such conditions, mainly due to a hard association of LiDAR points and image pixels, established by calibration matrices. We propose TransFusion, a robust solution to LiDAR-camera fusion with a soft-association mechanism to handle inferior image conditions. Specifically, our TransFusion consists of convolutional backbones and a detection head based on a transformer decoder. The first layer of the decoder predicts initial bounding boxes from a LiDAR point cloud using a sparse set of object queries, and its second decoder layer adaptively fuses the object queries with useful image features, leveraging both spatial and contextual relationships. The attention mechanism of the transformer enables our model to adaptively determine where and what information should be taken from the image, leading to a robust and effective fusion strategy. We additionally design an image-guided query initialization strategy to deal with objects that are difficult to detect in point clouds. TransFusion achieves state-of-the-art performance on large-scale datasets. We provide extensive experiments to demonstrate its robustness against degenerated image quality and calibration errors. We also extend the proposed method to the 3D tracking task and achieve the 1st place in the leaderboard of nuScenes tracking, showing its effectiveness and generalization capability. 激光雷达和摄像头是自动驾驶中 3D 物体检测的两个重要传感器。尽管传感器融合在该领域越来越受欢迎，但针对较差图像条件（例如不良照明和传感器未对准）的鲁棒性尚未得到充分探索。现有的融合方法很容易受到这种情况的影响，这主要是由于通过校准矩阵建立的激光雷达点和图像像素的硬关联。我们提出了 TransFusion，这是一种强大的 LiDAR-相机融合解决方案，具有软关联机制来处理较差的图像条件。具体来说，我们的 TransFusion 由卷积主干和基于 Transformer 解码器的检测头组成。解码器的第一层使用一组稀疏的对象查询来预测激光雷达点云的初始边界框，第二层解码器层利用空间和上下文关系，自适应地将对象查询与有用的图像特征融合。变压器的注意力机制使我们的模型能够自适应地确定应从图像中获取何处以及何种信息，从而形成稳健且有效的融合策略。我们还设计了一种图像引导的查询初始化策略来处理点云中难以检测的对象。 TransFusion 在大规模数据集上实现了最先进的性能。我们提供了大量的实验来证明其对图像质量退化和校准误差的鲁棒性。我们还将所提出的方法扩展到 3D 跟踪任务，并在 nuScenes 跟踪排行榜中获得第一名，显示了其有效性和泛化能力。 本文提出TransFusion方法，通过软关联机制提升LiDAR与相机融合在3D目标检测中的鲁棒性。 Xuyang Bai,Zeyu Hu,Xinge Zhu,Qingqiu Huang,Yilun Chen,Hongbo Fu,Chiew-Lan Tai cs.CV

authors_text: Md Adnan Arefeen,Sumaiya Tabassum Nimi,Md Yusuf Sarwar Uddin
title: FrameHopper: Selective Processing of Video Frames in Detection-driven Real-Time Video Analytics
title_zh: FrameHopper：检测驱动的实时视频分析中视频帧的选择性处理
comment: Accepted in The 18th International Conference on Distributed Computing in Sensor Systems (DCOSS 2022)
comments: Accepted in The 18th International Conference on Distributed Computing in Sensor Systems (DCOSS 2022)
abstract: Detection-driven real-time video analytics require continuous detection of objects contained in the video frames using deep learning models like YOLOV3, EfficientDet. However, running these detectors on each and every frame in resource-constrained edge devices is computationally intensive. By taking the temporal correlation between consecutive video frames into account, we note that detection outputs tend to be overlapping in successive frames. Elimination of similar consecutive frames will lead to a negligible drop in performance while offering significant performance benefits by reducing overall computation and communication costs. The key technical questions are, therefore, (a) how to identify which frames to be processed by the object detector, and (b) how many successive frames can be skipped (called skip-length) once a frame is selected to be processed. The overall goal of the process is to keep the error due to skipping frames as small as possible. We introduce a novel error vs processing rate optimization problem with respect to the object detection task that balances between the error rate and the fraction of frames filtering. Subsequently, we propose an off-line Reinforcement Learning (RL)-based algorithm to determine these skip-lengths as a state-action policy of the RL agent from a recorded video and then deploy the agent online for live video streams. To this end, we develop FrameHopper, an edge-cloud collaborative video analytics framework, that runs a lightweight trained RL agent on the camera and passes filtered frames to the server where the object detection model runs for a set of applications. We have tested our approach on a number of live videos captured from real-life scenarios and show that FrameHopper processes only a handful of frames but produces detection results closer to the oracle solution and outperforms recent state-of-the-art solutions in most cases.
summary: Detection-driven real-time video analytics require continuous detection of objects contained in the video frames using deep learning models like YOLOV3, EfficientDet. However, running these detectors on each and every frame in resource-constrained edge devices is computationally intensive. By taking the temporal correlation between consecutive video frames into account, we note that detection outputs tend to be overlapping in successive frames. Elimination of similar consecutive frames will lead to a negligible drop in performance while offering significant performance benefits by reducing overall computation and communication costs. The key technical questions are, therefore, (a) how to identify which frames to be processed by the object detector, and (b) how many successive frames can be skipped (called skip-length) once a frame is selected to be processed. The overall goal of the process is to keep the error due to skipping frames as small as possible. We introduce a novel error vs processing rate optimization problem with respect to the object detection task that balances between the error rate and the fraction of frames filtering. Subsequently, we propose an off-line Reinforcement Learning (RL)-based algorithm to determine these skip-lengths as a state-action policy of the RL agent from a recorded video and then deploy the agent online for live video streams. To this end, we develop FrameHopper, an edge-cloud collaborative video analytics framework, that runs a lightweight trained RL agent on the camera and passes filtered frames to the server where the object detection model runs for a set of applications. We have tested our approach on a number of live videos captured from real-life scenarios and show that FrameHopper processes only a handful of frames but produces detection results closer to the oracle solution and outperforms recent state-of-the-art solutions in most cases.
abstract_zh: 检测驱动的实时视频分析需要使用 YOLOV3、EfficientDet 等深度学习模型连续检测视频帧中包含的对象。然而，在资源受限的边缘设备中的每一帧上运行这些检测器都是计算密集型的。通过考虑连续视频帧之间的时间相关性，我们注意到检测输出往往在连续帧中重叠。消除类似的连续帧将导致性能下降可以忽略不计，同时通过降低总体计算和通信成本来提供显着的性能优势。因此，关键的技术问题是（a）如何识别对象检测器要处理哪些帧，以及（b）一旦选择要处理的帧，可以跳过多少个连续帧（称为跳过长度）。该过程的总体目标是使跳帧引起的误差尽可能小。我们针对目标检测任务引入了一种新颖的错误与处理速率优化问题，该问题在错误率和帧过滤分数之间进行平衡。随后，我们提出了一种基于离线强化学习（RL）的算法，从录制的视频中确定这些跳跃长度作为 RL 代理的状态动作策略，然后在线部署代理以用于实时视频流。为此，我们开发了 FrameHopper，这是一种边缘云协作视频分析框架，它在摄像机上运行经过训练的轻量级 RL 代理，并将过滤后的帧传递到服务器，在服务器上为一组应用程序运行对象检测模型。我们已经在从现实场景中捕获的大量实时视频上测试了我们的方法，结果表明 FrameHopper 仅处理少量帧，但产生的检测结果更接近预言机解决方案，并且在大多数情况下优于最新的最先进解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FrameHopper框架，通过选择性处理视频帧来优化实时视频分析中的检测任务，减少计算和通信开销。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的边缘设备上，连续对每个视频帧运行检测模型（如YOLOV3）计算成本过高，而相邻帧的检测结果存在冗余，可通过跳过部分帧实现性能优化。
AI.method: 基于强化学习（RL）设计离线算法，学习帧跳过策略（skip-length）并部署到边缘设备，结合云端检测模型实现轻量级帧筛选与处理。
AI.result: 实验表明，FrameHopper仅处理少量帧即可达到接近理想解的检测效果，在多数场景下优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过帧选择性处理与RL策略优化，FrameHopper有效平衡了计算效率与检测精度，为边缘-云端协同视频分析提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Guangqian Yang,Yibing Zhan,Jinlong Li,Baosheng Yu,Liu Liu,Fengxiang He
title: Exploring High-Order Structure for Robust Graph Structure Learning
title_zh: 探索高阶结构以实现鲁棒图结构学习
abstract: Recent studies show that Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial attack, i.e., an imperceptible structure perturbation can fool GNNs to make wrong predictions. Some researches explore specific properties of clean graphs such as the feature smoothness to defense the attack, but the analysis of it has not been well-studied. In this paper, we analyze the adversarial attack on graphs from the perspective of feature smoothness which further contributes to an efficient new adversarial defensive algorithm for GNNs. We discover that the effect of the high-order graph structure is a smoother filter for processing graph structures. Intuitively, the high-order graph structure denotes the path number between nodes, where larger number indicates closer connection, so it naturally contributes to defense the adversarial perturbation. Further, we propose a novel algorithm that incorporates the high-order structural information into the graph structure learning. We perform experiments on three popular benchmark datasets, Cora, Citeseer and Polblogs. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method for defending against graph adversarial attacks.
summary: Recent studies show that Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial attack, i.e., an imperceptible structure perturbation can fool GNNs to make wrong predictions. Some researches explore specific properties of clean graphs such as the feature smoothness to defense the attack, but the analysis of it has not been well-studied. In this paper, we analyze the adversarial attack on graphs from the perspective of feature smoothness which further contributes to an efficient new adversarial defensive algorithm for GNNs. We discover that the effect of the high-order graph structure is a smoother filter for processing graph structures. Intuitively, the high-order graph structure denotes the path number between nodes, where larger number indicates closer connection, so it naturally contributes to defense the adversarial perturbation. Further, we propose a novel algorithm that incorporates the high-order structural information into the graph structure learning. We perform experiments on three popular benchmark datasets, Cora, Citeseer and Polblogs. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method for defending against graph adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，图神经网络（GNN）很容易受到对抗性攻击，即难以察觉的结构扰动可以欺骗 GNN 做出错误的预测。一些研究探索了干净图的特定属性，例如防御攻击的特征平滑度，但对其分析尚未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们从特征平滑度的角度分析了图的对抗性攻击，这进一步有助于为 GNN 提供一种高效的新型对抗性防御算法。我们发现高阶图结构的作用是处理图结构的更平滑的滤波器。直观上，高阶图结构表示节点之间的路径数，其中数字越大表示连接越紧密，因此自然有助于防御对抗性扰动。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的算法，将高阶结构信息纳入图结构学习中。我们在三个流行的基准数据集 Cora、Citeseer 和 Polblogs 上进行了实验。大量的实验证明了我们的方法防御图对抗攻击的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用高阶图结构提升图神经网络（GNNs）对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法对图特征平滑性的分析不足，而高阶图结构能更有效地过滤对抗扰动，需进一步探索其防御潜力。
AI.method: 提出一种融合高阶结构信息的图结构学习算法，通过路径数量表征节点间连接紧密性，增强对抗鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在Cora、Citeseer和Polblogs数据集上验证，方法有效防御对抗攻击并提升预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 高阶图结构可作为平滑滤波器增强GNNs鲁棒性，所提算法在防御对抗攻击中表现优异。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究如何利用高阶图结构提升图神经网络（GNNs）对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。

ai_content.method: 提出一种融合高阶结构信息的图结构学习算法，通过路径数量表征节点间连接紧密性，增强对抗鲁棒性。
ai_content.result: 在Cora、Citeseer和Polblogs数据集上验证，方法有效防御对抗攻击并提升预测准确性。

search_text: Exploring High-Order Structure for Robust Graph Structure Learning 探索高阶结构以实现鲁棒图结构学习 Recent studies show that Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial attack, i.e., an imperceptible structure perturbation can fool GNNs to make wrong predictions. Some researches explore specific properties of clean graphs such as the feature smoothness to defense the attack, but the analysis of it has not been well-studied. In this paper, we analyze the adversarial attack on graphs from the perspective of feature smoothness which further contributes to an efficient new adversarial defensive algorithm for GNNs. We discover that the effect of the high-order graph structure is a smoother filter for processing graph structures. Intuitively, the high-order graph structure denotes the path number between nodes, where larger number indicates closer connection, so it naturally contributes to defense the adversarial perturbation. Further, we propose a novel algorithm that incorporates the high-order structural information into the graph structure learning. We perform experiments on three popular benchmark datasets, Cora, Citeseer and Polblogs. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method for defending against graph adversarial attacks. 最近的研究表明，图神经网络（GNN）很容易受到对抗性攻击，即难以察觉的结构扰动可以欺骗 GNN 做出错误的预测。一些研究探索了干净图的特定属性，例如防御攻击的特征平滑度，但对其分析尚未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们从特征平滑度的角度分析了图的对抗性攻击，这进一步有助于为 GNN 提供一种高效的新型对抗性防御算法。我们发现高阶图结构的作用是处理图结构的更平滑的滤波器。直观上，高阶图结构表示节点之间的路径数，其中数字越大表示连接越紧密，因此自然有助于防御对抗性扰动。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的算法，将高阶结构信息纳入图结构学习中。我们在三个流行的基准数据集 Cora、Citeseer 和 Polblogs 上进行了实验。大量的实验证明了我们的方法防御图对抗攻击的有效性。 本文研究如何利用高阶图结构提升图神经网络（GNNs）对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。 Guangqian Yang,Yibing Zhan,Jinlong Li,Baosheng Yu,Liu Liu,Fengxiang He cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yongwei Wang,Yuheng Wang,Tim K. Lee,Chunyan Miao,Z. Jane Wang
title: SSD-KD: A Self-supervised Diverse Knowledge Distillation Method for Lightweight Skin Lesion Classification Using Dermoscopic Images
title_zh: SSD-KD：一种使用皮肤镜图像进行轻量级皮肤病变分类的自监督多样化知识蒸馏方法
abstract: Skin cancer is one of the most common types of malignancy, affecting a large population and causing a heavy economic burden worldwide. Over the last few years, computer-aided diagnosis has been rapidly developed and make great progress in healthcare and medical practices due to the advances in artificial intelligence. However, most studies in skin cancer detection keep pursuing high prediction accuracies without considering the limitation of computing resources on portable devices. In this case, knowledge distillation (KD) has been proven as an efficient tool to help improve the adaptability of lightweight models under limited resources, meanwhile keeping a high-level representation capability. To bridge the gap, this study specifically proposes a novel method, termed SSD-KD, that unifies diverse knowledge into a generic KD framework for skin diseases classification. Our method models an intra-instance relational feature representation and integrates it with existing KD research. A dual relational knowledge distillation architecture is self-supervisedly trained while the weighted softened outputs are also exploited to enable the student model to capture richer knowledge from the teacher model. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we conduct experiments on ISIC 2019, a large-scale open-accessed benchmark of skin diseases dermoscopic images. Experiments show that our distilled lightweight model can achieve an accuracy as high as 85% for the classification tasks of 8 different skin diseases with minimal parameters and computing requirements. Ablation studies confirm the effectiveness of our intra- and inter-instance relational knowledge integration strategy. Compared with state-of-the-art knowledge distillation techniques, the proposed method demonstrates improved performances for multi-diseases classification on the large-scale dermoscopy database.

Over the last few years, computer-aided diagnosis has been rapidly developed and make great progress in healthcare and medical practices due to the advances in artificial intelligence. However, most studies in skin cancer detection keep pursuing high prediction accuracies without considering the limitation of computing resources on portable devices. In this case, knowledge distillation (KD) has been proven as an efficient tool to help improve the adaptability of lightweight models under limited resources, meanwhile keeping a high-level representation capability. To bridge the gap, this study specifically proposes a novel method, termed SSD-KD, that unifies diverse knowledge into a generic KD framework for skin diseases classification. Our method models an intra-instance relational feature representation and integrates it with existing KD research. A dual relational knowledge distillation architecture is self-supervisedly trained while the weighted softened outputs are also exploited to enable the student model to capture richer knowledge from the teacher model. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we conduct experiments on ISIC 2019, a large-scale open-accessed benchmark of skin diseases dermoscopic images. Experiments show that our distilled lightweight model can achieve an accuracy as high as 85% for the classification tasks of 8 different skin diseases with minimal parameters and computing requirements. Ablation studies confirm the effectiveness of our intra- and inter-instance relational knowledge integration strategy. Compared with state-of-the-art knowledge distillation techniques, the proposed method demonstrates improved performances for multi-diseases classification on the large-scale dermoscopy database.
abstract_zh: 皮肤癌是最常见的恶性肿瘤之一，影响大量人口并在全世界造成沉重的经济负担。在过去的几年里，由于人工智能的进步，计算机辅助诊断得到了迅速发展，并在医疗保健和医疗实践中取得了巨大进步。然而，大多数皮肤癌检测研究仍然追求高预测精度，而没有考虑便携式设备上计算资源的限制。在这种情况下，知识蒸馏（KD）已被证明是一种有效的工具，可以帮助提高轻量级模型在有限资源下的适应性，同时保持高水平的表示能力。为了弥补这一差距，本研究特别提出了一种称为 SSD-KD 的新方法，它将不同的知识统一到皮肤病分类的通用 KD 框架中。我们的方法对实例内关系特征表示进行建模，并将其与现有的 KD 研究相结合。双关系知识蒸馏架构是自监督训练的，同时还利用加权软化输出使学生模型能够从教师模型中捕获更丰富的知识。为了证明我们方法的有效性，我们在 ISIC 2019（皮肤病皮肤镜图像的大规模开放访问基准）上进行了实验。实验表明，我们的蒸馏轻量级模型可以以最少的参数和计算要求，对 8 种不同皮肤疾病的分类任务实现高达 85% 的准确率。消融研究证实了我们的实例内和实例间关系知识集成策略的有效性。与最先进的知识蒸馏技术相比，所提出的方法在大规模皮肤镜数据库上展示了多疾病分类的改进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SSD-KD的自监督多样化知识蒸馏方法，用于轻量级皮肤病变分类，通过整合实例内和实例间关系提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有皮肤癌检测研究过度追求高精度而忽视了便携设备的计算资源限制，需开发兼顾效率与准确性的轻量化模型。
AI.method: 设计双关系知识蒸馏架构，结合实例内关系特征建模与自监督训练，利用加权软化输出增强学生模型对教师模型知识的提取能力。
AI.result: 在ISIC 2019数据集上，轻量化模型以极少参数实现85%的8类皮肤疾病分类准确率，消融实验证实关系知识整合策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SSD-KD通过统一多源知识有效提升了轻量化模型的分类性能，在大规模皮肤镜数据库中优于现有知识蒸馏技术。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SSD-KD的自监督多样化知识蒸馏方法，用于轻量级皮肤病变分类，通过整合实例内和实例间关系提升模型性能。

authors_text: Jiankun Li,Peisen Wang,Pengfei Xiong,Tao Cai,Ziwei Yan,Lei Yang,Jiangyu Liu,Haoqiang Fan,Shuaicheng Liu
title: Practical Stereo Matching via Cascaded Recurrent Network with Adaptive Correlation
title_zh: 通过具有自适应相关性的级联循环网络进行实用立体匹配
comment: This work has been accepted to CVPR2022. The project link is https://github.com/megvii-research/CREStereo
comments: This work has been accepted to CVPR2022. The project link is https://github.com/megvii-research/CREStereo
abstract: With the advent of convolutional neural networks, stereo matching algorithms have recently gained tremendous progress. However, it remains a great challenge to accurately extract disparities from real-world image pairs taken by consumer-level devices like smartphones, due to practical complicating factors such as thin structures, non-ideal rectification, camera module inconsistencies and various hard-case scenes. In this paper, we propose a set of innovative designs to tackle the problem of practical stereo matching: 1) to better recover fine depth details, we design a hierarchical network with recurrent refinement to update disparities in a coarse-to-fine manner, as well as a stacked cascaded architecture for inference; 2) we propose an adaptive group correlation layer to mitigate the impact of erroneous rectification; 3) we introduce a new synthetic dataset with special attention to difficult cases for better generalizing to real-world scenes. Our results not only rank 1st on both Middlebury and ETH3D benchmarks, outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods by a notable margin, but also exhibit high-quality details for real-life photos, which clearly demonstrates the efficacy of our contributions.
summary: With the advent of convolutional neural networks, stereo matching algorithms have recently gained tremendous progress. However, it remains a great challenge to accurately extract disparities from real-world image pairs taken by consumer-level devices like smartphones, due to practical complicating factors such as thin structures, non-ideal rectification, camera module inconsistencies and various hard-case scenes. In this paper, we propose a set of innovative designs to tackle the problem of practical stereo matching: 1) to better recover fine depth details, we design a hierarchical network with recurrent refinement to update disparities in a coarse-to-fine manner, as well as a stacked cascaded architecture for inference; 2) we propose an adaptive group correlation layer to mitigate the impact of erroneous rectification; 3) we introduce a new synthetic dataset with special attention to difficult cases for better generalizing to real-world scenes. Our results not only rank 1st on both Middlebury and ETH3D benchmarks, outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods by a notable margin, but also exhibit high-quality details for real-life photos, which clearly demonstrates the efficacy of our contributions.
abstract_zh: 随着卷积神经网络的出现，立体匹配算法最近取得了巨大的进步。然而，由于结构薄、校正不理想、相机模块不一致和各种硬情况场景等实际复杂因素，从智能手机等消费级设备拍摄的真实图像对中准确提取差异仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一套创新设计来解决实际立体匹配问题：1）为了更好地恢复精细的深度细节，我们设计了一个具有循环细化的分层网络，以从粗到细的方式更新视差，以及用于推理的堆叠级联架构； 2）我们提出了一个自适应组相关层来减轻错误纠正的影响； 3）我们引入了一个新的合成数据集，特别关注困难的情况，以便更好地推广到现实世界的场景。我们的结果不仅在 Middlebury 和 ETH3D 基准上排名第一，明显优于现有最先进的方法，而且还展示了现实生活照片的高质量细节，这清楚地证明了我们贡献的有效性。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种级联循环网络与自适应相关层相结合的立体匹配方法，旨在解决消费级设备拍摄的真实场景中视差估计的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有立体匹配算法在处理真实世界图像时，因薄结构、校正误差、设备差异等复杂因素导致精度不足，亟需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计分层循环细化网络实现从粗到细的视差更新，引入自适应分组相关层缓解校正误差，并构建包含困难案例的合成数据集提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在Middlebury和ETH3D基准测试中排名第一，显著优于现有方法，且在真实照片中展现高质量细节。
AI.conclusion: 提出的创新设计有效解决了实际立体匹配中的关键问题，为消费级设备的视差估计提供了高效且精准的解决方案。

tldr: 该论文提出了一种级联循环网络与自适应相关层相结合的立体匹配方法，旨在解决消费级设备拍摄的真实场景中视差估计的挑战。
motivation: 现有立体匹配算法在处理真实世界图像时，因薄结构、校正误差、设备差异等复杂因素导致精度不足，亟需更鲁棒的解决方案。
method: 设计分层循环细化网络实现从粗到细的视差更新，引入自适应分组相关层缓解校正误差，并构建包含困难案例的合成数据集提升泛化能力。
result: 在Middlebury和ETH3D基准测试中排名第一，显著优于现有方法，且在真实照片中展现高质量细节。
conclusion: 提出的创新设计有效解决了实际立体匹配中的关键问题，为消费级设备的视差估计提供了高效且精准的解决方案。
search_text: Practical Stereo Matching via Cascaded Recurrent Network with Adaptive Correlation 通过具有自适应相关性的级联循环网络进行实用立体匹配 With the advent of convolutional neural networks, stereo matching algorithms have recently gained tremendous progress. However, it remains a great challenge to accurately extract disparities from real-world image pairs taken by consumer-level devices like smartphones, due to practical complicating factors such as thin structures, non-ideal rectification, camera module inconsistencies and various hard-case scenes. In this paper, we propose a set of innovative designs to tackle the problem of practical stereo matching: 1) to better recover fine depth details, we design a hierarchical network with recurrent refinement to update disparities in a coarse-to-fine manner, as well as a stacked cascaded architecture for inference; 2) we propose an adaptive group correlation layer to mitigate the impact of erroneous rectification; 3) we introduce a new synthetic dataset with special attention to difficult cases for better generalizing to real-world scenes. Our results not only rank 1st on both Middlebury and ETH3D benchmarks, outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods by a notable margin, but also exhibit high-quality details for real-life photos, which clearly demonstrates the efficacy of our contributions. 随着卷积神经网络的出现，立体匹配算法最近取得了巨大的进步。然而，由于结构薄、校正不理想、相机模块不一致和各种硬情况场景等实际复杂因素，从智能手机等消费级设备拍摄的真实图像对中准确提取差异仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一套创新设计来解决实际立体匹配问题：1）为了更好地恢复精细的深度细节，我们设计了一个具有循环细化的分层网络，以从粗到细的方式更新视差，以及用于推理的堆叠级联架构； 2）我们提出了一个自适应组相关层来减轻错误纠正的影响； 3）我们引入了一个新的合成数据集，特别关注困难的情况，以便更好地推广到现实世界的场景。我们的结果不仅在 Middlebury 和 ETH3D 基准上排名第一，明显优于现有最先进的方法，而且还展示了现实生活照片的高质量细节，这清楚地证明了我们贡献的有效性。 该论文提出了一种级联循环网络与自适应相关层相结合的立体匹配方法，旨在解决消费级设备拍摄的真实场景中视差估计的挑战。 Jiankun Li,Peisen Wang,Pengfei Xiong,Tao Cai,Ziwei Yan,Lei Yang,Jiangyu Liu,Haoqiang Fan,Shuaicheng Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Aditya Golatkar,Alessandro Achille,Yu-Xiang Wang,Aaron Roth,Michael Kearns,Stefano Soatto
title: Mixed Differential Privacy in Computer Vision
title_zh: 计算机视觉中的混合差分隐私
abstract: We introduce AdaMix, an adaptive differentially private algorithm for training deep neural network classifiers using both private and public image data. While pre-training language models on large public datasets has enabled strong differential privacy (DP) guarantees with minor loss of accuracy, a similar practice yields punishing trade-offs in vision tasks. A few-shot or even zero-shot learning baseline that ignores private data can outperform fine-tuning on a large private dataset. AdaMix incorporates few-shot training, or cross-modal zero-shot learning, on public data prior to private fine-tuning, to improve the trade-off. AdaMix reduces the error increase from the non-private upper bound from the 167-311\% of the baseline, on average across 6 datasets, to 68-92\% depending on the desired privacy level selected by the user. AdaMix tackles the trade-off arising in visual classification, whereby the most privacy sensitive data, corresponding to isolated points in representation space, are also critical for high classification accuracy. In addition, AdaMix comes with strong theoretical privacy guarantees and convergence analysis.
summary: We introduce AdaMix, an adaptive differentially private algorithm for training deep neural network classifiers using both private and public image data. While pre-training language models on large public datasets has enabled strong differential privacy (DP) guarantees with minor loss of accuracy, a similar practice yields punishing trade-offs in vision tasks. A few-shot or even zero-shot learning baseline that ignores private data can outperform fine-tuning on a large private dataset. AdaMix incorporates few-shot training, or cross-modal zero-shot learning, on public data prior to private fine-tuning, to improve the trade-off. AdaMix reduces the error increase from the non-private upper bound from the 167-311\% of the baseline, on average across 6 datasets, to 68-92\% depending on the desired privacy level selected by the user. AdaMix tackles the trade-off arising in visual classification, whereby the most privacy sensitive data, corresponding to isolated points in representation space, are also critical for high classification accuracy. In addition, AdaMix comes with strong theoretical privacy guarantees and convergence analysis.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 AdaMix，这是一种自适应差分隐私算法，用于使用私有和公共图像数据训练深度神经网络分类器。虽然在大型公共数据集上预训练语言模型可以提供强大的差分隐私 (DP) 保证，但准确性损失较小，但类似的做法会在视觉任务中产生惩罚性的权衡。忽略私有数据的少数样本甚至零样本学习基线可以优于大型私有数据集上的微调。 AdaMix 在私人微调之前在公共数据上结合了少样本训练或跨模式零样本学习，以改善权衡。 AdaMix 将非隐私上限的误差增量从基线的 167-311%（平均跨 6 个数据集）减少到 68-92%，具体取决于用户选择的所需隐私级别。 AdaMix 解决了视觉分类中出现的权衡问题，其中与表示空间中的孤立点相对应的对隐私最敏感的数据对于高分类精度也至关重要。此外，AdaMix 还具有强大的理论隐私保证和收敛性分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AdaMix的自适应差分隐私算法，用于在计算机视觉任务中结合私有和公开图像数据训练深度神经网络分类器。
AI.motivation: 在语言模型中使用大规模公开数据集进行预训练可实现强差分隐私保障，但视觉任务中类似方法会导致准确率显著下降，且少量样本或零样本学习基线可能优于使用私有数据微调的方法。
AI.method: AdaMix在私有数据微调前，先利用公开数据进行少量样本训练或跨模态零样本学习，通过混合隐私数据与公开数据优化隐私-准确率权衡，并提供理论隐私保证和收敛性分析。
AI.result: 在6个数据集上，AdaMix将非隐私上限的误差增幅从基线的167-311%降低至68-92%，具体取决于用户选择的隐私级别。
AI.conclusion: AdaMix通过结合公开数据的预训练与私有数据的微调，有效缓解了视觉分类任务中隐私敏感数据与高准确率之间的矛盾，具有理论和实践价值。

authors_text: Sha Yuan,Shuai Zhao,Jiahong Leng,Zhao Xue,Hanyu Zhao,Peiyu Liu,Zheng Gong,Wayne Xin Zhao,Junyi Li,Jie Tang
title: WuDaoMM: A large-scale Multi-Modal Dataset for Pre-training models
title_zh: WuDaoMM：用于预训练模型的大规模多模态数据集
comment: Some data problems cannot be obtained
comments: Some data problems cannot be obtained
abstract: Compared with the domain-specific model, the vision-language pre-training models (VLPMs) have shown superior performance on downstream tasks with fast fine-tuning process. For example, ERNIE-ViL, Oscar and UNIMO trained VLPMs with a uniform transformers stack architecture and large amounts of image-text paired data, achieving remarkable results on downstream tasks such as image-text reference(IR and TR), vision question answering (VQA) and image captioning (IC) etc. During the training phase, VLPMs are always fed with a combination of multiple public datasets to meet the demand of large-scare training data. However, due to the unevenness of data distribution including size, task type and quality, using the mixture of multiple datasets for model training can be problematic. In this work, we introduce a large-scale multi-modal corpora named WuDaoMM, totally containing more than 650M image-text pairs. Specifically, about 600 million pairs of data are collected from multiple webpages in which image and caption present weak correlation, and the other 50 million strong-related image-text pairs are collected from some high-quality graphic websites. We also release a base version of WuDaoMM with 5 million strong-correlated image-text pairs, which is sufficient to support the common cross-modal model pre-training. Besides, we trained both an understanding and a generation vision-language (VL) model to test the dataset effectiveness. The results show that WuDaoMM can be applied as an efficient dataset for VLPMs, especially for the model in text-to-image generation task. The data is released at https://data.wudaoai.cn
summary: Compared with the domain-specific model, the vision-language pre-training models (VLPMs) have shown superior performance on downstream tasks with fast fine-tuning process. For example, ERNIE-ViL, Oscar and UNIMO trained VLPMs with a uniform transformers stack architecture and large amounts of image-text paired data, achieving remarkable results on downstream tasks such as image-text reference(IR and TR), vision question answering (VQA) and image captioning (IC) etc. During the training phase, VLPMs are always fed with a combination of multiple public datasets to meet the demand of large-scare training data. However, due to the unevenness of data distribution including size, task type and quality, using the mixture of multiple datasets for model training can be problematic. In this work, we introduce a large-scale multi-modal corpora named WuDaoMM, totally containing more than 650M image-text pairs. Specifically, about 600 million pairs of data are collected from multiple webpages in which image and caption present weak correlation, and the other 50 million strong-related image-text pairs are collected from some high-quality graphic websites. We also release a base version of WuDaoMM with 5 million strong-correlated image-text pairs, which is sufficient to support the common cross-modal model pre-training. Besides, we trained both an understanding and a generation vision-language (VL) model to test the dataset effectiveness. The results show that WuDaoMM can be applied as an efficient dataset for VLPMs, especially for the model in text-to-image generation task. The data is released at https://data.wudaoai.cn
abstract_zh: 与特定领域模型相比，视觉语言预训练模型（VLPM）通过快速微调过程在下游任务上表现出了优越的性能。例如，ERNIE-ViL、Oscar 和 UNIMO 使用统一的 Transformer 堆栈架构和大量图文配对数据训练了 VLPM，在图文参考（IR 和 TR）、视觉问答（VQA）和图像字幕（IC）等下游任务上取得了显着的效果。在训练阶段，VLPM 总是采用多个公共数据集的组合来满足大量训练数据的需求。然而，由于数据分布（包括大小、任务类型和质量）的不均匀性，使用多个数据集的混合进行模型训练可能会出现问题。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个名为 WuDaoMM 的大规模多模态语料库，总共包含超过 6.5 亿个图像文本对。具体来说，大约6亿对数据是从多个图像和标题呈现弱相关性的网页中收集的，另外5000万对强相关的图文对是从一些高质量的图文网站中收集的。我们还发布了 WuDaoMM 的基础版本，拥有 500 万个强相关图文对，足以支持常见的跨模态模型预训练。此外，我们还训练了理解模型和生成视觉语言（VL）模型来测试数据集的有效性。结果表明，WuDaoMM 可以作为 VLPM 的有效数据集，特别是文本到图像生成任务中的模型。数据发布于https://data.wudaoai.cn

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为WuDaoMM的大规模多模态数据集，包含6.5亿张图像-文本对，用于预训练视觉-语言模型（VLPMs）。
AI.motivation: 现有VLPMs依赖混合多数据集训练，但数据分布不均导致训练效果不稳定。为此，提出统一且高质量的多模态数据集以提升预训练效率。
AI.method: 从网页中收集6亿弱相关图像-文本对和5000万强相关对，发布基础版500万对数据集，并训练理解与生成模型验证数据集有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明WuDaoMM可有效支持VLPMs预训练，尤其在文本到图像生成任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: WuDaoMM为视觉-语言模型提供了高效且高质量的预训练数据，尤其适用于生成任务，并已公开数据资源。

However, due to the unevenness of data distribution including size, task type and quality, using the mixture of multiple datasets for model training can be problematic. In this work, we introduce a large-scale multi-modal corpora named WuDaoMM, totally containing more than 650M image-text pairs. Specifically, about 600 million pairs of data are collected from multiple webpages in which image and caption present weak correlation, and the other 50 million strong-related image-text pairs are collected from some high-quality graphic websites. We also release a base version of WuDaoMM with 5 million strong-correlated image-text pairs, which is sufficient to support the common cross-modal model pre-training. Besides, we trained both an understanding and a generation vision-language (VL) model to test the dataset effectiveness. The results show that WuDaoMM can be applied as an efficient dataset for VLPMs, especially for the model in text-to-image generation task. The data is released at https://data.wudaoai.cn 与特定领域模型相比，视觉语言预训练模型（VLPM）通过快速微调过程在下游任务上表现出了优越的性能。例如，ERNIE-ViL、Oscar 和 UNIMO 使用统一的 Transformer 堆栈架构和大量图文配对数据训练了 VLPM，在图文参考（IR 和 TR）、视觉问答（VQA）和图像字幕（IC）等下游任务上取得了显着的效果。在训练阶段，VLPM 总是采用多个公共数据集的组合来满足大量训练数据的需求。然而，由于数据分布（包括大小、任务类型和质量）的不均匀性，使用多个数据集的混合进行模型训练可能会出现问题。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个名为 WuDaoMM 的大规模多模态语料库，总共包含超过 6.5 亿个图像文本对。具体来说，大约6亿对数据是从多个图像和标题呈现弱相关性的网页中收集的，另外5000万对强相关的图文对是从一些高质量的图文网站中收集的。我们还发布了 WuDaoMM 的基础版本，拥有 500 万个强相关图文对，足以支持常见的跨模态模型预训练。此外，我们还训练了理解模型和生成视觉语言（VL）模型来测试数据集的有效性。结果表明，WuDaoMM 可以作为 VLPM 的有效数据集，特别是文本到图像生成任务中的模型。数据发布于https://data.wudaoai.cn 本文介绍了一个名为WuDaoMM的大规模多模态数据集，包含6.5亿张图像-文本对，用于预训练视觉-语言模型（VLPMs）。 Sha Yuan,Shuai Zhao,Jiahong Leng,Zhao Xue,Hanyu Zhao,Peiyu Liu,Zheng Gong,Wayne Xin Zhao,Junyi Li,Jie Tang cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Ruijia Cheng,Sayamindu Dasgupta,Benjamin Mako Hill
title: How Interest-Driven Content Creation Shapes Opportunities for Informal Learning in Scratch: A Case Study on Novices' Use of Data Structures
title_zh: 兴趣驱动的内容创建如何塑造 Scratch 中非正式学习的机会：新手使用数据结构的案例研究
comment: Ruijia Cheng, Sayamindu Dasgupta, and Benjamin Mako Hill. 2022. How Interest-Driven Content Creation Shapes Opportunities for Informal Learning in Scratch: A Case Study on Novices' Use of Data Structures. In CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22), April 29-May 5, 2022, New Orleans, LA, USA. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 16 pages
comments: Ruijia Cheng, Sayamindu Dasgupta, and Benjamin Mako Hill. 2022. How Interest-Driven Content Creation Shapes Opportunities for Informal Learning in Scratch: A Case Study on Novices' Use of Data Structures. In CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22), April 29-May 5, 2022, New Orleans, LA, USA. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 16 pages
abstract: Through a mixed-method analysis of data from Scratch, we examine how novices learn to program with simple data structures by using community-produced learning resources. First, we present a qualitative study that describes how community-produced learning resources create archetypes that shape exploration and may disadvantage some with less common interests. In a second quantitative study, we find broad support for this dynamic in several hypothesis tests. Our findings identify a social feedback loop that we argue could limit sources of inspiration, pose barriers to broadening participation, and confine learners' understanding of general concepts. We conclude by suggesting several approaches that may mitigate these dynamics.
summary: Through a mixed-method analysis of data from Scratch, we examine how novices learn to program with simple data structures by using community-produced learning resources. First, we present a qualitative study that describes how community-produced learning resources create archetypes that shape exploration and may disadvantage some with less common interests. In a second quantitative study, we find broad support for this dynamic in several hypothesis tests. Our findings identify a social feedback loop that we argue could limit sources of inspiration, pose barriers to broadening participation, and confine learners' understanding of general concepts. We conclude by suggesting several approaches that may mitigate these dynamics.
abstract_zh: 通过对 Scratch 数据的混合方法分析，我们研究了新手如何通过使用社区制作的学习资源来学习使用简单数据结构进行编程。首先，我们提出了一项定性研究，描述社区生产的学习资源如何创建塑造探索的原型，并可能使一些不太共同兴趣的人处于不利地位。在第二项定量研究中，我们在几个假设检验中发现了对这种动态的广泛支持。我们的研究结果确定了一个社会反馈循环，我们认为它可能会限制灵感来源，对扩大参与造成障碍，并限制学习者对一般概念的理解。最后，我们提出了几种可以缓解这些动态的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析Scratch社区中的学习资源，探讨兴趣驱动的内容创作如何影响新手在非正式学习环境中掌握数据结构的过程。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在理解社区生成的学习资源如何塑造编程学习路径，并揭示其可能对学习者参与度和知识广度产生的潜在限制。
AI.method: 采用混合方法，结合定性分析（描述社区资源塑造学习模式）与定量分析（通过假设检验验证动态规律）进行研究。
AI.result: 发现社区资源形成的社会反馈循环可能限制学习灵感来源，加剧兴趣差异导致的参与壁垒，并窄化学习者对概念的理解范围。
AI.conclusion: 建议通过多样化资源推荐、强化跨兴趣领域关联性设计等策略，缓解兴趣驱动模式带来的负面影响。

authors_text: Gašper Beguš,Alan Zhou
title: Modeling speech recognition and synthesis simultaneously: Encoding and decoding lexical and sublexical semantic information into speech with no direct access to speech data
title_zh: 同时对语音识别和合成进行建模：将词汇和词汇下语义信息编码和解码为语音，无需直接访问语音数据
abstract: Human speakers encode information into raw speech which is then decoded by the listeners. This complex relationship between encoding (production) and decoding (perception) is often modeled separately. Here, we test how encoding and decoding of lexical semantic information can emerge automatically from raw speech in unsupervised generative deep convolutional networks that combine the production and perception principles of speech. We introduce, to our knowledge, the most challenging objective in unsupervised lexical learning: a network that must learn unique representations for lexical items with no direct access to training data. We train several models (ciwGAN and fiwGAN arXiv:2006.02951) and test how the networks classify acoustic lexical items in unobserved test data. Strong evidence in favor of lexical learning and a causal relationship between latent codes and meaningful sublexical units emerge. The architecture that combines the production and perception principles is thus able to learn to decode unique information from raw acoustic data without accessing real training data directly. We propose a technique to explore lexical (holistic) and sublexical (featural) learned representations in the classifier network. The results bear implications for unsupervised speech technology, as well as for unsupervised semantic modeling as language models increasingly bypass text and operate from raw acoustics.
summary: Human speakers encode information into raw speech which is then decoded by the listeners. This complex relationship between encoding (production) and decoding (perception) is often modeled separately. Here, we test how encoding and decoding of lexical semantic information can emerge automatically from raw speech in unsupervised generative deep convolutional networks that combine the production and perception principles of speech. We introduce, to our knowledge, the most challenging objective in unsupervised lexical learning: a network that must learn unique representations for lexical items with no direct access to training data. We train several models (ciwGAN and fiwGAN arXiv:2006.02951) and test how the networks classify acoustic lexical items in unobserved test data. Strong evidence in favor of lexical learning and a causal relationship between latent codes and meaningful sublexical units emerge. The architecture that combines the production and perception principles is thus able to learn to decode unique information from raw acoustic data without accessing real training data directly. We propose a technique to explore lexical (holistic) and sublexical (featural) learned representations in the classifier network. The results bear implications for unsupervised speech technology, as well as for unsupervised semantic modeling as language models increasingly bypass text and operate from raw acoustics.
abstract_zh: 人类说话者将信息编码成原始语音，然后由听众解码。编码（产生）和解码（感知）之间的这种复杂关系通常是单独建模的。在这里，我们测试如何在结合了语音产生和感知原理的无监督生成深度卷积网络中自动从原始语音中产生词汇语义信息的编码和解码。据我们所知，我们引入了无监督词汇学习中最具挑战性的目标：一个网络必须学习词汇项的独特表示，而不能直接访问训练数据。我们训练了几个模型（ciwGAN 和 fiwGAN arXiv:2006.02951）并测试网络如何对未观察到的测试数据中的声学词汇项目进行分类。支持词汇学习以及潜在代码和有意义的词汇下单位之间的因果关系的有力证据出现了。因此，结合了产生和感知原理的架构能够学习从原始声学数据中解码独特的信息，而无需直接访问真实的训练数据。我们提出了一种技术来探索分类器网络中的词汇（整体）和词汇下（特征）学习表示。这些结果对无监督语音技术以及无监督语义建模都有影响，因为语言模型越来越多地绕过文本并根据原始声学进行操作。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究如何在无直接语音数据访问的情况下，通过结合生成对抗网络同时建模语音识别与合成，实现词法和次词法语义信息的编码与解码。
AI.motivation: 传统语音模型通常将编码（生成）与解码（感知）过程分离，而本文旨在探索一种无需人工标注数据的无监督学习框架，以自动建立语音信号与语义表示之间的关联。
AI.method: 采用深度卷积生成对抗网络（ciwGAN和fiwGAN），通过融合语音生成与感知机制，从原始语音信号中学习词法和次词法语义的潜在表示，并利用分类器网络验证语义表征的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明网络能够从未见过的测试数据中分类词法单元，且潜在编码与有意义的次词法单元存在因果关系，证明了无监督学习下语义表征的可学习性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无监督语音技术及直接基于语音的语义建模提供了新思路，展示了生成模型在脱离文本标注情况下处理语音语义潜力。

The results bear implications for unsupervised speech technology, as well as for unsupervised semantic modeling as language models increasingly bypass text and operate from raw acoustics. 人类说话者将信息编码成原始语音，然后由听众解码。编码（产生）和解码（感知）之间的这种复杂关系通常是单独建模的。在这里，我们测试如何在结合了语音产生和感知原理的无监督生成深度卷积网络中自动从原始语音中产生词汇语义信息的编码和解码。据我们所知，我们引入了无监督词汇学习中最具挑战性的目标：一个网络必须学习词汇项的独特表示，而不能直接访问训练数据。我们训练了几个模型（ciwGAN 和 fiwGAN arXiv:2006.02951）并测试网络如何对未观察到的测试数据中的声学词汇项目进行分类。支持词汇学习以及潜在代码和有意义的词汇下单位之间的因果关系的有力证据出现了。因此，结合了产生和感知原理的架构能够学习从原始声学数据中解码独特的信息，而无需直接访问真实的训练数据。我们提出了一种技术来探索分类器网络中的词汇（整体）和词汇下（特征）学习表示。这些结果对无监督语音技术以及无监督语义建模都有影响，因为语言模型越来越多地绕过文本并根据原始声学进行操作。 该论文研究如何在无直接语音数据访问的情况下，通过结合生成对抗网络同时建模语音识别与合成，实现词法和次词法语义信息的编码与解码。 Gašper Beguš,Alan Zhou cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Chenxin Xu,Weibo Mao,Wenjun Zhang,Siheng Chen
title: Remember Intentions: Retrospective-Memory-based Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: 记住意图：基于回顾性记忆的轨迹预测
abstract: To realize trajectory prediction, most previous methods adopt the parameter-based approach, which encodes all the seen past-future instance pairs into model parameters. However, in this way, the model parameters come from all seen instances, which means a huge amount of irrelevant seen instances might also involve in predicting the current situation, disturbing the performance. To provide a more explicit link between the current situation and the seen instances, we imitate the mechanism of retrospective memory in neuropsychology and propose MemoNet, an instance-based approach that predicts the movement intentions of agents by looking for similar scenarios in the training data. In MemoNet, we design a pair of memory banks to explicitly store representative instances in the training set, acting as prefrontal cortex in the neural system, and a trainable memory addresser to adaptively search a current situation with similar instances in the memory bank, acting like basal ganglia. During prediction, MemoNet recalls previous memory by using the memory addresser to index related instances in the memory bank. We further propose a two-step trajectory prediction system, where the first step is to leverage MemoNet to predict the destination and the second step is to fulfill the whole trajectory according to the predicted destinations. Experiments show that the proposed MemoNet improves the FDE by 20.3%/10.2%/28.3% from the previous best method on SDD/ETH-UCY/NBA datasets. Experiments also show that our MemoNet has the ability to trace back to specific instances during prediction, promoting more interpretability.
summary: To realize trajectory prediction, most previous methods adopt the parameter-based approach, which encodes all the seen past-future instance pairs into model parameters. However, in this way, the model parameters come from all seen instances, which means a huge amount of irrelevant seen instances might also involve in predicting the current situation, disturbing the performance. To provide a more explicit link between the current situation and the seen instances, we imitate the mechanism of retrospective memory in neuropsychology and propose MemoNet, an instance-based approach that predicts the movement intentions of agents by looking for similar scenarios in the training data. In MemoNet, we design a pair of memory banks to explicitly store representative instances in the training set, acting as prefrontal cortex in the neural system, and a trainable memory addresser to adaptively search a current situation with similar instances in the memory bank, acting like basal ganglia. During prediction, MemoNet recalls previous memory by using the memory addresser to index related instances in the memory bank. We further propose a two-step trajectory prediction system, where the first step is to leverage MemoNet to predict the destination and the second step is to fulfill the whole trajectory according to the predicted destinations. Experiments show that the proposed MemoNet improves the FDE by 20.3%/10.2%/28.3% from the previous best method on SDD/ETH-UCY/NBA datasets. Experiments also show that our MemoNet has the ability to trace back to specific instances during prediction, promoting more interpretability.
abstract_zh: 为了实现轨迹预测，以前的方法大多采用基于参数的方法，将所有看到的过去-未来实例对编码为模型参数。然而，通过这种方式，模型参数来自所有可见实例，这意味着大量不相关的可见实例也可能参与预测当前情况，从而干扰性能。为了在当前情况和所看到的实例之间提供更明确的联系，我们模仿神经心理学中的回顾性记忆机制，并提出了 MemoNet，这是一种基于实例的方法，通过在训练数据中寻找类似场景来预测智能体的运动意图。在 MemoNet 中，我们设计了一对记忆库来显式存储训练集中的代表性实例，充当神经系统中的前额皮质，以及一个可训练的记忆寻址器来自适应地搜索记忆库中类似实例的当前情况，充当基底神经节。在预测过程中，MemoNet 通过使用内存寻址器来索引内存库中的相关实例来调用以前的内存。我们进一步提出了一个两步轨迹预测系统，第一步是利用 MemoNet 预测目的地，第二步是根据预测的目的地完成整个轨迹。实验表明，所提出的 MemoNet 在 SDD/ETH-UCY/NBA 数据集上比之前的最佳方法将 FDE 提高了 20.3%/10.2%/28.3%。实验还表明，我们的 MemoNet 能够在预测过程中追溯到特定实例，从而提高可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于回顾性记忆的轨迹预测方法MemoNet，通过检索训练数据中的相似场景来预测智能体的运动意图。
AI.motivation: 传统参数化方法将所有历史实例编码进模型参数，导致大量无关实例干扰当前预测，影响性能。
AI.method: 设计包含两个记忆库的MemoNet架构，通过可训练的记忆寻址器检索相似实例，采用两阶段预测系统先预测目的地再生成完整轨迹。
AI.result: 在SDD/ETH-UCY/NBA数据集上，FDE指标分别提升20.3%/10.2%/28.3%，且具备追溯具体实例的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: MemoNet通过聚焦相关实例显著提升轨迹预测精度，同时增强模型的可解释性。

authors_text: Yu Zhan,Fenghai Li,Renliang Weng,Wongun Choi
title: Ray3D: ray-based 3D human pose estimation for monocular absolute 3D localization
title_zh: Ray3D：基于光线的 3D 人体姿态估计，用于单眼绝对 3D 定位
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel monocular ray-based 3D (Ray3D) absolute human pose estimation with calibrated camera. Accurate and generalizable absolute 3D human pose estimation from monocular 2D pose input is an ill-posed problem. To address this challenge, we convert the input from pixel space to 3D normalized rays. This conversion makes our approach robust to camera intrinsic parameter changes. To deal with the in-the-wild camera extrinsic parameter variations, Ray3D explicitly takes the camera extrinsic parameters as an input and jointly models the distribution between the 3D pose rays and camera extrinsic parameters. This novel network design is the key to the outstanding generalizability of Ray3D approach. To have a comprehensive understanding of how the camera intrinsic and extrinsic parameter variations affect the accuracy of absolute 3D key-point localization, we conduct in-depth systematic experiments on three single person 3D benchmarks as well as one synthetic benchmark. These experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art models. Our code and the synthetic dataset are available at https://github.com/YxZhxn/Ray3D .
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel monocular ray-based 3D (Ray3D) absolute human pose estimation with calibrated camera. Accurate and generalizable absolute 3D human pose estimation from monocular 2D pose input is an ill-posed problem. To address this challenge, we convert the input from pixel space to 3D normalized rays. This conversion makes our approach robust to camera intrinsic parameter changes. To deal with the in-the-wild camera extrinsic parameter variations, Ray3D explicitly takes the camera extrinsic parameters as an input and jointly models the distribution between the 3D pose rays and camera extrinsic parameters. This novel network design is the key to the outstanding generalizability of Ray3D approach. To have a comprehensive understanding of how the camera intrinsic and extrinsic parameter variations affect the accuracy of absolute 3D key-point localization, we conduct in-depth systematic experiments on three single person 3D benchmarks as well as one synthetic benchmark. These experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art models. Our code and the synthetic dataset are available at https://github.com/YxZhxn/Ray3D .
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于单目射线的 3D (Ray3D) 绝对人体姿态估计，并使用校准相机进行估计。根据单眼 2D 姿势输入进行准确且可推广的绝对 3D 人体姿势估计是一个不适定问题。为了应对这一挑战，我们将输入从像素空间转换为 3D 标准化光线。这种转换使我们的方法对相机内在参数变化具有鲁棒性。为了处理野外相机外在参数的变化，Ray3D 显式地将相机外在参数作为输入，并对 3D 位姿射线和相机外在参数之间的分布进行联合建模。这种新颖的网络设计是 Ray3D 方法具有出色通用性的关键。为了全面了解相机内在和外在参数变化如何影响绝对 3D 关键点定位的精度，我们对三个单人 3D 基准以及一个综合基准进行了深入的系统实验。这些实验表明我们的方法明显优于现有的最先进模型。我们的代码和合成数据集可在 https://github.com/YxZhxn/Ray3D 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单目相机的绝对3D人体姿态估计方法Ray3D，通过将像素空间转换为3D归一化光线以提高鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 单目2D姿态输入下的绝对3D人体姿态估计存在相机内外参变化导致的挑战，需设计对参数变化鲁棒的通用方法。
AI.method: 将输入2D姿态转换为3D归一化光线，显式引入相机外参作为输入，并联合建模3D姿态光线与相机外参的分布关系。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集和一个合成数据集上的实验表明，Ray3D显著优于现有最先进方法，代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: Ray3D通过光线建模与参数联合分布学习，有效解决了相机参数变化带来的挑战，实现了高泛化性的绝对3D姿态估计。
